C: 「未学经商，先学做人。求知若渴，终身学习。」 ——「富家翁」维奥提斯 家财万贯的「富家翁」维奥提斯死后，他留下的只言片语被奉为生意经，在千年间被贩夫走卒争相传阅。人们总是好奇这位来自异乡、身无长物的少年是如何白手起家，在奥赫玛打下一片天地的，而每每被问及这个问题，维奥提斯总会提及那场不幸的灾祸。 「我始终相信，塔兰顿对每个人都是公平的。」 ——「商行公民代表」维奥提斯 维奥提斯仍是少年时，故乡被黑潮吞没，只身投奔身在奥赫玛的同胞兄弟阿提卡斯。只是扎格列斯向来爱捉弄倒霉之人，途中他遭盗匪抢劫，一刀刺入胸膛，一刀砍中臂膀。好在有猎户经过，救下了他的性命。尽管性命无忧，这场灾祸却给他留下了困扰多年的病症。 「悦纳自己的缺陷。适时的遗忘能让你更专注于自己的目标。」 ——「树庭失忆诊疗首席资助人」维奥提斯 维奥提斯跌落溪谷捡回性命，却也失去了一切记忆。受昏光庭院救治被问及自己是谁时，他只是喃喃自语「阿提卡斯」。依照这个线索，人们找到了他的兄长阿提卡斯。后者对他悉心照料，慢慢告诉他此前经历，症状才略有恢复。 此后，维奥提斯仍饱受失忆症困扰。或许因为回忆都从兄长的口述中得知，在病症发作时，他甚至分不清自己究竟是阿提卡斯还是维奥提斯。 「兄弟合作总要拆伙。我的奋斗历程中，从未依靠过兄弟的权势。」 ——「刻法勒圣殿特许供应商」维奥提斯 维奥提斯的兄长阿提卡斯其时已是大司铎座下最受厚望的学徒，在大司铎病逝后，他继任司铎，宣布著名的「永昼预言」。但维奥提斯却并未乘势领受圣职，而是选择自己打拼。 他在云石市集租下店铺，起早贪黑整整三年，攒下一万利衡币。再加上兄长阿提卡斯资助的三十万利衡币，他的第一个当铺终于开张了。 「诚信不蚀本，虔诚助盈利。」 ——「黎明云崖终身宾客」维奥提斯 动荡的岁月使维奥提斯在当铺中谋得第一笔资金。随后，他组织商队，垄断了城邦间的木材和橄榄油贸易，赚取了用之不竭的财富。奇怪的是，兄长阿提卡斯因病英年早逝后，维奥提斯的失忆症愈加严重。他在谵妄中自称阿提卡斯，并能将刻法勒谕言倒背如流。 这种奇异的现象使他开始笃信泰坦。每年，他抽取利润的六十分之一作为贡金献给刻法勒，直到逝世为止。
E: "Before learning to do business, learn to be a good person. Stay hungry for knowledge, and never stop learning." by Viotis the Wealthy The immensely wealthy Viotis left behind only a few words after his death, which were revered as business wisdom and eagerly passed around by merchants and commoners alike for a millennium. People have always been curious, how did this foreign-born youth who grew up impoverished manage to build an empire from scratch and carve out his legacy in Okhema? And whenever asked this question, Viotis would always mention that fateful disaster. "I have always believed that Talanton is fair to everyone." by Viotis, Merchant Guild Representative When Viotis was still a young boy, his homeland was consumed by the black tide, forcing him to flee alone to seek refuge with his compatriot brother, Atticus, in Okhema. However, Zagreus always took delight in tormenting the unfortunate. Along the way, Viotis was ambushed by bandits, with one blade piercing his chest and another slashing his arm. Fortunately, a passing hunter saved his life. Though he survived, the trauma left him with an ailment that troubled him for many years. "Embrace your flaws. Timely forgetting allows you to focus more on your goals." by Viotis, Chief Benefactor of the Grove Amnesia Clinic Viotis tumbled into a ravine and barely survived, but in doing so, he lost all his memories. When he was taken in and treated at the Twilight Courtyard, he could only mutter a single name "Atticus." Following this clue, people managed to locate his elder brother, Atticus. The latter cared for him diligently, slowly recounting his experiences until his condition showed improvement. Even after that, Viotis continued to suffer from amnesia. Perhaps because all his memories came from his brother's retelling, during episodes of his condition, he could no longer distinguish whether he was Atticus or Viotis. "Brotherly partnerships always end in separation. Throughout my journey, I have never relied on my brother's influence." by Viotis, Licensed Supplier of the Kephale Sanctuary Viotis's elder brother, Atticus, was already the most promising apprentice under the High Priest. After the High Priest's passing, Atticus succeeded him and announced the famous "Prophecy of Eternal Day." However, Viotis did not seize the opportunity to accept a sacred position. Instead, he chose to forge his own path. He rented a shop in the Marmoreal Market, working tirelessly for three years to save up ten thousand Balance Coins. With the addition of three hundred thousand Balance Coins from his brother Atticus's support, he was finally able to open his first pawnshop. "Integrity never leads to loss, and devotion brings profit." by Viotis, Lifetime Guest of the Dawncloud The turbulent times allowed Viotis to secure his first fortune through his pawnshop. He then organized trade caravans, monopolizing the timber and olive oil trade between city-states, amassing an inexhaustible wealth. Strangely, after his elder brother Atticus passed away prematurely due to illness, Viotis's amnesia worsened. In his delirium, he referred to himself as Atticus and could recite the Oracles of Kephale fluently. This strange phenomenon led him to become a devout believer in the Titans. Every year, he set aside one-sixtieth of his profits as tribute to Kephale, a practice he upheld until his death.

C:
对这些漫步深空星海之中的神秘存在，人们知之甚少。受限于有穷的认知，智慧生命只能依稀觉察星神们踏足于凡物无从窥见的命途，并凭借某种理念行使其不可估量的伟力。最终，在口耳相传的神话里，星神们成了高度凝聚的哲学概念之化身。

若有人能踏上星神所执掌的命途，便将禀受其遥远的感应，犹如穿越银河光年投来的瞥视。许多人认为：这已是星神与凡人能产生的唯一交集。
E:
People know very little about the mysterious existence that dwells in the vast stellar seas. With the limitation of knowledge, intelligent lifeforms can only faintly discern that Aeons tread upon paths imperceptible to mortal beings and execute unfathomable powers via some form of belief. In the end, the Aeons became an embodiment of highly condensed concepts of philosophy through the word of mouth spread of their legends.

If anyone finds themselves treading on the Path of an Aeon, they will be inundated by a distant sensation, like being struck by a gaze from light-years across the cosmos. Many believe that this is the only connection the Aeons and mortals can ever have.

C: 「哲思者仰望星河，探求文明的终极目标——『筑墙，』雄浑的回声响彻脑海：『筑墙。』」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 天彗星墙、亚空晶壁、巨引源基盘的砌造者，崇拜者称其「琥珀王」。其为更古老的「黄昏战争」的幸存者。 祂知晓大敌的吞噬迫在眉睫。因此不得不以光年为单位铸造障壁加以封印，隔绝保护尚有生机的世界。
E: "The philosopher gazes upon the stars trying to find the ultimate goal of civilization — 'Build a wall.' A majestic voice echoed in his head. 'Build a wall.'" — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith The builder of the Celestial Comet Wall, the Subspace Crystalline Barrier, and the Great Attractor Base. Followers call THEM the "Amber Lord," one of the oldest and most tenacious Aeons, having survived the "Dusk Wars." Aware of the imminence of THEIR mortal enemy's devouring, the Amber Lord forged a powerful light-years-long seal that would isolate and protect the living worlds.

C: 「如果正午的天边浮现了黑影，闭紧你的房门——那不是提前到来的夜色，而是饥肠辘辘的虫群。」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 塔伊兹育罗斯，又称「虫皇」、「沙王」，寰宇蝗灾的创造者。 作为统治大地的鞘翅目的最后一员，孤独的渴望点燃了祂的命途。塔伊兹育罗斯化为自我复制的恐怖，无尽繁衍的荒潮。祂——或者说——祂们横行诸界，直到命运以某种方式阻止了祂的前进。
E: "Hurry and shut your doors and windows if shadows appear at the noontide horizon, for that is no early dusk but the hungering Swarm." — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith Tayzzyronth, also known as the Imperator Insectorum, the Sand King, and the creator of the Swarm Disaster. As the last member of the Coleoptera that rules the land, THEIR Path was ignited out of a desire born from loneliness. Tayzzyronth metamorphosed into a self-duplicating horror, a torrent of infinite propagation. Tayzzyronth — Tayzzyronths rather — fluttered across the worlds until THEIR advances were halted by fate in some way.

C: 「我知道的你也知道，我不说的你也不说，我是什么？」 ——谜语大师巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉 「神秘」的追随者才人辈出，「谜语人」更是个中翘楚。他们曾是殿堂诗人、光影画家、变相师或秘学僧侣，在各自的领域栩栩生辉，却在接触了星神之后，变为一群口出胡言，书写妄语的莫名其妙之徒。 虚构史学家致力于历史的神秘化，而「谜语人」醉心于破坏语言的确定性；用来言词表意的文字在「谜语人」的口中逐渐模糊。他们解构文本，创造喻象，变换语序，篡改含义，将原本精确的语言变得面目全非。 谜语人虽不如虚构史学家那样大张旗鼓，但其所作所为仍然对现实宇宙造成了潜移默化巨大的影响。如今银河中已难寻纯粹精准的语言，原因何在？这是谜语人留下的又一个谜语。
E: "You know what I know, and you don't say what I don't say. What am I?" — Riddler Baden Babbibalo Bala Enigmata has a large number of followers, with The Riddlers being a prominent group. They were once palace hall poets, chiaroscuro painters, masters of disguise, or occult monks. While having reached great heights in their respective fields, after coming into contact with the Aeons, they turned into an incomprehensible group of people who spouted ridiculousness and wrote falsehoods. Where the History Fictionologists are devoted to the mystification of history, the Riddlers are obsessed with destroying the certainty of language. Words used to express meaning are gradually obfuscated in the mouths of the Riddlers. They deconstruct texts, abuse metaphors, change word orders, tamper with semantics, and transform an otherwise precise language into something beyond recognition. While the Riddlers are not as prominent as History Fictionologists, their actions still have a subtle yet huge impact on the current universe. Why is it so hard to find a pure and precise language in the cosmos these days? That is another riddle left by the Riddlers.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C:
虔信者，战士，求知之人，迷途客…总有凡人于有意或无意间踏入由「星神」执掌的命途，从此成为践行其理念的「命途行者」。

「命途行者」们演绎着千百种不同的人生。他们随处可见，却又鹤立鸡群：区别于浑浑噩噩、立场飘忽的常人，「命途行者」受某种信条或自身欲望的驱使，踏上了志坚行苦的生命征途。

对于行走在自身执掌的命途之上的凡人，星神往往不闻不问。但祂们因赞许或悲悯偶尔投下的一瞥，却足以被追随者奉为至宝。
E:
Devotees, warriors, seekers of knowledge, lost travelers... There are always mortals who, intentionally or otherwise, set foot on the Paths ruled by Aeons. Those who do so came to be known as Pathstriders that carry out the Path's will.

Pathstriders live thousands of different lives. They can be seen everywhere, yet stand out a cut above the rest. Different from regular people living in confusion and without a firm allegiance, Pathstriders are driven by precepts or their own desires as they embark on a life of determination and hard work.

The Aeons usually ignore those mortals who walk upon THEIR Paths. But the infrequent glances THEY cast — be it in approval or pity — are enough to be highly treasured by THEIR followers.

E: Semifinals

C: 司机，我还没上车呢
E: Driver, I haven't gotten in yet!

C: 百无一用，是我…酒囊饭袋，也是我……
E: Useless. That's me... Worthless... that's also me...

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 推进开拓任务获得
E: Obtained by progressing the Trailblaze Mission

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 宇宙、银河列车、星神、星核……你思索着当下的处境。名为三月七的少女突然出现，与你搭话。
E: The universe, Astral Express, Aeon, Stellaron... You were reflecting on your predicament while a young girl, introducing herself as March 7th, appeared out of nowhere and began talking to you.

C: 列车即将跃迁，你在沙发上闭眼等待，关于匹诺康尼的诸多记忆在你思绪中飞掠。而当你再次睁眼时，却发现自己身处陌生的梦中。
E: As the Express prepared to warp, you closed your eyes on the sofa and waited. Memories of Penacony flashed through your mind. But when you opened your eyes again, you found yourself in a strange dream.

C: 在最后的指尖一触后，万维克随神主日化作金光消散，星期日则重塑自身天环。「在这第八日，我赐予自身——『启程』。」
E: After the final touch of his fingertips, Wonweek dissolved into golden light with The Great Septimus, while Sunday reforged his halo. "On this eighth day, I grant myself — Departure."

C: 末日兽来袭，姬子认为应尽快带你离开空间站。你们另寻它路前往最近的月台，<color=#f29e38ff>瓦尔特</color>会前来接应你们。
E: Doomsday Beast attacked, and Himeko believed that you should leave the space station as soon as possible. You took a detour to the nearest railway platform, where <color=#f29e38ff>Welt</color> was going to pick you up.

C: 列车途径<color=#f29e38ff>雅利洛-VI</color>，因星轨被「星核」阻塞而被迫无限期停靠。姬子将「开拓」任务交给三月七、丹恒和你，以解除「星核」危机。
E: The Express passed by <color=#f29e38ff>Jarilo-VI</color>. The star rail was blocked by a Stellaron and had to stop there indefinitely. Himeko assigned the trailblaze mission to March 7th, Dan Heng, and you, in order to stop the Stellaron crisis.

C: 布洛妮娅与希儿谈论各自的童年经历。布洛妮娅想要将上下层再度联结，并向可可利亚诘问历史真相。希儿愿意支持布洛妮娅的决定。
E: Bronya and Seele shared memories of their childhood. Bronya expressed her wish to reunite the Overworld and the Underworld, and to confront Cocolia for the historical truth. Seele promised she'd stand by her.

C: 你们靠近「建木玄根」，丰饶神迹的所在之处，其受龙力遏制而形成龙的姿态。现在，丹恒将揭开最后的封印。
E: You approached the Roots of the Arbor, where the divine traces of Abundance resided. They were restrained by the power of the dragon and formed the appearance of one. Now, Dan Heng can finally break the last seal.

C: 你在梦境与现实的夹缝中苏醒，被黄泉与黑天鹅唤醒，意识到过去的经历皆源自<color=#f29e38ff>「太一之梦」</color>。
E: You woke in the gap between dreamscape and reality. You were woken by Acheron and Black Swan, and realized that all of your past experiences were from <color=#f29e38ff>Ena's Dream</color>.

C: 自称缭乱忍侠的<color=#f29e38ff>乱破</color>与众多小猴对峙，提醒你不要被邪祟的妖术所迷惑。乱破请你咬紧牙关，她将以一记手刀助你脱险。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Rappa</color>, who called herself the Dazzling Ninja, confronted the small monkeys and warned you not to be deceived by the fiendlings' spell. Rappa asked you to brace yourself, as she would help you snap out of it with a karate chop.

C: 风堇来到浴场。你经介绍得知风堇是「神悟树庭」的讲师助理，也是「昏光庭院」的首席护理师，已经完成治疗奥赫玛伤员的支援工作。
E: Hyacine arrived at the baths. You learned she served as an assistant lecturer at the Grove of Epiphany, as well as the chief healer of the Twilight Courtyard. She had just finished her relief work of treating the wounded from Okhema.

C: 在最后的送别，白厄感谢万敌帮助打败盗火行者。万敌则认为战斗还未结束，劝白厄向前看，看向等待被拯救的一整个世界。
E: In their final farewell, Phainon thanked Mydei for helping him defeat his archenemy, the Flame Reaver. Mydei warned him that the battle was far from over. He advised Phainon to look forward, and remember that there was a whole world behind him waiting to be saved.

C: 经由熔合刻法勒灵魂的渎神之举，那刻夏揭示「再创世」的真相：<color=#f29e38ff>背负火种的黄金裔将成为未来的泰坦，「负世」以其记忆重塑新世界。</color>
E: Through the blasphemous act of fusing his soul with Kephale, Anaxa proved the truth of "Era Nova": <color=#f29e38ff>The Chrysos Heirs who carry the Coreflames today would become the Titans of tomorrow, with the carrier of the Coreflame of "Worldbearing" reconstructing the new world through their memories.</color>

C: 你在冥界的花海中醒来。遐蝶将指引你重返生者的世界，自己则留在冥界履行神职。她请你带回「死亡」的火种，完成逐火之旅。
E: You awakened in the nether realm's field of flowers. Castorice guided you back to the world of the living, while she stayed behind to fulfill her divine duty. She tasked you with returning the Coreflame of "Death" and completing the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 原来，桑博因为帮了花火的忙，如愿拿回了自己的「面具」。因为雅利洛-VI的大灾，他选择登上舞台。
E: It turned out Sampo had finally retrieved his mask after helping Sparkle. Due to the catastrophe on Jarilo-VI, he chose to step back into the spotlight.

C: 星槎海码头的一角，银枝已在此等候多时。
E: At a corner of the Starskiff Haven pier, Argenti had been waiting there for quite some time.

C: 驭空发来消息，星槎海各处巷道中都有狼形生物在高速移动。飞霄动员云骑军严阵待敌，决不让步离人的袭击得逞。
E: Yukong sent a message that lupine creatures were moving fast through the ports of Starskiff Haven. Feixiao mobilized the Cloud Knights to prepare for battle, determined not to let the borisin attack succeed.

C: 击败可可利亚后，你们分头行动。希儿负责保护布洛妮娅返回上层区，你与三月七、丹恒则将胜利的消息带往下层区。三月七对你因被「存护」瞥视而获得的力量感到好奇，丹恒认为瓦尔特或许对此有所了解，等处理完雅利洛事务后可以与瓦尔特谈谈此事。
E: After defeating Cocolia, your group parted ways. Seele was tasked with protecting Bronya on her return to the Overworld, while you, March 7th, and Dan Heng headed to the Underworld to deliver news of the victory. March 7th, intrigued, asked about the power you'd gained when the Preservation laid eyes on you. Dan Heng suggested that Welt might know more about it. Once everything on Jarilo was wrapped up, it might be time to have that conversation.

C: 似乎运气没有站在你这边，拍出来的照片不尽人意。为表纪念，三月七将照片送给希露瓦和克拉拉，当作列车组的临别礼物。
E: Unfortunately, fate didn't quite favor your lens — the pictures came out a bit off. Still, March 7th handed them to Serval and Clara, a parting gift from the Crew.

C: 流萤的记忆发出疑问：「机甲…？！为什么……」她似乎被迫变更行进路线，耐人寻味的「机甲」或许与萨姆相关。
E: Firefly's memory questioned: "Mecha...!? Why..." She was seemingly forced to change her route. The peculiar "mecha" might be related to SAM.

C: 流萤的记忆述说着：「总算回到大堂了，这样就……」她以为自己逃出生天了，但这是流萤遇袭前的最后记忆。
E: Firefly's memory stated: "Finally back at the lobby. If that's the case..." She thought that she found a way out, but this was the last memory before Firefly was ambushed.

C: 砂金所说的「事实」就在这扇门后，他请你屏住呼吸，拭目以待。此时此刻，恰如彼时与砂金在客房内对峙。你推开房门，走入其中。
E: The "truth" that Aventurine spoke of was behind this door. He told you to hold your breath and look forward to it. This moment resembled the time when you confronted Aventurine in the guest room. You opened the door and walked into the room.

C: 你与列车组众人讨论两起凶案，得知家族希望列车组协助调查凶案真相。经过商议，你们决定同时与家族、砂金合作，尽力找寻凶手。
E: You discussed the two murders with the Crew and learned that The Family wanted your help to investigate those killings. After some negotiation, all of you decided to simultaneously cooperate with The Family and Aventurine to find the murderer.

C: 姬子与你们谈论下一步行动，提议返回现实酒店，核实流萤与知更鸟的情况。瓦尔特称梦境中有些令他在意的事，稍后他会与你们会合。
E: Himeko discussed what to do next, proposed everyone return to the hotel in reality to verify Firefly and Robin's situation. Welt mentioned that there were some things in the dreamscape that concerned him, and would share them with everyone after regrouping.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，守卫的心情变为「悲伤」。他低下高贵的头颅向你们求情，求求你们不要从这里过去。
E: Under the effects of Clockwork, the guard's feelings turned to "sadness." He lowered his head, once so proud, and begged for you not to pass through.

C: 加拉赫称，在哈努努解放监狱后，阿斯德纳的未来仍然岌岌可危。历史上的「钟表匠」与家族合作，才将此地打造为匹诺康尼。「钟表匠」受到橡木家系迫害，被迫出走，由此成为「同谐」的叛徒。加拉赫认为，流萤的死一定和「钟表匠的遗产」有关。
E: Gallagher added, after Hanunue had been let out of prison, Asdana's future was still in peril. The Watchmaker in history worked with The Family to construct this place into Penacony. The Watchmaker was attacked by the Oak Family and forced to leave, becoming a traitor to Harmony. Gallagher believed that Firefly's death must be related to the Watchmaker's Legacy.

C: 知更鸟称自己的失声是美梦崩溃的信号之一，家族中出现了「同谐」的背叛者。在揭开真相之前，知更鸟愿意放弃登上谐乐大典的舞台。
E: Robin said her loss of voice was one of the signs of the sweet dream's collapse, and that a traitor to the Harmony had appeared within The Family. Until the truth came to light, Robin was willing to give up her chance to perform on the stage of the Charmony Festival.

C: 星期日称星核就是匹诺康尼大剧院本身，完成这一切的则是「梦主」。瓦尔特将代表星穹列车，同星期日、知更鸟前往与「梦主」对峙。
E: Sunday explained that the Stellaron was none other than the Penacony Grand Theater itself, and that the one who orchestrated it all was the Dreammaster. Welt declared that he would represent the Astral Express and accompany Sunday and Robin to confront the Dreammaster.

C: 花火再次出现，以匹诺康尼的现状挑衅星期日与知更鸟，指出梦境并不美好。花火将最后两枚按钮送给兄妹二人。
E: Sparkle reappeared to provoke Sunday and Robin by pointing out the flaws in Penacony's dreamscape, showing that the dreamscape wasn't so beautiful after all. She handed the final two buttons to the siblings.

C: 加拉赫悼念米哈伊尔，坦露旧情与愤懑，举杯致意后默然退场。
E: Gallagher mourned for Mikhail, revealing his old sentiments and grudges, then disappeared silently after raising a toast.

C: 托帕察觉猎犬守卫身份可疑，得知近期有人散播可疑按钮，疑点重重。
E: Topaz sensed that the Bloodhound Guard's identity was suspicious, and her suspicions only increased when she learned someone had been distributing the strange buttons lately.

C: 波提欧无奈表示发现<unbreak>217</unbreak>个假炸弹娃娃，你们吐槽过后还要继续努力。
E: Boothill exasperatedly indicated that he found <unbreak>217</unbreak> fake bomb dolls. After complaining about it, you still need to keep looking.

C: 乱破要求「蕉授」正面迎战，勿再逃窜。「蕉授」却称上课时间未到，请别心急。
E: Rappa demanded Profnana to face her head-on and stop running away. Profnana retorted that class time hadn't started yet, so there was no need to be hasty.

C: 从阿格莱雅与缇宝的对话中，你得知缇安正在追踪尼卡多利所在的悬锋城。阿格莱雅带领你与丹恒去看赠予你们的谢礼。
E: From Aglaea and Tribbie's conversation, you learned Trianne was tracking down Nikador at Castrum Kremnos. Aglaea then took you and Dan Heng to see a gift she'd prepared for you.

C: 你的回答没有取得阿格莱雅的信任，处刑如期而至。千钧一发之际，白厄赶到涡心，与遐蝶一同为你们作担保，阿格莱雅不再追究泄密。
E: Your answers didn't win Aglaea's trust, and she prepared to execute you. Just in time, Phainon hurried to the Vortex and, with Castorice, spoke up for you, convincing Aglaea to let the leak go.

C: 阿格莱雅认为应当于隐秘情况下解决危机。遐蝶提出带领你去谒见「岁月」泰坦，希望能在往昔找到尼卡多利欺瞒死亡的真相。
E: Aglaea wanted to solve the crisis quietly. Castorice suggested taking you to meet the Time Titan, hoping to discover how Nikador had cheated death in the past.

C: 你们调查发声的雕像，自称「卡吕普索」的魂灵从中飞出。她对树庭的情况了如指掌，并声称那刻夏尚未死灭，邀你们前去王座瞧瞧。
E: From the singing statue you examined emerged a spirit calling herself Calypso. Intimately familiar with the Grove, she insisted Anaxa still lived, bidding you come to the Throne to see for yourselves.

C: 你将「金枝誓言」的一瓣放入池中，成功启动水车。卡吕普索透露，需要你们扫除树庭的黑潮，为她夺回正身，她才能以真面目示人。
E: You placed a petal of the Golden Bough of Vows into the pool, successfully activating the water wheel. Calypso revealed that only by cleansing the black tide from the Grove and reclaiming her true form could she show you her real identity.

C: 阿格莱雅询问你对于围猎计划的看法。缇宝负责用「百界门」将你们送往战场，白厄会誓死保护你的安全，而万敌此刻正处理另一难题。
E: Aglaea asked for your opinion on the entrapment plan. Tribbie would use the Century Gate to send the team to the battlefield. Phainon swore to protect you with his life, while Mydei was dealing with another problem elsewhere.

C: 你与白厄面见阿格莱雅，得知当下尚未找到堪任「岁月」神职的黄金裔。由于你曾与欧洛尼斯建立起特殊联系，迷迷建议让你来试一试。
E: You and Phainon met with Aglaea, and learned that she had not yet found a Chrysos Heir worthy of bearing Oronyx's divinity. Since you previously established a special connection with Oronyx, Mem suggested that you give it a try.

C: 瑟希斯称赞黎明云崖的壮丽，来古士向到访的泰坦表示欢迎。在等待凯妮斯一派前来会晤的间隙，那刻夏与瑟希斯可在附近随意游览。
E: Cerces praised the beauty of Dawncloud, and Lygus welcomed the visiting Titan. While waiting for Caenis and the others to arrive, Cerces and Anaxa were free to explore the vicinity.

C: 那刻夏看到先前所见的灵体讨论名为「卡厄斯」的半神，但瑟希斯对此毫无印象。那刻夏猜测自己所见并非幻觉，而是某人灵魂的样貌。
E: Anaxa saw the gathered souls discussing a demigod named "Khaos," whom Cerces had no recollection of. Anaxa guessed that what he saw was not an illusion, but the manifestation of someone's soul.

C: 赛飞儿猫咪大开口，欲让遐蝶以高价赎回礼物。赛飞儿邀请你们去她的住处谈生意，为了确保你会来，还顺手偷走了你的「神血蜜露」。
E: Cipher impishly demanded that Castorice pay an exorbitant price for the gift to be returned. To ensure your cooperation, she even swiped your Dew of Divine Blood, then casually invited you to her place to talk business.

C: 来古士拦截黑塔，称自己曾沐浴「智识」瞥视，缠绕翁法罗斯的第三条命途是「毁灭」，若黑塔强行突破，将释放出一位<color=#f29e38ff>「绝灭大君」</color>。
E: Lygus stopped Herta. He claimed that, just like her, he had basked in the gaze of the Erudition, and revealed that the third Path entangled with Amphoreus was the Destruction. If Herta attempted to invade Amphoreus anyway, she would unleash a <color=#f29e38ff>Lord Ravager</color> upon the cosmos.

C: 在征伐「天空」泰坦艾格勒之前，风堇回到树庭。作为天空一族的后人，「天空」的黄金裔，她缅怀自己在地面的生活回忆。
E: Before searching for the Aquila, the Sky Titan, Hyacine returned to the Grove. As a descendant of the Sky people and the Chrysos Heir of "Sky," she wanted to commemorate her memories of her life on the ground.

C: 你们在黎明云崖高台完成集结，即将踏上讨伐「天空」的征程。风堇吟唱祷言，以天空赐福创造出连接天地的彩虹桥。
E: You gathered at the highest point of Dawncloud, and prepared to embark on a war against the "Sky." Hyacine recited a prayer, and with the blessings of the Sky, created a rainbow bridge to reach the heavens.

C: 凯撒遇刺，凶手正是剑旗。海瑟音感到茫然，若翁法罗斯的一切皆为虚妄，那征程还有何意义？待到「救世主」归来，就让宴会结束吧。
E: The Imperator was assassinated by none but the Gladius herself. Hysilens felt lost. If everything in Amphoreus was futile, what had the warring campaign been for? When the Deliverer returned, let the feast come to an end.

C: 跃迁前夜，三月七向你和丹恒分享在贝洛伯格取得的纪念品笔记本。三月七希望你们好好练习拍照技术，而她会将照片记录在手账上。
E: On the night before the warp jump, March 7th shared a souvenir notebook from Belobog with you and Dan Heng. She encouraged you both to practice photography while she recorded the photos in her journal.

C: 你与丹恒见到形如「翁法罗斯」的壁画。丹恒认为长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
E: You and Dan Heng discovered murals resembling Amphoreus. Dan Heng believed that what lay sleeping beneath the ground might be Amphoreus's final Path: "the Remembrance."

C: 黑天鹅触碰一位窃忆者，发现维持这具法身的心识已经消失。或是被干净利落地处理，或是献祭了自身。
E: Black Swan touched a Memosnatcher, discovering that the consciousness maintaining this dharmakāya had vanished... Either cleanly disposed of, or sacrificed willingly.

C: 幼年白厄的身影不知所踪。昔涟注意到道路旁的金色若虫，推知他已经先一步奔向自己的命运。
E: Young Phainon was nowhere to be found. Cyrene noticed the golden nymph by the road and realized that he had already been running toward his destiny.

C: 娜塔莎听闻了养父去世的消息，她强忍悲痛，与养母和管家商讨了为下层区提供药物援助一事，随后便又要与家人匆匆离别。
E: Upon hearing the news of her adoptive father's death, Natasha held back her grief as she discussed providing medical aid to the Underworld with her adoptive mother and the Butler, before having to bid a hasty farewell to her family once again.

C: 眼前的裂解幻影，正是前任大守护者可可利亚的意志凝结的回响。
E: The shadows in the Fragmentum before us were the resonance formed by the will of Cocolia, the former Supreme Guardian.

C: 刃想起了镜流当年教他学剑的第一日。
E: Blade recalled the first day Jingliu had taught him swordsmanship.

C: 云骑队长称，逃窜的步离人是在劫掠公司货船时被朱明使节舰击溃并收押。在即将转运去幽囚狱时，步离囚犯们突然暴起作乱。
E: According to the Cloud Knight Captain, the fleeing borisin were captured after being vanquished by the Zhuming diplomatic vessel while raiding an IPC freight skiff. The borisin prisoners suddenly revolted just as they were about to be transferred to The Shackling Prison.

C: 太卜司恢复秩序后，符玄感谢捉鬼小队的帮助，并允许你们自行编写这次「灵异事件」的调查报告。
E: With order restored to the Divination Commission, Fu Xuan expressed gratitude to the ghost-hunting squad for your help and authorized you to create your personal report regarding the "paranormal incident."

C: 「罗浮杂俎」上出现了与青雀有关的帖子。
E: A post about Qingque appeared on Ghostly Grove.

C: 实名上网
E: RealName_Online

C: 潮流•忍徒
E: Trendy Ninja

C: 家人来仙舟啦？互粉一下，有机会合作啊。
E: You're at Xianzhou? Let's follow each other. Maybe we can collab sometime.

C: 「全世矩阵」无名泰坦大墓
E: "Universal Matrix" Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan

C: 冲上去帮忙，演出由我来守护！
E: Charge up to help. I shall protect the performance!

C: 用交通事故试试安全性。
E: Test safety with a traffic accident.

C: 你念了一段经修好了摩托车。
E: You fix the motorcycle by reciting a prayer.

C: 师父，请给我剑！
E: Master, give me the sword!

C: 你记得电视机就是这么修好的。
E: You recall that's how you fixed the TV.

C: 你仔细盯着窗户，没人能逃过你的视线。
E: You stare at the window diligently. No one can escape your sight.

C: 公司的妙妙工具一定不会让人失望呀~
E: The IPC's all-purpose tools will surely not disappoint!

C:
在斯诺兰德的雪原上流传着属于猎人们的生存铁则：在「荒神」捕食的期间，绝对不能去山岭的南面，那位撼山震岳的白色巨熊不欢迎任何人。

作为协会指派的猎人，休格收到救援信号赶往岭南，未曾想到会遭遇到一场计划已久的埋伏。

从漫长的枪击休克中醒来之后，休格立刻意识到自己曾在生死关前躲过一劫；但在下一秒，休格就立刻意识到，危机并未过去，他正处在「荒神」的注视下。即便掌击再近再快，「荒神」毫无章法的攻击也未必能够全部命中…休格冷静地等待机会，抽出带着剧毒的骨刀，以超越常人的动作瞬间跃起，胜负就在这一瞬间逆转了。

他取下「荒神」的头颅与皮毛，在枪伤未愈的情况下，撑过了第一个风雪之夜。

多日后，猎人协会找到了无头的「荒神」遗体。那时开始，他们便知道该死去的猎人未能死去，而未曾预料的复仇者却因此诞生。
E:
The hunters' rule for surviving the Snow Plains of Snowland was simple enough — Never go to the south of the mountain during Artaius' hunting season, since that mountain-shaking white bear did not welcome anyone.

As the hunter sent by the association, Hugh went to the south of the mountain after receiving the rescue call. Never did he expect to walk right into an ambush long in the planning.

After waking up from a long shock induced by gunshots, Hugh immediately realized he just barely escaped death. However, he also realized his plight was far from over, for Artaius was staring right at him. Despite the short range and fast pace, some of Artaius' messy attacks were bound to miss... Hugh calmly waited for an opening, then he whipped out his bone blade soaked in poison and jumped up for an extraordinary strike in the blink of an eye. Their positions as the predator and the prey were reverted.

After removing Artaius' head and fur, he managed to survive the first night in snow despite his untreated gunshot wounds.

Days later, the Hunters Association located Artaius' the headless corpse. It was then they realized the hunter who was supposed to die had survived, and an unforeseen avenger was born.

C: 纯美骑士纵横星海的时代，全宇宙都为他们的风采所倾倒；这群追寻着美的高贵骑士身着光耀照人的金银甲胄，肩披丝线与星光织就的华美战袍，在头盔之下，是俊美有如天神的绝代容颜。即使在「纯美」已然消逝的现代，那些曾经一睹骑士风华的人们依然相信伊德莉拉终将归来。
E: The entire universe bowed before the grace of the Knights of Beauty while they still traversed the skies. These noble knights who chased beauty wore resplendent gold and silver armor, and donned magnificent robes woven from silk and starlight. They had divinely beautiful features under their helmets. Even in the current era when the Beauty had already faded, those who had once witnessed the magnificence of the knights still believe Idrila will one day return.

C: 为什么宇宙里的智慧种族，大多是灵长目人科？每当技术研发部的定期会议结束，斯蕾琪卡都会陷入深深的自卑。她将人类的外貌锚定为外显性状，用药物注射改变了自身形态。她的呼吸孔被皮肤堵住，脏器和骨骼被强制拉伸，一刻不停的痛苦让她终于在外貌上成为了人类，可崭新的皮囊迎来的，只有蔑视的目光。在斯蕾琪卡的鼓吹下，前来成为人类的顾客络绎不绝，这并非是她体验到了人类的好处，只是单纯希望，能有更多人和她共享这份痛苦。
E: Why is it that the majority of intelligent species in the universe are primates? Whenever the periodical Technology Department meetings come to an end, Slejka would fall into a deep inferiority complex. She used injections of drugs to alter her external physical form, aiming for that of a human. Her breathing holes were covered with skin and her organs and bones were forcibly stretched, but this endless pain allowed her to gain the appearance of a human. However, this new look of hers was unfortunately met with disdain and contempt. With Slejka's encouragement, an endless queue of sentient beings came forth to change their appearance so they could look more human. However, this was not because transforming into a human held any particular benefit to her. It was purely because she wanted more people to share this pain with her.

C: 从某种角度说，信奉雅努斯的祭祀和信奉扎格列斯的盗贼有相通之处——他们都喜欢研究各种各样的门，只不过前者使用学术，后者使用盗术。于是这件传说能开启所有大门的神器成为两派争夺的焦点，直到一代神偷吕科斯在雅努斯神殿偷到此物，并且以身试法，证明了门的另一侧只能通向随机位置，盗贼们才对它失去了兴趣。
E: From a certain perspective, the priests of Janus and the thieves of Zagreus share a common interest — their study of all sorts of doors. The difference lies in their methods: The former approaches them through scholarship, while the latter relies on the art of thievery. This is why a legendary artifact said to unlock all doors became a point of contention between the two factions. The struggle continued until the master thief Lykos managed to steal it from the Temple of Janus. Seeking to test its power, he discovered that the artifact indeed opened any door, but only to a random location on the other side. With this revelation, the thieves quickly lost interest.

C: 在同一世纪内，同一颗星球上同时诞生了三名被智识星神瞥视的天才——#7柏环、#8拉姆和#9克莱恩，因此该时代被称为「黄金年代」。据传三人间曾展开一场爱情喜剧，在此期间天才俱乐部#9克莱恩曾制作一枚人造陨石球送给#7柏环，陨石球表面坐落着由其复刻的「博识之眼」。
E: Within the span of a century, three geniuses who drew the gaze of the Erudition Aeon were born on the same planet. They were Bohdan #7, Lambda #8, and Klein #9. Hence, this epoch was known as the "Golden Age." Rumor has it that something of a romantic comedy unfolded between the trio, as during this time, Klein — #9 of Genius Society — once created a man-made meteorite for #7, Bohdan, and upon the meteorite's surface existed a replica of the Eye of Erudition.

C: 你是说，那个结课率堪比星际和平娱乐盲盒出货率的拉帝奥教授，给你打了及格？别吹牛了。\n……\n你不会是认真的吧？

C: 觐见之骰•存护
E: Audience Die: Preservation

C:
快看！我挖到了织书神机的一枚齿轮，
我的祖先曾有幸觐见那台机器。
它矗立在皮翁立山脉的峡谷，
日夜不停地为人们复制知识。
青铜浇灌的身躯高耸入云，
黄金淬炼的织线千丝万缕。
书页如瀑布般倾泻而下，
连最偏远的城邦都能溅射到智慧的水花。
只要神机愿意，它吐出的书籍甚至可以盖满大地，
可惜啊可惜，
本应该是所有城邦共同的财富，却毁于利欲熏心。
每个国王和城主都想得到它，哪怕只是一部分，
这枚小小的齿轮，便是它被人撕裂的残肢。
E:
Look! I've dug up a gear of the Book-Weaving Divine Machine.
My ancestors were fortunate enough to behold that magnificent machine.
Looming in the valley of the Pioli mountains,
It tirelessly copied knowledge for humanity, day in and day out.
Its towering bronze frame soared skyward,
Adorned with intricate gold threads.
Pages cascaded down like a waterfall,
Spreading the wisdom even to the remotest city-states.
If the divine machine willed it, the books it produced could cover the earth.
Alas,
This shared treasure of all city-states was ruined by greed.
Kings and lords all coveted it, even just a fragment.
This mere gear is a piece of its shattered limb, torn apart by humanity.

C:
疲惫的远途者，你是否愿意登上我们的长船，
别看这艘船其貌不扬，它能渡往所有人的归乡。
船身取自哀地里亚的枯木，万年不腐，
帆布同样坚韧无比，还受过某位泰坦的祝福。
我们曾经尾随悬锋城的征伐路线航行，
沿途拯救失去家乡的难民。
也曾驰骋在黑潮的巨浪上，
打捞无辜的万千生灵。
现在请坐稳了，长船即将扬帆起航，
请塞纳托斯唤来冥界的风，我们这就去见他。
E:
Wayworn traveler, will you brave our longship?
This salt-crusted relic ferries all wayward souls home.
Hewn from Aidonia's unrotting withered trees,
sails tough beyond comparison, and even once received a certain Titan's blessing.
We once trailed Castrum Kremnos' warpath,
plucking refugees who had lost their homeland.
We've surfed the roaring waves of the black tide,
netting thousands of innocent lives from drowning depths.
Brace yourself — the longship stirs.
May Thanatos summon the winds from the nether realm, for we come seeking their audience.

C: 自灭者的火种
E: Kindling of the Self-Annihilator

C: 超验之镜（其三）
E: Mirror of Transcendence (III)

C: 在黄昏战争前，混沌星云膨胀所产生的爆炸碎屑可以作为饵料，其特有的宇宙尘埃芳香能够吸引到古兽前来觅食。但在这场覆界浩劫之后，「碎星芳饵」似乎失去了其原有作用，无论学者如何研究改造饵料，都再没有人能够成功寻得古兽身影。
E: Before the Dusk Wars, the exploded fragments born out of the expansion of disordered nebulas could be used as lures, and their unique aroma of cosmic dust could attract Leviathans to feed on them. However, the Shattered Star Bait seems to have lost its original effectiveness after that catastrophic disaster. No matter how much scholars researched and modified the lure, no one was ever able to glimpse the form of the Leviathans again.

C: 为解决愈发严峻的肥胖与健康问题，阿塔忒博士研发出了营养管理机。它不仅能吸收主人过剩的营养将其储存，还能够过滤大气中的无害颗粒用以合成食物。可谁也没想到，因为合成食物的效率过高，没管住嘴巴的消费者们体重不降反升。铺天盖地的投诉让阿塔忒博士彻夜难眠，整个人都瘦了一圈。
E: Doctor Atarte invented a nutrition management machine to confront the increasingly dire challenge of obesity. Not only can this machine absorb excess nutrition from its owner and save these calories elsewhere, but it can also filter out the harmless particles in the atmosphere to synthesize food. However, no one expected the consumers would instead gain weight, as the synthesized foods were too efficient and caused the users to keep eating. The overwhelming complaints made Doctor Atarte lose sleep for days at a time, losing a large amount of weight.

C: 在超距遥感通讯诞生以前，虫群间的信息素通讯，被视为宇宙中最高效的沟通手段。寰宇蝗灾时期，一伙狩猎蠧役的赏金猎人活捉了落单的残照蛰虫，将它们改造为前线的通讯工具。在不同程度的刺激下，无视距离的信息素感应会实时改变蛰虫的颜色，实现简单信息的传递。凭借这套密码体系，赏金猎人们在战场上越战越勇，直到他们和信息素引来的残照王虫面对面撞了个正着。
E: Before the creation of ultraremote sensing, pheromone communication among the Swarm was considered the most effective form of communication in the universe. During the Swarm Disaster, a group of bounty hunters that pursued worker bugs captured lone Afterglow Stings and modified them into frontline communications devices. With varying levels of stimulation, pheromone sensors that ignore distance would cause the insect to change color in real time and allow for simple information exchange. With this secret code, the bounty hunters became more and more courageous on the battlefield, until they came face-to-face with the Afterglow Swarm King attracted by the pheromones.

C: 用于「调和星际矛盾」的投票箱，根据使用者的意愿，你能从中得到任何东西。以太编辑的病毒代码，破坏力惊人的袖珍枪械，一支特米微型人组成的飞船舰队，甚至包括一张白旗。尽管它们总是突兀地出现在星际战场的各个角落，以「均衡」的名号高呼和平万岁，但正如所有人都知道它们出自假面愚者之手一样，自称「和平」的箱子也从来不会带来和平。
E: A ballot box used to mediate interstellar conflict. According to the user's wishes, you could obtain pretty much anything from within. An aether-edited virus code, a portable firearm with massive destructive power, a fleet of spaceships built by the tiny Thermians, white flag inclusive. Though they regularly pop up incongruously across all corners of interstellar theaters of war, proclaiming peace in the name of Equilibrium, these boxes calling themselves Peace will never bring peace — Just like how everyone knows they are the work of the Masked Fools.
