C:
汇报人：弗朗西斯科•德比斯基
汇报对象：「翡翠」
汇报内容：组长述职

「翡翠」女士：

这应该是我最后一次通过系统向您递交述职报告了。时光荏苒，转眼间我已在战略投资部工作了半个琥珀纪，也经过一路摸爬滚打才爬升到如今的位置；虽算不得功成名就，但至少也为我的家庭积攒了足够几代人过上安逸生活的财富，我已别无他求。在此，也要特地感谢「翡翠」女士您一直以来给予第一六六市场组的大力支持。

言归正传，我在这次述职报告中将不再对第一六六市场组的近期工作内容和业绩多做赘述，以上内容在本组的工作月报中均有体现。这篇报告的唯一目的是向您引荐我组内的一名员工：███•████。

关于███•████的事迹和业务表现，想必您多少有所听闻。我在系统附件中附上了她的述职文件、以及组内多名员工对她的综合考评文档，供您参阅。尽管年纪尚轻，但███已经表现出了非凡的业务能力、管理思维和意志品质。我毫不怀疑，如果由她来接任第一六六市场组组长的职责，本组的营收和项目成功率将会更上一个台阶。我也有理由相信，以███展现出来的潜力，她的职场生涯绝不会就此止步，她未来必将在更大的舞台上大展宏图。以上，在我退居二线之后，希望您能多多关照███•████——诚如战略投资部一贯的主张：人才是最重要的投资，我相信她早已步入您的视线之中。

战略投资部第一六六市场组
弗朗西斯科•德比斯基
E:
Reporter: Francisco Dvorski
Reportee: Jade
Report Content: Team Lead Work Report

Madam Jade:

This should be the last time I send you a work report through the system. Time flies. In the blink of an eye, I've already worked for half an Amber Era at the Strategic Investment Department, and only managed to climb to my current position through many trials and hardship. I may not be able to call myself distinguished, but I have at least gathered enough wealth for the next few generations of my family. I desire nothing else. Here, I would like to specifically thank the phenomenal support you've constantly given to Marketing Team <unbreak>166</unbreak>, Madam Jade.

Anyway, I will not waste any time presenting the recent deliverables and outcomes achieved by Marketing Team <unbreak>166</unbreak> in this work report. Those results can be seen from the monthly job report filed by the team. The only purpose of this report is to recommend a particular member of my team to you: ███ ████.

I trust that you have heard of ███ ████'s experiences and achievements in some fashion or another. I have included in the system her work reports and the comprehensive feedback given by multiple personnel in the team, for your perusal. Though she is still young, ███ has demonstrated exceptional business acumen, managerial thinking, strength of character and ability to perform under pressure. I have no doubt that, if she were to assume the leadership responsibilities of Marketing Team <unbreak>166</unbreak>, this team's profits and project success rate will be significantly elevated. I also believe that ███'s career will most certainly not stop here, not with the potential she has shown so far. She will definitely rise to bigger and better things in the future. Therefore, once I retire to the backlines, I hope you would be able to look out for ███ ████ — We here at the Strategic Investment Department have always believed that talent is the best investment, and I trust that you already have had your eyes on her.

Marketing Team <unbreak>166</unbreak>, Strategic Investment Department
Francisco Dvorski

C: 「戴斯特……」 「怎么了，德比斯基先生？」 「要不，你就先吃吧？我看不会有人来了。」 「没关系，我还不饿。怎么说这也是您的欢送会，还是再等等吧。」 「呵呵…我最知道这帮小崽子的德性了。一个个的，每天脑子里就只有工作，搞钱…怕是早就把我这个老领导给忘得一干二净了。」 「…我很遗憾，德比斯基先生。我本来以为，至少叶琳娜会……」 「——欸，别叫那个名字了，现在要叫『托帕』。真想不到啊，那姑娘竟然真成了他们的一员……」 「不服不行啊戴斯特，像我这种老顽固，再干几辈子都不可能沾到那个位置的边。人家已经是另一个世界的人咯，怎么可能有空来参加这样的小聚会？」 「您谦虚了，我觉得…啊，有人敲门——您别动，我去开。」 「…是谁啊，戴斯特？我这老花眼，有人站在我跟前都看不清……」 「抱歉，先生，没人来…是有人捎来了一封信。」 「噢…这样啊。谁寄来的，这么隆重？明明发条信息就可以了嘛……」 「信封上没有署名。您稍等，我念给您听吧——」 「亲爱的德比斯基先生：感谢您一路以来的厚爱和栽培！没有您的关照，就绝对不会有我的今天。实在抱歉，我现在远在泰科铵出差，不便参与您的退休欢送会。等到这桩项目结了，我一定会抽出一天时间来探望您。对了，我记得您的爱好之一就是机动球——我会从泰科铵给您带纪念品回来的。您永远忠诚的，小叶琳娜。」 「……」 「德比斯基…先生？您…哭了？」
E: "Destor..." "What's wrong, Mr. Dvorski?" "Maybe... you can start with the food? I don't think anyone is coming." "It's okay. I'm not hungry yet. This is your farewell party, after all. Let's wait for a bit longer." "Haha... I know what these brats are like. All of them only think about working and earning money... They've probably forgotten about their old leader ages ago." "...I'm very sorry, Mr. Dvorski. I originally thought that at least Jelena would..." "...Hey, don't use that name. Now you need to call her 'Topaz.' Honestly, I never imagined that she would become one of them..." "You've gotta acknowledge her achievements, Destor. Stubborn old bones like me won't get anywhere near that position even if I worked here for a few more lifetimes. She's already a part of a different world. How would she possibly have the time to come to this small party?" "You're being too humble. I feel that... Ah, there's a knock on the door! Stay where you are. I'll get it." "...Who is it, Destor? My eyesight is getting worse in my old age. I can't even tell who they are even if they're standing right in front of me..." "I'm so sorry, sir. No one came... It was just a letter being delivered." "Oh... I see. Who's the letter from? Such formality. They could have just sent an electronic message..." "There's no name written on the envelope. Hold on. I'll read the letter to you —" "Dear Mr. Dvorski, Thank you for your constant support and help over the years! I would definitely not be where I am today without your care and mentorship. I offer my deepest apologies for being unable to attend your retirement farewell party — I am currently working abroad at Taikiyan. Once this project is over, I will definitely take a whole day off and go visit you. Also, I seem to recall that you are into Roboball — So I'm going to bring back some souvenirs for you from Taikiyan. Yours Faithfully Forever, Jelena." "..." "Mr... Dvorski? Are you... crying?"

C:
在太卜司十余年，青雀活像只人畜无害又低调的小麻雀。

顺应父母的期望捧上了铁饭碗，青雀自以为终于可以松一口气，却不知负责情报、计算和信息的太卜司实属混子们的无边苦海，就算再使劲回头也望不见涯岸。高强度的工作让青雀就此陷入煎熬，不得解脱。

然而，所谓「杀不死你的便能使你更强大」，在漫无尽期的社会人生涯中摸爬滚打，青雀已然习得了一身老油条的摸鱼功夫。部门流转来去，上级换了好几个，青雀始终是雷打不动最低职级的卜者，并且还有更低的趋势…堪称长势喜人。

只是，如今尚有两件事困扰着她。一是每年元春时都要拜见父母，谈谈自己最近的生活状况和未来的人生规划——因为她根本没有规划；二是她那行事如玉兆般精准的领导总能在她偷闲时为她加塞新活计。

青雀决心继续精进自己的时间管理功夫，以便逃离太卜司恐怖领导的追缉——可惜小麻雀哪里明白「雀算不如天算」，连她这点小心思，也在那法眼的计算内。
E:
During the ten-plus years at the Divination Commission, Qingque kept a low-key existence like a harmless little sparrow.

Following her parents' expectations and holding down a steady job, Qingque thought she could breathe a sigh of relief. However, she didn't realize that the Divination Commission — which is in charge of gathering, collecting, and sorting information — is an endless sea of misery for slackers, with no end to the effort it demands. This high-intensity work drove Qingque into torment, from which she could not escape.

However, as the saying goes, "what doesn't kill you only makes you stronger." Struggling through the endless days of being a lifelong "professional," Qingque became a seasoned slacker and learned more than a few slick tricks to loaf on the job. She's transferred throughout the departments and worked under several bosses. Every time, she's always the lowest-leveled diviner, with her numbers threatening to go even lower. It can be said that this has been... pleasing.

However, there are two things that still trouble her. One is visiting her parents during New Year for an annual catch-up, talking about life and her plans for the future — because she doesn't have any plans at all. The other is that pesky boss of hers who's more accurate than a jade abacus at piling new work on her whenever she's busted slacking off.

Qingque is determined to keep improving her time management skills and escape the terror of being pursued by her superior in the Divination Commission. What a shame that Qingque fails to understand fate supersedes her. Her every thought is well within the purview of the omniscia.

C: 「地点：匹诺康尼  时间：██年██月██日 客人：██、██、██、██ 『一份悲伤的回忆，来自██。这份鎏金般的回忆带着夸饰与渴望，它将在往后的岁月藏起隐秘的伤怀，也注定了回忆的主人将长久受此影响。』 『一份欢乐的回忆，来自██。这份戏剧般的回忆披着斑斓的色彩，欢乐，混乱，滑稽——却难以称之为幸福。它所呈现的未来，也是如此。』 『一份遗憾的回忆，来自██。这份幸福的回忆美丽而瞬息即灭，如同死火堆中飞出的流星。享受时光吧，客人，它告诉我那很快就要逝去。』 『一份模糊的回忆，来自██。这份回忆微弱、混沌且令人迷茫，就像看不见尽头、望不到结局的冷雨。我渴望捕捉它指向的明天，是雨，还是晴……』」 ——黑天鹅的回忆 「我看到一个女人的身影，在影像和图案间跳跃变形。不…我没有疯，我的确看到了『她』。我记得她的声音，那种丝绒一般的质感，我也记得她手中流光溢彩的纸牌，好像有什么魔力似的…噢，对了，她还邀请我占卜。她说，『不管你是想占卜幸福、灾难、失物还是意外所获…我只需你付出一个真实的故事——因为过去和未来本是同一个圆上的同一个点。』我的脑袋晕乎乎的，她真温柔，我和她说了好多好多，只记得她很耐心的听完了我说的胡话…然后，根据她的占卜，我替酒店的客人找到了她的镜子！噢，你问我向她说了什么——没什么重要的，不过是一些关于过去的传言……」 ——一位匹诺康尼本地人的回忆 如今，她以占卜师的身份，穿梭于不同的世界，追索与命途，与星神有关的记忆。她相信，那些记忆坚硬如宝石，即便遗忘也无法彻底消磨它们。 「很多忆者都去过匹诺康尼，但一无所获，他们说那只是水面上一场浮华的梦。」 「但梦…亦是记忆的一种变形。趁着那些窃忆者和焚化工还没到来，我会潜入深海，一睹残骸。」
E: Location: Penacony Date: ██/██/██ Guests: ██, ██, ██, and ██ "A sorrowful memory from ██. This opulent memory, adorned with ostentation and longing, conceals an unknown sadness that will linger for years, influencing its owner for an extended period." "A joyous memory from ██. This dramatic memory is filled with vibrant hues of joy, confusion, and humor, but it can hardly be called true happiness. Such is the future it portrays." "A regrettable memory from ██. The fleeting happiness in this memory is beautiful yet short-lived, like a shooting spark from faded ashes. Cherish your limited moment, dear guest, for it informs me that it shall soon vanish." "A vague memory from ██. This memory is faint, chaotic, and disorienting, akin to an endless downpour with no respite in sight. I yearn to capture the future it points to, whether it be filled with rain or sunshine..." — Black Swan's memories "I saw the figure of a woman, gracefully leaping and transforming amidst images and patterns. No... I'm not crazy, I did indeed see 'her.' I remember her voice, its velvety texture, and the colorful cards in her hands, imbued with some sort of magic... Oh, and she invited me to partake in fortune-telling. She said, 'Whether you want to foresee happiness or misfortune in the future, retrieve lost possessions, or seek unexpected gains... All I need is an honest story, for the past and the future are overlapped on the same point of a single circle.' My head spun, and she exuded such gentleness. I talked so much to her, and she patiently listened to my ramblings... And then, following her divination results, I retrieved a lost mirror for a guest of the hotel! Oh, you asked what I said to her? Oh, nothing important... Just some rumors about the past..." — A native Penacony resident's memories Currently, she journeys through various realms as a diviner, uncovering memories intertwined with her Path and Aeons. She believes that those memories are as enduring as gems, impervious to the eroding forces of oblivion. "Numerous Memokeepers have ventured to Penacony, only to discover it as a mere illusory mirage dancing upon the water's surface." "However, dreams... They represent a distorted form of memories. I shall delve into its depths and catch a fleeting glimpse of the buried memories before those Memosnatchers and Cremators arrive."

C: 银河忍法帖之缭乱破魔传•试炼节点：忍侠之道是为何道 >>系统初始化>> >>用户缭乱•忍侠接入完成>> >>忍者等级验证中>> >>欢迎进入属于你自己的忍者•游戏！>> 试炼系统：这是你成为缭乱忍侠之后第三十三场战斗，你追猎御猿•邪忍的足迹，从他的邪恶之手中拯救出一个个世界。 试炼系统 ：你看着眼前被自己炸毁的地窖，阳光穿透墙洞，春风第一次涌入这个巨大的洞穴。 试炼系统：眼前是一个被「御猿•邪忍」蒙骗二十年的军•火村。生活于地下的村民认为外界充满战争，甘愿退化成为制造武器的工具。 试炼系统：咿呀！但你完全了解居民的真实想法。他们依赖那个战争的谎言，以筑成内心虚假的幸福与满足感。 试炼系统：因此，他们对未来充满怀疑。 当地居民：「当我们相信地上战争未止，而我们却能在安全地举行婚礼与葬礼时，我们因享受了他人难得的生活而感到幸福。」 当地居民：「当我们被告知地上的军队需要靠『地下』的武器制造来赢下战争时，我们因同样有生而为人的价值而感到幸福。」 当地居民：「你说战争早已结束？过去的生活是军火商的谎言？那、那这20年我们付出的一切是为了什么！？」 系统消息：忍者正在被不明真相的当地居民质问。 系统消息：忍者的士气缓慢下降。 试炼系统：但就如所有受到御猿•邪忍残害的世界，倘若置之不顾，他们和后代终将遭受更多实验的痛苦。 试炼系统：就像曾经的你一样。 试炼系统：请问，现在的你如何选择？ 选择：        1、坚守忍道。         试炼系统：「忍侠之道，扶正祛邪。斩灭世间恶孽，是在下欲攀的高天。」         试炼系统：你使用空手道让地窖又坍塌了一面墙，更多的阳光涌了进来，有些人往里缩得更深，有些人正朝外走去。        2、弃之不顾。         试炼系统：你没有再为「真相」辩驳，你尊重他们的想法。你黯然离去，顺便解决了地上的军•火邪忍。你心想，围墙已破，他们终会被阳光吸引。 系统消息：忍者选择了【坚守忍道】。 系统消息：用户【缭乱•忍侠】经验+30000，获得可提升坚韧度上限的【缭乱•忍道】！ 试炼系统：军•火村新出生的生命以惊人的速度适应着真实世界。你欣慰地看到，他们能够幸福无忧地长大成人。 试炼系统：恭喜你，又一个村庄摆脱了邪祟——但你云游驱魔的速度，远比不上御猿•邪忍危害四方的效率。 试炼系统：你来不及有一丝疲惫，接下来，你该往何处去？
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions, Tale of Dazzling Evilbreaker – Trial Node: What way is the way of the Ninja Hero >>Initializing system...>> >>User Dazzling Ninja has logged in!>> >>Verifying ninja level...>> >>Welcome to your unique ninja game!>> Trial System: This is your thirty-third battle since you became the Dazzling Ninja. You have been chasing after Evil Ninja Osaru and liberating world after world from his evil grasp. Trial System: You gaze at the cellar that you exploded. The sunlight is piercing through the hole in the wall, the spring breeze pouring into this vast cavern for the first time. Trial System: Before you lies a firearm village that has been ensnared by Evil Ninja Osaru's deceit for two decades. The inhabitants dwelling underground believed that the surface world is engulfed in endless wars, willingly regressing themselves into tools manufacturing weapons. Trial System: Hee-ya! But you know perfectly well what the locals really think. They rely on that lie of endless wars to build a facade of happiness and fulfillment within themselves. Trial System: As a result, they are skeptical of the future. Local Resident: "When we believed that the war on the surface hadn't ended, yet we were able to live here peacefully, holding weddings and funerals in safety, we felt happy because we were enjoying a rare happiness in these troubled days." Local Resident: "When we were told that the army on the surface needed the weapons manufactured underground to win the war, we similarly felt happy because we had value as humans." Local Resident: "What? You say the war had long ended? And that everything was a lie from those arms dealers? I-if this is true, what's the meaning of everything we gave up in the last twenty years?!" System Message: The ninja is being questioned by a local resident who has been kept in the dark. System Message: The ninja's morale is slowly declining. Trial Message: However, this is simply one of the many worlds crippled by the tyranny of Evil Ninja Osaru. If you leave them unattended, they and their future generations will suffer more anguish from the experiments. Trial System: Just like you once did. Trial System: What would you do now? Your Decision: 1. Stay true to your way of the ninja. Trial System: "My way of the ninja is a sacred oath to vanquish evil and uphold justice. To cleanse this world of all corruption is the heaven that I aspire to." Trial System: Using your karate skills, you smash down another wall to the dungeon, letting more sunlight flood in. Some people retreat, seeking shelter in the darkness, while others muster their courage and step into the light. 2. Leave them be. Trial System: You choose to respect their beliefs, refrain from arguing about the "truth," and leave in sorrow. By the way, you uproot all the Evil Ninja arms dealers above ground. You believe that as the walls have been torn down, one day they will be drawn to the sunlight once more. System Message: The ninja has decided to stay true to the way of the ninja. System Message: User "Dazzling Ninja Hero" has gained 30,000 XP and obtained "Way of the Dazzling Ninja," which increases maximum Toughness! Trial System: The new generations of the village, once an arms-producing center, are adapting to the real world at an amazing rate. You are relieved to see them grow up carefree and lead happy lives. Trial System: Congratulations! You have freed another village from evil, but the rate of your travelling salvation is far slower than the havoc wrought by Evil Ninja Osaru on the universe. Trial System: You can't afford to take a breather. Where will you go next?

C: 云间城邦随岁月离析，昏光庭院再度敞开门扉，为永夜捎来微光。\n医师雅辛忒丝，守望「天空」火种的黄金裔。继承先祖的意志，缝补破裂的晨昏\n——愿虹光洒落，仇怨消融，黎明重回大地。
E: As the city-state in the clouds crumbles through time, the Twilight Courtyard opens its gates once more, bringing a glimmer of light to Evernight.\nPhysician Hyacinthia is the Chrysos Heir who watches over the Coreflame of Sky. Carrying the will of her ancestors, she mends the torn fabric of dusk and dawn.\nMay the rainbow light pour down, dissolve all grudges, and bring the dawn back to this land.

C: 北境帝国许珀耳，严寒的国土燃烧着不熄的野心。 自那无嗣的君主陨落，继位者悬空，帝国已然四分五裂，内战不止。 失去家园的难民踏上乞讨为生之路，受伤的女孩因那一头罕见的蓝发在皑皑冰雪中格外显眼。 「只有受塔兰顿赐福的王室，才有如同火焰一般飘扬的蓝发，也唯有天选之人，才能流淌金色的鲜血……」 只因偶然的一瞥，野心勃勃的贵族将乞儿收养，向外散播着流浪王女的传言。 她被带上辉煌的高台，贵族高举她的手臂，那刺破的指尖滴下如同黎明一般浓郁的金血。 台下民众眼神狂热，那灼热的期待似乎要将她一同点燃。 「从此刻起，你就是王女『刻律德菈』。」 贵族将她带入宫殿，她穿上华美沉重的服装。 「刻律…德菈？」 只因一刻犹豫，脸上火辣的刺痛几乎让她流下眼泪。 「我是，我是…刻律…德菈…… 「我是刻律德菈。 「我是。」 她忍住自己的颤抖，任由耳边的哭喊远去 ——那是上一任王女的哀嚎。 她日复一日地学习皇室礼仪，直到狭窄的束腰再也不会让她疼痛，直到她能面不改色地大声演讲—— 「王女年幼，我将摄政，统理许珀耳帝国政务。」贵族以她的名义收拢人心，将王室之权据为己有。 「反正都是任人摆弄的弃子，她扮演得还不错，可以留着。」阴影里，新任的摄政王对宰相窃笑。 幽闭的时光望不到尽头，稚龄的「王女」将目光从远方隐约的星空移开，落回眼前的棋盘。 这是她用于自保的游戏。 「骄傲的王女，你的眼睛似乎总在观察，也似乎总在隐藏，就像……」 「就像什么？」 悄然几手间，她将要抵达棋盘的边境。 「就像…将要燃起的火焰……」 老师苦笑着掷下棋子，千百次的对弈中，已没有王女无法解开的棋局。
E: Hyperborea, the Northern Empire. A frigid realm where ambition burns without end. Since the childless sovereign fell, the throne sits vacant while the empire tears itself apart in endless civil strife. Refugees who lost their homes resort to begging to survive. A wounded girl with unusual blue hair stands out starkly against the pristine snow. "Only the royal family blessed by Talanton possesses such flame-like blue hair, and only the chosen ones have golden blood flowing through their veins..." An ambitious aristocrat takes in the beggar girl simply from just a passing glance, and begins spreading rumors of a lost princess. They lead her onto a magnificent high stage where the aristocrat raises her arm high. From her pricked fingertip drips blood as golden as dawn itself. The crowd below grows wild with excitement, and that heated anticipation seemingly sets her ablaze as well. "From this day forward, you are Princess 'Cerydra'." The aristocrat leads her into the palace, where she's dressed in ornate, heavy garments. "Cery...dra?" A single moment of hesitation earns her a slap so sharp it nearly brings tears to her eyes. "I am... I am... Cery...dra..." "I am Cerydra." "I am her." She controls her trembling as distant screams fade away. — Those were the screams of the previous princess. She studies royal etiquette daily until the tight corset no longer causes pain, until she can confidently deliver speeches... "As the princess is still young, I shall serve as regent and oversee the Hyperborean Empire's affairs." The aristocrat gathers support in her name while seizing royal authority. "She's merely a pawn we can discard, but she plays her role well enough to keep around." In the shadows, the new regent exchanges knowing smirks with the chancellor. Endless days in captivity blur together as the young "princess" reluctantly abandons the distant shimmer of stars to focus on her chessboard. This is the game for her self-preservation. "Proud princess. Those eyes of yours, always watching, always hiding... They are like..." "Like what?" With barely any effort, she will soon reach the border of the chessboard. "Like a flame soon to ignite..." With a bittersweet smile, her teacher places down the final chess piece. After thousands of matches, there's no longer a chess strategy the princess has not mastered.

C: 吉奥里亚的胸膛，伏龙的身躯支撑破碎的大地，忍耐千年苦痛。\n无名客丹恒，捍卫「大地」火种的黄金裔，扶八荒之将倾，将地上生灵送往远方的天地\n——百川归海，群山合鸣，不朽的道途将绵延万里。
E: The chest of Georios, the body of the fallen dragon supporting the shattered earth, enduring millennia of pain.\nDan Heng, the Nameless and the Chrysos Heir who guards the Earth's Coreflame, steadies the world before it falls and guides all life across the land to a new home beyond.\nRivers flow to the sea, mountains echo in harmony, and the eternal path stretches ten thousand miles.

C:
>>>……
>>>0、9、3
>>>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>……
……
>>>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> = 桃子
……
光。
暖的。亮的。白的。
……
天空。
云朵，柔软。
碰碰，吹散，拨弄，再舔一舔，下雨啦。
……
花。
甜丝丝。软。像桃子。
时间的风儿，故事来了，阳光，香香的。
……
小妖精。
毛绒绒。七种声音，组合。
陪伴迷路的孩子。聪明。
……
世界。
世界是光，天空，大海，星辰，种子，花，飞鸟，希望。
世界很美好。
世界是一个故事。
桃子来了，走了。故事，还有下一个故事。
……
我，你。
你是…桃子。
我是…桃子。
你，是一个人。
你，为了很多、很多人。
我，是一个人。
我，为了很多、很多人
……

后来，你又变成了「空白」……
你不在的时候，我一直在认真思考哦！但怎么想，我也不明白——
金发的织者明明能够做出最美的衣服，为什么不让她看得见？
狮子一样的王子不会死亡，所以就必须一遍遍地受伤？
那些好多好多的红发小女孩们，为什么她们总是变得越来越少？
还有，桃子，你每次离开之后，都去哪里啦？
……
下次，请你替我解答吧？
等你♪
第<unbreak>496000</unbreak>次。
<align="right">——███的记录</align>
E:
>>>...
>>>0, 9, 3
>>>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>...
...
>>>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> = Peach
...
Light.
Warm. Bright. White.
...
Sky.
Clouds, soft.
Touch, scatter, brush, lick again, it rains.
...
Flower.
Sweet. Soft. Like a peach.
Wind of time, stories come, sunshine, fragrant.
...
Little fairy.
Fluffy. Seven voices, combined.
Accompany lost children. Clever.
...
World.
The world is the light, sky, ocean, stars, seeds, flowers, birds, hope.
The world is beautiful.
The world is a story.
Peaches came and left. Stories after stories.
...
You, me.
You are... a peach.
I am... a peach.
You are a person.
You, for many, many people.
I am a person.
I, for many, many people.
...

Later, you became "blank" again...
While you were gone, I've been thinking hard! But no matter how much I ponder, I don't understand...
The blonde weaver can produce the finest clothing, so why is she not allowed to see?
If the lion-like prince cannot die, must he suffer injuries over and over again?
All those red-haired little girls, why do they keep getting fewer and fewer?
And Peach, where do you go every time you leave?
...
Next time, will you answer these questions for me?
I'll be waiting for you ♪
For the <unbreak>496</unbreak>,<unbreak>000</unbreak>th time.
<align="right">—— ███'s Record</align>

C:
你来到了「存护之城」。
雪幕之后，风似钢剑，火种留存。
远方不会听见，大地同样震颤，只有哭喊的人们迎风而上。

外敌、寒潮、裂隙之后，溃烂始于堡垒之中。
你施予援手，却遭背弃。
有人曾看轻你，误解你，但你仍走到他们身边，寻找他们的路。
更多的人挂怀你，担心你，面向他们的苦难，为苦恼之人找到药方。
最终他们走到你的身边。

冰雪中，你恰如一团火，存护这个世界的灵魂
——即使你将日日夜夜焚烧自己。
E:
You have arrived at the "City of Preservation."
Behind the snow curtain, the wind lashes like steel blades, but the kindling burns on.
Distant lands won't hear them, and the earth trembles in kind, with only the wailing crowds braving the wind.

After facing foreign enemies, the Eternal Freeze, and reality's fissures, a rot begins to fester within the fort.
You try lending a helping hand, but are forsaken.
Some once looked down on you and misunderstood you, but still you stood by their side and helped them find their way.
More care about you and worry about you. They face their suffering, and find the cure for the distressed.
Eventually, they come to your side.

In the ice and snow, you are like a fire, protecting the soul of this world
...Even though you must scorch yourself day and night.

C: 彦卿召唤的剑阵受到的伤害大幅降低并且无法被直接击败，需要击破弱点以解除剑阵；剑阵被解除后，彦卿解除韧性保护。
E: The Sword Formation summoned by Yanqing takes significantly less DMG from all sources and can only be removed by breaking its Weakness. Once the Sword Formation is removed, remove Yanqing's Toughness Protection effect.

C: 你踏上星穹列车，结识了一群志不同道不合的同伴，好在他们的态度都还算友善。\n一段不知终点的星间流浪之旅即将开启，或许你真的在不经意间把自己卷进了某部科幻电影的拍摄片场。\n根据列车长帕姆的通报，「跃迁」即将开始——鉴于你还是个星际穿越新手，最好还是找个地方坐稳扶好吧。
E: You board the Astral Express and become acquainted with a group of companions who may not always get along, but are all at least friendly.\nA journey with an unknown destination between the stars is about to begin. Maybe you really did accidentally stumble upon some set of a Sci-Fi movie.\nConductor Pom-Pom announces that the warp jump is about to begin — seeing that you're still new to interstellar travel, best you find a seat and hang on tight.

C: 坏消息是，你的「好哥们」桑博抛弃了你，留下你独自面对银鬃铁卫戍卫官——杰帕德•朗道；好消息是，面前这位威风凛凛的军人似乎没那么死板。\n你成功说服了杰帕德，令他相信你们来自天外世界。他承诺会护送你前往贝洛伯格的大守护者之所在。\n这一切看起来是那么恰到好处…别怀疑，跟着银鬃铁卫们走就是了。
E: The bad news is that your buddy Sampo has abandoned you and left you to deal with Gepard Landau, the Silvermane Guard Captain, alone. The good news, however, is that the imposing soldier is actually quite flexible.\nYou successfully persuade Gepard by making him believe that you are from a world beyond the sky. He promises to escort you to the Supreme Guardian at Belobog.\nEverything looked perfect... There's no reason for doubt, all you have to do is follow the Silvermane Guards.

C: 鏖战过后，你们终于反应过来让丹恒出现在这八角笼里的罪魁祸首是谁，而碰巧此人并未走远。\n一场可能不那么惊心动魄的追逐即将打响。你们发誓，只要这次捉到他，就一定要把这个只会投机倒把的走私犯当场就地正法——\n…其实不会那么夸张啦，嗯。
E: After the fierce battle, you finally realize who the culprit for putting Dan Heng in this octagon is. Coincidentally, that person hasn't gotten very far just yet.\nAn uneventful pursuit is underway. You swear that if you catch him this time, you will definitely end this opportunist smuggler right where he stands...\n... Okay, maybe that's a little exaggerated.

C: 深入矿区的路途中，你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的矿民伸出援手。\n你们遇到了一伙妄图趁乱攫夺利益的流浪者…是时候让他们好好改造、重新做人了！
E: On the way deeper into the mines, you can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.\nYou run into a group of marauding vagrants taking advantage of the chaos... It's time to teach them a lesson!

C:
你们修好了报废矿车，并将它从道路上移走，打通了继续向下的道路。
此处已近矿洞底部，你注意到希儿神色警惕，眼神也变得如尖刀般锐利…
她的眼神本来就吓人，是什么能让她露出比以往更甚的表情？你不知道，但你十分清楚一件事——
危险正在迫近，你应当做好万全准备。
E:
You fix the out of order mine cart and move it out of the way, opening the path continuing downward.
This is near the bottom of the mines and you notice Seele's cautious expression and sharp gaze...
Her expression is normally scary enough already, so what is it that would make her show an even more serious look? You're not sure, but there is one thing that you are certain of...
Danger is closing in and you should make yourself prepared.

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处卖了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n你集齐了三级认证，是时候打开大门直面史瓦罗了。
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nYou've collected all three levels of certifications. It's time to open the gate and meet Svarog.

C:
在这地下的巨大空间中待的时间越长，就越难区分冷峭的岩层与天空的区别。
现在是时候重返地面了…但仅凭你们一己之力是无法实现这一宏愿的——否则你们早就爬上去了，不是吗？
「地火」的诸位代布洛妮娅向你们致意，也表示愿为你们开路…只是不能对向导过于挑剔。
做好心理建设之后就随桑博一道出发吧。
E:
The longer you stay in this giant underground space, the harder it is to differentiate between the cold rock ceiling and the sky.
It's time to return to the surface... But you wouldn't be able to without any help — because if you could, you would've already done so, isn't that right?
The members of Wildfire extends Bronya's greetings to you and are willing to guide you... But you can't be too picky about the guide.
Prepare yourself mentally and leave with Sampo.

C: 克服千难万险之后，你们终于来到了寒潮肆虐的极北之地，百年来除大守护者外无人能够踏足的古代战场。\n可可利亚与布洛妮娅就在这里的某处…你们要做的就是深入禁域，找到她们。\n那灾难的源头「星核」也在前方——做好决一死战的准备吧。
E: After overcoming numerous difficulties and dangers, you have finally come to the Far North, where the Eternal Freeze is raging. For hundreds of years, no one except the Supreme Guardian could set foot upon this ancient battlefield.\nCocolia and Bronya are here somewhere... Your mission is to go deep into the forbidden zone and find them.\nStellaron, the source of disaster, also lies ahead. Get ready for a fight to the death!

C: 明明是外宾身份，却要如梁上君子般做抉门斩关的活计。但麻烦到来时，也顾不上体面了。\n太卜司中，留守卜者们人人自危。星核带来的变数已超越了太卜司所能计算的极限。现在，该是问问太卜如何处置的时候了。
E: Though you are guests, you are now breaking down locks and gates like a group of thieves. However, there is no point in being polite when trouble is at your door.\nThe remaining diviners in the Divination Commission are all worried for their own skins. The variables brought by the Stellaron had far surpassed the limits of the Commission's calculation capacities. Now is the time to ask the master diviner about her plans.

C: 流萤如约为你买了单，接下来她将带领你前往其他知名景点打卡。虽然听起来有点走马观花，但这正是旅游的本质。
E: As agreed, Firefly pays the bill, and she will now take you to other tourist attractions. It may feel rushed and superficial, but that is the nature of playing tourist.

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——她建议你尝试一下「艾迪恩公园」的各类娱乐设施。为此，你得向这里的管理员兑换一些代币才行。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — She suggests you try out the various amusement facilities in Aideen Park. In order to do this, you will need to collect Aideen Tokens from the administrator here.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n跟随黑天鹅前往忆域的出口，同时调查这场凶杀案吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nFollow Black Swan to the Memory Zone's exit while investigating the murder scene.

C: 你已经亲眼见证了砂金口中那「足以颠覆匹诺康尼」的事实——知更鸟小姐的身体自胸口的裂痕崩解，在这座美梦中化作了泡影。\n他似乎还有话要对你说，看看他的真实意图究竟为何吧。
E: You have witnessed the truth that can "result in the collapse of Penacony" as mentioned by Aventurine... Robin's body starts to disintegrate from the crack in her chest and is eventually reduced to nothingness in the dream.\nAventurine seems to have something to say. Let's see what he has got up his sleeves.

C: 砂金以知更鸟之死为由向你发出了扳倒家族的合作邀请：并非威逼，而是利诱。尽管他为你留足了选择的余地，但你清楚人从不应该轻易做选择。\n在离开忆域之前，你还有机会和黑天鹅聊聊，参考一下她的看法。
E: Using Robin's death as an excuse, Aventurine invites you to collaborate with him in bringing down The Family. It is not coercion, but a temptation with the promise of gain. Although he leaves you with enough room to decide, you know that one should not be hasty when it comes to decision-making.\nYou still have the chance to talk to Black Swan and ask for her advice before leaving the Memory Zone.

C: 你█ █耳边的低语正变得越来越响亮，甚至还看到了另一个██ ██ █。\n希望你能坚持到登上游乐园舞台的那一刻█ ██ █。
E: The murmurs n██r your ears grow louder, more booming. You can even see another ███ ██████.\nLet's hope you can hold on until the m█ment you st█p onto the stag█ of the █m█sement pa██.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 这次的巡猎有还不错的麦芽汁、有搞笑的猴子，还有爽到漏油的派对，真他宝贝的有意思！但总感觉有点太乱来了，很多事想不通，但你上次看的电影说过…该死，那台词怎么说的来着——\n「如果一切都要解释清楚的话，这个世界就少了一丝神秘。」
E: This hunt is a blast, with tasty malt juice, hilarious monkeys, and a fudgin' awesome party! Yeah, it's a bit off the wall, and things don't always add up, but just like they say in the movie you watched last time... Dang, what was that line again...?\n"If everything can be explained, this world would lose its touch of enigma."

C: 这是什么地方？这具身体…又是谁？应该万分不安地向前走，又或回头寻找来处？
E: What is this place? ...Whose body is this? Should you power on ahead in uncertainty, or turn back to find out where you came from?

C: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
E: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

C: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
E: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

C: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
E: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。在这剑拔弩张之时，欧洛尼斯的态度却在见到{NICKNAME}后发生了转变。
E: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures. Just as the sword was being drawn, Oronyx's demeanor shifted upon noticing {NICKNAME}.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 经过一路的观察，遐蝶揭穿卡吕普索的真面目，指出其人正是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。瑟希斯承认身份，委托{NICKNAME}等人助它前往那刻夏所在之处，将火种再度熔合，以便缉拿树庭覆灭的元凶——无名的黑袍剑士。
E: After careful observation, Castorice exposes Calypso's true identity as {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Cerces admits to this and asks {NICKNAME}'s group to help them reach Anaxa, so they can fuse the Coreflame again to catch the culprit behind the annihilation of the Grove — the nameless black-robed swordmaster.

C: 为了医救城外的无名伤者，风堇暂时驻留奥赫玛，缇安、遐蝶与{NICKNAME}三人先行前往树庭——信仰{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的学术圣地。
E: With Hyacine remaining in Okhema to treat the unnamed wounded person, Trianne, Castorice, and {NICKNAME} head to the Grove — the academic sanctuary dedicated to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n你的身体在云崖圣道上攀登，灵魂却在冥河滩涂上缓行…那些亡魂与登山道重合在一起，究竟想要讲述什么……
E: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nYour body climbs the Sacred Path of Dawncloud, but your soul lingers at the shores of River of Souls... The souls along the mountain path — what do they want to tell?

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 在遐蝶权能的掩护下，万敌帮我们拖住了盗火行者的脚步，让我们得以从云崖脱身，抵达云石天宫附近。这里也同样是一片狼藉，好在奥赫玛的居民受到风堇的庇护，其时已无大碍。\n距离创世涡心只有一步之遥，得加快脚步了。
E: Shielded by Castorice's power, Mydei buys us time against the Flame Reaver, enabling our escape from Dawncloud to Marmoreal Palace. Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection.\nThe Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 翁法罗斯的千万次轮回，连同那无缘黎明的盗火者一同，即将在此刻跨入终幕。真相呈现在{NICKNAME}面前，引领着{F#她}{M#他}跨入「岁月」的起点。
E: The millions cycles of Amphoreus, along with the Flame Reaver who was denied the dawn, are about to reach its final curtain. The truth now lies before {NICKNAME}, guiding {F#her}{M#him} toward the origin point of "Time."

C: 你会踩上一颗拥有炫彩涂层的星际反物质地雷吗？同理，你会主动靠近一台明显是陷阱的电视机吗？
E: Would you step on a rainbow-coated interstellar antimatter mine? Likewise, would you go near a TV that's obviously a trap?

C: 我不是烂片导演！我是匹诺康尼史上最伟大艺术家！听懂了吗？艺术家！
E: I'm not some third-grade director! I'm the greatest artist in Penacony's cinematic history! Got it? Artist!

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 接过逐火之旅同伴的成果，承担起「负世」的职责，在海瑟音的见证下，完成「再创世」……\n不出意外的话，这便是此世旅途的终点。
E: Taking up the mantle from your Flame-Chase Journey companions, embracing the burden of Worldbearing, and completing the Era Nova under Hysilens' witness...\nIf all goes as planned, this should be the end of this life's journey.

C: 接过逐火之旅同伴的成果，承担起「负世」的职责，在海瑟音的见证下，完成「再创世」……\n不出意外的话，这便是此世旅途的终点。
E: Taking up the mantle from your Flame-Chase Journey companions, embracing the burden of Worldbearing, and completing the Era Nova under Hysilens' witness...\nIf all goes as planned, this should be the end of this life's journey.

C: 说起来，长夜月已经帮了三月七很多了…她究竟是敌是友，或许最好的方式是面对面谈谈。
E: Come to think of it, Evernight has helped March 7th quite a lot... Whether she's friend or foe, perhaps the best way to find out is to talk face to face.

C: 翁法罗斯与外界的隔绝状态被打破，三位无名客先行者成为新世界的泰坦。圣城居民向「负世」的{NICKNAME}祈祷，虔诚等待全世的神谕降临。
E: The isolation of Amphoreus has been shattered, and the three Nameless forerunners have become Titans of the new world. The holy city's residents pray to the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, devoutly awaiting the divine prophecy to descend upon the world.

C: 智械哥留下关于「墓碑」的注释作为遗言。种种迹象表明，德谬歌的确存在。该是与智械哥对峙的时候了，他的忌惮正是不容忽视的证据。
E: Old Intellitron left notes about the "tombstone" as his final message. All signs indicate that Demiurge does indeed exist. It's time to confront old Intellitron, for his apprehension is the undeniable proof.

C:
我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻♪
生命微种萌蘖于无瑕忆中。心灵最柔软处，由哀怜触动的真挚颤抖，就是「生命的因」。
E:
Let me tell you the story of "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti ♪
Tiny seeds of life sprout within pristine memories. In the most tender corners of the heart, that genuine shiver stirred by lament... That's the "mover of life."

C: 空间站最近热闹不断。模拟宇宙再次更新、天才俱乐部的大人物都齐聚于此，每个人都心思各异——你总觉得会有些意想不到的事情发生。\n你并不知道阮•梅身处何处，只能四处寻找……
E: The space station has been bustling with activity lately. With the latest update to the Simulated Universe and the gathering of prominent figures from the Genius Society, everyone seems to have their own agenda. You can't help but feel that there might be some unexpected events on the horizon. \nYou don't know Ruan Mei's exact location, so you have to look for her...

C: 阮•梅的「生命造物」竟然是一群拥有了生命的糕点！它们甚至发展出了自己的「情绪」、「思考」及「意志」…\n现在你得想办法回收它们了。
E: Ruan Mei's "life creations" are actually pastries with a life of their own! They have even developed their own "emotions," "thoughts," and "will"...\nNow you have to find a way to recover them.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n希儿发短信了。公司偷袭了下层区。快去看眼情况。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nSeele sent a message. The IPC launched a sneak attack on the Underworld. Need to go see what's happening.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n扑满好像在给我们带路。先跟着吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nThe Trotter seems to be leading the way for us. Follow it for now.

C: 探测器虽然没能修好，但它还是应该物归原主…你注意到虎克大人失去了平时的活力，好像对自己很失望。\n你知道小姑娘为了找回探测器前前后后的努力，但是她将意料之外的损坏归罪于自己办案不利，你并不同意。
E: The detector is still broken, but it should be returned to its owner... You notice that Hook has lost her usual vibrance, as if she is disappointed in herself.\nYou know she has worked hard to find the detector, but disagree that it's her fault the detector is broken.

C: 科鲁泽坚称自己的身体很好，但你从他那副虚弱的样子猜测：盔甲上可能对他造成了不良的影响。你决定请权威人士娜塔莎来为科鲁泽做个体检。
E: Kluzer insists that he is fine, but you can tell from his weak look that the armor might have negatively affected him. You decide to ask Natasha, the health professional, to examine Kluzer.

C: 娜塔莎告诉你诊所一直收到匿名的爱心包裹的隐秘。尽管娜塔莎并不知道背后的好心人是谁，但你和她还是决定把这位匿名人士的爱心，传递到更多有需要的人手里。
E: Natasha tells you that the clinic keeps receiving anonymous care packages. She doesn't know who is doing this, but you two decide to spread their love and care to those in need.

C: 令你与克拉拉大跌眼镜的是，零件盗窃案的罪魁祸首竟是一只异常的小机器人。\n在制服窃贼的过程中，这台机器人只不停向你们求饶，却没有表现出哪怕一丝攻击性。\n这令克拉拉感到有些压抑。陪她一起返回基地，研究下一步行动吧。
E: Clara and you are surprised to find a strange little robot to be the culprit of the thefts.\nAs you subdued it, the robot kept begging you for forgiveness and didn't show any aggression.\nThis made Clara feel rather down. Return to the base with her and plan your next move.

C: 你与克拉拉跟随着帕斯卡的脚步在铆钉镇的街道上漫步。期间，克拉拉向你提出了一个令你同样感到困惑的问题——「铆钉镇的灯光为何从没断过？」\n你暂时没有头绪。但直觉告诉你，问题的答案似乎就在这小镇的某处。\n或许——注意，我是说或许——帕斯卡知道这一切的真相呢？
E: Clara and you followed Pascal's steps and strolled along the streets of Rivet Town. During this, Clara asked you a question that you also found puzzling. "Why do the lights in Rivet Town never go out?"\nYou don't have the answer yet, but instinctively feel that the answer to this question lies somewhere in town.\nPerhaps — and I mean "perhaps" — Pascal knows the truth about this?

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 雪原极光观测之旅到这里就全部结束了，结局可谓是皆大欢喜，但两位女孩似乎还想让这趟旅行变得更加完美。\n她们已经各回各家，为晚些时候的夜宵各做准备，而此时的你则受到了来自朗道姐弟的短信。\n时间刚好，就趁这个机会向二人汇报你们在雪原的种种见闻吧。
E: The trip to observe the Snow Plains aurora is now over. You achieve a happy ending, but the two girls seem to want to make this trip even more special.\nThey've both gone home to prepare for supper later, just as you receive a message from the Landau siblings.\nNow is the time to report to these two what you have seen out in the Snow Plains.

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，你和佩拉来到下层区的机械聚落调查此事。\n克拉拉就站在面前，上去和她打个招呼吧。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Pela and you arrive at the Robot Settlement in the Underworld to investigate this matter.\nClara is right in front of you. Go and say hello to her.

C: 跟踪者似乎与药王秘传有关，去通知白露，并且告知她们会遇到什么麻烦吧。\n她们应该还在提心吊胆地等着你的消息。
E: The stalker seems to be related to Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Tell Bailu and the nurse about this, as well as the troubles they might encounter.\nThey should still be waiting for your news anxiously.

C: 虽然主意不算是好主意，但不失为一种尝试，去找找云骑军的甲胄吧。\n这些甲胄严丝合缝，根本看不出士兵的种族和性别，真是太巧了。
E: It's not the greatest idea, but it's an idea. Go look for Cloud Knights' equipment.\nThe armor is tightly sealed, no one would be able to tell the species and gender expression of an individual wearing them, what a find.

C: 半夏似乎已经快到极限了，但是你很清楚，你不应该让她停下。希望她的心上人，这一次就在那里等着她。\n按照你不多的经验，很少有人能像她这样，没有彻底失去理性。
E: Banxia seems to be at her limits, but you understand clearly that she shouldn't stop now. Hopefully her sweetheart is there waiting for her.\nBased on your limited experience, not many can keep their sanity intact like Banxia at this stage.

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 和高唐吵架的是一个怪家伙。虽然听起来是误会一场，但这个叫贝娜的怪家伙似乎的确有自己的困扰。看来又到了助人为乐的时候。
E: The person quarreling with Gao Tang is someone odd. Although it sounds like a misunderstanding, this person named Benna does seem to have her own problems. Looks like it's time to lend a helping hand again.

C: 虽然有种种疑惑，不过结果好一切都好。能拿到地衡司的赏钱，还有什么不满的呢？别想那么多了，快去地衡司拿钱吧！
E: Though you have many doubts, everything turned out fine in the end. What is there to be dissatisfied with if you can get a reward from the Realm-Keeping Commission? Don't overthink things. Go to the Realm-Keeping Commission and get your money!

C: 哎呀呀，没想到这个钟珊的身份并不简单…不，其实你早就想到了，对吧？
E: Ohoho, who would've guessed there is more to Zhongshan's identity than what meets the eye... No, actually, you've had an inkling for a while now, haven't you?

C: 依附在你身上的浮烟将岁阳与仙舟的恩怨娓娓道来，同时也借你的口在这小小的迷路团队里肆意肆意撒播不合。眼下，想要从这处幻境中脱离，仍需要众人同心协力。安抚藿藿，然后一块找到离开这儿的法子。
E: Sticking close to you, Cirrus chatters garrulously about the Xianzhou's old grudge against the heliobi while also stealing use of your mouth to sow seeds of discontent among this small, lost team. It'll take everyone working together to get out of this maze. Comfort Huohuo, then find a way out of here together.

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 钟表小子似乎发现了柯柯娜身上表现出来的异常——和他谈谈，看看从一旁他观察到了什么。
E: Clockie seems to have realized the abnormalities in Cocona — Talk to him, and see what he has observed.

C: 初入职场，同事似乎有一些话想和柯柯娜说。
E: As Cocona starts her career, her colleague seems to have something to say to her.

C: 带着费歇尔给你的照片，去和奥尔拉聊聊吧。
E: Take the photo Fischer gave you and talk to Orla

C: 冷芯与你一起到尾翼视察，提出更换尾翼涂装与为飞艇命名的事项，你心中浮现了几种方案……
E: You and Caldwick inspect the airship's empennage. As he raises the business of changing the empennage paint and naming the airship, several ideas come to your mind...

C: 你解决了外邦人的粮食问题，却得知苏克提瑞斯被捕的消息。他做了什么，值得如此大动干戈？
E: You solved the issue of the outlanders' food supplies, but received news of Soctires' capture. What has he done? Is this reaction really warranted?

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n看来纷争的舞步没法在海洋的宴会上展示风采，偏见与恐惧像汹涌的大浪，刀枪盾斧是无法抵挡的。你和帕里斯能帮上忙的，也只是让这浪别这么早把她的小船掀翻，仅此而已。
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nIt seems that the dance of Strife cannot fully express its grace at a banquet of the ocean. When prejudice and fear rage like giant waves, no blade or shield can hold them back. The only assistance that you and Paris can offer is to prevent her little boat from being overturned so soon.

C: 欧洛尼斯的眷属，为何会对帕西提亚纠缠不休？在散落的天外之音中，是否会有线索留存？
E: Why are Oronyx's kin so intent on bothering Pasithea? Perhaps there is a clue to be found in the scattered celestial echoes?

C: 自「铁墓」一战结束后，似乎一直没有见到昔涟，原来她躲在这里啊。但…好像有些不太一样？
E: I haven't seen Cyrene since the Irontomb battle ended. So this is where she's been hiding. But... something seems different about her?

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，她正在研究撞色搭配的事。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She's trying to learn about how colors match and clash. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 你的学生希拉竟是一名仿生人，你答应要教导她的也并非什么寻常知识，而是教她如何做人。
E: Your student, Sheila, is an android, and you're going to teach her how to act like a human.

C: 原来「怪谈」不过是「空谈」一场，赶紧将这个真相告诉阿德勒吧！
E: The "ghost story" was just a rumor. Tell Adler about this discovery!

C: 根据「防盗门怪谈」亲历者提供的坐标，找到防盗门，并调查出「怪谈」背后的真相。
E: Follow the coordinates provided by the person who witnessed the Security Door Anecdote, find the security door in question, and unveil the truth about the "ghost story."

C: 你从未见过健谈的老歌德如此讳莫如深——尤其当他言语间不经意流露出与某神秘「会社」的联系时，这神秘的老人与他掩藏的秘密彻底点燃了你的好奇心。\n完成老歌德的委托，解明真相吧！
E: Old Goethe is usually very chatty, and you have never seen him speak so enigmatically before... Your curiosity is totally piqued by this mysterious old man and his secrets when he casually lets slip hints of his connection with a secret society.\nComplete his assignment and find the truth!

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知亚诺发布了委托，想要行使他的正当权益。帮帮亚诺！
E: You see that Amo has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise his rightful rights. Go help Amo!

C: 捉迷藏比赛已经开始。寻找一个合适的藏身点吧！
E: The hide-and-seek competition is on. Find a suitable place to hide!

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 你成功打开了火种匣。问问伊来内其中贮藏的是什么吧。
E: You successfully opened the Coreflame Casket. Ask Alain about its content.

C: 火种匣里存放着「天父的赎罪膏油」，祭司们收入的重要来源。\n伊来内请求你打开下一个火种匣。「余火」会在其中吗？
E: The Coreflame Casket contains the "Sky Father's Atoning Balm," an important source of income for the priests.\nAlain asks you to open the next Coreflame Casket. Could the Embers be within?

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 在你的帮助下佩佩脱离了危险，现在你和它联手探，你决定跟随它的步伐，继续前进……
E: Thanks to your help, Peppy is out of danger. You have decided to follow its lead and explore the area together...

C: 没想到艾丝妲为佩佩定制了如此神奇的同步功能…你和佩佩以全新的形态出击，继续追查丢失奇物的下落.
E: Asta has developed an incredible synchronization feature for Peppy... Now you and Peppy can venture out in a new form and continue to track down the lost Curio.

C: 「管家」将奇物的下落托盘而出，现在该去取回奇物了……
E: The butler has revealed the location of the lost Curio. Now it is time to retrieve it...

C: 收到奥列格的邀请，你前往残响回廊参与清理裂界怪物的作战行动。\n和奥列格谈一谈，了解一下战场的现况。
E: You receive Oleg's invitation to an operation to clear the Corridor of Fading Echoes of Fragmentum monsters.\nTalk to Oleg to get a sense of the current situation of the battleground.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 你在奥赫玛意外得到一份古老的卷轴，上面记载了一个神秘的仪式。按照卷轴记载的步骤，找齐所有材料，在指定地点下召唤出来的会是什么呢？
E: Unexpectedly, you come across an ancient scroll in Okhema, detailing a mystical ceremony. Follow the instructions carefully and gather all the necessary materials. What will be summoned at the designated location?

C: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。
E: The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

C: 就算是为了赔偿金，你也得搞清楚这头大地兽的来历。但首先，你需要先让它安静下来。
E: Even if it's just for the compensation, you need to figure out where this dromas came from. But first, you need to calm it down.

C: 你来到了黎明云崖，并没有看到希瑞雅口中好心的守卫叔叔。\n想办法向眼前这名站岗的守卫打探打探吧。
E: Having reached Dawncloud, you find no sign of the "Mr. Nice Guard" that Serena spoke of.\nTry to inquire with the guard on duty.

C: 名叫布凯辛的科员希望你能帮助她测试名为「星芒战幕」的战斗模拟程序。\n启动「星芒战幕」，尝试通过其中包含的挑战。
E: Researcher Grumpy wants your help in testing the battle simulation program called Stellar Flare.\nActivate Stellar Flare and attempt the challenges within.

C: 与「影像」有关的「设备」…雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: An "equipment" that's related to "images"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用阿丽萨•兰德的骑枪作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield Alisa Rand's Lance in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 接受了小秘书的邀请，接下来就是正式得到金人巷商会的承认，你将担当「金人巷商业顾问」一职。\n前往陈机铺，去和会长谈谈吧…等等，为什么会是陈机铺？
E: After accepting Mingxi's invitation, what's left is to formally get an official acknowledgment from the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. To achieve this, you will serve as the "Aurum Alley Business Consultant."\nHead to Oldies Depot and speak to the president and... wait, why Oldies Depot?

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「清玩斋」与商会建立合作关系。但「清玩斋」的老板泊阳此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Elegance Pagoda to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boyang has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n有些玩家在通关之余会忍不住怀疑，如此简单的谜题真能难得住人？而另一些玩家...他们就是被难住的人。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nSome players can't help but wonder whether such simple puzzles can really stop anyone. Meanwhile, players who don't wonder about this question... are the ones who got stopped by these puzzles.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 青雀说「沙盘当然有第二种解法」，似乎解谜之道得先从沙盘的出口开始。
E: Qingque says the sand table always holds an alternative solution. To find it, you must start from the sand table's exit.

C: 在仔细观察过后，你确认这个区域就是充当休息区的好地方。下面该喷上合适的涂鸦，为不识字的造物们指引回来休息的路。
E: Upon careful observation, you confirm that this is a good place to cordon off as the Rest Area. Time to spray the right graffiti on the ground to help these illiterate creations get back to their resting spots.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n舒翁打算继续寻找被遗弃的「美梦剧团」，去梦境酒店深处看看吧。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nSiobhan decides to continue her search for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe. Explore deeper into the hotel in the Dreamscape.

C: 叛徒们居然在画里藏了一个密室，筑梦技术什么都可以解释吗？
E: The rebels have hidden a secret room in the painting. Can Dreamweaving technology really explain this?

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！/本层的拍摄已经完成，去下一个片场吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nFilming on this floor has concluded. Go to the next location!

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n找到宝箱了，快去打开它吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou've found a treasure chest. Open it!

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与银狼一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向银狼寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Silver Wolf during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Silver Wolf for some advice.

C: 青雀认定斯科特是「过度喜欢上班给他人造成麻烦的人」，她主动请缨，要会会这斯科特。\n斯科特被彻底说服，这一次他应该是认识自己的错误了吧。
E: Qingque believes Skott is only causing this much trouble for others because he's a diehard workaholic. And so, she volunteers to meet with Skott.\nSkott has been thoroughly convinced by Qingque! Maybe he'll finally see the error of his ways now?

C: 完成「码放货物」简单模式III
E: Complete Inventory Arrangement Easy Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在「黄金的时刻」到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around the Golden Hour to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到广告牌的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the billboard's beats. Help Rappa collect inspiration to help with composing.

C: 穿过果壳，自我加冕者将成为地上的无限宇宙之王。
E: Emerging from the shell. Those who crown themselves will become the lords of a boundless universe on earth.

C:
关于浴室的Q&A：

Q：列车组成员平时都在哪里洗澡？
A：各自的房间。

Q：可一些乘员的房间里也没有浴室啊？
A：隐藏式设计，我的朋友。

Q：丹恒的房间不是资料室吗？那里也有隐藏式的浴室？
A：苍龙濯世，我的朋友。
E:
A Bathroom Q&A

Q: Where do the Express Crew usually take their baths?
A: In their own rooms.

Q: But some don't have a bathroom in their room.
A: Hidden designs, my friend.

Q: Isn't Dan Heng's room the Archives? There's a hidden bathroom in there?
A: The Azure Dragon ablutes all, my friend.

C: 有好事者前来挑衅，你自然不会退缩。努力工作，堂堂正正地击败这个对手吧！
E: When a worthy challenger shows up, don't shy away. Put in the effort and defeat this rival fair and square!

C: 内部问题都解决好了，是时候继续工作了！
E: Now that all the internal issues are sorted out, let's get back to work!

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 空间站的角落里，属于造物们的定向越野大赛正在悄然举行。艾丝妲给了你一些点心，可以拿来为你支持的小家伙呐喊助威。\n与主持赛事的盹盹咪互动，参与到赛事应援中去吧！
E: In a corner of the space station, the exciting great obstacle race for creations is secretly underway. Asta has given you some snacks that you can use to cheer for your favorite little ones.\nGo interact with Dozing Meow, who's hosting the event, and join in supporting the contestants!

C: 秘密——先卖个关子，我们在会议上再正式公布，你可以期待一下哦。
E: Not telling yet... We'll make an official announcement in the meeting, but I'm keeping you in suspense for now~

C: 接下来，本列车长要宣布下一站的名字——
E: It's time for your conductor — ahem, that's me — to reveal the name of our next stop...

C: 你看见空间站的标志，好像一把长枪穿过月亮。
E: You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like a spear piercing through the moon.

C: 不知道是哪位科员还在使用受损的屏幕进行工作呢？
E: I wonder who here has to work with a damaged screen?

C: hello world
E: Hello World

C: 反倒是一个文档页面占据了主要屏幕。
E: Instead, a page of text fills the screen.

C: 这就像织锦一样，你我一次只能编织一条金线，但它最终会变成美丽的图景。
E: It's like weaving brocade — you and I can only add one gold thread each time, but eventually, we will make a gorgeous pattern.

C: 啊，是反物质军团！这帮疯子流窜过来了，看我上去揍它。
E: Ah, it's the Antimatter Legion! So these crazy jerks made it all the way here... Watch this!

C: 哇，你怎么在这儿？！…你怎么比我们还快？
E: Whoa! Why are you here!? ...And how did you get here before us?

C: 都听你的。
E: Okay.

C: 哈哈，年轻人就是容易打成一片，看来你们已经相当熟络了。
E: Haha, look at you all, you've already gotten really close.

C: 至于开拓、星神、阿基维利分别是什么，等这里的事端平息了再聊——你也不想突然被一大堆名词怼在脸上吧？
E: As for what the Trailblaze, the Aeons, and Akivili are all about, let's talk about it when things have calmed down a little. I don't wanna overwhelm you now, do I?

C: 埃美丽，冷静下来，想想<color=#dbc291ff>她</color>遇到这种灾难会怎么做，十杯咖啡？一粒药片？还是躲到堆满星神密卷的房间里？
E: Emily, calm down and think about what <color=#dbc291ff>she</color> would do in such a disaster. Ten cups of coffee? A pill? Or maybe hide in a room full of Mystic Scrolls of Aeons?

C: 呜呜，该怎么办呀，刚刚他们说，收容舱段也有怪物，我给<color=#dbc291ff>波少</color>的礼物还留在应物科的分析室里……
E: *crying* What should we do!? They said there are monsters in the storage zone. And the gift I prepared for <color=#dbc291ff>Master Capote</color> is still in the analysis room of the Department of Implement Arts...

C: 你们非得当面讨论我吗？
E: Must you two discuss this right in front of me?

C: 你真是我见过最自私的人。
E: You really are the most self-centered person I've ever met.

C: 是你啊，{NICKNAME}…你似乎有话要说？
E: Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}... Do you have something on your mind?

C: 要好好保重哦，{NICKNAME}，我们会经常回来看你的。
E: Take care, {NICKNAME}. We'll come back now and then to see you.

C: 但是，只要「星核」还在你身体里，就要小心行事。我和姬子没有把握每次都能恰好压制住它。
E: However, as long as the Stellaron is still in your body, you should be careful what you do. I don't know if Himeko and I can suppress it again.

C: 三月七乘客的房间就在客车车厢。不过她总喜欢到处乱跑，不一定在就是了。
E: March 7th's room is in the Express Sleeper Compartment. She's always running around, so she might not be there.

C: 被人破门而入的次数多了，自然就会感知气息了。
E: I learned to sense incoming visitors after people kept barging in so frequently.

C: 我发现列车时，它的记忆体已经损坏，丢失了很多宝贵的资料。只知道：列车确实是阿基维利的造物；列车确实曾与阿基维利一同旅行。
E: When I found the Express, its memory had been severely damaged, with much of its valuable information lost. All I know is that the Express is an Aspect of Creation built by Akivili themself, and used to travel the cosmos.

C: 祂是如此与众不同……祂的陨落也突如其来，传说某位星神杀死了祂，可是我不相信。
E: THEY were different from most... But THEIR passing came so suddenly that it was thought THEY were killed by another Aeon. I don't believe that to be the case.

C: 关于同伴…
E: About our companions...

C: 等、等一下！这跟说好的可不一样啊，她明明说要邀请我们一起商议要事……
E: W—Wait a minute! This isn't what we agreed! She said we were gonna be escorted to discuss an urgent matter!

C: 是。
E: Y—Yes, ma'am.

C: 小事小事，你们第一次来贝洛伯格作客，能让你们感受到这座城市的热情就好。
E: No sweat. This is your first time in Belobog — I just want you to feel some of the warmth the city has to offer.

C: 退后！封锁区域，非铁卫成员禁止入内！
E: Stand back! This area is off limits — only Silvermane Guards are permitted to enter here!

C: 永冬铭碑的碑体由两部分构成：象征知识与工业力量的齿轮，以及象征寒潮的巨大冰晶。这两个符号紧密嵌合，齿轮束缚住了冰霜，代表着筑城者们不屈服于蛮荒自然的精神。
E: Everwinter Monument is made up of two parts: A gear that symbolizes knowledge and industrial strength, and huge ice crystals that symbolize the Eternal Freeze. These two symbols are bound together — the gear restricting the ice. It represents the unyielding spirit of the Architects in the face of nature's barbarity.

C: 我们现在去哪儿？
E: Where do we go now?

C: 什么——
E: What...?

C: 讲故事我最擅长，我来！
E: Ooh! I'm the best storyteller — let me! Let me!

C: 我们能和杰帕德谈谈吗？
E: Can we talk to Gepard?

C: 铁卫的密码…要不问问杰帕德？
E: Silvermane Guards... Should we ask Captain Gepard for help?

C: 嘿嘿，我的事不急，慢慢来吧。我来找佩拉，她之前来过了吗？
E: Well, no worries. It's not like I need the book right away. I actually came to see Pela. Was she here earlier today?

C: 没想到佩拉还擅长这种事情…
E: I never knew Pela was good at this kind of thing...

C: 菲丝，实在不好意思，那本限定场刊先帮我留着吧…我之后再回来拿——那个…你刚刚没让他们看到新刊内容吧？
E: So, Fizz... Um... This is kinda embarrassing, but could you do me a favor and reserve that limited edition for me... Seems like I'll have to buy it a bit later. Also... You didn't let them see the new edition, did you?

C: 算了，不说晦气话了！快告诉我发生了什么吧。
E: Never mind, enough ifs. Please tell me what happened.

C: 我还找到了你的「钥匙」。
E: I also found your key.

C: …我想明白了。我不能再这样下去了。我要辞掉在技术部的工作，找个地方重新开始——这次自立门户。
E: ...I have figured it out. I can't go on like this anymore. I'm quitting my job in the Technology Division to start my own thing. This time, I'll make it on my own.

C: 这…你这完全就是拍了个寂寞嘛！
E: ...There's gotta be a better shot than this one!

C: 欸？没这回事，你来得正好！快快快，来帮我解个围……
E: Oh! No, not at all! I could do with a hand, actually...

C: 我必须向你道歉…也希望你不要把这件事放在心上。
E: Allow me to offer you my apologies... I hope you don't take this matter to heart.

C: 你没做错任何事，希露瓦。
E: You didn't do anything wrong, Serval.

C: 你看我有得选吗？
E: Do I have a choice?

C: 不过，你可别小看了姐姐她折腾人的能力…如果你们什么时候实在受不了了，就把她送回来吧。
E: Still, don't underestimate her ability to drive people crazy... If at some point your crew can't take it anymore, just send her back.

C: 抽屉
E: Drawer

C: 行李在等待着它们的主人。也许很快会有一位侦探打开它，拿走重要的线索，拯救整座城市——那是另一个故事了。
E: The luggage is waiting for its owner. Maybe shortly after, a detective will open it to discover essential clues and save the entire city — well, that's a whole new story.

C: 你看见牌子上写着：「『七彩虹』——七彩缤纷，买一送六！」
E: You see a sign that says: "Rainbows — blazing with color, buy 1 get 6 free!"

C: 你沉浸在分类垃圾的快乐里……
E: You immerse yourself in the joys of sorting garbage...

C: 你也参加过吗！？这个俱乐部太不讲武德了吧！
E: They let YOU take part!? When did this place last have an inspection!

C: 这里好多好多人，虎克好矮，什么都看不到……
E: There are so many people here — Hook's too short. I can't see anything...

C: {NICKNAME}，快！我们去帮他！
E: {NICKNAME}, quick! Let's help him!

C: 哼，是啊，天底下哪有无缘无故的善意。
E: Hmph, of course it is. Nobody gives without expecting something in return.

C: 我不是说了吗？那家伙很少挪窝，几乎不会离开炉心。就算偶尔离开了，他也不会在外面多待，总是把事丢给手下。
E: Like I told you. That guy barely leaves his nest — it's rare to see him away from the Furnace Core. Even when he does appear, he doesn't stick around for long. He leaves everything to his subordinates.

C: 没多久，姐姐。
E: Not that long... big sister.

C: 怎么样，漆黑的虎克大人，现在可以把秘密告诉我们了吧？
E: So, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, you can tell us now, right?

C: 啊，你们还不清楚里面的情况吧？大矿区里圈已经被一群机器人占领了！矿队还是流浪者都没法靠近。
E: Oh! Don't you know? The inner section of the Great Mine has been seized by a band of robots! Neither the mining team nor the vagrants can get anywhere near.

C: 我不是你们的朋友……
E: I am not your friend...

C: 嗯，该去会会「地火」了，走吧。
E: Mm, we should be going to see Wildfire. Let's move.

C: 这里和「上层区」的关系是？
E: What's the relation between here and the Overworld?

C: 「联手」？此时聊这个为时尚早。
E: Ally? It's a little premature to be talking about that.

C: 不工作8小时我睡不着。
E: I can't sleep unless I've worked for eight hours.

C: 我不知道到底发生了什么，她为什么突然转变了态度？…但命令就是命令。军人不该过度揣摩命令。
E: What must have transpired to cause her such a drastic change? ...Still, orders are orders. It's not for soldiers to question their superiors.

C: 你们不是在休息吗，这个点出门做什么？
E: Aren't you supposed to be sleeping? What are you doing out here?

C: 没看出对不起的意思！
E: I'm not seeing the apology here!

C: 别瞎想了，快拆开看看。
E: Stop overthinking and just open it.

C: 嘿，朋友们，咱们走呗？
E: Well my friends, are you ready to head out?

C: 先不说这个了，你没有把虎克真正的目的说出去吧？
E: Never mind that. You didn't tell her what I was really up to, did you?

C: 我赶时间，速战速决。
E: I'm in a hurry. I'll make quick work of them.

C: 还行吧，火过一段时间以后，现在已经有点过气了…但这可难不倒我。
E: He's alright, he's off the peak now but that's nothing to worry about.

C: 哪有这么巧的事儿？
E: Wow, how convenient... for you.

C: 哇——真的吗？太好啦，我…我也有童话书啦！
E: Wow! For real!? Now I finally have a fairy tale book of my own too!

C: （症状还在恶化…他很清楚自己的情况。）
E: (The symptoms are still worsening... he is well aware of his condition.)

C: 各位观众，接下来千万别把你们的目光移开——比赛，现在正式开始！
E: Dear viewers, no time to blink— the match starts now!

C: 哎呀呀，真是不得了！今天的这场战斗，恐怕宣告了「机械格斗流」的彻底失败，真是奇耻大辱！
E: Wow, that was a—ma—zing! Today's battle nailed the total failure of the "mechanical fighting style." What a shame!

C: 大守护者可可利亚牺牲了自己，封印了「星核」。我们参与了战斗，见证了整个过程。
E: The supreme guardian sacrificed herself to seal the Stellaron. We were there at the fight — we witnessed everything.

C: 哎…哎哟喂……
E: Huh...? Argh...

C: 请出示你的上岗执照。
E: Do you have a license?

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 怪物…怪物入侵了矿区！求、求求你们——救救我的同伴！
E: Th—The monsters invaded the mine! Please, you have to save my friends!

C: 计划有变——我要留在贝洛伯格，不上「星穹列车」啦。
E: Change of plan. I've decided to stay in Belobog.

C: 多亏了你，我也看到了下层区人们的境况。我突然发觉，也许自己还能帮得上忙…也许我还能为这座城市做出些贡献。
E: If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have had any idea about the hardships people were going through in the Underworld. It made me feel like... maybe I could help a little, and make Belobog a better place.

C: 「货箱便是钥匙」？
E: "The Crates Are the Keys"?

C: 以下为您展开详细报道。
E: Let's take a closer look at the details.

C: 这回不一样！我可是随时紧绷着，观察情况准备开溜。
E: Hey, that's not fair! My eyes are peeled this time — I'll make a run for it the second things go wrong.

C: 仙舟一定能逢凶化吉！
E: Xianzhou will surely quell this crisis!

C: 再这样下去，十王司的判官们该要出来收拾残局了。
E: If it goes on like this, the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission will have to come out and clean up this mess.

C: 都往后退！
E: Everybody, stay back!

C: 她叫素裳，好像刚从仙舟「曜青」调动过来。
E: Her name is Sushang. She apparently just transferred here from the Yaoqing.

C: 反正上面啥也没说，就让我过来疏散流云渡里的百姓啦。
E: Anyway, the higher-ups didn't say anything — they just got me to evacuate the civilians at Cloudford.

C: 走，咱们上船！
E: Come on, let's climb aboard!

C: 动身。
E: Let's go.

C: 循着这些亮晶晶的痕迹，把停云小姐找出来对吧？
E: *sigh* We need to follow these sparkly traces to find Miss Tingyun, right?

C: 狐人女孩？确实，敝店的镯子吊坠深受狐族姑娘的喜爱，当然……
E: A foxian girl? Well, our bracelets and pendants are extremely popular among foxian customers...

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}，你忘了咱们是干嘛来了？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, remember what we're here for?

C: 那就只能恕我记不得啦。
E: Then you'll have to pardon my bad memory.

C: 你这话我就不爱听了。
E: Now now, that ain't right.

C: 气息…消失了？
E: The scent... where did it go?

C: 这…不会也是卡芙卡的线索吧？
E: Is this... anything to do with Kafka?

C: {NICKNAME}，稍后要看着点小三月，别让她冲动行事。
E: {NICKNAME}, keep your eye on March. We can't let her be impulsive.

C: 你们对那些云骑做了什么？
E: What did you do to these Cloud Knights?

C: 你居然一点把握也没有？
E: You don't have the slightest clue, do you?

C: 你是故意的吧！
E: Are you doing this on purpose!?

C: 承蒙关心，小女子没事～谁叫将军命令我跟着各位呢，可不敢违抗军令呀。
E: Thank you for the concern, but I'm fine~ The general commanded me to stay with you — I dare not go against military orders.

C: 咦，你倒是很熟嘛……
E: Huh? You're pretty familiar with this place.

C: 这持明协助建造的丹炉中均存有云吟术，少主可借此多加体会……
E: All the elixir crucibles that the Vidyadhara helped to construct contain cloudhymn magic. You should take this chance to learn more, young master...

C: （丹恒向队长简单描述了三月七等人的外貌。）
E: (Dan Heng briefly described to the captain the appearances of March 7th and the crew.)

C: 那些由历任持明龙尊所编织的禁制，那些驯驭、分散巨兽力量的缠结，构成了一张衰朽将破的罗网，脱落在即。
E: The containment mechanisms woven by past thrones, the bindings that tamed the beasts' power known, a fragile net, soon to shatter and fall, its decay a warning, heard by one and all.

C: 你和绘影图形里记录的样子所差无几，持明的转生真的会让人蜕变新生吗？
E: Your appearance closely matches the depiction in the annals... Does Vidyadhara reincarnation really entail a complete transformation — a new life?

C: 很抱歉，我从未提起…
E: I'm sorry I never spoke up...

C: 不过酷酷的气质倒是一脉相承，哈哈。
E: Still, it's got the same stony expression, haha.

C: 你想起来了？
E: Do you remember now?

C: 「持明稚童，故人提执。前世贤契，来世蒙师。」……
E: "Our reincarnation's greatest cost, the wisdom of a past life lost, yet through the teachings of our kind, unto the young again consigned."

C: 外客初来乍到，逛的都是星槎海的宣夜大街。那儿名声在外，热闹是热闹，但要说好吃的好玩的地方哪儿多，还得去金人巷。我给你在地图上标好了。
E: Tourists fresh off the starskiff always head to Starwatcher Avenue in Starskiff Haven — it's one of those bustling tourist streets... But, if you want the real deal on local snacks, you've gotta get to Aurum Alley. I've marked it out for you on your map.

C: 与此同时，在幽囚狱中……
E: Meanwhile, in The Shackling Prison...

C: 唉，我不是医士，说不出个子丑寅卯来。
E: Alas, I'm no healer, I'm afraid I couldn't say.

C: 包袱里还有一张字条，「赠岩明先生，招财进宝，无往不利」。岩明先生，看来这是停云小姐打算送给你的礼物。
E: There's also a note in the package: "This is for you, Mr. Yanming. Wishing you fortune and success in every endeavor." Yanming, it seems like this is a gift for you from Miss Tingyun.

C: 她享不了口福，我就请各位来饮这一杯吧。
E: Seeing as she can't enjoy it right now, I'll have to invite all of you to try a cup.

C: 没能让停云小姐吃到我做的菜啊…
E: If only Miss Tingyun could try this one last time...

C: 我奉十王司的诰谕，赦免对你的流放令。自此刻起，你可以自由在罗浮之上来去。
E: In accordance with the edict of the Ten-Lords Commission, I am hereby authorized to relieve your banishment decree. From this day henceforth, you may come and go freely on the Luofu...

C: 那就一言为定。
E: Deal.

C: 谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}和丹枢大人对我的帮助。你下一次回来，小鱼应该会长高不少，这样就用不着拖累大家了。
E: Thank you for helping me... and thanks to Dan Shu too. I should be taller the next time you're back, so I won't be such a burden on everyone.

C: 就是就是！得罪了这帮妖人，这可不是打屁股就能解决的事情了！我妈说他们一天吃三四个小孩呢！
E: Ugh, guess you're right, these guys mean business. My mom said they eat three or four kids for breakfast!

C: 云骑们只找到她随身携带的扇子。和我们同行的那位「停云」究竟是受幻胧操纵的傀儡，还是某种一叶障目的幻术，这一切暂时无法查清了。
E: The Cloud Knights were only able to find her fan — she took it with her everywhere. It's currently unclear if Tingyun was a puppet manipulated by Phantylia, or if some form of deception was used to cloud our vision.

C: 那些留在此地的老无名客们后来过得如何，经历了哪些事，又给这世界留下了怎样的痕迹…探寻先人们的足迹，也不失为一种冒险。
E: Why did these Nameless choose to stay here? How did the course of their subsequent lives unfold, and what legacies did they leave behind? Retracing our predecessors' footsteps, that is in itself an adventure, wouldn't you agree?

C: 列车即将跃迁——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
E: The Express is about to make the jump — the Express is about to make the jump — Please be seated and hold on!

C: 我可能梦见了一个悲伤的未来…
E: I may have dreamed of a tragic future...

C: …人呢？
E: ...Huh?

C: 梦中的匹诺康尼被分成十二个时刻，我个人对「太阳的时刻」很感兴趣，那是一座承载了匹诺康尼历史、文化的观赏梦境。
E: The dream Penacony is divided into twelve moments. Personally, I'm interested in the Moment of Sol — it's a visual dreamscape steeped in Penacony's history and civilization.

C: 别误会，刚刚只是想提醒你——这地方鱼龙混杂，不怀好意的家伙可太多了，记得多长个心眼，比如…记得关门。
E: Don't misunderstand, that was a mere reminder. This place runs deep, with plenty of unsavory characters. Don't forget to stay on your toes. Like... keeping your door closed.
