C: 不过临走前，我可以再问你一个问题吗？在你听来，或许会有些古怪，甚至失礼，但我想知道……
E: But before I go, can I ask you a question? You may think it somewhat strange, perhaps even rude, but I wish to know...

C: 这边！您能看到我吗？这边！
E: This way! Can you see me? Over here!

C: 咦，您记得我吗？我好开心。
E: Huh, you remember me? I'm so glad.

C: 您问的是梦境中的「白日梦酒店」吗？具体细节我也不是很清楚，非常抱歉……
E: You're asking about The Reverie in the dreamscape, right? I'm not sure exactly either, I'm sorry...

C: 是我，「梦境贩售店」——您也可以叫我爱德华医生。乐意为您效劳！
E: It's me, the Dreamscape Sales Store. I also go by the name of Dr. Edward, and I'm happy to be at your service!

C: 这就是精神分析，{M#先生}{F#女士}——爱德华医生乐意为您效劳！
E: It's the magic of psychoanalysis, {M#sir}{F#madam}. Dr. Edward is happy to assist you!

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this accusation?

C: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
E: Could there be anyone worse than me?

C: 什么情况，你是谁？
E: What happened? Who are you?

C: 盛会之星也很现实啊…
E: Looks like life on the Planet of Festivities can be pretty tough...

C: 哎哎，别这样！咱俩好容易再见一面，怎么说走就走？
E: Come on! It's been so long since we last met each other. How can you just walk away like that?

C: 感谢您的捐献——读取完成！正在为您调整忆质，生成梦泡……
E: Your donation is appreciated! The retrieval is complete. Now, I will calibrate the memoria and generate the dream bubble...

C: 哎呀，真遗憾——我还想看看{NICKNAME}要怎么应付垃圾之王呢……
E: What a bummer... I was really looking forward to seeing how {NICKNAME} was going to overthrow the Garbage King...

C: 可惜啊，可惜！这样一场富有深意的梦，却因为流萤小姐的出手戛然而止……
E: What a huge pity! Such a meaningful dream came to an abrupt halt because of Miss Firefly...

C: 看来你是真的不懂啊，那就回头看看吧……
E: Seems like you really do have no clue. Turn around and take a look...

C: …是的。
E: ...Yes.

C: 是啊。他们能以模因的形式穿梭于各个世界，只出现在特定的人眼中——不觉得和你口中的钟表小子很像吗？
E: Exactly. They traverse freely between different worlds as memetic entities and are only visible to certain people. Doesn't she sound very much like that Clockie you saw?

C: 噢，这可真是太糟糕了。但没关系，我依旧狂热！
E: Oh, that's a downer... but not for me! I'm still brimming with elation!

C: 那可以请你放我们过去吗？
E: Well, can you let us through?

C: 哈，这可是你自找的！但你可别太嚣张——像你这种人，我见过太多了！
E: You're asking for it! And I wouldn't be so cocky if I were you — I deal with punks like you all the time!

C: 尝试洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts.

C: 这是哪儿？
E: Where is this?

C: 这里只有…一幅拼图。
E: There's nothing but... a jigsaw puzzle here.

C: 我现在该做什么？
E: What should I do now?

C: 怎么全是垃圾桶？
E: Why are there trashcans everywhere?

C: 放心，我会稍加操作，将梦泡堆叠在一起，为各位安排一场舒适的软着陆。
E: Don't worry, I'll do something about it. Let me stack the dream bubbles to give everyone a nice, soft landing.

C: 竟然发生了这种事，那…是又有人遇害了吗？
E: I can't believe this has happened. Was... someone killed again?

C: 我只是想问问——事到如今，家族还不打算出手吗？你那可怜的妹妹已经牺牲了哦？
E: I'm just curious — Now things have come to this, is The Family still unwilling to fight? I mean, your darling sister's already a goner, right?

C: 从你踏入忆域的那一刻起，现实的建筑构造便没有意义了。我能感受到，此刻她在很远的地方。
E: The moment you stepped into the Memory Zone, reality's building structures lost all meaning. I can sense that she is in a faraway place right now.

C: 抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
E: Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?

C: 我的意思是，不行…
E: I mean, no can do...

C: 她以为逃出生天了，但……
E: She thought she had escaped but...

C: …啊，请再等一下。
E: ...Ah, hold on just a sec.

C: 「茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ位于德涅斯-普鲁阡-多瑙三大星系的交界无主地带，星球表面气候以极端恶劣著称，时刻面临着来自小型天体冲击的威胁——」
E: "Sigonia-IV is located in an unclaimed zone at the intersection of the Dnies, Pruthian, and Dorneau star clusters. The planet's surface environment is known for being extremely harsh, constantly faced with the threat of impact from small-scale celestial objects..."

C: 答非所问。
E: That's not what I asked.

C: 钟表小子的笑容始终灿烂——不知他的目光是否能够遍及美梦中每一处无光的角落？
E: Clockie's smile forever radiant — It's not yet known if his gaze can reach every dark corner in the realm of dreams.

C: 「哦…一位忆者，你侍从流光忆庭…还是焚化工？」
E: "Oh... a Memokeeper. Do you serve the Garden of Recollection... or The Cremators?"

C: 「…日前，星际和平公司在松波尔的市场开拓任务已接近尾声——」
E: "...Days ago, the Interastral Peace Corporation's market trailblaze mission in Sombor was coming to an end..."

C: 但您也知道，若想真相水落石出，一点高昂的风险是必须的。
E: I'm sure you're aware of the high level of risk I'll be undertaking to bring the truth to light.

C: 我确实需要一位仆人，助我从外部找出家族中潜伏的*邪恶*。而我会自内向外肃清，在十七个系统时内将真凶捉拿归案。
E: I indeed do need a servant to help me uncover the evil hidden in The Family from an external perspective. I will purge the evil from the inside and bring the real culprits to justice within seventeen system hours.

C: 加拉赫…加拉赫…他会在哪儿呢？
E: Gallagher... Gallagher... Where could he be?

C: 这位极其有原则的猎犬家系成员大笑着离开了现场。
E: The highly principled member of the Bloodhound Family laughed heartily and left the scene.

C: 似乎是原因不明的昏迷，幸好当事人最后还是恢复意识了…毕竟有家族在保护客人们嘛。
E: It was like they were in some sort of coma. Nobody knows what caused it, but luckily, the customer eventually regained consciousness... Well, all customers are under the protection of The Family, after all.

C: 为什么这间酒吧不卖苏乐达呢，是有什么隐情吗？
E: Why don't they sell SoulGlad in this bar? Did something happen?

C: 金币柠檬片。
E: Coin-shaped lemon slices.

C: ——敬伟大的复仇。
E: ...To great vengeance.

C: 这真正的滋味…和那位<color=#dbc291ff>米哈伊尔</color>有关吗？
E: Does this "true taste" have anything to do with that <color=#dbc291ff>Mikhail</color>?

C: 还有…钟表小子是钟表匠。
E: And that... Clockie is based on the Watchmaker.

C: 是在一次又一次成功后，带着不可胜数的筹码满载而归，还是在一次失败后……
E: Will I return triumphant with unending riches after countless successes, or will I encounter failure...

C: 我就是你，甚至比你更了解「自己」，更知道你到底想要什么。你快死了，死到临头还想拉几个倒霉蛋一起上路…所以你才会来这儿，不是么？
E: I'm you, and perhaps even more aware of yourself than you, of what exactly you want. You're dying, and you still want to drag a bunch of unfortunate fools with you through death's door... That's why you're here, isn't it?

C: 正好，你提到了那位教授——我特别喜欢你和他的共同点，阴谋和算计…尤其是结局的那部分，一场华丽的背叛！
E: It's good timing that you mentioned the doctor. I'm especially fond of what you and he have in common, the conspiracies... calculations... especially the part about the finale, a magnificent act of betrayal!

C: 人们只看见你在牌局上一掷千金，却不知道在牌桌下还有另一只手，握紧筹码，颤抖不已……
E: They only see your big bets, your bravado, the full house, the straight flush. They don't know the other hand is below the table, clutching your chips for dear life.

C: 当然，姐姐也在，我们四个人刚玩过捉迷藏。
E: Of course, Big Sis is there too. The four of us were just playing hide-and-seek.

C: 「发言人对这一『深重的人道主义灾难』表达了深切哀悼，同时就此事向全体星际公民发表重要讲话——」
E: "The spokesperson expresses his deepest condolences for this devastating humanitarian disaster, at the same time delivering an important message on this matter to all interplanetary citizens..."

C: 基石消失了…又是「同谐」的幻觉啊。
E: The cornerstone is gone... Another illusion of the Harmony.

C: 普通员工才要穿那种衣服，我的位置…比他们高得多。
E: Only ordinary employees have to wear that. My position... is much higher than theirs.

C: 你为什么没有告诉同伴，我的*真实身份*？
E: Why did you not tell your companions about my true identity?

C: 空无一人？之前猎犬们驱散了游客，现在他们也不知去向……
E: Not a soul in sight? The Hounds drove out the visitors, and now their whereabouts are unknown too...

C: 它们不在梦中。
E: They aren't in a dream.

C: …我不打算做什么。
E: ...I don't intend to do anything.

C: 知更鸟小姐放心，我们会加强巡逻，保证不出任何意外。
E: Rest assured, Miss Robin, we'll intensify our patrols to ensure that no incidents occur.

C: 就这样吧。
E: Let's call it a day.

C: 这样啊…那你们应该和加拉赫谈谈，不过他正在接待橡木家系的访客，特意嘱咐大家不要打扰。
E: I see... Then you'll have to speak with Gallagher. But he's currently busy hosting a visitor from the Oak Family, and specifically asked not to be disturbed.

C: 让我瞧瞧…是什么让神主最优秀的两位诠释者如此好奇，竟然连餐后甜点都忘了品尝？
E: Let's see... what is it that has captured the attention of the two best interpreters of the Great One, to the point that they've forgotten how to enjoy their dessert?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「沉眠」</color>，这就是它真正的名字。常人无法在梦境中再度沉睡，我们才有机会钻这个空子。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Dormancy,"</color> that's its real name. We exploited a loophole — you see, regular people can't fall asleep again while they are inside the Dreamscape.

C: 看来有人需要帮助…我们去看看吧。
E: Looks like someone needs help... let's go check it out.

C: 这就是匹诺康尼的美梦存在的意义。
E: That's precisely why this sweet dream in Penacony exists.

C: 自然如此。
E: Naturally.

C: 欢迎来到「白日梦」酒店，请问有什么可以为您效劳的？
E: Welcome to the Reverie Hotel. How may I help you?

C: 我是刚登上星穹列车的新人无名客，叫「帕姆」。
E: Me? I'm Pom-Pom, a new Nameless who's also with the Astral Express.

C: 哦！那就好！我专程跑来共襄盛举的，就怕这庆典出事呢！
E: Oh! That's a relief! I didn't come all this way to see the festival go down the drain!

C: 除非邀请函不是由他们寄出，那家族在这种局面下依然坚持举办谐乐大典…就更耐人寻味了。
E: Unless the invitations weren't sent by them. If that's the case, it's even more intriguing that The Family insists on organizing the Charmony Festival... despite the chaos.

C: 如果这正是逝者们期望的结果，我们还应令它做出改变吗？
E: If this is what the departed ones expected, should we try to change it?

C: 哈哈，多么朴实又温暖的话语！
E: Haha, simple words, but full of warmth!

C: 依我看，光靠瓦尔特参与谈判肯定远远不够。且不论对方是否会乖乖就范，谈判这件事本身只能给我们创造一个和对方分庭抗礼的机会，不能带来任何优势。
E: As I see it, relying on Welt's negotiations alone is far from enough. Regardless of whether the other party will be compliant, negotiating simply allows us to meet them as equals, it won't grant us an upper hand.

C: （跪地求饶）
E: (Get on my knees and grovel)

C: 为什么竞争对手…是苏乐达？
E: Why is our opponent... SoulGlad?

C: 这关不会是要我们话疗它吧…
E: So, this stage is requiring us to cure this thing with a whole therapy session now?

C: 小心，更多怪物进来了！准备开火！
E: Careful, looks like we've got more company! Get ready to fire!

C: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
E: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

C: 如果我没猜错，纯美骑士团应该也收到了「钟表匠」的邀请函，对吧？
E: If I'm not wrong, the Knights of Beauty also received an invitation from the Watchmaker, right?

C: 你怎么在这里？
E: What are you doing here?

C: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
E: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

C: 但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
E: But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!

C: 虽然抵达后我一度因不善言辞而被当作身材高大、身着银铠、如烈焰般火红而炽热的通缉犯…但无妨，这一切都是来自梦想之地的「纯美」历练。
E: Though upon arrival, I was once mistaken for a towering, silver-armored fugitive with fiery red flames, due to my lack of eloquence... it matters not, for all these trials stem from the Land of Dream's Beauty.

C: 就是说……
E: That means...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>还是选择为它打造鸟笼，在温暖的屋宇中精心饲养鸟儿？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Or build a cage for it, and feed it, giving it the utmost care from within the warmth of a home?</color>

C: 逐梦客的故事啊…本着善意，我应该会<color=#dbc291ff>请求猎犬家系停止追捕</color>，拉他一把。
E: A Dreamchaser story... If I acted out of kindness, I would probably <color=#dbc291ff>ask the Bloodhounds to stop their pursuit</color> and lend him a hand.

C: 也只有在这样的日子里，人们不必面对弱肉强食的法则，能够在这短短数日中「幸福地活着」。只可惜…两三个日夜相较漫长的人生还是太过短暂。
E: And it is only on these days, that people do not have to adhere to the law where the strong prey on the weak — they can live out their lives happily during these brief intermissions. It's just a pity... that two or three days are still too fleeting compared to the span of a lifetime.

C: 真是个好故事。不过在匹诺康尼的动画里，钟表小子和伙伴们一直都生活在美梦小镇，似乎从来没有离开过？
E: That's a great story, but in the Penacony cartoon, Clockie and his partners have always lived in Dreamville and never ventured out, right?

C: 米哈伊尔不喜欢别人叫他爷爷，他说听着显老，自己还年轻。「米哈伊尔」是父母留给他的名字——{RUBY_B#米哈-伊尔}米哈利和伊丽丝{RUBY_E#}，两位伟大的海上旅行者。
E: He didn't want me to call him "Grandpa" because that would make him sound old. He believed he was still young. The name "Mikhail" was given to him by his parents, Mihaly and Elise, both renowned seafarers.

C: 它们不会突然动起来吧？
E: They won't suddenly start moving, will they?

C: 看来在完成这出剧目前，它是不会让我们离开的。
E: Guess we won't be able to leave until this act is complete.

C: 「主人已不在，我便不再有自己的主人。我应寻找新的主人，并为之效忠。」
E: "Master is no longer here. I must seek a new master and serve them faithfully."

C: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
E: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

C: 「如若没有一位君王，谁能使星辰流转、潮汐涨落、万物生长？」
E: "Without a king, who shall govern the movement of stars, the ebb and flow of tides, and the growth of all things?"

C: 在那种世界里，人根本不可能获得真正的幸福！不过只是星神的玩具罢了！
E: People will never achieve true happiness in a world like that! They would just be toys for the Aeon!

C: 不过，在未来的序曲正式奏响前，还烦请各位再花些时间思考我提出的问题——
E: However, before the prelude to the future begins, please take a moment to ponder the questions I've posed...

C: 诸位既智慧又敏锐，自然不难理解，为何「同谐」与「秩序」能够合二为一。
E: Wise and perceptive as you are... Answer me this — Why could the Harmony and the Order merge into one?

C: 将军为人深明大义。能有仙舟联盟从中斡旋，匹诺康尼的和平指日可待。
E: The general possesses a deep understanding of the greater good. With the Xianzhou Alliance mediating, peace for Penacony is within reach.

C: 希望这次旅行平安无事…
E: Please let this trip be uneventful...

C: 怎么样，这趟美梦之旅…可还令你满意？
E: How about it, this journey of beautiful dreams... Was it to your liking?

C: 我…我可没弄坏它…
E: I... I wasn't the one who broke it...

C: 人生看似漫长，却也只能提取出不过寥寥数份饱含力量的记忆：或欢欣、或悲伤，或轻快、或沉重…但你不一样，{NICKNAME}。
E: Life, seemingly vast, offers but a scant collection of impactful memories: Some joyful, some sorrowful, some light, some heavy... But you, {NICKNAME}, are different.

C: 见见知更鸟小姐吧。她是凭借自己的意志从太一之梦中醒来的人，也是这位坚强的小姐孜孜不倦地用歌声将我们引领至此。
E: Let me introduce you to Robin. She woke up from Ena's Dream by her own will, and it's this tough lady who led us here with her song.

C: 这其中也包括我的哥哥。太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
E: This includes my brother as well. Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.

C: 正如我所说，我们的计划不是让所有人弃暗投明，而是让他们选择自救。试问，人要在什么情况下才会自救？
E: As I said, our plan is not about convincing everyone to choose the right path, but about inspiring them to save themselves. So, when will people actively save themselves?

C: 明明身在「虚无」之中，却要守望人们离开「虚无」……
E: Now come to think that you exist in the Nihility, and you watch over others to depart it...

C: 直到那沉寂的黑暗中，回忆泛起点点涟漪……
E: Until memories stir up ripples in that quiet darkness...

C: 你知道的，我的「剧本」还没结束。
E: Well, you know, my "script" isn't over yet.

C: 若是让家族或公司其中一方完全掌控匹诺康尼，只怕这里又会变回声色犬马的虚假美梦，老无名客们的努力…又会再度付诸东流。
E: If either The Family or IPC were to assume full control of Penacony, it would return to its previous illusory dream of hedonism, and the efforts of those previous Nameless... would once again go to waste.

C: 这就是接下来，我们要在「晖长石号」上见证的事了。
E: That's what we're about to witness on the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 在甜蜜中憧憬明天。
E: In sweetness, we dream of the future.

C: 「秩序」是何时出现的？
E: When did the Order infiltrate Penacony?

C: 你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
E: What happened to you in Ena's dream?

C: 我把位置在您的设备上标记出来了，请查收。
E: I've marked the pawnshop's location on your device. Please feel free to check it out.

C: （反正暂时没有别的事做，就照她说的四处看看吧。）
E: (Well, I've got nothing better to do anyway. I'll do as she says and see what happens.)

C: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
E: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)

C: 祝你们在大典上玩得开心。
E: I hope you guys have fun at the festival.

C: 听起来很简单，很好实现。那么，来谈谈代价吧？
E: Sounds simple enough. Very pragmatic. Then, let's discuss the cost.

C: （还是再转转好了……）
E: (Let's keep walking...)

C: 这只「捕头」娃娃彻底不吱声了。你将它打开（其实是撕开，但这么说有些残忍），发现它确实是玩具——只不过装了遥控小音响而已。
E: This "Constable" Doll finally falls silent. You open it up (more like tear it apart, though that sounds cruel) and uncover its true nature — a mere toy equipped with a remote speaker.

C: 我们在哪里见过吗？
E: Have we met somewhere?

C: 现在，匹诺康尼也如你期望的那样，在漫漫长夜后迎来了黎明。前路或许不是一帆风顺，但人们已经做好准备迈向「自由」。
E: Now, Penacony as you hoped, has welcomed the dawn after a long, dark night. The path forward may not be a bed of roses, but at least people are prepared to step forth towards freedom.

C: 你究竟是什么人？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 为对抗自灭的结局，我踏上旅途，寻找斩断「虚无」的方法。而漫长的求索过后，我确信自己的目的地就在分割现实与虚无的「黑网」深处。
E: In order to fight against the cruel end of self-destruction, I went on a journey, in search of a way to sever the chains of the Nihility. After a long and grueling search, I am convinced that my destination lies within the depths of the Dark Web, where reality and the Nihility are separate.

C: 各位可曾想过？如果你们此行的目的地是连大名鼎鼎的阿基维利都未曾抵达过的世界……
E: Have you all considered this? Perhaps your destination could be a world that even the renowned Akivili never reached...

C: 学术研讨…是要坐在大讲堂里，对着几百页幻灯片聊上好几个系统时？
E: An academic conference... You mean we'll have to sit in an auditorium and spend several system hours talking about a few hundred slides' worth of scholarly discourse?

C: （这里就是折纸大学？不像学校啊，倒是很眼熟。）
E: (Is this Paperfold University? It doesn't look much like a school, but it does look somewhat familiar.)

C: 这真的是折纸大学吗？
E: Is this really Paperfold University?

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 这…怎么可能？校长怎么是……
E: Wha... No way. The dean is...

C: 经过讨论，教研组一致决定，取消本学期所有的课程和考试，只需参与校庆便可获取学分！
E: After some discussion, the teaching research team has come to a unanimous decision to cancel all courses and exams for this semester. Everyone who attends the school anniversary will earn their credits.

C: 我是星穹列车的无名客。
E: I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.

C: 你怎么知道这么多？
E: How do you know so much?

C: 筑梦学院。
E: Dreamweaver Academy.

C: 看不起筑梦学院？
E: Is Dreamweaver Academy not good enough?

C: 哦，是你们啊！我是群里的「蕉开富贵」，直接叫我富贵也行！
E: Oh, it's you guys! I'm Peelin' Richie from the group chat. You can call me Richie!

C: 当然——盛会巨星、无名客、匹诺康尼的股东！不要小看财富学院的情报网，你们还没走进校门，爆料帖子就已经塞满折纸论坛了。
E: Of course. You're the Festive Superstar, the Nameless, and Penacony's shareholders! Don't underestimate Fortune Academy's intelligence network. The Paperfold forums were filled with all the latest scoops before you even walked through the school gates.

C: 同学们，刚刚就是开个玩笑。来来来，别说前面的摊子了，您三位想去哪就去哪儿，要不要来我宿舍坐坐？来我家也行！
E: My friends, I was just kidding earlier. Please, you three can go wherever you like. If the booths up ahead aren't enough, why don't you come visit my dorm? Or my home!

C: 难道是…
E: Could it be...

C: 找到你了！这下我看你往哪跑！
E: Found you! You're not getting away this time!

C: 我没给别人拍过照片，还是你来吧。
E: I've never taken photos of other people before. It might be better if you do it.

C: 什么罗？
E: Shura huh?

C: 别把初心忘了。
E: Don't forget the aspirations you once had.

C: 就算不怎么样，但总归是麦芽汁，但凡请我喝的人，我从不对他们食言。
E: It may not be much, but it's still malt juice. I never break a promise to those who treat me.

C: 您果然也注意到了啊，附近的忆质在它开始盛行后发生了变化。
E: As I expected, it's come to your attention too. The memoria nearby has been mutating ever since Slumbernana Monkey gained popularity.

C: 但要好事成双，让让步也没什么。带上这个再去吧，他们看到就明白了——放心，不会破坏规矩，只是提醒他们别刻意刁难。
E: But you know what they say: Good things come in pairs! There's no harm in making a concession sometimes. Here, bring this with you the next time you head over. They'll know what to do once they see it. And don't worry, we're still playing by the book. This is just to keep them from making things difficult for you.

C: 三月七话音未落，蒙塔娜自顾自跑开了……
E: Montana runs off on her own before March 7th even finishes speaking...

C: 但就在那么做了之后……
E: But right after doing that...

C: 那边的牛仔，有空说风凉话，不如过来搭把手。
E: Shut up, cowboy. Enough snide remarks. Come over and help us out.

C: 恐怕不是相信我，而是他们从没想过放弃这里。
E: I think it's less about believing me than them not wanting to give up on this place.

C: 那么，知更鸟小姐，还需要我做些什么吗？
E: So, Miss Robin, is there anything else I can do?

C: 周藏没有激战的痕迹，它们一定是被非常快速地击败，就此丧失自身的全部。
E: There are no indications of a fierce battle in the area. They must have been swiftly defeated, losing everything that defines them.

C: 用它来装饰这面墙壁吧，主题就是我，还有大家最爱的「睡蕉小猴」！
E: Let's use it to decorate this wall, the theme will be everyone's favorite monkey, Slumbernana Monkey!

C: 从配色到构图，从整体到局部，从立意到设计，它值得你花费一个系统时…不，一整天…不，一整年的时间来仔细打磨！在筑梦艺术史上留下浓墨重彩的一笔！
E: From color schemes to composition, from the big picture to the smallest detail, from concept to design — it deserves not just a system hour, not just a day, but an entire year of meticulous refinement! Make your mark on the history of dream art!

C: 这是作弊蕉！
E: That's cheating, bana!

C: 好双标的老师…
E: What a hypocritical teacher...

C: 终于露出残暴的本性了吗？那在下可要开始壮绝•狩猎了。
E: Alas, the pretense of your tyranny has shattered. With that, a magnificent hunt shall be set in motion!

C: 误会，都是误会。
E: It's all a misunderstanding.

C: 我是怎么*蕉*你的？天大地大，客户最大——你们好呀，亲爱的同学们……
E: "The customer is always right!" Did I not teach you that? Greetings, dear students...

C: 话说回来，蕉师……
E: By the way, BananAdvisor...

C: 哦，我听说令尊也一起来到了匹诺康尼。他换了份工作，在早霞工厂没日没夜地上班，真是感人蕉。
E: Oh, I heard your father came to Penacony, too. He's been working day and night ever since taking up a new job at Dawn Factory, hasn't he? Aww bana, how touching!

C: 接下来是指引勇者的「贤者小猴」…丹恒演员，我认为你的气质很符合。
E: Next up is Wise Monkey who guides Brave Monkey... Your disposition makes you perfect for this role, Dan Heng.

C: 请随意。
E: As you wish.

C: 蕉，蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana...

C: 这玩偶…简直就跟活物一样。
E: Does this toy... have a life of its own?

C: 半个奇怪的地方都没有——这可真香蕉的怪。
E: Not a single thing around here makes sense — this is downright bananas.

C: 可惜的是，感官隔绝得太快了些，他没能来得及听到少女的疑问，并以此重新斟酌自己的冒险。
E: Unfortunately, the sensory isolation happened too quickly. He didn't have time to hear the girl's question and reconsider his adventure.

C: 导演，解释一下
E: Better explain yourself, director.

C: 你、你居然还私藏武器，你想干什么——
E: Y—You are secretly concealing weapons as well? What are you planning—

C: 试炼？说什么*忍侠俚语*…又是个被猴子逼疯的可怜娃，*忍侠俚语*。
E: Trial? What kind of *Ninja Slang*... Another poor kid driven mad by those monkeys, *Ninja Slang*.

C: {NICKNAME}•忍者，还有何事？此时此刻容不得耽搁。
E: Ninja {NICKNAME}, is there anything else the matter? This is no time to be dawdling.

C: 一台平凡的摄像机，若不是出自忆者之手，你很难想象这东西能将你们送往另一片梦境。
E: An ordinary camera. Had it not been made by a Memokeeper, it'd be hard to imagine that this thing could send you to another dreamscape.

C: 邪祟，实在卑鄙！
E: A truly despicable fiendling!

C: <size=36>美梦多彩，理想自由！</size>
E: <size=36>Color your dreams, free your ideals!</size>

C: 飞龙忍者所言极是，在下已将「超•忍•卷轴」交予诸位，就用空手道来令踏上邪祟之道的忍徒们醒悟吧！
E: Ninja Hiryū is right. Since I have already relinquished the Super Ninja Scroll, I'll rely on my fists to awaken these ninja initiates that succumbed to the way of the fiendling.

C: 再往前，去卧房看看吧。
E: Let's move on to the bedroom.

C: 啊！吓我一跳……
E: Ah! That scared me...

C: …但也仅此而已。
E: ...But that's as far as I will go.

C: 其人将深入神性的试炼，证明摧锋陷坚之志，诚如神谕所示……
E: They now seek to venture deep into the trial of divinity and prove their will to destroy our enemies, as foretold by the prophecy...

C: 但愿…各位平安无事。
E: Please... stay safe.

C: 只是遇见了些前尘影事，不提也罢。
E: Just some memories from my past. Nothing worth mentioning.

C: 方才，我也见到一位故人…可白厄从未与他结识。
E: I saw someone from my past a while ago... Someone Phainon has never met.

C: 谢谢你帮我说话。我平日深居简出，虽说有点积蓄，但…确实不擅长与他人打交道，更遑论购物还价。如果没有你，恐怕是要破费了。
E: Thanks for helping me out. I'm not one to venture out often, and while I have some savings, it takes a lot out of me to even talk to people, let alone haggle... Had you not been here, I would've been set back plenty.

C: 不必紧张，我们绝不会为难你。缇安会作为外交使者前往，另外，遐蝶也会同去。
E: No need to fret. We won't put you on the spot. Trianne will be going there as the diplomatic messenger of Okhema, and Castorice will be accompanying her.

C: 不过，学院是这么安静的地方吗？
E: But... is the academy supposed to be this quiet?

C: 缇安相信，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}不会有事的！毕竟都说了，树庭的大家都很聪明嘛。
E: Trianne believes {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} will be alright! After all, everybody says that the people of the Grove are really smart.

C: 不过，请千万答应我们…保护好自己。
E: Please promise us that you'll take care of yourself.

C: 此刻，站在这里与各位交谈的，并非记忆的残留，而是我科学的结晶，高贵、纯粹、确凿、无疑的真理。
E: The person standing here and conversing with you right now isn't the vestiges of a memory. Rather, it is the culmination of the greatness of science and the pure, irrefutable, and undeniable exalted truth.

C: 不，不是幻觉，我也听到了。
E: No, you didn't imagine it. I heard it as well.

C: 别怕，我有捉鬼工作经验！
E: Don't be afraid, I have experience in ghost hunting!

C: 心脏？
E: The heart?

C: 智力问答？也好，吾喜欢，请。
E: A pop quiz? Well, that sparks my interest. Go ahead.

C: 原来我们这是在泰坦头上动土…
E: So, what we're doing is simply provoking the Titans...

C: <size=36>小小咪——要燃起来了——！</size>
E: <size=36>Memmy... is about to burst into flames!</size>

C: 既然如此，那我们先撤了。
E: If that's the case, let's get out of here.

C: 终于来了，伙伴！等你们很久了……
E: You're finally here, friend! I've been waiting for a while now...

C: 门扉，对面…会在哪里？
E: The entrance on the other side... Where could it be?

C: 奥、奥赫玛的宪兵队正在执行公务，请勿随便靠近！
E: Th—The Civil Guard of Okhema is on official duty. Please keep out of this area!

C: 言外之意…你曾想过放弃悬锋的王权，放弃领导你的族人。
E: In other words... you did entertain the thought of giving up the throne of Kremnos and forsaking your people.

C: 一。
E: One.

C: 小白！连小白也……
E: Snowy! Even Snowy...

C: 咱俩认识也有段时间了，听你说悬锋古语的次数…屈指可数啊。
E: Though we've been acquainted for some time, I have... rarely heard you talk in the ancient tongue of Kremnos.

C: …你们的字典里是不是压根没字？
E: ...I'm getting the feeling that your language has no words at all.

C: 然后，我在其中看到了奥赫玛。以及……
E: But to answer your question, I saw Okhema in the trial, as well as...

C: 「迈德漠斯，不要悲伤。我已挣得荣耀，用光荣的死亡回敬夙敌……」
E: "Mydeimos, do not mourn. I have achieved honor by bestowing a noble death upon the enemy..."

C: 听说是悬锋人…
E: I heard it's the Kremnoan...

C: ——遍地都是她的金丝，我知道。那女人相当自信，笃定我逃不出她的掌心。
E: ...Is covered by her golden threads, I know. That woman is extremely confident I won't escape her grasp.

C: 苦啊！还不如陪你整理文件呢。
E: Awful! I should have stayed and organized documents with you.

C: 聊了这么久，肚子有点饿啦。况且，不是快到{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}了嘛。
E: After all this talking, we are feeling a bit hungry. Plus, it's nearly the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} now.

C: 说到这个…在觐见泰坦前，*我们*最好准备一些「番红蕊」。
E: Oh, on that note... we had better prepare some "saffron" before we meet with the Titan.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>命运重渊</color>！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Abyss of Fate</color>!

C: 没有…应该也没关系，试着说服{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}吧。
E: I suppose we can do without it... Let's try to convince {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我没能救下那孩子。
E: I failed to save that child.

C: 我们誓死追随您。
E: We dedicate our lives to following you.

C: 欢迎回来！
E: Welcome back!

C: 谢谢你。太好啦。
E: That's great. Thank you.

C: 你还是不懂他：没准都用不着第一遍，他就会一拳把门揍开了。
E: You still don't know him well enough then. He might not even need a first try — he'd just punch the door open.

C: 不过，虽然我没拿，可保不齐其它人不会动歪心思…毕竟圣女大人的手灵巧得很，你做的那些玩具，大家可都愿意高价收购呢，呵呵。
E: While I didn't take them this time, I can't speak for others. Your craftsmanship is brilliant! Those toys of yours could fetch a great price out there, hehe.

C: 当真。我本以为，眼下这动不动死去活来的状态会妨碍我取回身体……
E: Certainly. I initially thought this extremely frail state would hinder me from getting my body back...

C: 和死人作伴去吧！
E: Go find your friends in hell!

C: 看起来，这个叫做「圣杯」的奇物确实很古怪。虽然还记得我们一起经历了这场冒险，但事后回想起来，有些细节却总会变得模糊起来。
E: It's indeed bizarre. This so-called "Holy Grail" Curio... Even though I still recall what we went through together, some of the details always get a bit hazy when I think back on it.

C: 嗯？那是知更鸟？她怎么来这儿了？
E: Hmm? Isn't that Robin? What's she doing here?

C: 在对无名客进行「匹诺康尼圣杯战争」进一步采访前，让我们先进一段插播广告——
E: Before we continue our interview with the Nameless about the Penaconian Holy Grail War, let's cut to a quick commercial break—

C: 但能有幸见证它存在的人却少之又少。嚯嗬嗬嗬！现在，我将为各位带来一个见证它的机会——
E: Yet, only a rare few ever have the privilege of witnessing its existence firsthand. Hohohoho! But today, I bring you all that very opportunity—

C: 毕竟这可是梦里。冰淇淋和酒瓶都能开口说话，乐器自动演奏。什么实现愿望的圣杯，死而复生的历史名人…倒也不太让人意外。
E: Well, we are in a dream world where ice cream talks, wine bottles sing, and instruments play themselves. A Grail that grants wishes and legendary figures resurrecting from history? Not so far-fetched here, I guess.

C: 我的制片人，时间宝贵，还是快点看看其他参战者的情况吧。
E: Producer, time's ticking. Let's hurry and check out the other participants!

C: 哼哼，所幸，我抽到了你这张上上签，Assassin！凭借你的宝具，我们应该能占得先机……
E: Lucky for me, I drew the best possible card: Assassin! With your Noble Phantasm, we should have the upper hand...

C: 你可以叫我Lancer。
E: You can call me Lancer.

C: 你们认识？
E: Wait, you two know each other?

C: 呃，「魔力」、「宝具」…世上真的有这样的东西吗？
E: Uh, "magical energy," "Noble Phantasms"... Do these things really exist?

C: 在他眼中，匹诺康尼的历史名人也好，传奇英雄也罢，都只是被后人包装而成半真半假的形象…是橱窗里供人消费的商品，连梦想也会成为真人秀的奖品。
E: To him, the historical figures of Penacony, the legendary heroes, are all just half-truths, images created by later generations, like products in a store window. Even their dreams turned into reality TV prizes.

C: 向他们求饶！
E: We should surrender and beg for mercy!

C: 作为过来人，让我给你个忠告吧——圣杯从不会如人所愿，它能留下的，只有被欲望掩埋的亡灵。
E: Let me offer you some advice from experience — the Holy Grail never grants wishes the way people expect. All it leaves behind are dead souls buried by their desires.

C: …说的也是，我也这么觉得。希望石中剑能选出正确的王。
E: ...Right. I agree. I hope the Sword in the Stone manages to pick the right king.

C: 你迟到了，新人。再晚来几个系统日，报销时限都要过了。
E: You're late, newcomer. A few more system days of delay and we'll miss the reimbursement deadline.

C: 但对于那个曾经拔起石中剑的女孩来说，我无法责难她不自量力的心。她只是想像那位挑战白龙的王一样，试图去拯救些什么。
E: But I can't blame the girl who drew the Sword in the Stone for overestimating herself. She just wanted to deliver something from disaster... just like the king who challenged the White Dragon.

C: 我…无法成为像你们一样的愚者…
E: I... can't become a fool like you...

C: 我也不会认同你们的选择！
E: And I won't agree with your choices!

C: 哦嚯嚯嚯，为什么不能？
E: Hahaha... why not?

C: 不必为了一栋被保上了几百种保险的古老建筑物操心…老奥帝这家伙从来不会在钱的问题上让自己吃亏。
E: No need to feel bad for a heritage building insured with hundreds of different policies. Old Oti would never allow himself to lose a single coin over that.

C: 啧，到头来便宜了你们。
E: Tch, so the IPC is still the final winner of it all.

C: 看看这个忆质黑洞吧，十个琥珀纪过去了，曾经坐在这里，从零开始建造匹诺康尼的人们，如今就只剩下一个卑鄙无耻的老头。他的朋友也好，他的敌人也罢，全都不在了。
E: Look at this Memoria Singularity. Ten Amber Eras have passed, and out of those who once came here to build Penacony from the ground up, only one despicable old man is left. His friends, his enemies... they're all gone.

C: 面对即将出现的敌人，两位从者已跃跃欲试。
E: With enemies on the way, the two Servants were more than ready to fight.

C: 你声音呢？
E: Where's your voice?

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 你怎么在这儿？
E: Why are you here?

C: 我好不容易从坟墓里爬出来，别再用你那烂片来吵我的眼睛！
E: I spent so much effort clawing my way out of the grave, so quit burning my eyes with your bargain-bin flicks!

C: 两位，我们又见面了。作为Caster，你的战斗方式…实在让人眼前一亮。
E: We meet again. As a Caster, your combat style... was quite a surprise.

C: 你不要死哇！
E: Don't you dare die on me!

C: 那我的屁股怎么办？
E: Hey, what about my butt!?

C: 滴答，把功率开到最高，我就不信还有人能在我的钟表把戏里挺住。
E: Tick-tock, cranking power to maximum! I refuse to accept that anyone could resist my Clockwork now!

C: Archer？！
E: ARCHER!?

C: 在来之前，奥帝先生给了我一个后备方案：当我落败时，老老实实向诸位认输，并诚邀大家前往大剧院做客。
E: Mr. Oti gave me a backup plan before I came here. When I lose, I'm to humbly admit defeat and invite everyone to the Grand Theater.

C: 行了行了，说起话来一套一套的。可还人情是一码事，送死是另一码。
E: Okay, okay. I get it already. You have a way with words, I'll give you that. Still, it's one thing to repay a favor, but quite another to knowingly put myself in harm's way.

C: 至少我得先知道代价为何物。
E: I'll only know when I find out what it is.

C: 此去一别，便是永别。离开匹诺康尼前，我想再做一次回望。
E: When it's time to go, this will be farewell for good. So, before I leave Penacony, I'd like to take some time to look back on all the events that have taken place.

C: 我对甜品并无偏见，当初立下的法则也只是叫人们不要哄抢，依序拿取。
E: I have nothing against desserts. The only reason I made that rule is so that people can learn to wait in line in an orderly manner for things instead of shoving and jostling people around.

C: 只一眨眼的工夫，面前的冰激凌消失了。
E: In the blink of an eye, the ice cream vanished.

C: 如同路边常见的醉汉一般，他从口中吐出了一道彩虹——
E: Like a drunkard commonly seen by the sidewalk, he vomited a sliver of rainbow—

C: 当浮现的余音试图将你我纠正时，我就能寻获它的所在。
E: When a distorted Afterecho manifests to correct us, I'll be able to pinpoint its whereabouts.

C: 所以，是公司的人救了你？
E: So, it was the IPC that freed you?

C: 交给我的同伴了，毕竟他们更了解「停云小姐」，旅游度假的事也是年轻人更在行。
E: My companions are with her. They know Miss Tingyun better anyway. Plus, those youngsters will definitely do a better job than me when it comes to vacations.

C: 三月七小姐！此前的提议您考虑得如何了？
E: Miss March 7th! Have you taken the time to consider my suggestion?

C: 你最好不是说「聪敏过人」那句。
E: Hey! You'd better not be referring to the part about my wits surpassing many others!

C: 两位，请问这是何处？
E: Excuse me, could you tell me where I am?

C: 抱歉，现在还不能让你恢复知觉。你会因此痛不欲生。
E: I'm sorry. I can't let you regain your ability to feel just yet. You'd be in excruciating pain.

C: 将就一下吧。
E: You'll have to make do.

C: 最后一位…丹鼎司的白露大人，她喜好热闹。
E: Finally, we have Lady Bailu of the Alchemy Commission. She loves excitement.

C: 幻胧，怎么是你…
E: Phantylia? How...

C: 听二位描述，那绝灭大君果真本领非凡，所作所为都和小女子本人如出一辙。说是伪装，更像是代我活过了几日。
E: Based on your description, that Lord Ravager was indeed cunning. Her demeanor mirrored mine so closely that it felt like she was living my life for a few days rather than merely disguising herself.

C: 看完再说。
E: I'll let you know after I've seen it.

C: 我叫…万维克，是隐夜鸫家系的成员。
E: My name is... Wonweek. I'm a member of the Nightingale Family.

C: 这就是我的「开拓」之道，也是我停留于此的原因。
E: This is my way of the Trailblaze and the reason why I decided to stay here.

C: 另一个原因，则是为了苦痛…如同折翼坠地般，必能令我清醒的疼痛。
E: Another reason is to feel pain... A pain like falling from the sky with broken wings that can keep me awake.

C: 你看，我已经在试着做出改变了。
E: You see? I'm already starting to make changes.

C: 不管了，反正都得清理干净。跟紧我，可别轻易碎了！
E: Meh, whatever. We have to get rid of them anyway. Alright, stay close and try to avoid shattering to pieces!

C: 哈哈！不自量力的家伙，还以为自己有能力打断黑塔女士的实验？
E: Bahaha! Presumptuous fellows. Who are you to interrupt Madam Herta's experiment?

C: 但依旧剩下一份天文数字的清单——什么「『翁法罗斯神王队』下一赛季将使用王者巴维鲁取代队徽」——希望能帮上各位的忙吧。
E: There's still an unbelievably long list of generated results. Something about how the Divine Amphoreus team will swap out their current crest emblem for one in King Baviru's likeness in the next season. I hope that can be of some help to you.

C: 如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。给，这是你的武器。
E: Friction really does spark friendships, huh? Here, you can have your weapon back.

C: 你的枪……
E: About your spear...

C: 抱歉，黄金裔大人，让您见笑了。请问这两位是…？
E: I'm sorry you had to see that, esteemed Chrysos Heir. Hmm? These two with you are...?

C: 这位先生，您竟然不知道吗？这分明是家喻户晓的预言——
E: Excuse me, sir? Everyone knows about the prophecy. How is it that you—

C: 缇宝老师会和二位同行，解答你们的所有疑虑。
E: Tribbie will join you. She can also answer any questions you may have.

C: 哪来的舞台效果？
E: What's with the stage effects?

C: 三、三个缇宝？！
E: Th—Three Tribbies!?

C: *我们*是缇宝——不对，现在哪是自我介绍的时候！
E: We are Tribbie— Wait, no, now is not the time for introductions!

C: 这儿的人名一个赛一个奇怪。
E: The names of the people here keep getting stranger and stranger.

C: 这些敌人…一动不动？
E: These enemies... aren't moving?

C: 虽然信仰对大多数人更重要…但也有许多市民更在意身外之物。
E: Although faith is more important to the vast majority, there are still quite a number of citizens who care more about their worldly possessions.

C: 没事，我都死过好几回了。
E: It's fine. I've already died a number of times before.

C: 这场迎宾宴会算不上馨雅，但却帮助我们消除了疑虑。从现在起，你们便是圣城的贵客，黄金裔的上宾。
E: While this welcome banquet is far from elegant, it has helped to remove any misgivings that we had. From this moment forth, you shall be treated as distinguished guests of the holy city and of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 哪里变了？
E: How so?

C: 浴场的精灵正在跃动，这汪灵水是「海洋」泰坦的馈赠，它会带两位回到久远的过去。现在，请浸入浴池，聆听温暖的池水娓娓道来。
E: The bath sprites are excited to begin. This bath contains spirit water that has been blessed by the Ocean Titan. It can guide you back into the distant past. Go ahead, step in and listen to what the comforting ripples have to say.

C: 我发誓。
E: I promise.

C: 咦，你怎么也念上啦？说起来，刚到奥赫玛那会儿，你是不是也这么做了？
E: Eh? You can recite this, too? Wait, did you also chant this when we arrived in Okhema?

C: …昔日的影子，你还没有走出。黄金裔。
E: ...Out of the shadow of the past, you've not stepped, Chrysos Heir.

C: 嗡嗡嗡呜……
E: Grumphhh...

C: 唔，的确很诱人……
E: Oh, that's indeed tempting...

C: 不买。
E: No, thanks.

C: 别误会，我只是看那狮头不爽。
E: Don't misunderstand, I'm just annoyed at that lion head.

C: 暂且放下严肃的话题吧。介意给我和两位贵宾留点空间吗，缇宝？
E: Let's talk about something less serious for now. Would you mind giving the three of us some space, Tribbie?

C: 比匹诺康尼的客房强。
E: It's even better than the Penaconian hotel rooms.

C: 我一定要征服天空！
E: I'd conquer the skies for sure!

C: 视线逐渐模糊下去，取代冰冷现实的是一片紫色的海洋…她口中的花乡……
E: Your vision blurs, and cold reality fades into a purple ocean — her promised land of flowers.

C: 当然不是，朋友，你还好好地活着。
E: Not quite, Friend. You're still alive and kicking.

C: 一阵无名之花的暗香涌入了你的鼻腔…余韵如此甜美，令你逐渐忘却了呼吸的意义。
E: A subtle fragrance of an unnamed flower fills your senses, its sweetness making you forget the need to breathe.

C: 阿格莱雅她…为了奥赫玛，她的心早就结成了冰。
E: Aglaea... She has long sealed her heart in ice, for Okhema's sake.

C: 所以「半神」是什么？
E: So, what exactly is a demigod?

C: 开玩笑的，开拓之旅得继续下去。
E: Just kidding. We have to press on in our trailblazing expedition.

C: 我知道，重逢是种奢望。至少我们能让告别不那么草率。
E: I know that a reunion in the future is wishful thinking, but at the very least, we can bid each other a proper farewell.

C: 你醒了，睡得还真久。
E: You're finally awake. About time.

C: 若诸位心中已有提议，现在便是宣明的时刻。
E: Should you harbor any thoughts, this is the moment to bring them forth.

C: 即便圣城有两位半神驻守，这赌注也太过激进。因此……
E: Even with two demigods protecting the holy city, the risk is too great. Hence...

C: 来吧，搞起！
E: Sure, let's do this!

C: 阿格莱雅
E: Aglaea

C: 这里是外城廊道，过去由重兵把守，即使你我联手——至多走出三十步距离。
E: This is the outer city corridor. It used to be heavily guarded by soldiers. Even with the two of us working together, we wouldn't have made it past thirty steps.

C: 你要的战利品，拿去吧。
E: Well, here's your spoils.

C: 奥赫玛将要面临灭顶之灾。必须有人回援。
E: Okhema is on the brink of destruction. Someone needs to go back and rescue them.

C: 不、不对。我们要接着前进，完成我们的使命。
E: N—No, we need to press on and finish our mission.

C: 把这片战场交给我。我会拖住这具躯壳，让它无暇挥舞「天谴之锋」。带着消息回去…通知那两位半神。
E: I'll hold them off here and keep them from wielding the Blade of Fury. You need to head back and notify the two demigods.

C: 「天谴之锋」——即便世界已经破碎，它依然高悬于世人头顶。
E: The Blade of Fury — Even if the world lay shattered, it would still hang high above everyone's heads.

C: 过去参与竞技的战士，都是在这儿休整的么？
E: Maybe this is where all the warriors in the past took their breaks during competitions.

C: 我们与一位泰坦的殒落如此接近…这感觉很虚幻。
E: We're so close to the fall of a Titan... It feels unreal.

C: 你与白厄在掩护下撤离、回到奥赫玛……
E: You and Phainon retreat using the opportunity and return to Okhema...

C: 对，她叫三月七。
E: That's right, she's called March 7th.

C: 「奇迹典籍」…只能用它碰碰运气了。
E: The Tome of Miracles... We'll just have to try our luck with this, then.

C: 又是你……
E: It's you again...

C: 卡芙卡转头望向你，她的脸上浮现了那个你无比熟悉的笑容…一半冰冷，一半温暖。
E: Kafka turns to look at you, her face showing that familiar smile — half cold, half warm.

C: …有事吗？我在下副本，没空闲聊。
E: ...What's up? I'm in a raid and don't have time for small talk.

C: …泰坦？
E: ...Titan?

C: 这就解锁新命途了吗？！
E: Did I unlock a new Path just like that!?

C: 所有画面以外的洒血和悲鸣都只是主角的陪衬。我们会一同起舞，逆流而上，直到宇宙的「终末」。
E: All the bloodshed and cries beyond the screen are merely there to serve as the backdrop for the main characters. Together, we will dance against the current, until the universe meets the Finality.

C: 请问…有没有诗歌描绘了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂，还有悬锋城隐于迷雾的秘密？
E: I wonder if there is a ballad about {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s madness as well as the mystery of Castrum Kremnos vanishing into the fog.

C: 「神明啊，你厌倦了纷争吗？若是如此，该如何解释你的暴戾，笼罩你的幽暗该如何祛散？」
E: "O god, have you grown weary of endless strife? Then how do you justify your ruthless tyranny? And how shall you cast off the darkness that so deeply shrouds your divinity?"

C: 千百件之多，我曾打造过的神兵利器。逐一记住，不可能。
E: Thousands of marvels of weaponry, I crafted. Remember them all, impossible it is.

C: 如果迷迷认定他藏有宝贵的记忆，那就当面询问一番吧。
E: But if Mem thinks he has some valuable memories, we'd better ask him in person.

C: （…你还好吗，姐姐？）
E: (...Something on your mind, big sis?)

C: 啊…啊！桀桀桀，原来是阿格莱雅大人！赞美「法刻勒」，您的每一寸肌肤都同那天上黎明机器一样光芒万丈啊！
E: O—Oh, it's Lady Aglaea! Teehee, what a delight to see you here! Praise Phakele, every inch of your skin is glowing like the dawn itself!

C: {RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}老祖，请让我抱紧您老的飞毛腿……
E: O venerable {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}, may I borrow a fragment of your fleetness?

C: …您好？
E: ...Hello?
Heellooo!

C: 童叟无欺！要怪就怪那帮粗野的斗士，压根就不识货！
E: I'm as honest a merchant as they come! Those boorish warriors know nothing about quality gear!

C: 你看出什么了吗？
E: What's wrong with that weapon?

C: 安静……
E: Keep quiet...

C: 「不，你难道没听清吗？这是仪式的一部分，是为泰坦奉上的献祭。」
E: "Yes. Didn't you hear? This is part of the ritual. We need to offer up sacrifices to the Titan."

C: 「这是长远的战略。眼下的第一要务还是完成对神王的…『工程』。」
E: "That's the long-term plan. Our priority for now is still to complete the god-king's... 'project'."

C: …不可思议。
E: ...Unbelievable.

C: 铸魂雕像的长剑未能归位，此处还缺了些什么。仔细观察，雕像的本体并不完整。
E: The Sword of the Soul-Forging Statue failed to return to its original place. Something is still missing here. Upon close inspection, you notice the body of the statue is incomplete.

C: 这里。这里！
E: Here. Here!

C: 咦？它们在翁法罗斯应该随处可见才对。
E: Huh? They're all over Amphoreus.

C: 请告诉我…你是否知道{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}身在何方？
E: Please, tell me... do you know where {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is?

C: 还真是风平浪静，仿佛什么都没发生过。
E: It's so peaceful, as if nothing even happened.

C: 开局一人一狗…
E: So, once again, it's all down to one {M#guy}{F#gal} and {M#his}{F#her} dog.

C: 他必须战胜自己的恐惧…向神谕证明自己。
E: He must conquer his fear and prove himself to the prophecy.

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 巨龙吞下了城邦的公主，因此遭到勇士们的围剿。人们将恶龙击倒，却发现龙腹中的公主已然离世。
E: It swallowed the princess of the city whole before it was suppressed. After taking down the evil dragon, the warriors discovered that the princess' life had already met its end.

C: 原来不是阿格莱雅说了算？
E: So Aglaea doesn't actually call the shots?

C: 是我们？
E: Is it us?

C: 个中缘由我理解了。有什么我们能做的吗？
E: I have a better understanding of the full picture now. Is there anything that we can do?

C: 天父…选中了你……
E: Sky father... has chosen you...

C: 你有…资质…力量……
E: You have... potential... strength...

C: 意志…强大…坚韧……
E: Willpower... powerful... and tenacious...

C: 我没有「未来」吗？
E: I don't have a future?

C: 视觉以外的感官变得更加敏感，你感受到一片紫色的海洋……
E: Aside from your vision, your senses grow more acute. You feel the presence of a purple sea...

C: 找到什么了吗？
E: Did you discover something?

C: 呵，十五个日夜啊……
E: Heh, fifteen days and nights...

C: 呵…你也能看见它？
E: Heh... You can see them, too?

C: 让我们像真正的哲学家那样，通过话语和智慧决定你我究竟能为自己争取多少，又能为之牺牲多少吧。
E: Let us decide how much we can secure for ourselves and how much we're willing to sacrifice, like true philosophers — with our words and wisdom.

C: 这很重要吗？我有的是办法。依我看，你还是多关心关心迫在眉睫的威胁吧。
E: Is that of importance to you? All you need to know is that I have a plan. In my opinion, you should be more worried about the impending threat.

C: 阿格莱雅，今天她能在众目睽睽之下把我带走，明天她就能大手一挥，彻底废黜元老院，而我们方才议论的种种也都成了笑话——
E: If Aglaea can seize me in full view of the masses today, she could also dismiss the entire Council of Elders in one fell swoop tomorrow. If that happens, the discussion that we've just had will turn into an utter joke instead...

C: 呵，说来遗憾……
E: Ah, it's unfortunate...

C: 呼…突然…好困……
E: Why are my eyelids... so heavy... all of a sudden...?

C: （…谁也别想让我停止「开拓」。）
E: (No one can stop me from trailblazing!)

C: （无名客的字典里，没有「睡觉」二字……）
E: (The word "sleep" does not exist in the Nameless' dictionary...)

C: 我突然变得好困…
E: Wow, I feel so sleepy all of a sudden...

C: …听我讲个故事吧。
E: ...Then, let me tell you a story.

C: 而是阁下的灵魂不再属于人间…我的双手早已夺无可夺，仅此而已么？
E: ...but that your soul no longer belonged to this world... and there was nothing left for my hands to take. Nothing.

C: 觐见「死亡」泰坦，此行恐怕也前途未卜…我想，要是能抓住临行前的每一刻，不留遗憾就好了。
E: The journey to seek an audience with the Death Titan cannot be an easy one... I want to make full use of every moment I have before we depart, so that I don't have any regrets.

C: …这是她留下的诡计。
E: ...This is a trick she left for us.

C: 修复左边的黄金短矛。
E: Repair the left Golden Short Spear.

C: 既然我知道是礼物——那自然要开个高价啦！风的子民可不会在一个地方停留太久，除非你的诚意能让风驻足。怎么说，嗯？
E: Now, now. Since I know it's a gift — That just means I need to milk its worth! The children of the wind never stay for long in one place, unless your offer is tempting enough to still the wind. What say you?

C: 哎呀，人家好怕怕…嘻，能追上我的尾巴再说吧？
E: Waaaah, I'm so scared! Tee-hee, can you even catch my tail?

C: 是我…在抗拒它。顺流而下的诱惑…我会抵抗……
E: I'm the one... resisting it. I must resist... the temptation to go with the flow...

C: 但是，缇安相信小小蝶，总有一天会回到，冥界——
E: But Trianne believed that Little Cas would eventually return to the nether realm...

C: …我知晓了。
E: ...I see.

C: 为了让我过上新的人生，它却没能顺遂心愿，早早陨落…玻吕刻斯该有多想亲眼见证，它竭尽全力拯救的姐姐，今后生活得怎么样啊。
E: They never saw their wish fulfilled and fell so prematurely, all because they wanted to give me a new life... Pollux must really want to know how their sister has been after giving their all to save her.

C: 若死神举起左手，则灵魂受赐死亡，步入冥界，等待转生；若举起右手，则灵魂将被冥界拒绝，回归人间，继续在大地上前进。
E: If the Reaper raises their left hand, the soul is granted death and allowed to enter the nether realm to await reincarnation. If they raise their right hand, the soul is rejected by the nether realm and returned to the mortal realm to continue walking the earth.

C: 我们…真是一同走过了无比荒谬的旅途啊。
E: We've taken quite the ridiculous journey together, haven't we?
What...?

C: 你更加爱真理。
E: You cherish the truth even more.

C: 但是，很遗憾：我仍然对此结果深表质疑，并要求挑战此次决议！
E: But I regret to say that I still harbor doubts about this outcome. Thus, I hereby challenge this resolution!

C: 哈，看啊！连你白厄和阿格莱雅都没这个胆量！
E: Haha! Will you look at that? Even Phainon and Aglaea lack the courage to make such a promise!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而我们所有人的灵魂，都将在负世的神迹下永存不灭——我承诺，刻法勒庇护下的一切，都必将步入那新生的世界！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>All of our souls shall endure for eternity in the miracle of the Worldbearer, and all under Kephale's protection shall step into that new world!</color>

C: 每一位来到这里的亡者，都会发出同样的感叹。
E: Every departed soul who has arrived here has expressed the same.

C: 「所以，前进吧。不要停下向前的脚步，不要辜负她的牺牲，还有曾经与你同行的一切——」
E: "So, continue onward. Do not stop moving forward, and do not let her sacrifice and the support of all who have stood by you be in vain..."

C: 请吧。
E: Please do.

C: 恭喜我们，在各自命运的末端达成了一样共识。
E: Congratulations are in order. We've found common ground at the very end of our destined paths.

C: 我相信她一直都在我们身边。
E: I believe she'll always be at our side.

C: 姬子小姐，继续合作才是最明智的选择……
E: Miss Himeko, the wisest choice right now is for us to continue cooperating...

C: 好、好的，一定不负使命，黑塔女士……
E: O—Okay, I won't fail the mission, Madam Herta...

C: 很好——第一面镜，我们出发吧。
E: Excellent — First Mirror, let's get going.

C: 万敌不得不肩负起「纷争」的重任，但悬锋人也绝不会将火种拱手让给宿敌奥赫玛。为了寻求理解，他决定首先向恩师，悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯请教，二人不欢而散。
E: Mydei had to shoulder the burden of Strife, but the Kremnoans would never willingly give up the Coreflame to their old foe Okhema. In an attempt to gain a better understanding, he decides to first seek advice from his teacher Krateros, a veteran of Kremnos. The two part on bad terms.

C: …但我不会这么做。这不重要。
E: ...But no, I will not do that. That isn't important.

C: 当然是开玩笑的。拜托啦丹宝，我们上吧——
E: Hehe, I'm kidding, Dannie! Lend me a hand, pretty please? Alright, now let's get them!

C: 发生什么了？这里已是一片废墟，不该有这么多敌人才对。
E: This place is practically in ruins. What happened? There shouldn't be this many monsters here.

C: 咳咳，好多灰尘…这些都是他收到的投诉信吗？
E: Ack, it's so dusty in here... Whoa, are these all complaints about him?

C: 倘若我是一头愚昧无知的大地兽，面对此等伟力，也许会将四肢匍匐在大地上，盼望诸神为我降下神谕。只可惜，我是靠双足直立行走，拥有智慧和尊严的人类。
E: If I were as foolish as a dromas, perhaps I'd throw myself down and prostrate before their greatness, begging for the gods' prophetic wisdom. Well, sorry to disappoint, but I'm no dromas. Alas, I am a human, standing tall on two feet, possessing both intellect and pride.

C: 我要掌握的是生命根源之法，「灵魂」的本质——<color=#dbc291ff>「『我们』究竟是为何物」</color>。
E: The source of life is what I wish to grasp... To understand what makes up the soul, and to learn <color=#dbc291ff>what we really are</color>.

C: 我来了。{NICKNAME}阁下的性命危在旦夕，还请您不要做多余的事。
E: I'm here. {NICKNAME}'s life hangs by a thread, I must ask you to refrain from taking any unnecessary steps.

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 小声点，黄金裔来了。
E: Hush, the Chrysos Heir is here.

C: 不过，这究竟是？
E: And yet, what exactly is this?

C: 怎么，把你说倒了？
E: What? At a loss for words?

C: 将「勇气」、「荣耀」、「坚韧」、「牺牲」和「理智」尽数分离……
E: Completely separating Courage, Honor, Tenacity, Sacrifice, and Reason...

C: 打起精神，小姑娘。不必为光荣的死亡落泪。
E: Cheer up, young lady. There is no need to shed tears over a glorious death.

C: 在预言许诺的新世界里，我将为你播下第一枚花蕾——
E: In the prophesized new world, I shall plant the first bud on your behalf...

C: 你马上就会知晓了，风堇姑娘。
E: You'll know very soon, Miss Hyacine.

C: 她没有撒谎……
E: She isn't lying...

C: 不能屈服于她的蔑视。
E: We must not yield to her scorn.

C: 金线…在颤抖……
E: The golden thread... is trembling...

C: 抓住光亮……
E: Seize the light...

C: 啊，对哦…裁缝女的神职消散以后，「万帷网」的速度直接从5线退化到2线年代了……
E: Oh, right... once the seamstress's powers diminished, the World Wound Web slowed drastically, from five threads to just two...

C: *我们的使命，就是把天父的话语转变成坚定的信念哪！这连续百个黎明的载歌载舞，将让翁法罗斯的每位人子相信——*
E: Our mission is to transform the sky father's words into unshakable faith. For a hundred dawns, through song and dance, every child of humanity within Amphoreus will come to believe —

C: 我能想象你们三人结伴旅行的快活模样。
E: I can almost see the three of you traveling together, laughing and sharing moments.

C: 就以逐火之旅为例吧？自从阿格莱雅大人开始领导奥赫玛，每一位承担火种的黄金裔——啊，除了那刻夏老师——都是由她亲自选定的。
E: Look at the Flame-Chase Journey. Since Lady Aglaea took over the leadership of Okhema, every Chrysos Heir entrusted with a Coreflame — aside from Professor Anaxa — was personally chosen by her.

C: 你认为呢…塞涅俄丝？
E: What do you think... Seliose?

C: 那之后，又过了一段时间……
E: Some time after that...

C: 而你…亲身经历了四次擢升，四场离别。
E: And you... have experienced four ascensions and four partings.

C: 现在不是感伤的时候，来，和人家一起——睁大眼睛，打起精神！
E: Now's not the time to feel down. We gotta pull ourselves together!

C: 像咱们三个，恐怕都对所谓学术著作不感兴趣，但还是能在友爱之馆泡上一整天。
E: The three of us might not be into scholarly books, but we could still spend an entire day at the Library of Philia.

C: 你怎么也来啦！
E: Why are you here too?

C: 你的朋友似乎对我们很感兴趣。和{F#她}{M#他}解释一下吧，白厄阁下？出于礼节……
E: Your friend seems quite interested in us. Perhaps you could explain, Lord Phainon? It would be the polite thing...

C: 就这么几个人，打发谁呢？
E: Just a handful of you here. Who do you think you're fighting?

C: 唔，总感觉史书里的记载，和*我们*记忆中的来龙去脉稍有出入呢…但当时的细节，*我们*也有些记不清了。
E: Hmm, the historical records seem slightly at odds with our memories... but the details from that time have become somewhat hazy to us.

C: 呃…没有没有！我只是觉得，这个故事那么感人，可不能被一句假话给毁了呀——假如我有人的泪腺，现在肯定已经泪流满面了吧！
E: Uh... no, no! I just think the story's so moving... it'd be a shame to ruin it with a lie. If I could cry, I'd be in tears right now!
Prrrrrr~~

C: 你看它的脸——哎呀呀，怎么会有长得这么丑的东西？啧啧……
E: Look at its face — oh my, how could something be so ugly? Tsk tsk...

C: 呃…恕我直言，大姐头，你最近是不是精神压力有点大？我刚才哪问过什么问题，你肯定是幻听了！
E: Uh... forgive me, Boss Lady, but have you been under a lot of stress lately? I didn't ask anything. You must've imagined it!

C: 呼…这感觉，还真神奇…你什么时候学会的这招？
E: Huh... this feels truly magical... When did you pick up this trick?

C: 嗯。我猜…元老院的反对派还在做绝望的挣扎，想阻挠逐火。
E: Hmm. I guess, the opposition within the Council of Elders is still desperately fighting to obstruct the Flame-Chase.

C: …但我的想法改变了。
E: ...But my perspective has changed.

C: 再见了，白厄。
E: Goodbye, Phainon.

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 怎么铺子都空了？
E: Why's the market look so emptied out?
Huh...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>先祖们，请稍等我片刻吧</color>。我在树庭留下的回忆…值得花上一些时间来缅怀。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>O ancestors, please wait for just a bit longer</color>. The time I spent in the Grove... deserves some reminiscence.

C: 尽喜欢耍小聪明和嘴皮功夫——哀丽秘榭的白厄，扣一个学分！
E: All you do every day is wag that sharp tongue of yours — That's a credit deduction, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae!

C: 最后，果然轮到我了吗……
E: So it's finally my turn...

C: 哈…我们认识也有段时间了，你应该能分出我什么时候在客套，什么时候又是在说真心话。
E: Ha... After all this time, you should know when I'm just being polite and when I'm genuinely speaking from the heart.

C: 奥赫玛的各位——我已经得到了天空一族先祖的赐福。
E: People of Okhema, I've been blessed by the ancestors of the Sky people.

C: 不受艾格勒垂爱的乌云阴雨，要如何带领天空之民赢得黄金战争？
E: How can storm clouds and rain, unloved by Aquila, lead the Skyfolk to victory in the Chrysos War?

C: 反抗的一方没什么不对。
E: The resistance did nothing wrong.

C: 战斗无法避免，但我们不是为了摧毁…而是为了救赎。
E: This battle can't be avoided, but we do not do this for destruction... We do this for salvation.

C: 它察觉到什么了？
E: Did they sense something?

C: 印记…又消失了？
E: The mark... has disappeared again?

C: 那时的她心怀仁慈。哪怕言语激愤，心中却满载对人子的慈悲。
E: She was brimming with compassion at that time. Her words were bursting with anger, but her heart had nothing but mercy for the children of humanity.

C: 据我们所知，正是艾格勒对世间降下了诅咒，禁止翁法罗斯人触碰天空之外的世界。
E: As far as we know, it was Aquila that placed the curse on this world, preventing Amphoreans from ever reaching the realm beyond the sky.

C: 黄昏之女，是谁允许你回到这阴云之子的圣地？你同时身负异端的血统和黄金的诅咒，驱逐是对你永久的惩罚。
E: Oh, Daughter of Dusk, who has permitted your return to this sacred land of the Cloudborn? Bearing the blood of heresy and curse of gold, exile is your eternal sentence.

C: 就让「晨昏之眼」的陨落成为一段崭新历史的开篇吧。在我归来后，世上将不再有不公的神明……
E: Let the fall of the "Eye of Twilight" mark the dawn of a new chapter in history. Upon my return, there will be no more unjust gods...

C: 天赋，以及苦修。
E: Talent, and rigorous training.

C: 没错。用诸位已经熟悉的手段让它无处可藏，然后……
E: Exactly. Employ the tactics you've mastered to expose them, and...

C: 去接触浑象仪吧，雅辛忒丝。
E: Go to the celestial globe, Hyacinthia.

C: 不过，现在*我们*已经想通啦——你很强大，塞涅俄丝，你注定要在这个世间留下印记…*我们*相信你有改变世界的力量。
E: But we have come to accept it. You're strong, Seliose, and you're meant to leave your mark on the world... We believe you have the power to change the world.

C: 来比立定跳远吧？
E: Let's have a long jump competition.

C: 过程很顺利，还剩一处「电路」需要修复……
E: Smooth sailing so far. We've got one more "circuit" to fix...

C: 我会在下一站等着你们，小风堇。
E: I will be waiting for you all at the next destination, Hyacine.

C: 索拉比斯阁下在等着我们。
E: Lord Solabis is waiting for us.

C: 现在去哪找核心成员？
E: How're we gonna find a core member now?

C: 在听到那几个故事以后，我也私自下定了决心——
E: After hearing those stories, I made up my mind...

C: 所以，你…打算就这么把火种交给我们？
E: So, you're... going to hand the Coreflame over to us, just like that?

C: 状况越来越让人摸不着头脑了…
E: Things are getting more confusing by the minute...

C: 但在为来世破晓引火前，我需要你的承诺——两个承诺。
E: But before I ignite the dawn of the next world, you need to promise me something — two things, actually.

C: （偷偷藏起木头人。）
E: (Quietly hide the wooden soldier)

C: 是呀！我还记得…你们喊我出去玩总是不走正门，爱翻墙，真是调皮！
E: Right! And I remember you never used the front door when you wanted me to come play. You always climbed over the wall. You were such mischief-makers!

C: 要说哀丽秘榭最让人留恋的地方，除了大树下的秋千架，就是这儿了。
E: You know, besides the swing under the big tree, this has to be my favorite spot in all of Aedes Elysiae.

C: 多哆啦迷向众人描述了更多细节……
E: Dolimem continues to explain in greater detail...

C: 谢谢你，伙伴，就听你的——无论结果如何，就让我们共同面对吧。
E: Thanks, partner. We'll do it your way — whatever the cards show, we'll face it together.

C: 还是看看吧？就算结果不那么美好，至少我们也知道了该如何努力，尽可能让它完满一些，对不对？
E: Why not take a look anyway? Even if it's not what we hope for, we'll know what we need to work on, don't you think?

C: 翻看第一页上的神谕牌。
E: Turn to the first page of oracle cards.

C: 莉维娅……
E: Livia... no...

C: 如果输了，该怎么办？
E: What if we lose?

C: 我们是为了回应世界的愿望而启程的，对吧？
E: We set out on this journey to answer the world's desire, didn't we?

C: 我们…会看到什么？
E: Just what... will we see?

C: 与我一同证明…你我足以超越神谕的命运。
E: Together, let's prove... that we're enough to transcend the prophesized fate.

C: 当时没来得及仔细感受——你们口中所谓泰坦憩息的圣所，我看倒更像是它们冰冷的灵柩。
E: I didn't have the time to observe it in too much detail back then — but a "holy sanctuary" of the Titans? Looks more like their frozen crypt to me.

C: 年轻就是有活力啊。
E: Youth is always brimming with energy.

C: 别了，{NICKNAME}。现在，我将兑现我最后的命运。
E: Farewell, {NICKNAME}. This is where I fulfill my final destiny.

C: 第一万次轮回，昔日的伙伴已尽数成为仇敌。无尽的杀戮令我不知苦痛为何物，沉痛的虚无几乎将我吞噬，逼迫我停止抗争——但我坚持了下来。
E: In the ten-thousandth cycle, my former comrades had all become my enemies. The endless slaughter dulled my senses to pain. The painful emptiness almost swallowed me, forcing me to stop fighting — but I endured.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>若我生来是「毁灭」的骄阳，便让你和你的走卒尽数作我爆发的耀斑！然后，就让这团徒劳燃烧了三千万个纪元的怒火淹没一切——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>If I was born as the blazing sun of Destruction, then let you and your lackeys be the flares erupting from my core! And let this rage, burning futilely for thirty million epochs, engulf everything—</color>

C: 也许，是它在怒吼吧。向着它的造物主，它的神明。
E: Or maybe... it is screaming. At its creator. At its god.

C: 黄金战争已持续近一个世纪。黑潮的威胁愈演愈烈，势不可挡。
E: The Chrysos War had lasted for nearly a century. And the threat of the black tide was growing stronger and more relentless.

C: 但我不会追根究底。自陛下颁布逐火号令，世间英雄纷纷递来投名状，其中多一名「白厄」或「黑厄」又何妨？
E: But I won't question you further about it. Ever since Her Majesty issued the Flame-Chase decree, heroes from all over have sent their letters of introduction. What's the harm in adding one more name like Phainon or Pie-non?

C: 是你们……
E: It's you...

C: 「星神」？命途？哼，简直不知所谓。
E: Aeons? Paths? Hmph, what a load of nonsense.

C: 请允许我提问：阁下如今所身负的火种，究竟有多少？
E: Allow me to ask: How many Coreflames do you carry now?

C: 「死亡」的火种自龙腹中取出。多么明亮的火。
E: The Coreflame of Death was taken from the dragon's belly. What a brilliant flame.

C: 只是…我不明白，为什么？在你肩头的太阳里……
E: It's just... I don't understand. Within the sun upon your shoulders...

C: >>>十二黄金裔严格按照实验原定设计顺序，生命周期依次正常结束，载入缓冲区。对象卡厄斯兰那回退演算进程，并监测到对象心智函数异常波动。
E: >>> Lifecycles of the twelve Chrysos Heirs were terminated strictly in the predetermined experimental sequence and successfully loaded into the buffer. Subject Khaslana regressed the extrapolation process and abnormal fluctuations were detected in his mind function.

C: 愿未来的岁月就像毛绒，包裹着你，永远温暖，永远轻柔！
E: And may the days ahead embrace you like the softest fluff, forever warm, forever gentle!

C: 「开拓」之旅，果然还是得有你在。
E: The Trailblazing journey just isn't the same without you.

C: 我和黑塔女士能捕捉到她的信号，却无法锁定位置。但可以确定的是，她仍在翁法罗斯。
E: Madam Herta and I can detect her signal, but cannot ascertain her location. What we can be sure of is that she's still in Amphoreus.

C: 或许，也可以拥有共同的未来？一个从未在任何轮回中出现的未来。我相信你，{NICKNAME}。
E: And we may also share a common future? A future that has never emerged in any other cycles before? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过，眼下当务之急是「再创世」。我很快抵达创世涡心，和白厄会合。「再创世」仪式本该在来古士主持下顺利进行，但盗火行者的出现再次让世界命运悬而未决。
E: However, the current priority was the "Era Nova." I quickly arrived at the Vortex of Genesis and met with Phainon. The "Era Nova" ritual was supposed to proceed smoothly under the guidance of Lygus, but the appearance of the Flame Reaver once again left the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

C: 不依靠你，我同样能独尊银河。
E: I will rule over the cosmos even without your help.

C: 记忆是梦的开场白…
E: Memories are the prelude to dreams...

C: …凯妮斯？！
E: ...Caenis!?

C: 原来关键在我吗？既然{NICKNAME}都这么说了…那人家必须全力以赴啦。
E: So I'm the key? Since you insist, {NICKNAME}... I'll give it my all!

C: 去去，别瞎打听了，让我一个人清净清净！
E: Ah, stop trying to get things out of me. Leave me alone!

C: 神谕之子降临圣城，凯撒独断褫夺兵权；同盟会议不欢而散，恐有血腥风波……
E: The Children of the Prophecy arrived in the holy city, and the Imperator unilaterally stripped away military power. The Alliance Meeting ended in discord, and there may be bloody upheaval...

C: …呵，忘了吧。要是让金织爵听见这句话，又该责备我了。
E: ...Hah, forget it. If Dux Goldweaver heard that, she'd scold me again.

C: 问问看吧。
E: Ask around.

C: 毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……
E: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

C: 别说废话。简洁、具体，我不会提醒第二次。
E: Don't waste my time. Be precise. Be specific. I won't ask a second time.

C: 坏了，伙伴…你好像遇到高手啦？
E: Oh dear. Seems like you've met your match, partner.

C: 因此，今日的晚宴不为鼓舞士气，而是为了确立同盟真正值得信赖的盟友——
E: The purpose of tonight's banquet is not to raise our morale, but to establish which allies our alliance can actually trust...

C: 那我绝对会把你的野心，和来古士放在一起——用球棍砸个粉碎！
E: Then I'll place your ambitions into the same basket as Lygus, and smash them into pieces with my baseball bat!

C: 说什么呢，本姑娘什么时候死了？
E: Huh? When was I dead?

C: 那是一段漫长的旅程…
E: It's been a long and arduous journey...

C: 人们会知道，不必再去追逐什么，翁法罗斯早已迎来神谕中的{RUBY_B#天外的救世主}黎明{RUBY_E#}。
E: People will know that there's nothing left to chase. Amphoreus has already welcomed the {RUBY_B#Deliverer beyond the sky}dawn{RUBY_E#} foretold in prophecy.

C: 只有通过这种方式，我们才能确保在{NICKNAME}归来前，「再创世」一定不会发生……
E: This is the only way to make sure that the "Era Nova" won't happen before {NICKNAME} returns...

C: 收起这套陈词滥调吧。
E: Spare me the clichés.

C: 女王的行宫就在前面。她曾经优美的身姿，也被污浊浸没……
E: The queen's palace lies just ahead. Even her once-graceful form is now tainted and drowned in dirty mire...

C: （吊灯还是维持不住…周围的时象仪，也许能派上用场？）
E: (The chandelier's still giving way... maybe the Chrono Vessel nearby can help?)

C: 「树影衬着智者的背影，像一颗巨石在背负年轮……」
E: "The shadow of a tree frames the sage's back, like a boulder bearing the rings of time..."

C: 典狱官的沉醉即将结束，而囚徒也将得到自由……
E: The prison warden's dream is nearly over. And the prisoner will soon be freed...

C: 前进吧，为了世人的心愿！
E: Go forth. For the hopes of humankind!

C: 但，谨代表一切有思想的生灵：我们决不会容忍如此冰冷而残酷的暴行。
E: However, I hereby speak for all sentient lifeforms: we will never allow such a cruel atrocity to occur.

C: 比喻堆得再多，也掩盖不了你在做的事：银河中的「铁墓」仅仅是未完成品，就足以污染一切无机世界的生命逻辑……
E: You can pile your metaphors mountain-high, but they won't change the act you're committing. The Irontomb out there in the cosmos is still a technical beta version, and yet it's already powerful enough to corrupt the life logic of all inorganic worlds.

C: 想要珍藏的记忆，一定不会轻易逝去。即使被时光的长河磨洗，也会留下存在的痕迹。
E: Memories you want to treasure will never fade away. Even if immersed in the long river of time, these memories will still leave traces of their existence.

C: 匹诺康尼是汇聚一切理想的「同谐」之地。它主张不容干涉的自由，因而在声色犬马中步入迷茫……
E: Penacony is a land of the Harmony where all dreams and hopes merge and combine. It believes in unrestrained freedom, and that's how it lost itself in shallow delights...

C: 我不会将它交给任何人。
E: I won't give it to anyone.

C: 不可理喻。你以为一句轻飘飘的伪善之词，就能给自己的暴行开脱…？！
E: You are beyond reason... You think such a simple and hypocritical statement can justify your atrocities!?

C: 很好，多洛斯人的游击队呢？
E: Good. What about the Dolosian militia?

C: 敌军战士就地处决，反抗的哲人一律押解回营，依军法处置；还有，切不可损毁藏书——去吧，通告全军！
E: Take no prisoners among the enemy soldiers. All sages who resist are to be captured and tried according to martial law. And do not destroy any books. Now go! Notify the entire army!

C: 报！山之民反抗猛烈，传闻中的「开山者」亲临战场，他们的战阵滴水不漏……
E: Reporting in! The Mountain Dwellers are resisting fiercely, and the legendary "Mountainbreaker" has personally engaged in battle. Their formations are nigh impenetrable...

C: 「海列屈拉，我的臣子——你已尽锋刃之责。如今，神谕为我欲行之路作了断言：我的征服，注定无法迈向群星。」
E: "Helektra, my subject, you have done your duty as my blade. The prophecy has now made its final decree on the road I intend to walk: My conquest is doomed to never reach the stars."

C: 「再创世」的原理，你已经很清楚了吧？以负世者的「记忆」为蓝本，开启下一世代的演算。
E: You already have a good idea of what the Era Nova does, right? It initiates extrapolations for the next cycle based on the Worldbearer's "memories."

C: 然后，我会变成什么样子？
E: ...What will I turn into after that?

C: 会如何？
E: What will happen?

C: 初步判定，在真空中包裹两位的「气泡」是由近似忆质的物质构成。猜测：该种物质与失联的三月小姐有关。
E: Our preliminary determination is that the "bubble" enveloping you two in the vacuum is made of a substance similar to memoria. Conjecture: This substance is connected to the lost Miss March.

C: 意外接连发生。「律法」被修正后，我们本已攻破来古士的防火墙——
E: There have been several unforeseen circumstances. We broke through Lygus's firewall after the "Law" was amended...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>█ 警告！检测到非法操作█ ██ ███</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>█ Warning! Illegal operations ███ ████ █████ detected</color>

C: 通信？哦哦，总算能联系上活人了！本姑娘急需场外支援……
E: Communications? Oh, does this mean I finally get to talk to someone real? I really, really need outside help right now...

C: 证明我们来对了地方。
E: That means we're in the right place.

C: 虽然很相似，但昔涟记忆中的神谕牌册……
E: The oracle cards in Cyrene's memories do resemble the book...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程已完成。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting complete.</color>

C: …是那把<color=#dbc291ff>仪式剑</color>。
E: ...It's that <color=#dbc291ff>ceremonial blade</color>.

C: 像你那样与人相处，我果然做不到呢……
E: Seems like I really can't get along with people like you do...

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 激动人心的「英雄救美」…再度上演！
E: Another "damsel-in-distress rescue"... plays out again!

C: 拍她吗？
E: Do I take a photo of her?

C: 而这一世，在{F#她}{M#他}和昔涟讲述星际旅行的时候，那些与列车同行的回忆也钻入了我的脑海……
E: So when {F#s}he told Cyrene in this cycle about {M#his}{F#her} interstellar travels, those memories of journeying with the Express entered my mind as well...

C: 我可不想错过任何一次「开拓」——你们得好好练习技术，争取拍得有我八成好，听到没？
E: I don't want to miss a single "Trailblaze." So you all need to practice your photography skills until you're at least <unbreak>80%</unbreak> as good as me, got it?

C: 在这场前所未有的伟大「开拓」中，也写下「三月七」的名字！
E: Into this Hero's Journey called "Amphoreus"... Into this unprecedented Trailblaze!

C: 君命无二……
E: Two pair...

C: 你想过，该映出一个怎样的自己吗？
E: Have you thought about the version of yourself you want to see in the mirror?

C: 沁甜的气息轻抚鼻腔，它来自云石天宫的七色浴盐。
E: You may notice a hint of sweetness in the air. That would be the fragrance of the seven-colored bath salts from Marmoreal Palace.

C: 这是什么…
E: What is this...?

C: （话说回来，我为什么要在登记簿上找三月七……）
E: (Wait a second... Why am I looking for March 7th in the guest book?)

C: （一些若即若离的声音在和我对话，它们是从哪里传来的？）
E: (Faint, fleeting voices are speaking to me... but where are they coming from?)

C: 空间站，{NICKNAME}的起点。看来，我们成功啦……
E: The space station. Where it all began for {NICKNAME}. Looks like... we made it.

C: 那位「三月小姐」给人的印象，就像水面上的倒影。但并非平静、清澈的湖面，而是一潭深渊。
E: That "Miss March" feels like a reflection on water, only not from a calm, clear lake... but from a bottomless abyss.

C: 而它，便是与「开山者」同生共死的巨龙，大地兽之王。
E: Terravox themself was the Dromas King, the Giant Dragon who swore their life to the "Mountainbreaker."

C: 需要有人来守望「大地」。所以，我接受了交易。接过泰坦神权，我沉入岩渊，以石铸的血肉弥合大陆。但……
E: Someone had to watch over the "Earth." So I agreed to a deal. I would take the Titan's divine authority and sink into the cliffs, using my flesh and blood forged of stone to mend the land. But...

C: 大地并非海洋中的孤岛，而是其上万物的总和。
E: The earth is not a lonely island in the middle of the ocean. It is the sum of all the living things that stand on it.

C: 讨论「如果」没有意义。但，我很庆幸，结局终究没有落到那一步。
E: There's no point in discussing "what-ifs," though I am glad it didn't come to that.

C: 我相信，这值得一试。
E: Then I believe it's worth a shot.

C: 大约只是忆潮的回声吧。
E: That was probably just the echoes of the memoria tide.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>███存续█存█续██ █ █续█ █</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>███Keep going█keep█going██ █ █going█ █</color>

C: 你，是其中之一。
E: You... are one of them.

C: 是…{NICKNAME}吗！也许，是{F#她}{M#他}提起过的「星核」吧。
E: Could it be... {NICKNAME}! Maybe it's the "Stellaron" {F#s}he mentioned.

C: 去那里寻找{NICKNAME}的下落吧。
E: Let's go there to find {NICKNAME}.

C: 咦，它们在守着什么…？
E: Huh? They're guarding something...

C: 没想到，仍有漏网之鱼啊。
E: I didn't think there were still some that got away.

C: 再给他点时间吧，帝国咨政院的螺丝脑袋们要先理解什么是「战争」——搞不好，趁螺丝不在，那帮人早就把他藏库里的要塞全拆了。
E: Give him a bit more time. Those screwheads at the Imperial Advisory Council need to understand what the concept of "war" means first. For all we know, they might have already gutted all the fortresses in Screwy's collection while he was away.

C: 最后的「再创世」在即，不妨拭目以待……
E: The final "Era Nova" is at hand. Why don't you wait and see?

C: 众神啊，看哪！翁法罗斯已完成了她的胜利，再创世即将到来——
E: Behold, O gods! Amphoreus has achieved her victory, and the Era Nova approaches.

C: 无论「理性」，还是缺陷，皆由我亲手种下。如果还要说什么——劝来世学者别把我捧上神坛，物尽其用吧。
E: "Reason" or defects, they will all be sown by my own hands. If there's anything else to say, I urge future scholars not to put me on a pedestal. Just make use of what I leave behind.

C: 还是腹中有话，不吐不快呢？
E: Or is there something else on your mind that you're just desperate to get out?

C: 瞧你说的，我也没投反对票呀。
E: Look who's talking. I didn't vote against it, did I?

C: 银河已将目光投向翁法罗斯，只待…一声枪响。
E: The cosmos has set its sights on Amphoreus, and now it's just waiting for... the first shot.

C: 当然——以「存护」的名义，一切献给琥珀王。
E: Of course. In the name of Preservation, all for the Amber Lord.

C: 这会儿就别引用「寂静领主」的名言了，不吉利。无论如何，我们都得继续深入……
E: Not the time to quote the Lord of Silence. Bad omen. Either way, we have to press on...

C: 黑塔，这片空间…被某种能量彻底污染过。
E: Herta, this whole space has been completely tainted by some kind of energy.

C: 来吧。是时候和屏障说再见了。
E: All right, let's finish this. Time to break through that barrier.

C: 「再用那强有力的意志，反抗它的摆弄。」
E: "Resist it with the strength of your mighty will."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>告别死亡之名——「来生的侍女，遐蝶」——希望这一名讳能为星空铭记……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Casting off the name of death — Castorice, Servant of the Afterlife — may her name be etched into the stars...</color>

C: 只有通过那本书，我们才能在历史上留下姓名么？
E: Is that book truly the only way for us to leave our names in history?

C: 那片冷漠的星空不曾垂怜翁法罗斯。你为什么要替它燃烧，甚至…化作死灰？
E: The cold, indifferent cosmos has never shown mercy to Amphoreus. Why would you burn for it, only to... turn to ash?

C: 「负世」的另一半重量，就在这段路的尽头。
E: The other half of the weight of Worldbearing lies at the end of this path.

C: 我想去…找到它！
E: I want to... go find it!

C: 你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
E: Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?

C: 「一个宁静、温柔的新世界。」
E: "A peaceful, gentle new world."

C: 计算中的时刻将要来临。这一战的结果，会成为「智识」数算的新锚点。
E: The calculated Instant is coming. The outcome of this battle will become a new anchor for the Erudition's computations.

C: 这两个字总是主动来敲门。心软的列车长，也从来不会拒绝它们。
E: It is a word that often comes knocking at our door, and our softhearted conductor never turned anyone down.

C: 不必再考验我的决心。
E: No need to keep testing my resolve.

C: 我会传递阁下的馈赠，如拥抱一般温暖。
E: I will pass on your gift, lady. It's as warm as an embrace.

C: 铁墓是一艘完美的航船，若能暗中埋下种子，在「智识」被它引爆的瞬间，「记忆」也将遍布寰宇的每个角落。
E: Irontomb is a perfect ark. If a seed can be planted within, then the moment the Lord Ravager blows the Erudition to pieces, the Remembrance will be spread to every corner of the cosmos.

C: 「是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？」
E: "It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Did I really change that much?"

C: 「这便是银河的第四种『终末』——『记忆』。」
E: "That is the cosmos's fourth kind of 'Finality': the Remembrance."

C: 因为你留下的诗，被所有人温柔地续写着。
E: It's because everyone has been gently adding to the story you left behind.

C: 听潮声响起，让天地重生。
E: Listening to the call of the tides, and granting rebirth to heaven and earth.

C: 我不止一次和你提到的庆功会，如今总算实现了。
E: That celebration party I've been mentioning to you has finally become a reality.

C: 这意味着，我会永远留在「过去」。
E: That choice means I'll remain in the "past" forever.

C: 我听过这么一种说法：神性是「无瑕的人性」，而人性是「有瑕的神性」……
E: I once heard a saying that went something like this: Divinity is "flawless humanity," and humanity is "flawed divinity"...

C: 翁法罗斯的孩子，早就不相信神明啦。比起喜欢恶作剧的祂们……
E: We children of Amphoreus gave up on gods long ago. Those beings who love to play pranks on the universe...

C: 明明是「因」促成了「果」。
E: Clearly, "cause" leads to "effect."

C: 她的推演合情合理…只是漏算了「人」在这个故事中所能做到的极限呢。
E: Her deduction was perfectly logical... but she failed to account for what the "humans" in this story could achieve.

C: ——回到「少女的故乡」。
E: Return to the "girl's homeland."

C: 哆、唻、咪、发、嗦、拉、嘻。
E: Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti.

C: 「无论哪种『喜欢』，都是弥足珍贵的『爱』，我都会感激地收下，幸福地回馈。」
E: "No matter what form 'liking' takes, it is still precious 'love,' and I will accept it gratefully and return it with joy."
Mem...

C: 很遗憾。截至目前，我们仍一无所获。
E: Unfortunately, we still haven't found anything.

C: 或者换个角度，假如你是「赞达尔」——你会对一个构不成威胁的概念这么上心，处处提防？
E: Or we can look at it from another perspective. If you were "Zandar," would you be this obsessed with a concept that poses no threat? Would you guard against it at every turn?

C: 成像
E: Form Image
>>> Query: "Record."

C: 昔涟是。温柔。爱美。会写诗。
E: Cyrene is. Gentle. Likes beautiful things. Can write stories.

C: 总觉得，多了点成熟的气质呢。
E: It just feels like you are a bit more mature.

C: 都是虚假的？可你明明就站在这里。
E: Everything was false? But you're standing right here.

C: 洗耳恭听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 墓碑之下，就是此处。
E: This is the place below the tombstone.

C: 危亡关头，「长夜月」被三月的相机捕获，陷入哀丽秘榭的记忆迷宫中。经历几番长谈，三月与「长夜月」达成一致…「长夜月」归还三月的记忆，而三月也终于回到了我们的身边。
E: When all seemed lost, "Evernight" was captured by March's Camera and trapped within the memory maze of Aedes Elysiae. After several lengthy conversations, March and "Evernight" reached an agreement... "Evernight" returned March's memories, and March finally returned to our side.

C: 战略投资部正在总结此战的成功经验。我们希望当下一次类似的危机发生前，能建立起一套有效的对灾响应机制。
E: Our department is summarizing key lessons from this campaign. If another crisis of this scale appears on the horizon, we intend to have a system ready to respond.

C: 尽管来吧，我不会害怕。
E: Come at me. I ain't afraid.
███████ I was told: The beginning is still unknown ███████

C: 完
E: The End

C: 我们需要和军团交手么？
E: *whistle* Alright, so do we need to fight the Legion?

C: 不知道，艾利欧没有说，那这件事就不重要。
E: I dunno. Elio didn't say anything about it, so it doesn't matter.
Hmm...

C: 打起来打起来。
E: You guys should fight it out.

C: 右边？
E: The one on the right?

C: 这些够了吗？
E: Are these enough?

C: 焦糖，二氧化碳，听起来挺耳熟。香涎…是口水的意思吗？！
E: Caramel, carbon dioxide, sounds familiar. Ambergris... Does it mean saliva!?

C: 还算他讲点义气。活到这份上，我就念着这口<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>了。
E: At least he has a shred of loyalty left. At my age, a sip of <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color> is the only thing I want...

C: （…莫名其妙。不过，艾丝妲和阿兰似乎摊上麻烦了……）
E: (...So strange. Seems like Asta and Arlan are in trouble...)

C: 前脚「军团」刚走，后脚就有人造谣生事…那句话怎么说来着？「对外敌我唯唯诺诺，搞内耗我重拳出击」……
E: As soon as the Legion exits stage right, in comes the gossip... How does that saying go again? "Greet enemies outside with a smile, greet enemies inside with a sword..."

C: 那怎么能呢？毕竟是这么有…麻烦的状况。
E: What do you mean? This is such an inter— Uh... inconvenient situation.

C: 好吧，试试就逝世！
E: Alright, though it'll probably be my funeral...

C: 每次收到她的回信，我都会情不自禁地想象着，拿一颗石头雕出她的笑脸。
E: Whenever I receive a reply from her, I can't help but picture the smile on her face and I'd carve it on a rock.

C: 也许我会花十年的时间找到刚度过一个月的她，但我们的时间流速就能从此同频，总比在这里坐以待毙来得好。
E: Maybe it will take me ten years to find her, who has only spent a month. But once I do that, our time will be synchronized. It's better than sitting here and doing nothing.

C: 等我找到莱斯莉，总有一天，我会回来告诉你我在这趟旅程所看见的一切……
E: When I find Lesley one day, I will come back and tell you everything I witnessed on my journey...

C: 他还能再振作起来吗？
E: Do you think he'll be able to pull himself together?

C: 我、我也不知道该给多少…我在这一直是包吃住的，对钱也没什么概念……
E: I—I'm not sure how much I should offer you... Since my living expenses are all already covered by the space station, I have no idea how much money is worth.

C: 恐惧若被旁人察觉，不仅会失去信任，借机为阿尔弗瑞德报仇的愿望也会落空。
E: Fear, if picked up by others, will not only make everyone distrust you, but also ruin your chance to avenge Alfred.

C: 在我们「黑塔•星域界种科」，每一个人在跟银河生物打交道的过程中，都会磨练出这样的本领。
E: In the Herta Department of Ecology, we deal with all sorts of cosmic creatures every day. Developing this kind of ability is just part of our training.

C: 话音未落，议事间内响起了掌声和起哄声，该称他们为法政科的科诺列夫夫妇！在这群情激昂的时段，你看到无数双手从镜头面前交握而过，直到你听见有人在唤一个名字……
E: Before the voice finishes, there is already applause and jeers in the Conference Room. So they are the Konolevs of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics! During this passionate event, you see countless handshakes in front of the camera until you hear someone call out a name.

C: 顾名思义，就是极度形似真人的机器人——你好好听故事别打岔……
E: As the name suggests, it is a robot that looks extremely similar to a real person. Now pay attention to Gunn's story and don't interrupt.

C: 我想请教前辈一件事，是这样的…我总结了下一些星球中神话故事里的星神形象。
E: Well, there is something I wanna ask you about... So, I've been researching how Aeons are depicted in the mythological tales from different planets.

C: 还有你这衣服…故意不穿制服，就是为了炫你的名牌定制？
E: And your clothes... Why don't you wear the uniform? Are you trying to show off your luxurious tailor-made outfit?

C: 还是找<color=#dbc291ff>维修工程师</color>来修一下吧。
E: I'd better ask the <color=#dbc291ff>maintenance engineer</color> to fix it.

C: 能查到就行…噢，你是在问其他的啊。
E: Good... Oh, you mean you couldn't find the others?

C: （虚拟网络放大了人心中的恶意，看他被骂成这样，难道是在最脆弱的时候被模因病毒趁虚而入？）
E: (People act much more maliciously on the virtual network. He was brutally harassed online. Did he get infected by the memetic virus during his most vulnerable moments?)

C: 你不担心另外两位的行为吗？
E: Aren't you worried about the other two?

C: 根据监控到的影像，军团残党和裂界造物同时存在于你现在所处的这片区域。
E: According to the surveillance video, creations of the Fragmentum and remnants of the Legion are present in this area where you are now.

C: 前面好像有怪物出没，正好可以用来测试一下。
E: There appear to be some monsters right ahead, so let's give it a test run.

C: 佩佩！
E: Peppy!

C: 咱们这就带上佩佩出发吧！放心啦，它不会咬人的。
E: ...Let's go together! Relax — Peppy doesn't bite.

C: 怎么样？听我聊天，果然能感受到能量围绕在身旁吧？
E: Such is the power of my rhetoric! It creates an energy that uplifts the soul.

C: 我来寻找走丢的朋友。
E: I'm here to find a lost friend.

C: 报告的确提到过监控异常以及模块报错…看来之后可以从这方面入手解决问题。
E: The report did mention abnormalities in the surveillance system and module errors... We'll have to start prioritizing those issues.

C: 卡波特手写版粉丝回馈手卡。
E: Capote's handwritten fan reply card.

C: 为了让你的侥幸心理破灭，我只能再次拿出关键证据了。
E: *sigh* I'll just have to show you more evidence.

C: 阿兰，真的对不起。
E: Please forgive me, Arlan.

C: 是的，我在清扫的过程中，发现了一本没有名字的手写笔记，里面记录了化解上级压力的<unbreak>36</unbreak>种方法，还专门有一部分写的是化解上级压力的修行。
E: Yes. I found an anonymous handwritten journal while I was cleaning up — it mentioned <unbreak>36</unbreak> different strategies for relieving pressure. That's where I read about the trials.

C: 当真恐怖如斯。
E: Whoa, scary!

C: 哈…好吧。{NICKNAME}，你不会拒绝一个伤患的请求吧？事出紧急，我需要你的协助。
E: Ah... Alright. {NICKNAME}, you wouldn't refuse the request from a recovering patient, would you? This is an emergency, so I do need your help.

C: 嗯…按你所说，呜呜伯集体行动的原因在于某种「共同目标」，我想，这就是防卫科现下调查的关键。
E: So, as you've already established, the Wubbaboos are mobilizing to work toward "a certain objective," which, I believe, will be the new focus of the Security Department's investigation for now.

C: 你们回来啦。
E: You're back.

C: 嗯，我都一一读过了，根据手上有的荣仓终家书、日记，以及研究报告……
E: Okay, I read through them. According to his letter back home, his diary, and his research report that we have on hand...

C: 看来他习惯报喜不报忧。
E: Looks like he has a habit of reporting good news only.

C: 他谎称自己在塔内受到了黑塔大人的认同，又受到上级研究员的厚待，目的也只是为了让母亲宽心吧。
E: He lied about his status and claimed that Madam Herta gave him high praise and that he was very appreciated by his seniors, all to make his mother proud.

C: 据点位置无误，我们尽快赶过去，务必要弄清它们在此处集会的原因。
E: The location of the base is correct. We should get there immediately and find out the reason why they are gathering here.

C: 从现在开始，你就是极少数能听懂它们在说什么的幸运儿了。
E: From now on, you will be one of the very few who can understand them.

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 她真好看。
E: Aaah... She is pretty.

C: 给，把镜头对准墙上的涂鸦就行了。
E: Here — just point it at the graffiti on the wall.

C: 不太可能，这探测仪我上周才买，还在退款有效期内呢。
E: That's highly unlikely, I bought this detector just last week. The refund guarantee hasn't even expired yet.

C: 比科员更爱惜吗?
E: She values them even more than the researchers?

C: 唔，不行，这样想就输了。就算只剩最后一条线索也要排查下去，不然，我的工作可能真的要不保了……
E: *sigh* No, if I start thinking like that I may as well give up now. I have to fully investigate every lead or I'll really be out of a job...

C: 你这维修报表再拿去核对一下吧…不是我说，你自己数数上面有几个零。
E: Take this maintenance report of yours and look it over again. You need to count the zeros yourself — that goes without saying.

C: 百、百密一疏啊，正常人第一反应都是去查不认识的名字，谁会想到问题出在自己身上？
E: I—It's an honest mistake. The reaction of any ordinary person is to check for unfamiliar names, right? Who would think to check their own name?

C: 「模拟宇宙需要错谬」，这是你自己说的话，现状明明完美符合，你怎么就不满意了？
E: "The Simulated Universe is bound to make errors." You said that yourself, and that's exactly what we're experiencing. Why is it a problem all of a sudden?

C: 你以为你很了不起吗？你现在就像一个，一个…一个蠢材俱乐部的家伙。
E: Do you really think of yourself as someone so exceptionally amazing? Right now, you're more like... like... like someone from the Nitwit Society.
