C: 我可以去找阿德里安•泰勒，可以去找艾普瑟隆的红鼻老人，甚至可以去找博识学会——至少他们不会中途撒手跑路！
E: I can go and find Adrian Taylor, or the red-nosed old man from Epsilon, or even the Intelligentsia Guild — at least they won't quit halfway!

C: 至此，你已经明白事件的全貌了。
E: You now know everything about this encounter.

C: 我们也离开这里吧。
E: It's about time we were on our way.

C: 也祝你在庇尔波因特玩得开心。
E: I hope you have a good time in Pier Point as well.

C: 受网络攻击影响，感应门无法正常启动了。为了打开它，你得找到与之关联的<color=#dbc291ff>「涂鸦」</color>。
E: Affected by the cyber attack, the sensor door cannot be activated normally. In order to open it, you have to find the <color=#dbc291ff>graffiti</color> associated with it.

C: 当然，现在你不需要让敌人变得更强。使用涂鸦，降低目标的威胁吧。
E: Of course, for now, you don't have to strengthen them. Use the graffiti to weaken your enemies.

C: 就像你之前那样？
E: Like... you?

C: 伊德莉拉？
E: Idrila?

C: 那我们现在应该咋办？
E: What do we do now?

C: 你看。
E: Just like that.

C: 你说得很对，不走偶像派浪费了他这张俏脸。
E: You're right. It'd be a shame to waste such a handsome face. He just screams "idol!"

C: 别、你别用那个语气！你这是道德绑架，知不知道？
E: Don't use that tone! You're trying to guilt-trip me, aren't you?

C: 呜哇！
E: Ahh!

C: 个人追求？我都没这东西！
E: Desires? I don't have any desires!

C: 嗯，这是我的推断。
E: Yes, that's my theory.

C: 放过我，我不好吃…
E: Please spare me. I'm not even tasty!

C: 是我等的信仰，命路的所求。在为捍卫美的信道，于战斗中流血失神的时候，我曾无数次在昏迷中得见祂的行迹，从脚下蔓延，伸向不可知的前方。
E: In the pursuit of defending beauty I have bled into unconsciousness... and in the ensuing stupor I have witnessed countless times THEIR traces spreading from beneath my feet — reaching into the unknown before me.

C: 你是为见到「祂」而战？
E: Are you fighting to see "THEM?"

C: 啊？！银枝想一个人下车挑战巨真蛰虫？！
E: What!? Argenti wants to leave the Express and fight the Giant Sting alone!?

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来了？
E: {NICKNAME}, welcome back.

C: 是，我也准备加入。
E: Yes, I intend to participate in the efforts as well.

C: 不好意思打断一下…
E: Sorry, if I can interrupt...

C: （现在的话，应该能把一切串联起来了。）
E: (Now I should be able to tie everything together.)

C: 这样吧，我虽然是界种科的室长，但不是界种科最了解奇物的人。
E: Well, I might be the Department of Ecology head, but I'm not the most knowledgeable person when it comes to Curios.

C: 也行，看着啊，这几天我给你整点刺激的。大的要来了！
E: Sure thing. Anyway, keep your eyes peeled — I'll be bringing you something big soon!

C: （从头好好检查一遍，回到最开始与黑塔的对话…）
E: (I need to go over it from the start... starting with the conversation I had with Herta...)

C: 在这种情境下重逢。逻辑：并不令人喜悦。
E: Reuniting under such conditions... Affirmation: Unpleasant.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 冷静。艾丝妲只是被传送走了，并无生命危险。
E: Stay calm. Asta was merely teleported — her life was not in danger.

C: 你曾在那里做科研吗？
E: Did you do research there?

C: 阮•梅现在在哪里？
E: Where is Ruan Mei right now?

C: 似乎是生命培育…
E: Something about nurturing lifeforms...

C: 嘘，有些小科员是她的狂热粉丝，会对着她的收音机不停调台，搜刮她平常的爱好！你知道阮•梅女士喜欢听什么吗？
E: Some of us younger researchers are her superfans — we're always scanning different frequencies to find out what her tastes are! Do you know her favorite tunes, by any chance?

C: （……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
E: (...So I really can't say anything about her.)
(Meow...)

C: 我说过，如果你遇见难以逾越的危险，我会出手将其击落。
E: I did say that if a danger proved too great for you, I would personally step in to confront it.

C: （被封闭的舱段…会是什么样子？）
E: (What would a sealed zone... look like?)

C: 你审视着阮•梅造物，它似乎仍在悲伤地等待阮•梅来接它。
E: You gaze at Ruan Mei's creation, which appears to still be waiting sadly for Ruan Mei to come get it.

C: 嗯，艾丝妲批量采购了好几个批次，空间站里一直沿用到现在。
E: Yeah, Asta bought loads of them in bulk. They still use them on the space station to this day.

C: 探索新世界比较重要。
E: Exploring new worlds is more important.

C: 感觉每种都很好看。
E: They all look amazing.

C: 好咧！我这就帮您挑上几株……
E: Alright! Let me help you pick a few...

C: 感情这种事你不懂也正常。
E: It's quite normal for you to not understand emotions.

C: 嘿嘿，这个配方可是本店绝对机密，你可千万别说出去。
E: Hehe, that recipe is a store secret. You mustn't tell anyone!

C: 胡编乱造的故事罢了。
E: Ah, it's all just a bunch of nonsense stories.

C: 你说得我都有点不好意思了，我感觉我的芯片温度有点高。
E: Stop, you are embarrassing me. I feel like my processing chip is overheating.

C: 还真是冰天雪地呀。
E: It really is one big snowball.

C: 我真的不知道银鬃铁卫是什么…
E: I have no idea who these Silvermane Guards even are...

C: 收集了更多居民的意见后，最后的结果依旧是平票…
E: After collecting more citizen opinions, the final result remains a tie...

C: 哈哈哈，你说话真是直接，我欣赏这点！
E: You're so direct — I like that!

C: 估计已经灭绝了。
E: It's probably extinct.

C: 我还好，只是…只是有一阵子没休息了。突发情况实在太多……
E: I'm fine, I just... I haven't rested in a while. There's just too much happening all at once...

C: 是一份「合同」，托帕不久前才发给我的，下面还附了她的亲笔信。
E: ...The contract Topaz sent to me a little while ago. There's a handwritten letter attached.

C: …这是贝洛伯格人自己的大事，咱们就别掺和了！
E: I... think we should leave this matter to the Belobogians... Don't you agree?

C: 对。它的重要性，你大概一眼就能看出来…这句话的意思是，我想请你来帮忙评估我们目前的成果。
E: Yes. I think you'll understand the significance once you see it... In short, I need you to help us evaluate our current progress.

C: 让你意外啦？但我的理由其实很简单。
E: Surprised? My reasons are pretty simple.

C: 史瓦罗先生，和一个叫托帕的姐姐一起走了……
E: Mr. Svarog went out for a walk with a lady called Topaz...

C: 这边的情况也差不多。两边各执一词，根本没法达成共识。
E: It's pretty much the same situation here. Neither party is willing to compromise.

C: 该到做决定的时候了。这种…这么混乱的局面，不能再持续下去了。
E: The time has to come to make a decision... This chaos cannot be allowed to continue any longer.

C: 哪来的黑衣人？
E: Where did those people in black come from?

C: 听说有人经历了十七轮面试…
E: Is it true the IPC requires you to go through <unbreak>17</unbreak> rounds of interviews?

C: 他们宁愿拿生命赌博…
E: They're willing to gamble with their life...

C: 这也难怪。我坚决反对他们服用所谓的「特效药」，他们肯定也知道我的态度。
E: I'm not surprised. They'll know that I'm completely against them using this "wonder medicine..."

C: 那副遭罪的模样，简直生不如死…过了没多久，两个人就前后脚离开了。
E: The two began to suffer terribly, such that death became a blessing... It wasn't long before they departed this world, one after the other.

C: 但医生的研究一再受阻，最大的原因在于缺乏实验对象。篡改人体的免疫系统伴随着巨大的风险，而上层区没有人愿意配合他进行这种实验。
E: But his research met with obstruction time and time again, the biggest factor being a lack of test subjects. Tampering with the human immune system carries huge risk, and nobody in the Overworld was willing to submit themselves to such experiments.

C: 哦，凑巧路过，然后把我们看门的弟兄揍得落花流水？
E: Oh, just passing through... And our guards decided to just beat themselves into submission, I suppose?

C: 您稍等片刻——我这就去通知各部门，准备开始下一场比赛！
E: Just a moment, I'm going to inform all departments that the next fight is about to begin!

C: 这就是所谓「三堂深处」…快进来吧！
E: This is the so-called "the three depths"... Come on in!

C: 还好我早有防备，早在几天前，{NICKNAME}就找到我，提醒我注意近期或有水魈流窜，没想到这么快你就送上门了。
E: Good thing I was on guard. As early as a few days ago, the real {NICKNAME} had already warned me that there may be a Xenohydro wreaking havoc in the near future. I didn't expect you to come so soon.

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。但我说这些并不是为了换取你的原谅。只是…把你当作朋友，久违地，说一说心里话而已。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. But I'm not saying this to get your forgiveness. I was just... talking to you as a friend, getting things off my chest.

C: 嗨，功劳是大家的～
E: Hehe, it was a team effort~

C: 对了…他说过，礼貌的孩子不能忘了自我介绍。我叫希莉儿，很开心…很荣幸认识你。
E: Oh, he also mentioned that it's polite to always introduce yourself. So, my name is Cyrille, and it's nice... an honor, I mean, to meet you.

C: 嗯哼…嗯哼……
E: Mhm... mhm...

C: 这些箭头到底是什么意思？
E: What exactly do these arrows mean?

C: 逆时针旋转箭头
E: Counterclockwise rotation arrow

C: 任务完成，我们回机械屋去吧。这一趟可真够折腾的……
E: Mission accomplished. Let's head back to the workshop. This trip has been so tiring.

C: 对了，我记得上层区有一家花店？不如我们去那边看看吧。
E: Oh, yes! I remember there was a florist in the Overworld. How about we head over that way?

C: 「开拓」在保护我，反倒是你…
E: Trailblaze protects me. It's you I'm worried about...

C: {NICKNAME}，有时间吗？我又有一件事想请你帮忙。一件…比较私人的事。
E: {NICKNAME}, can I talk to you for a moment? I have a favor to ask. Something... rather personal.

C: …那怎么行！身为博物馆项目的负责人，我可不能容忍这种蒙骗大众的行为……
E: ...Out of the question! As the curator of the exhibits here, I would never resort to deceiving the public like that...

C: 真是撞大运了，没想到调查进展这么快！
E: What a stroke of luck! I didn't expect to get a break in the investigation so quickly!

C: 博物馆经理——在贝洛伯格学院发起的「毕业后最想从事的职业」投票里，那可是总得票数前三的岗位！回报绝对没得说。
E: Museum manager — voted among the top three "Most Highly Desired Careers After Graduation!" in a Belobog Academy poll. Needless to say, we offer a competitive package.

C: 你们不是朋友吗？
E: Weren't the two of you friends?

C: 五万？嗯…比我想的低了点， 不过也还凑合吧。
E: <unbreak>50,000</unbreak>? Well... it's a little less than I thought, but not too bad.

C: 你们居然见过？
E: You two know each other?

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 请你先留步。如果你也对此不知情，那想必是流程推进过程中出了什么差池。
E: Please, wait a moment. If you know nothing about my application, then maybe it didn't reach her.

C: 那我稍后就把这份简历提交上去——走吧，陪我一起去博物馆！
E: I'll submit this resume in a bit. Come on! Let's go to the museum!

C: 果然还是逃不掉吗……
E: Ha, there's no escaping it after all..

C: 你倒贴啊！还能怎么办？
E: Just say you will compensate for the loss! What else can you do?

C: 算你识相。
E: As you should.

C: 哎…时间还够，那就陪你走个过场吧。
E: Fine. I'll play along, but it's only because I'm not busy today.

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 是你啊，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。这里不适合聊天，有事长话短说吧。
E: Ah, young {F#lady}{M#man}. This isn't the best place for a chat. Let's keep things brief.

C: 你不相信她的本事？
E: You don't think she's got the talent?

C: 什么探测器？
E: What detector?

C: 啊…怎么办！虎克已经要晕了！你们还记得他们都说了什么吗？
E: Argh... Hook's head is spinning! Do you remember everything they said?

C: 我管他有什么苦衷！下层都到这个地步了，不靠偷不靠抢，我们这群人还能混得下去吗？
E: The heck if I care! With the Underworld in such a sad state, how are we supposed to survive if we don't resort to robbing and stealing?

C: 你还在呢？
E: You're still here?

C: 不过还是容我先验下货，看看是不是我要找的那几件……
E: Let me check the goods and make sure they're what I'm looking for...

C: 所以这到底是怎么回事？
E: So what is going on?

C: …算了，我知道替他说话只会让你更生气。至少…至少现在我们有机会做正确的事。
E: ...Never mind. I know I sound like I'm defending him, and I don't want to make you angry. At least now we've got the chance to right the wrongs.

C: 奇怪…手册上是这样说的没错啊……
E: Weird... That's what the guide says...

C: 为什么他们就是不能停止操心，让我放手去做呢？
E: Why can't they just stop worrying and let me do what I want?

C: 玲可会伤心的…
E: Lynx will be upset...

C: 可可利亚做了手脚。
E: Cocolia must have done something to make you forget.

C: 我好像…就是在这里被选中，然后被带上地面的……
E: I... must have been chosen from among the children here and then taken to the surface...

C: …四十八…四十九…五十！
E: <unbreak>48</unbreak>... <unbreak>49</unbreak>... <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

C: 难道是发生了什么故障…可它看上去很正常啊？
E: Could it have malfunctioned? It appears to be normal...

C: 问问它为什么要偷零件吧。
E: Ask him why he was stealing parts.

C: 奥列格大叔是想谈谈史瓦罗的事吧？我们得走了，不好意思，娜塔——伤员就麻烦你啦。
E: I bet old Oleg wants to talk about Svarog. We should get going — sorry Nat, we'll have to leave the wounded to you.

C: 这在地上简直难以想象，机器人在上层区只是工具而已。
E: This would be unthinkable on the surface. Robots are merely tools in the Overworld.

C: 踢踢踏踏，踢踢踏踏，黑暗中伸出了她的爪牙
E: Scraping of claws, gnashing of teeth, evil intent hears the sound of his feet

C: 这个按钮上写着「系统重置」，摁下去试试看吧。
E: This button says "system reset." Let's give it a try.
Beep... Boop...

C: 我会跟首领表扬你的，现在少说几句吧。
E: I'll commend you to the chief. No need to waste your time.

C: 受到威胁？什么意思？
E: In danger? What do you mean?

C: 你自由发挥吧。
E: Make something up.

C: 别自乱阵脚。记住，要让他相信我们是计算中的「变量」。
E: Stay focused. Remember, we have to make him see that we're a variable in the calculation.

C: 自从博士跟他的助手去世以后，它就一直停留在这里，一步都没动过。
E: Since the doctor and his assistants passed away, it's remained here. It hasn't moved an inch.

C: 别乱动，我马上就把你修好。
E: Hold still. You're nearly fixed.

C: 拍卖会上有什么好东西？
E: What kind of treasures can I find at the auction?

C: 嗯…恕我直言，这件商品可能会流拍啊…毕竟在下实在看不出它有什么价值。
E: Hm... With all due respect, I don't think this item will generate much interest at the auction... I don't see any value in it.

C: 你是给我传单的那个人…
E: You gave me the pamphlet...

C: 我原本想去找找有没有侄女可能喜欢的礼物，玩具、玩偶之类的——贵一点儿也没关系，重要的是能让孩子高兴。
E: I wanted to go and see whether there were any gifts, toys, or dolls that my niece might like. I didn't mind if they were a little more expensive than usual, I just wanted her to be happy.

C: 各位不用担心，这只是技术性调整！现在我们暂时休息一会儿，拍卖会稍后继续。
E: Don't worry, everyone — just a minor technical issue! We'll take a quick break now, and the auction will resume soon.

C: 嘁，不过是个小鬼，凑什么热闹？你们知道这探针的价值吗？
E: Hahahaha, what could a couple of brats do to me? Do you even know how much the probe is worth?

C: 啊？！娜塔莎姐姐你也去了拍卖会吗？
E: Huh!? You were at the auction too, Natasha?

C: 其他客人还有鼹鼠党的小伙伴，还有…对了，还邀请了希儿！她说今天没空，但是会把礼物寄给虎克。
E: I also invited other members of The Moles, and... Oh yeah! Seele too! She couldn't come today, but she said she'd still send me a gift.

C: 宝、宝贝女儿送给我的？那可得好好看看，好好看看……
E: For me? I'm curious...

C: 谢…谢谢…外来者…救了…克拉拉。
E: Th—Th—Th—Thank you... for rescuing... Claaaara.

C: 方脑壳？！哦，天哪！
E: A square head? Oh my gosh!

C: 没什么头绪…还有其他细节吗？
E: Not really... Is there anything else you noticed?

C: 好、好的！克拉拉就跟在{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}身后。
E: O—Okay! I'll follow you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 遥控机器人…是高智商犯罪！
E: Remotely controlling a robot to steal parts... What an ingenious criminal!

C: 别打我，我投降！好汉饶命啊！
E: Don't hit me. I surrender! Please have mercy!

C: 评估个体状况完成。认定外壳损毁程度为——<unbreak>98.2%</unbreak>。
E: Assessment of the robot's condition is complete. The shell damage is estimated to be <unbreak>98.2%</unbreak>.

C: 欸？它发出的声音，好像有点奇怪？
E: Huh? It's making a strange sound.

C: （看来它还没恢复正常…之后再来看看吧。）
E: (Looks like it hasn't gone back to normal yet... I should come back later.)

C: 放弃吧…
E: I think you should give up...

C: 那…请先告诉克拉拉吧，史瓦罗先生。
E: Okay... Then you can tell me first, Mr. Svarog.

C: 提醒：该概率仅为理论估测。在下层区过去<unbreak>700</unbreak>年中，从未发现实际案例。
E: Please keep in mind that these probabilities are only estimates. Over the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, this has never happened in the Underworld.

C: 「壁垒」的故障还没修好呢，别大言不惭了，弟弟！
E: The Barrier hasn't been fixed yet. Don't try and be a hero, Gepard!

C: …就跟那个杰帕德一样。我能看出来——他刚才下了很大的决心才放下武器。
E: ...It's the same with Gepard. I could tell it took a lot for him to lay down his arms.

C: 我会尽力帮你找回自我。
E: I'll try my best to help you regain yourself.

C: 我…没什么想说的了。
E: I... don't have anything to say.

C: （虽然桑博说这可能是裂界影响下产生的幻象…但她的语气听上去实在太过真实了。）
E: (I know Sampo said it's possibly all just an illusion created by the Fragmentum... but she sounds all too real to me.)

C: 唔…满嘴胡话的女人，凭空出现的军械箱……
E: Mmm... a strange woman spouting nonsense, and Armory Boxes just popping out of thin air...

C: 「星核」已经警告了可可利亚…
E: The Stellaron has already warned Cocolia...

C: 我…还是记不起来啊…没有印象……
E: I... I don't remember... It's a blank canvas...

C: …愚蠢，卑微……
E: ...Foolish, weak...

C: 裂界侵蚀已经蔓延到了下层。如果撤走所有铁卫…留在下面的人该怎么保护自己？
E: The Fragmentum corrosion has already spread to the Underworld. How will those below ground fend for themselves if we withdraw every guard?

C: …必须阻止它的行动！
E: ...We have to stop it!

C: 七百年前，它驱逐了反物质军团——今天，它也会将你们的存在一并抹消！
E: Just as it dispelled the Antimatter Legion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, so too will it wipe you from the face of this world!

C: …但是？别卖关子啦，丹恒！
E: ...However what? Don't leave us on a cliffhanger, Dan Heng!

C: …也许可可利亚的话并非满篇胡言乱语。星核对这个世界造成的影响已经太深，恐怕已经到了无法逆转的地步。
E: ...Perhaps there was some truth among Cocolia's ravings. Over such a long period of time, the Stellaron has surely had a huge impact on this world. It's possible that the changes have become irreversible.

C: 既然注定要接过「大守护者」的职责…那我就必须舍弃天真的幻想。
E: Now I must take over the duties of the supreme guardian... and discard my naive fantasies.

C: 一介过客，却执意要肩负起一整个世界的命运……
E: You are but a stranger to us. And yet you seek to bond your destiny to ours...

C: 不…不对。你身上…没有他的气息。
E: N—No. You don't have... his scent.

C: 没想到他们竟还派专人盯着被寒潮吞没的星球…可真像公司的办事风格。
E: I didn't think they would actually send someone to keep an eye on a planet engulfed in the Eternal Freeze... That however does sounds like their way of doing things.

C: 呵呵，就知道你会这么说。
E: Hehe. I knew you would say that.

C: 寒潮前的历史？我确实有所了解，但没办法很准确地为你复述出来。
E: Before the Eternal Freeze? I do know about it, but I can't recite it all by memory.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>星槎海的航道里会经过不同颜色、不同型号的星槎。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Starskiffs of different colors and models will pass through the lanes in Starskiff Haven.</color>

C: 你发现，蓝色的客运型通过了3艘。
E: You saw three blue passenger starskiffs going past.

C: 有这么明显吗？我和她朝夕相处的，感觉更明显一些。
E: Is it that obvious? For me, having her around day and night does make me more aware of her struggles.

C: 我也只是一个普通人，不过是想要更好的家政服务罢了。别人都可以换，我也想雇一位交流起来更加轻松的保姆，这也不难理解吧……
E: I'm only an average citizen who wants better housekeeping service. I just want to get a new housekeeper like everyone else, someone I can have an easier time communicating with. That's not asking too much, is it?

C: 赔偿就是赔偿，是法律要求他给你的，你不要的话，就是违法。
E: If you don't accept the compensation from him, you're breaking the law.

C: 方子上并没有细说它的来源和性质，只是称它为「天人金枝」？仙舟的常用药材中有叫这么个名字的吗？
E: The prescription didn't say what this ingredient is or where it's from. It's just called "Divine Aureate Twig." Is this the name of a common medicine in Xianzhou?

C: 我想搞清楚之前那位丹士长赠给我的药方究竟是真是假。
E: I want to find out whether the prescription the last chief alchemist gave me is genuine.

C: 听说你这边需要帮忙？
E: I heard you need help here.

C: 一想到连离别都如此轻松惬意，我就想生气跺脚——虽然我脚不能着地。
E: The thought of how easy and satisfied goodbyes have become makes me want to stomp my feet in rage — even though I can't actually reach the ground.

C: 妈妈，你别再劝我了。
E: Mom, I won't change my mind.

C: 罗浮仙舟，我来了…
E: Xianzhou Luofu, I'm coming...

C: 吃了上顿没下顿
E: I'll say I'm living from hand to mouth.

C: 首先我要考察你的「韵律」。诗人会使同韵母的字在诗句中有规律地反复出现，从而造成一种声音回环的美——也就是押韵。
E: First, I'll test your rhythm. Poets often use words with the same rhyme regularly in a verse to create an artistic echo-like effect.

C: 不被欢愉和逆境触动的爱意。
E: The love that is untouched by joy, by adversities.

C: 女孩左右顾盼，见四下无人，把脸转向你，满眼兴奋。
E: The girl looked around. After making sure the coast was clear, she turned to you with her eyes filled with excitement.

C: 说吧，你想了解什么？
E: Tell me. What do you want to know?

C: 孤屿是小聪的前世。
E: In Cong's former life, he was Guyu.

C: 我明白了，我推荐您「彩云纪」最新款的女士竖领短袄，包您满意。
E: Got it. I recommend that you buy the latest women's cropped jacket with a stand-up collar from the Nimbus Chronicles series. I'm sure you'll like it.

C: 这是孤屿在浴月蜕生之前就紧紧握住的同心锁，他希望能在转生之后和你再续前缘。
E: Guyu held this lock tightly in his hands before he underwent the hatching rebirth in the moonlight. He hoped to continue his relationship with you after the reincarnation.

C: 仔细想想…还真是！
E: Come to think of it, it really does seem to be my job!

C: 这点好处，别想请得动我！
E: These peanuts are not enough to hire me!

C: 欸，你不会忘记带礼物了吧？
E: Hey, you didn't forget the gifts, did you?

C: 去问问<color=#dbc291ff>地衡司公廨外的广大</color>吧，城市的牛皮癣都归他管。
E: Go ask <color=#dbc291ff>Guangda outside the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery</color>. He's responsible for fixing such scars found in the city.

C: 关于「美丽狐仙聊天」…
E: About the Foxian Beauty Chat...

C: 太好了，我一见到你，就觉得你是我的知音。
E: That's great! The moment I saw you, I knew you'd be someone who understands me.

C: 放心，我会按公司货运的双倍…不，三倍价格付费！还有，小姐姐们的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>！你也想见识见识狐仙小姐姐的迷人魅力吧？
E: Don't worry, I'll pay you double— no, triple the amount the delivery service company charges! Also, I'll throw in the beauty's <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>! You want to behold the beauty's charm for yourself!

C: 识别码我会交给你，然后我们去跟踪机巧鸟。找到收货人，然后我再低声下气地跟小姑娘请求一下，应该就有<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>了。
E: I will give you the identifier code, then we will go ahead and follow the cycrane. We find the consignee, I supplicate myself to the lady a little bit, and I should be able to get the <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>.

C: 她不会被抓走的。
E: She won't be arrested.

C: 你明明被骗得团团转。
E: The wool was not just pulled over your eyes, it was all around your head.

C: 真诚待人又有何不对？
E: What's wrong with being honest and sincere?

C: 明白了。我就当这是人类多样性的一种证明了。
E: I see. I'll take it as a testament to the diversity of humankind.

C: （…那里好像有光亮反应了？过去看看好了。）
E: (...Something's glimmering over there? It's worth going to take a look.)

C: 我的体形在不断缩小。皮肤、肌肉、内脏…我确实越来越年轻了，只是这份「青春」似乎没有尽头。
E: My body, it keeps shrinking. My skin, muscles, organs... Indeed, I'm getting younger, you see, but this "youth" doesn't seem to have an off switch.

C: 嚯，这么爽快！好啊，大毫在此拜谢恩公了。
E: Hah, that was fast! Thanks for your help.

C: 告诉地衡司的人，白露大人由我们丹鼎司来照顾就行，别多管闲事。
E: Tell the Realm-Keeping Commission that Lady Bailu is in the Alchemy Commission's care... and not to meddle in other people's affairs.

C: 我和她是同道，但她却好像一直躲着我，嘿嘿……
E: We walk the same path, but it would seem she's hiding from me, hehe...

C: 先拿走吧。
E: I'd better take this.

C: 我有异议！
E: I disagree!

C: 来，拿着。
E: Here, take it.

C: 谢谢你，白露大人。我们约定好的地方就在那边，走吧。
E: Thank you, Lady Bailu. The place we arranged to meet up is ahead. Let's go.

C: 很遗憾，没有。
E: I'm afraid not.

C: 那是，不止一波，各怀目的。
E: Yes — many. Each with their own agenda in mind.

C: 丹鼎司的医士说我只能尽快蜕生，不然会有性命之虞……可怜那些同袍兄弟，却不能重归古海。
E: The doctors at the Alchemy Commission said I have to reincarnate as soon as possible to avoid affecting my immortal life... But my poor comrades have no chance of returning to the ancient sea.

C: 需要我做什么？
E: Is there anything I can do for you?

C: 老大，就是这个人…拿着您需要的货物。
E: Boss, this is the one... He brought the delivery.

C: 咱们长乐天算是罗浮上一个很重要的中心城区，上面对这里的治安问题也很上心。所以，上上下下安装了不少机巧鸟。
E: Exalting Sanctum is one of the Luofu's crucial central cities — the higher-ups are very concerned about security issues here. That's why there are so many cycranes stationed in the area.

C: 哈哈哈哈，您几位真有活力。会查罗刹这批人也是有原因的：唯独在建木生发前一天，他究竟做了什么…我们确实不知道。
E: Hahahaha, you lot are enthusiastic, I'll give you that. The reason I mention the day before the resurrection is because... we have no idea what he did that day.

C: 什么时候能好？
E: When will you be done?

C: 的确，感觉他们的茶可能和姬子的咖啡差不多……
E: Their tea must be stronger than Himeko's coffee...

C: 还记得贝洛伯格的尤利安…
E: Remember Julian back in Belobog...?

C: 正是如此。也许罗刹在罗浮上有内应，而他和内应之间就通过书的扉页来相互联系。
E: Exactly. I think Luocha may have friends on the Luofu, and they're using the title page to communicate.

C: 哦，没事。我只是…对其它世界的「罗刹」有点固有印象，止不住有些担心。
E: Ha, don't worry about me. It's just... my mind keeps wandering back to those other "Luochas" I mentioned. Not the greatest memories.

C: 恩公也这么说吗…我、我当然知道这样激烈地表达只会带来反效果。
E: You think so too, benefactor...? I—I mean, I know getting emotional only makes things worse.

C: 别硬撑了，一口解千愁。
E: Help yourself, I'm sure there's some leftover.

C: 我妈可不是不负责任的人。她肯定是把工作安排妥帖后才去翘班的。
E: Hehe, my mom isn't the irresponsible type — she only skips work if she's managed to delegate everything.

C: 有点幼稚…
E: That's a bit childish...

C: …抱歉，打扰了。
E: Uh sorry... Sorry, we'll get going.

C: 我妈在办公桌里放了很多东西，咱们得找找。
E: My mom keeps lots of stuff in her desk. Let's have a look.

C: 妈妈没能载回同伴，她只能遵守这个誓言，不让另一个采翼出现。对她来说，我不仅仅是她的女儿，也是她能为采翼履行的最后责任。
E: Mom didn't manage to bring her comrade back... so she vowed to prevent me from setting out. Not only am I her daughter — I'm also her final promise to Caiyi.

C: 这次是去打步离人的主力舰队，还是别那么激动，稍微冷静些吧。
E: We're engaging the main borisin fleet this time. Don't get too excited.

C: 区区几个孽物，瞧不起谁呢？
E: Hey, you think we can't take them?

C: 我不明白，你为什么一定要成为飞行士！
E: Why do you insist on becoming a pilot!? I don't understand.

C: 你真的很像采翼。所以这些年来，你越是优秀，我就越是恐惧。我知道你早就准备好了…但是，我一直都还没准备好……
E: ...You are so very similar to Caiyi. The more outstanding you became over the years, the more fearful I turned. I've known for a long time you were ready... but I was not...

C: 早知道就不打开包裹了。
E: If we'd known, we wouldn't have opened the package...

C: 谢谢你来帮助我，{NICKNAME}。我很感激…后会有期了。
E: Thank you for coming to my aid, {NICKNAME} — I appreciate it... Our paths will cross again.

C: 咦？
E: Huh?

C: 军令在此，便是将军本人，此刻也非得罪不可。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: The law is the law, even if we must offend the general. Everyone, take them down!

C: 仙舟拥有非常发达的科技。如果我猜的没错，从进入空港开始，我们已经身在人造的空间球中。
E: The Xianzhou possesses extremely advanced technology. If I'm not mistaken, we've been in an artificial ecosphere since we arrived at the skyport.

C: 交给我吧～
E: I'm on it~

C: 恩公说笑了，这么大的货箱…就算是所有人一齐上都拿不下呢。
E: I'd like to see us try, haha... they're extremely heavy. Even with all of us, we wouldn't be able to move one.

C: 不认得…
E: No...

C: 区区小事，不算麻烦。
E: It's no bother — a little walk will do me good.

C: 那么这局对弈，我会奉陪到底。
E: Then I shall see this gamble through.

C: 可白珩却不管那些。在她看来，龙尊不过是血肉凡胎，与一旁的士兵无异。她在世的时候，可没少把你差来遣去的。
E: ...but Baiheng didn't care about any of that. She believed that the high elder was mortal and no different from the soldier next to her. You ran a fair share of errands for her when she was still around.

C: 对于云骑将士，归葬沙场本是荣耀。可是饮月…你不懂这些。
E: For the Cloud Knights, giving up one's life on the battlefield is an honor... but that wasn't something you believed in, Imbibitor Lunae...

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 所以，它想带我们看什么东西？
E: So what does he want us to take a look at?

C: 呃，哈哈，过奖过奖。
E: Uh, haha, thanks miss.

C: 是了，星槎的航行记录都登录在码头的舵航仪里。
E: The starskiff voyage log can be accessed through the dock navigator array.

C: 云骑不拿公务做交易，何况，你赢不了。
E: A Cloud Knight never gambles with official business. But in any case, you won't beat me.

C: 是了，星槎的航行记录都登录在码头的舵航仪里。
E: The starskiff voyage log can be accessed through the dock navigator array.

C: 瞻前顾后，劲衰力弱。
E: Hesitant, weak.

C: 这里魔阴横行，妖氛遍布，正适合考校剑术。剑斩孽物，不违背云骑军的规纪，也谈不上「用公务与我交易」，对吧？
E: This place is brimming with mara — the perfect environment for honing one's skills. Surely slaying abominations doesn't count as "gambling with official business"?

C: 不接！！
E: I refuse!!

C: 不必担心。第二步非常简单啊，很快就可以结束了。
E: No need to worry, the second step is extraordinarily simple. It'll all be over soon enough.

C: （不过，这个邮包似乎被加密了。这也没办法，毕竟是重要情报。试试看能不能解开吧。）
E: (Hmm, seems like it's encrypted somehow... Makes sense, this is critical intelligence after all... Let's see if I can crack the code.)

C: 工作经历相关的物件。没问题。
E: Something related to your work. Good.

C: 这失真的情况有些古怪……
E: The distortions we're experiencing are... unorthodox.

C: （触摸「异物」）
E: (Touch the "foreign object")

C: 这里就是星穹列车了吧？看起来，你快要回溯到自己所经历的源头了。到那时候，大衍穷观阵就可以开始演算了。
E: This is the Astral Express, no? It would seem that you're nearing the source. The Matrix of Prescience Ultima should start making further calculations soon.

C: 唔…毕竟你比较谨慎嘛。但无论如何，礼物没有不收的道理，不然多没礼貌啊！
E: *sigh* You're too cautious. A gift is a gift — it's rude not to take it!

C: …你是？
E: ...And you are?

C: 让你看笑话了呀。云璃与你讲了不少，不过，你也听听我这老头的说法吧。
E: Sorry for all this trouble. Yunli told you quite a bit. Now, it's time for this old man to tell my side of the story.

C: 我已吩咐过工造司，将剑存放入武库中好好保管。你若是放心不下，不妨问问相关人士。
E: I've instructed the Artisanship Commission to keep the sword safe in the arsenal. If you have any doubts, feel free to ask the people involved.

C: 你合上剑匣，将它放回原处。
E: You close the sword case and put it back.

C: 我想跟其他人再聊聊。
E: I'd like to talk to the others again.

C: 我会等你。
E: I'll be waiting for you.

C: 我没有！
E: I didn't do it!

C: 若时间再充裕些，让她相信我是「同谐」本人垂迹也不是不可能。
E: If we had a little more time, I could have even convinced her I was Xipe the Harmony.

C: 沙马里当场就不行了，一下从梦里惊醒了过来。那凶手也转眼消失不见。
E: Shamari collapsed on the spot and woke up from the dream. The murderer vanished in a flash.

C: 看来那就是花火留给你的谜题了。
E: Looks like a puzzle that Sparkle has left behind for you.

C: 少插嘴，有你说话的份吗？咳咳…听闻黑天鹅大人智计超凡，想来定能解开这起「花火大人遇害案」的真相！
E: Don't interrupt. I wasn't talking to you. Ahem... I understand Lady Black Swan has quite the intellect. I'm sure you'll be able to get to the bottom of the Sparkle murder case!

C: 这听起来…似乎没什么区别？
E: That sounds like... both buttons can do the exact same thing?

C: 因为她公平。
E: Because she is fair.

C: 真凶是「阿佑」。
E: The murderer is Wright.

C: 还不是为了方便你们记忆！这次还给他们补上了种族细节，方便区分。
E: It's not just to aid your memory! We've added more descriptions to help tell them apart.

C: 花火大人真是宅心仁厚！
E: Miss Sparkle is so gracious!

C: 花火大人不想扰乱侦查嘛！
E: Miss Sparkle doesn't want to distract your investigation!

C: 钟珊闯入试衣间，希望讨回自己的戒指，不想花火大人把心一横，直接吞下了它！谁曾想，这一下戒指卡在了喉咙里！
E: Zhongshan stormed into the changing room to try and get his ring back — flustering Miss Sparkle, who swallowed it! Who would've guessed that the ring would get stuck in her throat?

C: 「花火伪装成的另一名角色」…不就是你吗，「桑博」先生？
E: "Sparkle has disguised herself as another character"... Wouldn't that be you, Mr. Sampo?

C: 可按侦探的描述，这间密室并没能延缓目击者发现尸体，现场也没有可供嫁祸的第三者，而满地鲜血也不像是要伪装成自杀……
E: But based on the detective's description, this locked-room did not delay the discovery of the body. There was no third party at the crime scene to frame, and the blood everywhere didn't look like a faked suicide...

C: 不出所料，又换设定了……
E: As expected, another change in setting...

C: 锵锵——现在就是一出戏剧最令人激动也最浪漫的时刻：挑战观众环节！
E: Ding-a-ling~ Now comes the most exciting and romantic moment in any drama: The audience challenge!

C: 首先是店员阿佑，他是个皮皮西人，身高还不到花火大人的腰，这一点常被人取笑，令他变得有些阴暗。
E: First of all is the shopkeeper, Wright. He's one of the Pepeshi people and only stands as tall as Sparkle's waist, which is often a source of teasing for him. He can get pretty salty about it.

C: 然后他突然用力勒紧了领带！就这样杀害了花火大人！
E: ...he then suddenly pulled it tight! And THAT'S how he killed Miss Sparkle!

C: 但我比较喜欢副警长小姐的性格设计呢，能不能让它回来呢？
E: But I preferred the character design of the deputy sheriff. Can it come back?

C: 很遗憾，这处阵基唤作「界寰阵」，据说是专司读取与「空间」有关的信息。
E: Darn, the Spatial Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to retrieve information related to space. You probably could've guessed that...

C: …{NICKNAME}，你去问吧。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, you go ask her.

C: …又是我出主意？
E: ...Am I coming up with the plan again?

C: 我？我来领兵？
E: Under... my control?

C: 很久以前，仙舟尚未升入天空前，我们的祖先生活在某个星球的大地上。和诸位一样，那时的仙舟人是寿不逾百岁的短生种。
E: Long ago, before the Xianzhou took to the skies, our ancestors lived on the surface of a planet. Like all of you, the Xianzhou people at that time were a mortal species with a lifespan of fewer than <unbreak>100</unbreak> years.

C: 哎？她竟然没有大发雷霆。看来是占了一卦，早就做好了准备。
E: Huh? She's not angry? *sigh* Is there anyone that isn't two steps ahead of us around here?

C: 打从星核开始侵蚀的时间算起，除了派驻在其他洞天的丹士医师之外，「丹鼎司」就再也无人回报。
E: From the time the Stellaron corrosion began to spread until now, the only reports we've received on the Alchemy Commission have come from alchemists and doctors stationed in other delves.

C: 没事的啦。天塌下来，有太卜大人在，哦，现在还得加个将军大人，上前顶着呢。
E: It'll be fine. Even if the sky collapses, we have the master diviner with us to hold it up. Oh, and now we have the general here too.

C: 来，师姐疼你，撬棍和切割锯都给你准备上了，去吧！事后云骑军把你从墙上铲下来的时候，别怪师姐没警告你。
E: Sure, go ahead. Here's a crowbar and a saw! Don't say I didn't warn you when the Cloud Knights have to scrape you off the walls.

C: 是嘞！还记得那时为解开「换境画屏」上的根须，我们用机关烧穿了上面的缠结么？
E: Precisely! You remember how we untangled the Shifting Screen with fire?

C: 都是传说了。但今日「建木」复生，显得传说也不那么荒诞…你们就当个乐子听了吧。
E: It's only a legend... though what with the Ambrosial Arbor having come back to life, I suppose it's no longer absurd...

C: 你们是受将军请托，要去往「丹鼎司」么？
E: So the general asked you to head to the Alchemy Commission?

C: 第二、禁止靠做家务来赚取零花钱，一切经济来源只能靠其他小屁孩「自愿」上供！
E: Number two — earning pocket money through chores is forbidden — all sources of income must be "voluntary" donations from other kids!

C: 我来招聘一名战士。
E: I'm here to hire a fighter.

C: 我可没听说过会被黉学先生骂哭的第一恶棍！
E: Yeah, right! You think the baddest baddy in the galaxy would burst into tears whenever they're yelled at by an abecedary!

C: 是啊…我确实在努力改变她这样的人的处境。
E: Yes... by trying my best to change her personal circumstances.

C: 丹枢将贮有丹药的小盒放在了亭台上，你看了看它。
E: Dan Shu placed the box with the pellet on the table. You glance at it.

C: 嘘，能不能小点声？我可是本本分分客居在此的化外民，和「药王秘传」没有半点关系。
E: Shh, can you keep your voice low? I'm just an outworlder who lives here and keeps to myself. I have nothing to do with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 调查有什么进展的话，咱们就在丹鼎司见面吧。
E: Let's meet at the Alchemy Commission to discuss updates on the investigation.

C: 这是什么新碰瓷骗局？
E: Is this a new scam?

C: 换言之，咱们需要找到一个濒危且凶猛的…植物？这还真是一道难题啊…你有什么头绪吗？
E: In other words, we need to find an endangered and ferocious... plant? This is so challenging... Do you have any ideas?

C: {NICKNAME}，我需要你的配合，看到我带来了这些超控模块吗？想办法拆开机兵的外壳，找到适配的接口，把它们都接上去试试。
E: {NICKNAME}, I require your assistance. See those override modules I brought? Try to remove the casing of the automatons and search for the right port to connect with the modules.

C: 快把你那些小纸人拿出来，还记得怎么念咒吗？
E: Take your paper dolls out, quickly! Do you remember the incantation?

C: 幽灵出没，是因为怨念不散，还是灾难又要降临的预兆？你就不感到好奇吗？
E: Why are the ghosts haunting the garden? A lingering grudge, perhaps... or maybe they're an omen of some impending disaster? Aren't you curious?

C: …那有十王司的冥差巡逻，咱们换条路走吧——先走狐眠冢那边，绕进谈狐林好了。
E: ...There are Ten-Lords Commission spiritfarers on patrol. Let's go the other way — we'll head to the Foxsomn Tomb first, then cut through the Locufox Forest.

C: 等一小会，我还有事。
E: I still have something to do.

C: …哦、哦。刚才听见桂乃芬小姐大喊起来，所以慌了神……
E: ...Oh... I heard Miss Guinaifen yell, so I got scared...

C: 说说现状吧，仙舟人管你的遭遇叫「鬼打墙」，继续没头脑地走下去也无济于事。
E: Allow me to explain what's happening... The Xianzhou natives call it a "ghost lock." You're walking in a circle, and no amount of walking will get you out of it.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请拿好这张符纸，贴在身上。岁阳短时间内还不能完全支配人的身体，用这纸符可以暂时压住它对你的影响。
E: {M#M—Mr.}{F#M—Miss} {NICKNAME}, take this talisman and stick it to your body — it'll temporarily suppress the heliobus's influence...

C: 喂，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，你去，安慰安慰藿藿，这家伙的哭声真是比断断续续的蚊子叫声还招人烦。
E: Hey! {M#Boy}{F#Girl}! Say something nice to Huohuo. Her crying is like a mosquito in my ear.

C: 吾等判官，谁也无法在这一点上强过你。
E: On that point, none of the other judges can surpass you.

C: {NICKNAME}，我要继续借你的身体一用。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'll need your body for a while longer.

C: 这里有好几面铜镜。
E: There are multiple bronze mirrors here.

C: 这么多年过去，尾巴大爷还是很受欢迎……
E: Never knew you were so popular, Mr. Tail...

C: 藿藿，动身吧，穿过铜镜，到吾这边来。
E: Hurry, Huohuo. Pass through the mirror and come to me.

C: 擢升的公文吾还记得。
E: I still remember the decree for her promotion.

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 你的判断还是挺准确的。
E: Your judgment was pretty accurate.

C: 她微笑地看着你，那笑容显然经过经年累月的训练——多一分则谄媚，少一分则冷漠。
E: She smiles at you, with a precise smile obviously honed from years of training — a mere notch more would be flattery, and a notch less would be indifferent.

C: 能快速结束这场对话，乔凡娜显得很开心——她转过头，接着忙她自己的事情去了。
E: Giovanna is visibly pleased that she can end this conversation quickly. She turns away and busies herself with her many tasks.

C: 啊，是您啊…我现在已经没事了，承蒙您关照……
E: Ah, it's you... I'm all fine now. Thank you for your assistance...

C: 我很开心，{F#女士}{M#先生}…我真的很开心。
E: I'm truly happy, {F#madam}{M#mister}... I really am truly happy.

C: 我…恐怕是您记错了，我没有怎么学过声乐。
E: I... I'm afraid you've recalled wrongly. I've never studied music before.

C: 给你五个系统时的期限——业绩再上不去，你就回家吧。
E: I'll give you a deadline of five system hours — if you can't get your performance up to par by the end of it, just go home.

C: 普莱佐的眉毛挤在一起，似乎有些面露难色。
E: Prezzo's brows tighten, his expression a little contorted.

C: 不需要了——我全都不需要了。
E: I don't need them — I don't need any of them anymore.

C: 他的母星是个贫瘠的地方，自星际能源战争之后就一直受到公司的制裁。他们观看外星电影的唯一手段，就是从走私商手里高价租赁录像带。
E: His home planet is an impoverished land that has been under IPC sanctions ever since the Interstellar Energy War. The only way that they are able to watch movies is by renting tapes from smugglers at a high price.

C: 我愿意为他放弃一切。我的财产，我的生活，我……
E: I would give anything for him. My money, my life, my...

C: …还真是白送我了啊。
E: ...Are you guys really giving it to me unconditionally?

C: 您好，您就是新任船长吧？没想到居然这么年轻…我叫罗莎，很高兴见到您。
E: Hello, are you the new captain? I didn't think you'd be this young... I'm Rosa, pleased to meet you.

C: 容我想想……
E: Let me think...

C: 请您稍等。
E: Just a moment.

C: 需要任何工作上的支持，尽管开口！我会让现实酒店的所有员工都全力配合你的工作，嚯嗬嗬嗬！
E: Just speak out if you require any support in your work! I will dispatch all staff working in the hotel in reality to coordinate with you, ohhohoho!

C: （让我想想…好像还缺了点什么。对，得去一趟宴会厅……）
E: (Let me see... Something seems to be missing still. Oh yes, I have to go to the banquet hall...)

C: …所以只能麻烦您了。请查一下，我的名字叫罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登豪威尔。
E: ...So I'll have to trouble you, then. Please can you look me up? The name's Royroy Bougiebooga Baden-Powell.

C: 突然间，你觉得罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登豪威尔这个名字听上去居然没有那么滑稽了。果然，拥有一位富有的亲属是皮皮西人最好的医美。
E: All of a sudden, the name Royroy Bougiebooga Baden-Powell doesn't sound so funny to you anymore. Sure enough, having a rich relative is the best cosmetic out there.

C: 您的房间号是…<unbreak>13588</unbreak>，白金客房！
E: Your room number is... <unbreak>13588</unbreak>, the Platinum Suite!

C: 太、太好了，看来我没、没走错……
E: G—Great. Looks like I—I've come to the right place...

C: 那我可得好好夸夸你。还记得那次你发给我的艾普瑟隆股市报告吗？「预计艾证指数将在经历沉底后强势反弹，建议投资者抓住时机，即刻加仓」——
E: Then I really should sing your praises. Remember that time you sent me an Epsilon stock exchange market analysis? "The Epsilon Stock Index is expected to bounce back strongly after bottoming out, and investors are advised to seize this opportunity and immediately take positions"...

C: 差点忘了，我们是来退房的。{NICKNAME}，这是我的房卡——
E: I nearly forgot — we'd like to check out. {NICKNAME}. Here's my room card...

C: 青雀把手机递给了你……
E: Qingque hands you her phone...

C: 万一你输了呢？
E: And what if you just so happen to lose?

C: 放肆！你知道我是谁吗？
E: How dare you! Do you know who I am?

C: 不论失去了谁，盛会和派对都会继续。我们为这个世界付出的努力、泪水和代价，最后都会被人们对狂欢的贪恋淹没。
E: The festival and party go on no matter who is gone. The blood, sweat, and tears we have shed for this world will inevitably be overshadowed by people's obsession with revelry.

C: （算算人数：我、三月、丹恒、帕姆、姬子、杨叔，黑天鹅也先算进去吧……）
E: (Let's count the people there: Me, March, Dan Heng, Pom-Pom, Himeko, Mr. Yang... and let's count Black Swan in too...)

C: 我给云璃师父翻译翻译：「欸嘿，这是我的剑，不给」。
E: Let me translate for you, Master Yunli: "Nuh-uh, this is my sword, and you can't have it."

C: 即便演武仪典结束了，罗浮仙舟还是这么热闹啊…对了，小三月他们呢？
E: I can't believe the Xianzhou Luofu is still so busy even after the Wardance is over... Oh yeah, where are March and the others?

C: 呵呵，妾身也是与各位一样，为朱明仙舟的客人送行的。毕竟我在朱明仙舟学艺多年，受炎庭君照料，妾身也早已算得是半个朱明人了。
E: Hehe, I am here to bid farewell to our Zhuming guests as you are. As I've spent so many years studying on the Xianzhou Zhuming and been under the care of Ardens Regia, I am basically a half-native Zhuming person at this point.

C: 这手稿真的有这么重要吗？
E: Is this manuscript really that important?

C: …这就是青雀叫我来的原因吗？
E: ...Is this why you've invited me over, Qingque?

C: 我早就看出你是一个富有同理心的人了，我们赶紧开工吧。
E: I can already tell that you're an empathetic person, so let's get to work.

C: 那就出发！目标，星槎海。
E: Then let's head out! Destination: Starskiff Haven.

C: 铖杰你别再垂头丧气了，你看看这里，有美食小吃，可以去不夜侯饮茶，可以逛逛宣夜大街，可解压了。怎么样，你想去哪里？
E: Chengjie, don't be so crestfallen. Look, there's food and drink, there's the Sleepless Earl for tea, and there's Starwatcher Avenue for shopping. So, where do you wanna go?

C: 这样吧！把这「傻瓜式」系统先装在金人身上，然后带到公输师傅那里，让他帮你看看这套…「傻瓜飞行士系统」，如何？
E: I have an idea! Let's install the set-and-forget system on an aurumaton and bring it to Master Gongshu so that he can take a look. How does that sound?

C: 公输师傅刚才悄悄跟我说，他担忧铖杰师傅好久了，但是碍于面子……
E: Master Gongshu just whispered to me that he had been worrying about Chengjie for a long time, but his pride got in the way of approaching Chengjie...

C: 青雀这么说，想必是能办到？
E: The confidence in your tone tells me it's possible.

C: 司库其实还是很有技术含量的，请两位不要来抢我饭碗。
E: Well, it actually requires a lot of skills to be a custodian. Please stop eyeing my job, you two.

C: 我…不行了，我认输……
E: That's it... I give up...

C: 我事先就有种不好的预感…卢卡这家伙，果然想一出是一出。
E: I have a bad feeling about this... Luka always does things on the spur of the moment.

C: 怎、怎么可能？！您别开玩笑了，看不出来我是真的很痛心吗……
E: H—Hey, stop kidding around! Can't you tell I have a serious problem on my hands...?

C: 相信我，希儿！
E: Trust me, Seele!

C: 想趁人不注意偷走两台机器人可是个大工程，何况其中一台还装了报警器。所以，我猜咱们的小贼朋友压根没把「小飞」带走。
E: It's a big job to steal two robots without anyone noticing, especially when one of them has an alarm. I'm guessing that our thief friend never even took Little Fay.

C: …一惊一乍的，你不是得了什么毛病吧？
E: ...Why are you so hyped? What's going on?

C: ——我都承认你的强大。你的表现值得让我重新评估人类的极限。
E: ...I acknowledge your strength. Your performance was enough to make me re-evaluate the limits of humanity.

C: 它们可是我毕生的心血……
E: They are the fruits of my entire life's labor...

C: 早点回来啊。
E: Come back soon.

C: 三位，三位，请留步！
E: Hey, you guys! Hold on a moment!

C: 彦卿明白了，警惕点好。
E: I get it. Better safe than sorry.

C: 刚刚还说街上的安全工作不容闪失，怎么就有事情发生了。抱歉各位，我得先去探探情况。
E: I just mentioned security, and now all of a sudden something's gone wrong. Excuse me, I need to go check out the situation.

C: 仙舟的朋友，你们虽然救了我们，我们是很感激。但连我们带货物也一块扣押，这是不是就有些不像话了？
E: While we appreciate your rescue, my Xianzhou friends, don't you think it's a bit too much to detain us and our cargo?

C: 你好，你是来挑战演武仪典的选手？
E: Glad to meet you, too. Are you here to participate in the Wardance?

C: 怎么样，你心动了？
E: Sounds tempting, doesn't it?

C: 再说了，这柄剑如今有些畏惧它的主人。我倒要反问他，自诩惜剑如命，竟连自己掌中之剑如今是何状态都不认得。
E: Besides, the sword seems scared of its own master. I'd like to ask him – you claim to cherish your sword as your life, yet you don't even recognize the state it's in right now?

C: 一副深藏不露的模样。
E: There appears to be more than meets the eye.

C: 三月，你就少说点吧。
E: Please, March, just keep quiet.

C: 看来这位公司员工是{NICKNAME}老师的旧识…也不知这算是好事还是坏事。
E: Looks like you've met this IPC worker before, {NICKNAME}... I'm not sure if that's a good or bad thing.

C: 呃…说的倒是没错，但、但公司偶尔也会允许一些例外。比如仙舟的舰船，公司向来是乐意网开一面的。
E: Umm... th—that's true, but the IPC s—sometimes makes exceptions. For example, they've always given special terms to Xianzhou vessels.

C: 为了琥珀王！！！
E: For the Amber Lord!!!

C: 都给我起来，不许倒下！你们这些废物，对得起公司的薪水吗？
E: Get up, all of you! Why is the IPC even paying you? You're a bunch of losers!

C: 怎么还藏了这等惊喜…真是吓煞妾身了。
E: Well, how unexpected... that was a surprise~

C: 街上的云骑颇为警醒，可见那位将军还是明白这层道理的。至于别的，我瞧不出来。
E: The Cloud Knights on the streets remain vigilant, so at the very least General Jing Yuan is aware of this. As for other matters, I'm unable to say.

C: …还有我的。
E: ...And mine, too.

C: 倒也不必妄自菲薄，毕竟演武仪典将军不会下场。只要牢记你当日以一人之力挑战我和刃时将生死置之度外的心境，便足以战胜大部分挑战者。
E: Don't underestimate yourself. After all, generals won't fight in the ring during the Wardance. Just remember the state of mind you had when you single-handedly took on me and Blade, putting life and death aside. With that mindset, you can prevail against most challengers.

C: 震鳞赫赫，击云掣电…以丹恒先生的身手，还需要别人指教吗？
E: He strikes like lightning... Does Mr. Dan Heng really need anyone's guidance?

C: 寒鸦拦住了你的去路。她身负要务，必须确保你一路所至之处由她决定。
E: Hanya blocks your way forward. She has been entrusted with the important task of ensuring that you only explore areas she deems safe.

C: 武弁们发誓为把守幽狱奉献生命。但目睹她们的牺牲，你仍希望她们能安然活着。
E: Although the wardens had taken an oath to defend the Shackling Prison to the death, you cannot help but wish they could treasure their lives after witnessing their sacrifice.

C: 片刻后
E: Moments later

C: 鄙人只是对三月小姐「该学什么」的问题心有戚戚，忍不住凑了过来。
E: Well, my curiosity got the better of me I suppose. When I heard Miss March's pondering about what to learn, I couldn't help but wander over.

C: 椒丘先生小看了我和云璃，我和她年纪虽小，也是上过战场的。
E: Perhaps you've underestimated Yunli and me, Mr. Jiaoqiu. We may be young, but we've seen our fair share of war.

C: 这段时间，我也算是一步步看着您越变越强了啊！再与我对练一番如何？
E: I've been watching your progress during this period! How about another spar?

C: 但明日钟声响起，礼炮绽放，彦卿将代表仙舟「罗浮」云骑军，站上擂台，接受四方骁勇之士的挑战。
E: Tomorrow, when the bell rings and the ceremonial cannons roar, I'll be there representing the Cloud Knights of the Xianzhou Luofu, standing in the ring, ready to take on challengers from all over the cosmos.

C: 列车就是大善人
E: We are the good guys.

C: 我和丹枢有过一面之缘。她的挚友死于方壶的战争，她憎恨「巡猎」…在丹鼎司中准备多年，正是为了向仙舟复仇。
E: I personally met Dan Shu once. Her closest friend was killed during the war on the Fanghu, and she harbored deep hatred towards The Hunt. So she spent years making preparations in the Alchemy Commission, in order to take revenge on the Xianzhou.

C: 仙舟的穷观阵也能预卜未来…你相信它预言的未来吗？
E: The Xianzhou's Matrix of Prescience can also predict the future... Do you believe in its prophecies?

C: 抱歉，记起了一些不快的回忆。
E: Sorry, I was just reminiscing about some unpleasant memories.

C: 一眨眼，时间已经过去了这么久。寒鸦和姐姐都成了冥世之身，再不会为什么比赛激动雀跃了。
E: Time sure flies. Now, both my sister and I are residents of the netherworld, and we will never again feel the thrill of a competition.

C: 熙熙攘攘，看不到边。
E: Yeah, it's bustling.

C: 咱们走吧。
E: Let's get going, then.

C: 在幽狱之底，没人能听见诸位的呼喊。
E: Nobody will hear you here, at the bottom of the Shackling Prison.

C: 伟大的呼雷汗，狐人之敌，众生的猎者。我只是犀犬猎群中一个小小的策问官，也许曾是您血脉中产下的最微不足道的子嗣之一。我名{RUBY_B#Mok Tok}末度{RUBY_E#}。
E: O, Great Hoolay, nemesis of the foxians, and the hunter of all beings, I'm Mok Tok, a humble counselor of the Rhinohound Pack. I am only one insignificant heir spawned from your bloodline.

C: 为了救回您，我们别无选择！派我前来的长生主的天使如此说过，「只有您的回归才能结束步离人漫长的分裂」。
E: But we have no other choice! The angel serving under the Master of Immortality sent me with a message, "Only your return will end the prolonged divisions among the borisin."

C: 听好了，我一直潜踪蹑迹尾随这些逃犯。我知道他们接下来打算做什么。他们的计划是闭锁整座幽囚狱出入的门户，拖延此事被外界知晓的时间。
E: Listen up, I've been tracking these fugitives, and I know their next move. They're planning to seal off the entire prison to keep the outside world in the dark.

C: 他用冷漠的表情上下打量着你。不知为何，你能读懂那没有任何表情的表情似乎在说「这个人脑壳坏掉了，真可怜啊」。
E: With an indifferent gaze, he sized you up and down. Somehow, you deciphered his expressionless face as saying, "This person's lost their mind, how pitiful."

C: 报！幽囚狱消息断绝，我们接到了一只机巧鸟的传讯……
E: Report! After we lost contact with The Shackling Prison, we received a message from a cycrane...

C: （反击，指出计划还没成功）
E: (Refute him by pointing out that their plan has not succeeded yet)

C: 真是一时鬼迷心窍…早知道要死在这儿，还不如回到幽囚狱里蹲大牢…好死不如赖活着。
E: What the heck was I thinking...? If I knew it would end like this, I would've stayed in The Shackling Prison. Better to live in shackles than die free.

C: 说到这个，彦卿大人，您不是应该在竞锋舰上吗？现在不回到竞锋舰上没关系吗？
E: Speaking of which, Lieutenant Yanqing, aren't you supposed to be on the Skysplitter? Is it alright for you to be here instead?

C: 而她用自己血脉中的馈赠摧毁了步离人。
E: And she used the gift of her bloodline to destroy the borisin.

C: 冷静，末度！看看你现在的样子，东躲西藏，提心吊胆…哪里还有半点步离人的尊严！
E: Calm down, Mok Tok! Look at you now, hiding and fearful... Where is your borisin dignity?

C: 这个临时顶替他的三月七究竟是谁啊？
E: This last-minute replacement, March 7th, who exactly is she?

C: 在我完成这一切之前，你有机会阻止我，或是死在我的手中，这将是我为你准备的道路。
E: Before I finish these tasks of mine, you have a chance to stop me, or die at my hands. This is the path that I have prepared for you.

C: 我接受你的挑战，呼雷。因为从踏上竞锋舰的这一刻起，你已经走上了一条绝路。
E: I accept your challenge, Hoolay. Because the very moment you stepped aboard the Skysplitter, you stepped onto your path to ruin.

C: 再坚持片刻，我的支援马上就到！
E: Hang in there a bit longer, reinforcements are on the way!

C: 不用了，你还有执勤的任务，我一个人去就行。
E: No need. You have your own duties to take care of. I'll be fine by myself.

C: 一剂毒药罢了…以为靠这样的手段能扭转战局？
E: A pathetic little poison like this... You think this is enough to turn the tide of battle?

C: *咆哮*
E: *roar*

C: 你想转世重生？
E: You wish for rebirth?

C: 今天你们来丹鼎司…哦，我明白了，{NICKNAME}想必是来陪三月探望两位师父的吧？
E: You came to the Alchemy Commission today... Oh, I get it. {NICKNAME} is here with March to visit her masters, aren't you?

C: 仔细想来，似乎没有机会受伤。
E: Now that I think about it, I didn't really have a chance to get hurt.

C: 我自己就是医生嘛，对身体情况的了解，未必逊色于那位龙女大人。
E: Well, being a doctor myself, I don't think my knowledge of my own body is inferior to the Dragon Lady's.

C: 药王残党的出世，步离人的群集…那只隐于幕后的黑手搅动风云，要的便是联盟首尾难顾，最终如一支流矢，无所中的。
E: The resurgence of the Sanctus Medicus and the gathering of the borisin... are merely distractions orchestrated by an unseen force, meant to divide the Alliance's attention.

C: 准确地说，是其神体的一部分。在两位囚犯描绘的未来中，它便是能将「寿瘟祸祖」牢牢钉上末日之途的钉子。
E: More accurately, it's a fragment of the divine body. In the future they depicted, this fragment serves as the final nail, sealing the fate of the Plagues Author and securing its doom.

C: 我明白了。对方可有说明来意？
E: I understand. Did she explain her intentions?

C: 大部分人都很尊敬她？
E: Do most people respect her?

C: …从那以后，那个绿火腿夫人对朕心服口服。你看，今天朕一喊她，她立刻就乖乖出来了。
E: ...Since then, Lady Greenham has bent her knee. You see, today I called for her, and she came right out.

C: 是啊！朕是个好人，好人必须直面自己做过的恶。
E: Yes! I'm a good person, and good people must face their evils.

C: 最近功课太多，感觉已经有些日子没进城了。
E: I've had so much homework lately. It feels like forever since I've visited the city.

C: 他不是小孩了，不会奏效的。
E: He's not a child, so he won't play into your hands.

C: 这次恒星风暴格外强烈，灾民遍布帝国。全国上下都在挨饿，只有你老家的灾民收到了你的「善意」，这对其他百姓公平吗？
E: The stellar winds this time were particularly intense, and disaster victims litter the Empire. While the whole empire is suffering from a famine, only your hometown's victims received your "kindness." How is this fair to the rest of the refugees?

C: 老人嘴角微扬，露出一丝笑意。
E: The elderly man's face breaks into a faint grin.

C: 这就够了…去吧孩子，趁着猎犬还没回来。我会带着希望等你回来。
E: That's more than enough... You should go before The Bloodhound Family Members are back. I'll be waiting for your return with hope.

C: 没时间给你们互相客套了，螺丝。赶紧聊正事吧。
E: There's no time for pleasantries now, Screwy. Let's cut to the chase.

C: 听不懂你在说什么。
E: I don't get it.

C: 席位比黑塔还高？
E: His seat is higher than yours.

C: 哈哈，不得不赞美「开拓」为这个宇宙带来的奇迹。
E: Haha, I must praise the miracles brought to this universe by the Trailblaze!

C: 你该庆幸螺丝咕姆先生在你身边，逐梦客。否则……
E: Count yourself lucky that Mr. Screwllum is with you, Dreamchaser. Otherwise...

C: 这是家主定下的规则。
E: The regulations are set by the head of our family.

C: 尚存的疑问：家族为何要大费周章，将查德威克的记忆存于此处；这份记忆于他们而言又有何重要之处？
E: One question remains: Why would The Family go to such lengths to store Chadwick's memory here? What significance does his memory hold for them?

C: 它能帮你回忆起来。
E: It can help you recover your memory.

C: 有些话语现在传达已经太晚。如今我们已经知晓，魔盒里的确装着一只怪物。但愿您能守住它，不让它被无知的孩子随手打开。
E: Some advice is too late to be given now. Now, we already know that the box contains a monster. I hope you'll safeguard it and make sure it won't be opened by some ignorant kids.

C: …很遗憾，查。你在自己的领域是「天才」，但却对权力的结构一无所知。你过于天真…所以才会看不清大局，甚至对于自己身处什么样的时代一无所知。
E: ...I'm very sorry to tell you this, Chad. You might be a genius in your field, but you know nothing about power. Your naivety blinds you from seeing the big picture, and you don't even understand the era you're in.

C: 求求你…求求你。
E: Please... I'm begging you.

C: 他们需要我——为了掌控那些知识，也为了不让它们落入银河间其它派系之手。他们会追我到天涯海角。
E: They needed me to control the knowledge and keep it out of reach of other factions across the universe. So, they would always be breathing down my neck.

C: 假如在某个遥远的世界上，万千生灵正被烈火摧残，悲鸣响彻云霄——但对于在树下仰望夜空的你我而言，那不过是漫天繁星被谁人摘下了一颗而已。
E: Let's say there was a faraway planet where its people were being ravaged by ferocious flames with their cries echoing throughout the sky. Yet, for you and I, lying beneath the tree and gazing at the sky, the planet would be just another star plucked by someone from many others.

C: 螺丝…螺丝咕姆？！我没想到…我从来没想过自己还能再见到你……
E: Screw... Screwllum!? I never thought... I could see you again...

C: 看来在生命的最后时刻，卡尔德隆•查德威克选择了相信你，黑塔女士——哪怕你们素未谋面。
E: It appears that in the final moments of his life, Calderon Chadwick chose to place his trust in you, Madam Herta — even though the two of you had never met before.

C: 啊…原来如此。但你应该也明白吧？只要我想，我肯定有办法搞清楚自己在哪。这不是什么难事。
E: Ah... I see, but you should know too? That if I wanted, I would find a way to locate my position. It's not that hard.

C: 算了，跟你没关系。
E: Forget it, it's none of your business.

C: 还有其他问题吗？
E: Do you have any other questions?

C: 你好，年轻的逐梦客，还有别的事情吗？
E: Hello, young Dreamchaser. You have something else to ask?

C: 当时的匹诺康尼刚刚完成对梦境的开辟，各大家系也还未完全投入同谐的怀抱，无数机遇潜藏在梦中待人挖掘，因此无数逐梦客蜂拥而至，渴望财富与成功。
E: During that time, Penacony had only just completed the Dreamscape's development. The lineages weren't completely given unto Harmony's embrace yet, and countless opportunities buried in dreams were waiting to be unearthed, resulting in numerous Dreamchasers gathering like moths to a flame, thirsting for fortune and success.

C: 折纸小鸟叼来树枝，修理大树，筑造巢穴。大树的迷宫弯弯绕绕，只有小鸟才知道树叶间的捷径，啾。
E: Origami birds pick up branches, repair the Great Tree, and build nests. The Great Tree's maze is winding, and only birds know the shortcuts between leaves, tweet.

C: 之后我去了隐夜鸫，筑梦师接纳了我，教我知识，带我和他们一起搭建梦境……
E: Later, I went to the Nightingales, and the Dreamweavers took me in, taught me everything, and brought me along with them to build the Dreamscape...

C: 那小孩儿身边的家人越来越少了，我们没法再护他周全…如果可以，以后也麻烦你多帮帮他。
E: The child's family is being whittled down. We can't keep him safe anymore... If you could, please help him out whenever possible in the future.

C: 每一位筑梦师都很宝贵，我们已经不能再承受任何损失了。
E: Every single Dreamweaver is precious. We cannot afford any more losses.

C: 小鸟的身影越发透明，它向着伙伴、向着自己的美梦奔去。
E: The bird's silhouette grows increasingly translucent as it runs towards its companions and the embrace of its own yearning.

C: 真相究竟是什么样，相信拉莱德大人心知肚明。究竟要采用哪种解释，选择权在你。
E: I believe Lord Liluder is most aware of the truth. You are free to choose your explanation, no matter which one it may be.

C: 现在城内的局面非常复杂，谁都能说出一堆道理来。公民们吵得厉害，元老院估计一时也拿不定主意。
E: The situation in the city is complicated. Everyone seems to have their fair share of arguments. The citizens are locked in their bickering, and the Council of Elders will likely reserve judgment for now.

C: 不知道。可能是他们与奥赫玛存在信仰分歧——就像那位诺杜斯祭司一样。
E: I don't know. Perhaps they have a conflict of faith with Okhema — like that priest of Noldus.

C: 交给我了。
E: Will do.

C: 既然如此，我们不如先在附近找个地方落脚，看看能不能自食其力。只是没想到……
E: If that's the case, we might as well look for a nearby place to rest our feet, to see if we could fend for ourselves. But who would've thought...

C: 我要了。
E: I'll take it.

C: 傻孩子，人家怎么会稀罕一个苹果呢？再说这本来就是人家的东西……
E: Silly child, why would our benefactors be satisfied with just an apple? And it was theirs to begin with...

C: 你…不要质疑我对英雄们的感恩！万敌勇士乃是悬锋城王储，白厄勇士更是命定的救世主。
E: You— Do not undermine my gratitude for the heroes! Warrior Mydei is the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos, and Warrior Phainon is the destined Deliverer.

C: …对案情的讨论不应上升到人身攻击。请两位用更加健康的方式提出观点。
E: ...Discussion about the case should not give rise to personal attacks. I will ask both parties to present their arguments in a more cordial manner.

C: 承认吧，拉莱德，只有你做不到而已。
E: Admit it, Liluder, you're the only one who can't live up to this ideal.

C: 让他赔偿损失？
E: Make him pay for the losses?

C: 如果你支持他们，就确实去伸出援手。如果你反对他们，就当面把话讲出来。即使没有被金丝相连，表达心意也绝非难事。
E: If you support them, offer a helping hand. If you oppose them, speak directly. Even if you are not connected by golden threads, expressing one's mind shouldn't be too hard.

C: 最终，六成的票数支持流放苏克提瑞斯…
E: Finally, sixty percent of the votes support Soctires' exile...

C: 只要黑潮的威胁还存在一天，这样的悲剧就不会结束…所以，我们必须狩猎火种。
E: As long as the threat of the black tide exists for another day, this tragedy will not cease... Hence, we have to hunt down all the Coreflame.

C: 我想问你一些问题。
E: I want to ask you some questions.

C: 哇哦，一下就被看穿了。正好阿格莱雅见多识广，一定知道我们想要问的事情！
E: Woah. You saw right through me. I know you are a lady of great learning, Aglaea. I'm certain you know about what we seek!

C: 我是来劫狱的。
E: I came to break someone out.

C: 或许是因为有着尼卡多利的血统，天谴哲人敏锐地察觉到你身上散发出的强者气息——他们并不知道，他的神在未来都被你轰杀了呀！
E: Perhaps they carry the blood of Nikador? The Furiae Philosopher keenly senses the aura of strength emanating from your body... They have no idea that their god will be slain by you in the future!

C: 你可想清楚了？
E: Have you seen sense?

C: 原来是这小子…
E: So this is the guy...

C: 别跑——掠夺祭品的异乡人，一起成为吾父蜜酿的配料吧！
E: Stop right there! Outlanders that plundered the sacrifices to our lord! You will become seasonings in my father's honey brew!

C: 因为她是黄金裔吧。
E: Probably because she's a Chrysos Heir.

C: 你曾举着那天谴的弓矢步步轻移，将箭尖射入敌人的胸膛。
E: You once raised high your bow of fury and marched on step-by-step, launching arrows deep into your enemies' chests.

C: 这可是用吉奥里亚的圣石雕刻的，被她一下就碰碎了……
E: That was carved from the sacred rock of Georios. She smashed it like it was nothing...

C: 嗯，这话也没错——听到了吗？帕里斯，你不该带她来这里。
E: Hm, you have a point... Did you hear that, Paris? You should not have brought her here.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 太好了！既然这样，我在奥赫玛城中的理想也算是实现了！
E: Felicitations! My Okhema dream has finally come true!

C: 不、不，不是的！这都是命运的罪！
E: No, no, that's not true! This is all fate's fault!

C: 你可真会找机会挖墙脚。
E: A home wrecker knows when to strike.

C: 旧日的奥赫玛城门，一场胜利的战争后……
E: The former Okhema city gate, after a victorious war...

C: 希望在你的生活中，没有这么沉重的东西压在你的心头。
E: You can't help but wish no such heavy burdens were weighing you down in life.

C: 我记得城里的每一个声音，自然，也能辨识出新的声音。
E: I remember every voice in this city. Naturally, I can differentiate from the new voices.

C: 不行，你们的要求太多了。再这样下去，迟早会被人揭穿。
E: That won't do. You're asking too much. We'll be exposed if we keep this up.

C: 哼，就在一年前，你们可还是另一幅嘴脸…我也懂，毕竟位置互换了。
E: Hmph, you were begging for our favor merely a year ago...But I get it. The tables have turned.

C: 如果命运泰坦们真能窥见未来，那它们是否看到了黑潮吞没一切的景象？为什么不来拯救我们？
E: If the Fate Titans could really peer into the future, would they have seen the black tide devour everything? Why do they not come and save us?

C: 和往常一样就好。
E: Just do what you usually do.

C: 工匠，那常常是山之民的工作。可谁说得准呢？也许你真能成为一个杰出的工匠。
E: Craftsmanship is common work for Mountain Dwellers. But who knows? You might turn out to be an excellent craftsman.

C: 我恨她。
E: I hate her.

C: 帕西提亚，你就要死了。
E: Pasithea, you're going to die.

C: 只是，梦里再也听不到你的声音了，以后多半会…有些寂寞。
E: But I can no longer hear your voice in my dreams. In the future... it might get a little lonely.

C: 看来，你早就做好准备了。真不愧翁法罗斯的「全世之座」。
E: I see you've long been prepared. As expected of the "Throne of Worlds" of Amphoreus.

C: 难道说…
E: Could it be...

C: 再也玩不了捉迷藏，也不能去擂台边给卢卡哥哥加油……
E: No more playing hide-and-seek, or cheering for big brother Luka at the arena...

C: 但这不是翁法罗斯的答案，我想，应该也不是你的。
E: But that's not Amphoreus's answer, and I don't imagine it's yours either.

C: 麋鹿…密录…呜呜！米露……
E: Lots... Losh... Wooo! Loss...

C: 这里…哪里？呜呜…那里？哪里？呜呜！
E: Here...where? Wooo... Where? Where? Wooo!

C: 你平时都做些什么？
E: What do you usually get up to around here?

C: 学习前沿科学的理论知识，为法政科和空间站的大家提供辅助服务，以及…等待古恩先生的升级与维修。
E: Learn cutting-edge scientific theories, support the department of Galactic Geopolitics and the space station, and... wait for Mr. Gunn to give me upgrades and maintenance.

C: …如果可以的话，我不想辜负大家的期望，我想成为让所有人都满意，能够被人类社会所接纳的人。
E: ...If I can... I do not want to let everybody down. I want to make people happy and become part of human society.

C: 哈？你谁啊？什么年代了还这么跟人搭讪！什么「传闻中的某某某」，真老土！
E: Ha? Who are you? Who still flirts like this these days? Blah blah "the rumor this," ha — so tacky!

C: 话题打开了，然后该怎么延续下去呢？
E: Once the conversation starts, how do I keep going on from there?

C: 啊？真的吗？
E: Ah? Really?

C: 真的假的？
E: Really?

C: 现在埃美丽小姐的实验团队正在招募有志之士，真希望我能被她选上！
E: Miss Emily's research team is recruiting people willing to join them, and I really hope she picks me!

C: 抱歉，简单来说就是——我认为有些机器人没坏，重启一下就能接着用。
E: Sorry, what I mean is, I don't think some of the robots are broken at all. They just need a reboot.

C: 启动中…正在检查更新，当前版本已为最新版本，启动成功！
E: Initiating... Checking updates. Current version is up to date. Initiation successful!

C: 她却跟我说，「你去试试就知道了」。哎，我也很想去，但我最近很忙。于是我就跟她说，我请我的朋友代为体验。
E: But she said "just go have a try yourself." I want to go, but I'm so busy! So, I told her that my friend would try it for me.

C: 好像有…
E: I think so...

C: 果真吗，你不要骗我。
E: Really? Don't troll me.

C: 原来如此…塔米拉小姐不想和我走得太近，是因为害怕自己的演艺生涯受挫——可以理解。
E: I see... Miss Tamila doesn't want to cozy up to me for fear of ruining her career. I can understand that.

C: 正巧，「鼹鼠党」的那群孩子都是个顶个的热心。有他们掺和这么一下子，我们本来紧张的运力反而能缓解不少了。
E: Luckily, the kids of The Moles are very caring and helpful. Their involvement actually helps a lot.

C: …奶奶，我们这儿有你的快递！
E: ...Grandma, here's a package for you!

C: 真的可以吗？谢、谢谢你，年轻人！
E: Really? Thank, thank you, {F#young lady}{M#young man}!

C: 不过这泡沫也轮不到我们这些外人来戳破，对吧？毕竟那是他的家事。
E: But it's not our place to burst his bubble, is it? This is between him and his family.

C: 当然，也请您不要气馁，继续加强学习。到那时再来挑战吧。
E: Of course, you shouldn't be discouraged! Keep working on your studies, and then come back to try again.

C: 哎，很可惜，答错了。看来也没有必要继续问下去了。
E: Ah, how unfortunate, that's incorrect. It seems like there's no need for us to continue.

C: 这两道题将会很难，除了知识，恐怕还需要一些…才智，希望你做好心理准备。
E: These questions will be very challenging and you'll need... wisdom to go with your general knowledge. Have you prepared yourself?

C: 无妨，虽然这件事没能让我们收获一篇划时代的科学论文，但让我认识了一位绝顶聪明的青年。
E: It doesn't matter. It may not have been any quantum leap in scientific research, but I still got to meet an extremely smart kid.

C: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
E: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.

C: 算了算了，不跟你置气了——毕竟「非科学家」的知识水平有限，我不该抱多大幻想……
E: Ah, forget about it. I ain't mad at you. I should have no illusions about the limited intellect of "non-scientists"...

C: 我以未来首席大科学家的名声担保，绝对不让你白跑这一趟。快去吧，我一边琢磨新理论一边等你的好消息。
E: With my reputation on the line as the future Chief Scientist, I won't let your labors be in vain. Go, now — I'll wait for your good news while I keep on pondering new theories.

C: 我直接问问她好了。
E: Why don't I just ask her directly?

C: 我帮你开好医生证明了。
E: I got you a doctor's letter.

C: 哎，我人呢？看不见啊，在哪儿呢…这样的照片好像并不能证明我的清白啊。
E: Huh, where am I in this photo? I can't see myself in this... This picture is not gonna prove my claims.

C: 哈哈哈，其实都是小事！我们一家子关系还是非常好的。
E: Hahaha, it's nothing! My family actually gets on very well.

C: 你说我一个人打拼是图什么…还不是为了早点经济独立…要再让我回去我可受不了……
E: Why do you think I'm trying to make a name for myself... It's all to become financially independent soon... I can't take it if I have to go back...

C: 那么，你也多保重。
E: Take care of yourself as well.

C: 我会…会在这里一直等着…哪里也不会去……
E: I'll... I'll stay here. I won't go anywhere...

C: 哟，{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}也是来下馆子的啊？
E: Yo! You're here for a feed too?

C: （落难者好像已经过上了财务自由的生活，这个漂流瓶应该怎么办呢？）
E: (The castaway seems to have made a financially independent life for themselves. What should I do with this drift bottle?)

C: 海边的陌生人将漂流瓶抱去，就像是祖传下来的宝贝。你眉头一紧，想起自己来到海滩的理由——「放生帮」。
E: The stranger from the shore leaves, cradling the drift bottle like a treasured heirloom. You furrow your brow and remember the reason you came to the beach — The Unshackled.

C: …这也许是「虚无」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「虚无」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「虚无」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of Nihility. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of Nihility. How about trying out Nihility at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
E: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

C: 你觉得应当在下方竖起一个标牌：「当心高空坠物」。
E: You feel that a sign should be erected below: "Beware of falling objects."

C: 武器最好的一点就是…它们永远都不会背叛你。
E: The best thing about weapons is... they will never betray you.

C: 有时候你会觉得经过编纂的历史就是一种名为「秩序」的模因——乱糟糟的生活在故事中总会变得井然有序，人们的经历甚至可以像交响乐一样形成某种合奏。
E: Sometimes you will feel that a compiled history is just a meme known as "order" — a chaotic life always becomes orderly in a story, and people's experiences may even meld together to form a collective harmonic symphony.

C: ——不过你为什么要开房呢？就为了退房吗？
E: ...But why are you getting a room? Just to check out?

C: 你想起与那白发青年的初见，那时的他意气风发，仿佛天下再无对手；你又想起他投身试炼之前的表现，不算犹豫，但也绝非自信。
E: You reflect on your first meeting with the white-haired man. Back then, he was so spirited, like no one in the world could stand in his way. Then, you think about his expression before he threw himself into his trial. Though he wasn't hesitating, he was also far from confident.

C: 厄洛缇亚满载世界的爱，乘着黎明归来，
E: Eroteia, full of the world's love, returned at dawn,

C: 朝拜者走入命运深处，接受温暖如初的怀抱，仿佛一切从未远离。
E: Pilgrims step into the depths of destiny, welcomed by an embrace as warm as ever, as if nothing had ever been lost.

C: 静默伫候命定的时刻。
E: Silent and unmoving, awaiting their destined hour.

C: 枯败的花园
E: The Withered Garden

C: 尼卡多利再如何凶恶，也不可能刹那间倾覆整座城池，连一位幸存者都见不到。
E: No matter how ruthless Nikador is, there's no way they could raze an entire city in an instant without leaving a single survivor.

C: 说来也是怪事——我也以为黑潮根本奈何不了你。
E: It is strange, though, now that I say it... I thought that the black tide would have no effect on you.

C: 不。
E: No.

C: …也只能将它制成「提线」。
E: ...I can't hope to make it into any more than a "puppet string."

C: 很好…那么，歌耳戈，举矛吧！
E: Very well... Then raise your spear, Gorgo!

C: 这…王后如此屈尊恳切相托，我又怎能令您失望？
E: This... My Queen, I would not dream of disappointing you with such an earnest request.

C: 你记住了「反抗传统的情侣与注定流离的命运」
E: You remembered "The Lovers in Defiance of Tradition and Their Doomed Fate to Wander"

C: 你记住了「曾驻足聆听过水漫琴的乐声」
E: You remembered "Listening Intently to the Music of the Water Lyre."

C: 交错的枝叶图案中藏着一个预言装置的凹槽，周围的金色纹路仿佛在等待某种启示。 预言家们总是这样——连放个宝贝都要先征得命运的同意。
E: Intricate leaf patterns conceal a recess for a prophetic device. Golden engravings around it seem to await some revelation — typical of prophets, seeking destiny's approval even to store treasures.

C: 金色碎片在黑夜中依然明亮，照亮了周围盛开的蓝花。据说当年墨涅塔的蝶群就是从这样的茧中破茧而出，为世间带来了回忆与预言的馈赠。
E: Golden fragments remain radiant in the darkness, illuminating the blooming blue flowers around them. It is said that Mnestia's swarm of butterflies once emerged from such cocoons, bestowing the gifts of memory and prophecy upon the world.

C: 祭坛上的纹路在黑暗中若隐若现，你依稀能辨认出这是墨涅塔的象征。
E: The intricate patterns on the altar faintly emerge in the darkness. You can just discern that they symbolize Mnestia.

C: 理性的泰坦是否能算到，自己也会被非理性的黑暗所吞噬？你很好奇。
E: Could the Reason Titan have foreseen that they too would be swallowed by the irrational darkness? You wonder.

C: 那你是怎么认识他的？
E: How do you know him then?

C: 总算清静了…让我看看，这帮小兔崽子有没有又往典藏里放些大逆不道的东西……
E: Finally, it's quiet again... Let me see, I wonder if these brats have been sneaking impure content into the collection...

C: 漂浮在空中的立方体被称为「火种匣」，据说刻法勒的火种就被存放其中。
E: The floating cube is called the "Coreflame Box," and it is said to hold Kephale's Coreflame.

C: 你看，那些完整的「柱子」也并非真的脚踏实地，它们也悬浮在空中。这时你就会理解，你以为的也不一定是你以为的。
E: See, those complete pillars aren't really standing on solid ground either — they're floating in the air, too. And that's when you'll understand: what you thought might not always be what it appears to be.

C: 询问基础问题。
E: Start with the basics.

C: 吼吼！异乡的勇士会提出什么样的疑问呢，本狮很期待吼！
E: Roarrr! I wonder what kind of question the warrior from outlands will ask — this should be interesting!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>关于巨鲸的壁画上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>over the mural of the giant whale</color>...

C: 我能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
E: I can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

C: 贵客真是有干劲啊，明明我已经为你揭晓了一只若虫的位置…咱们还是不要太拼为好吧？别着急，慢慢来……
E: You're truly diligent, dear guest. Even though I've already revealed the location of one nymph, perhaps we shouldn't push ourselves too hard? Take your time...

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ「欧欧？出场费，那是啥，比刻法勒还高吗？」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ "Oh-ho? Appearance fee? What's that? Is it higher than Kephale?" )∋

C: 我不要了，再见！
E: I changed my mind. Goodbye!

C: o((-'ω´-  )o「哦哦？有所领悟！这样的话，就可以拥有——」)∋
E: o((-'ω´-  )o "Ooh? I get it! That way, I will have—" )∋

C: …给我也来一份吧。
E: ...Can I have some too?

C: 「…会死的」
E: "...You'll die."

C: 咦？你是「金织」女士的客人，还有这孩子是……
E: Huh? You're Lady Goldweaver's guest, and this child is...

C: …实不相瞒，我是元老院的一名督查。我们怀疑一位议员长期收受贿赂，却一直找不到证据。
E: ...To be honest, I'm an inspector from the Council of Elders. We've been suspecting a legislator of accepting bribes for years, but we could never find solid evidence.

C: 又或者…这是我此生仅有的机会？
E: Or maybe... this is my only chance?

C: 别再上前一步，因为此处的静寂不容亵渎。
E: Step no closer, for this silence tolerates no sacrilege.

C: 意义不明的金属元件，其上的星月纹样强调着它从属于晨昏之眼、并非凡物。
E: An enigmatic metal component, adorned with star-and-moon patterns that clearly signify its belonging to the Eye of Twilight. It is no ordinary object.

C: 或许等白厄他学成归来之后，我也该去外面的世界走上一圈。
E: Maybe once Phainon returns, trained and ready, I'll take a trip myself and see what's out there in the world.

C: 我没有掉怪物。
E: I didn't drop any monsters.

C: 亡语蝶们在死地飞舞，归往冥界的路途并不孤单。
E: The Eulogistic Butterflies flutter through this land of death. The path to nether realm is never lonely.

C: 我怕伤到你。
E: I am afraid that will hurt you.

C: 彩虹桥你不是头一回走，瀑布也不是第一次见。但不得不说，从这个角度望过去，眼前的景致倒确实值得稍稍驻足欣赏一番。
E: It's not your first time crossing the rainbow bridge, and you've seen this waterfall before. But you must admit that from this angle, the view does deserve a moment's pause to take it all in.

C: …真是位特立独行的老师。我叫白厄，这位是遐蝶，我们是……
E: ...What an eccentric professor. My name is Phainon, and this is Castorice. We are—

C: …嗯，原来老师对我们已经有些了解。
E: ...Yes. Looks like you already know about us, Professor.

C: 直到心搁浅在岸上…身落回仄暗的海洋…再也跃不出虚妄……
E: Until its heart runs aground on the shore... its body falls back into the dim sea... never to leap from illusion again...

C: 不、不仅是我，还有我的电路板们，是的是的…请全部救下来吧！
E: N—Not just me, but my circuit boards as well, yes, yes... please save them all!

C: （先问问列车长发生了什么事吧……）
E: (Ask the conductor about what happened...)

C: 镜子…？
E: Mirror...?

C: 这倒证明了我一直以来的猜想：看来异问魔应该是「神秘」的造物。
E: This actually confirms a theory that I've always had: It seems like Inquisition Spirits are a creation of the Enigmata.

C: 少女挥了挥手，仿佛掷出一枚小石子，水面不断荡开涟漪。你突然想起——
E: The girl waved her hand, as if tossing a small pebble that caused the water surface to keep rippling. You suddenly remember—

C: 当然可以。不过军费有限，重复演练可就没有配发的奖励了。
E: Sure. However, we have a limited military budget, so no rewards will be given for repeating drills.

C: 你听到了一阵冰冷的电子音：「是否开启同步模式？」
E: You hear an emotionless electronic voice: "Activate sync mode?"

C: （好了，没你什么事了，这里不太安全，你还是别待着这儿。）
E: (All right, you're in the clear now. It's not safe here, so you'd better not linger.)

C: 小狗用它毛茸茸的头拱了拱你的手，你熟练地按下了它背上的信标按钮。
E: The puppy nudges your hand with its fluffed head. You instinctively press the beacon button on its back.

C: 你们要找它？恐怕有点麻烦，它把控着房间的出入权，恐怕不会让你进去。
E: You're looking for it? That's gonna be hard, I'm afraid. It controls access to and from the room, and it won't let you in.

C: 开启同步模式。
E: Activate sync mode.

C: （打听「管家」的秘密）
E: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

C: 反倒是你们二位，怪物屡次袭击下，我们可是一直锁着门的，你们是怎么溜进来的，不解释一下吗？
E: The two of you, on the other hand — there are monsters rampaging outside, and we've kept the door locked up all this time. How'd the two of you get in? Care to explain?

C: （让你装，被戳穿了吧！）
E: (Your lies have been exposed!)

C: 佩佩低头看了看自己的爪子，又抬头看了看悬浮在空中的小机器人。
E: Peppy lowers its head and stares at its paws, then raises its head and stares at the little robot in the air.

C: （让佩佩用关机键威胁它）
E: (Have Peppy threaten it with the shutdown button)

C: （这个舱段的设施有问题，我担心会出什么意外…走，我送你回去。）
E: (There is something wrong with the facilities in this zone. I am worried that something might happen... Come! Let me bring you back.)

C: 那走呗？
E: Then let's go!

C: 呀！眼睫毛动了一下，被我发现了！你明明没在睡觉！！
E: Ah! Your eyelashes just fluttered — I caught you! You're not sleeping, are you?

C: 虽然是听过的故事…但{NICKNAME}来讲，还是那么引人入胜。
E: Even though I've heard these stories before... they're just as captivating as ever when you tell them, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯哼，当然！其他事我也记得哦？比如你翻开这本书的次数，在每一页停留的时长…全都有好好记下来！
E: Of course! I also remember other things, like how many times you've opened the book and how long you linger on each page... I've kept track of it all!

C: 趁人不注意，背着人家偷偷…唔…算了，就让你保留些神秘感吧！
E: So, you went behind my back, and... well, fine, I'll let you keep your secrets!

C: 很不幸，又没有结局。
E: Sadly, no ending again.

C: 不行不行，还没完全准备好呢。
E: No way, it's not ready yet.

C: 接收指令: 重置
E: Order Received: Step N, Reset

C: 拼图已经集齐，快来拼我吧…
E: All the puzzle pieces are here. Put the pieces together now...

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 老夫得把这个点子记下来……
E: I need to get this idea down...

C: 哎，可惜了，这里就你我两个人……
E: It's a pity that it's just you and me here...

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我们的占算结果只是让人提早知道罢了，其实咱们什么也没有改变。
E: Our results just give people advanced notice about events. In fact, we don't actually change anything.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 是啊，我之前应该讲的很明白了吧…
E: Yeah, I should've been clear from the very outset...

C: 你管我！你先下棋，我要看你能嘴硬到什么时候！
E: What's it to you? Make your chess move! We'll see how long your mouth stays smart!

C: 狡猾的人类，口是心非。
E: Slippery, duplicitous human.

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's start.

C: 其实我之前就注意到了，这种事时有发生，我去调查过，是一种奇怪的积木引起的。
E: Truth be told, I've noticed this issue — which happens from time to time — for a while now. When I looked into it, my findings revealed that it's caused by a strange type of building block.

C: 说起来我也感觉到很意外，毕竟这里是幽囚狱嘛。
E: I'm also surprised. After all, it's The Shackling Prison.

C: 这里应该就是「魔方秘社」所在的囚室了……
E: This must be the cell where the Hex Club is...

C: 滴答，你来了，游客。
E: Tick-tock, you're here, guest.

C: 虽然不知你所指的是什么，但这种操使傀儡的手段确实算不上独特。你能理解就好。
E: Though I'm not sure what you mean, I agree this method of controlling puppets isn't exactly unique. As long as you understand, that's enough.

C: 衣匠大军，踏平奥赫玛！
E: The army of Garmentmakers will trample Okhema!

C: 我拜托某只熟识的若虫设下了一个练手小谜题，贵客不妨先试着解开它——这对解读预言也有好处。
E: I've asked my trusted nymph to prepare a small puzzle for practice. Why not give it a try, my esteemed guest? It may prove useful in unraveling future prophecies.

C: 嗯…有位织者善于把控产品质量。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>琢石区的平台边缘</color>清点数量，指挥一座雕像的建成，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver skilled in quality control. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now doing an inventory check <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of the platform in the Chisel Zone</color>, overseeing the precise construction of a statue. Head there to locate them.

C: 伴随着一串奇怪的笑声，一只若虫从阴影中现出了身形。
E: With a strange laughing sound, a nymph appears from the shadows.

C: 桀桀桀——您要是看到我的收藏，一定会五体投地，然后乖乖让开。
E: Hehehe... If you saw my collection, you would throw yourself to the ground in reverence and get out of my way.

C: 您假使试过，一定会觉得这招太不人道了！
E: If you try it on yourself, you'll realize just how inhumane it is!

C: 呜啊…这是怎么办到的？
E: Ooh, err... How did you do that?

C: 来点生活体悟？
E: Some quotes about life?

C: 关于你的事迹…
E: Tell me your story...

C: 要窃取它们不用钥匙，也无需撬棍，有时只用几句甜言蜜语，一番动人辞令，就能让人深信不疑。
E: Neither keys nor crowbars are needed to steal them. Sometimes all it takes is a glib word, a heartfelt gesture, to have them swoon for your earnestness.

C: 尝尝诡计的厉害！
E: Taste the power of my schemes!

C: 「哟，是您啊。」
E: Ooh, it's you.

C: 少废话，我的东西你别惦记。
E: Cut the chatter. My stuff is off-limits.

C: 虽然很像你的那些小小调皮朋友，但这的确是另一只独立的奇美拉。你们素未谋面，因此也很难理解对方的语言。
E: Despite resembling your playful little friends, this is a completely different chimera. Since you've never met, you can't understand each other's language.

C: 嗐，这还真不简单！咱也做不到。
E: Ha, it's actually quite complicated! Even I can't do it.

C: 没想到吧，桀桀桀桀——
E: Surprised you there, didn't I? Hehehehe—

C: 切，小气。不过想也知道，巴特鲁斯不是天外来客，你们的黑客后门，对我来说毫无用处。
E: Tch, stingy. But obviously, ol' Bartholos isn't from beyond the sky, so your hacker backdoor is useless to me.

C: 你慢点…说这么多我记不住。
E: Slow down... I can't keep up.

C: 记得是…门锁？
E: Isn't it... a door lock?

C: 迷津展露，交给你了。
E: The Maze has been revealed. I'll leave it to you.

C: 交给你了，辅祭。
E: I'll leave it to you, acolyte.

C: 而作为祭司，我们的了解会比民众更深入，比如，「迷津」的形制模拟了雅努斯于门径中穿行的行为，它的历史甚至要比这命运三相殿本身还要久远，等等。
E: As priests, however, we understand it on a deeper level. For instance, the Maze's structure simulates Janus traversing the Passage, and its history predates even the Temple of the Three Fates.

C: …我是谁？
E: ...Who am I?

C: 他总是说让我耐心等，迟早会有人来解开这些「刻意」的谜题，我原本是不信的。直到你出现了，哗啦啦。
E: He always tells me to be patient, that sooner or later someone will come to solve these "deliberate" puzzles. I didn't believe it at first. Until you showed up. *whoosh*

C: 其实我也试过自己解开谜题，但很可惜我的分类是荧虫，头上没有犄角，撞不碎塑像。
E: I did try to solve the puzzle myself once, but unfortunately, as a glowworm, I don't have horns to smash the statues.

C: 拜托您先解锁下个火种匣…这段时间里，我会继续筛查。
E: Please, unlock the next Coreflame Casket. I'll keep sorting through the records in the meantime.

C: 这次匣子里面是余火吗？
E: Is this one holding the ember?

C: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
E: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

C: 还是跑路保命要紧！
E: Forget that! Survival comes first!

C: …云朵的芳香。你是否…曾到过我的故乡？
E: ...The scent of clouds. Have you... been to my homeland?

C: 战斗结束，你在原地等待，但什么也没有发生。
E: The fight is over and you wait in place, but nothing happens.

C: 「你就是阿基维利——你还活着，有趣的对手！请你多耍耍我，那就是我想要的…成长起来，然后打败我！」祂踢着地面发出踏踏声，渐渐离开…你大口喘气，从折磨中逃生。
E: "You're Akivili — you're alive and well, what an interesting opponent! Please play with me more, that's what I want... Grow up and defeat me!" THEY kick the ground with a stomp and fade away... You gasp for air as you escape from the torment.

C: 「『欢愉』的星神阿哈。」黑塔没好气地解释道，「非常难捉摸的家伙，祂大概发现自己活在游戏里了。这家伙很聒噪，也很危险。下次捏着鼻子和祂多聊几句吧，辛苦你了。」
E: "Aha, the Aeon of Elation." Herta explained uncharitably, "A very elusive one who probably found THEMSELF living in a game. This fella is very noisy and dangerous. Next time, bite your tongue and talk to THEM more, thanks for your hard work."

C: 瞧，左边是你大脑里的虚拟朋友，右边是已经下载进入系统缓存的队友。
E: Look, on the left are the virtual friends in your brain, and on the right are teammates already downloaded into the system cache.

C: 一个又一个敌人倒在你的面前，天啊，你简直无人能挡！就像神话传说里的英雄那样英姿伟岸！你挥舞棍棒，打倒一只不自量力胆敢挑战你的野兽，不禁放声大笑。畅快的欢愉令你忘乎所以——慢着，到底发生了什么？
E: One enemy after another falls before you. Oh my, you are unstoppable! Just like the heroes of myth and legend! You can't help but laugh as you swing your baseball bat and take down a beast that dares to challenge you. You are getting carried away by the bliss — wait, what the heck just happened?

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「大概会来个翻天覆地的大升级吧。」</color>黑塔回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「螺丝咕姆和阮•梅没什么想法，但斯蒂芬兴奋极了，我估计他以为我们是真心想做个游戏。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Pretty much a complete overhaul of an upgrade,"</color> Herta replies. <color=#dbc291ff>"Screwllum and Ruan Mei didn't think much about it, but Stephen is thrilled to pieces. I bet he thinks we're really developing a game here."</color>

C: 算了，没事。
E: Forget it, it's nothing.

C: 等等，我还有问题。
E: Hang on. I still have questions.

C: 首先，斯蒂芬大幅调整了流程，按他的说法「在每个阶段的挑战目标会更明确」——我不大理解。但我是天才，不代表我很懂游戏，所以随他吧。
E: Firstly, Stephen has made significant adjustments to the gameplay loop. According to him, "The challenge goal of each phase is even clearer" — I don't really get it. Just because I'm a genius doesn't mean I understand gaming — so whatever he says goes.

C: 你感受到阮•梅的目光落在你身上；但她一言不发。
E: You can sense Ruan Mei's gaze on you, but she doesn't say a word.

C: 你在原地等待——直到攻击的欲望平息下来。你相信你也懂得暴力美学…躁动的杀戮欲望会逐渐膨胀，你渴望与所有你恨的事物再次相逢。
E: You wait in place until your desire to attack subsides. You believe you understand the art of violence... Your desire to kill will grow over time, and you yearn to encounter the things you hate again.

C: <color=#6f7cda>是我！/</color><color=#ad5e68>是你！/</color><color=#6f7cda>是祂！</color><color=#ad5e68>/是大家！</color>
E: <color=#6f7cda>It's me!/</color><color=#ad5e68>It's you!/</color><color=#6f7cda>It's THEM!</color><color=#ad5e68>/It's everyone!</color>

C: 不，你是阿基维利！
E: No, you're Akivili!

C: 可惜！模拟宇宙使你的胡须生长，精神愈发颓靡——它们完全没长到该去的地方。
E: Unfortunately, the Simulated Universe makes your mustache grow and turns you into a disheveled person. The hair isn't growing where it is supposed to be.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群哭泣的伶人。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice changes into a chorus of weeping Mourning Actors.

C: 你可以踏着各个命途上行者留下的足迹，让自己更接近对应的星神。
E: You can follow the footsteps of the Pathstriders to get closer to a particular Aeon.

C: 别！我不关心这东西。
E: Nope! Not interested in this stuff.

C: 「行为、情绪、体温、兴衰、杀戮、混乱、无序。也许『神秘』的出现正是为了抹消一些确定的…」螺丝咕姆的元件运转快了几秒，他闭上眼睛，「结论：十分糟糕的事情发生了，我为此感受到『悲哀』。」
E: "Behavior, emotions, body temperature, rise and fall, massacre, chaos, and disorder. Perhaps the appearance of the Enigmata was to erase some certainties..." Screwllum's components whir harder for a few seconds — he closes his eyes. "Conclusion: Something terrible has happened. 'Sadness' is my emotion."

C: 向祂发问。
E: Ask THEM questions.

C: 创造毁灭。
E: Create destruction.

C: 击灭虫群的主力。
E: Destroy the main force of the Swarm.

C: 蛰虫们的毒针刺破你的装甲，它们迅速分解你的身体组织，又被装甲注射的药剂中和。猛烈的火力压制住了敌人的进攻，可源源不断的虫子化作一堵层层剥离的铁幕，缓慢地向你逼近。
E: Piercing your armor with their poisonous stinging barbs, the bugs quickly break up your body tissue, which is then neutralized by the potion injected by the armor.
