Fierce firepower holds down the enemy's assault, but the never-ending stream of insects manifests themselves into an iron curtain that is constantly peeling off, which slowly rolls closer to you.

C: 比起找上一颗行星来殖民，在远航舰的物质循环下生活无疑才是更好的选择。这里安全又舒适，在母星还未自我毁灭的时候，大家都把这种地方叫做天堂。
E: Compared to finding a planet to colonize, living aboard a long-distance voyage ark with a fully efficient material recycling system is undoubtedly a better prospect. This place is safe and comfortable. Before the home planet destroyed itself, everyone would call such a place paradise.

C: 好像有点乱套了。
E: That seems a little messed up.

C: 你也要变成蚂蚁，无意识地，无自觉地在道路上前行，向着天空滑落。
E: You will also become like an ant, helplessly and unconsciously moving on down the line, sliding up toward the sky.

C: 真有品味。
E: Great taste.

C: 开始进食。
E: Start eating.

C: 这是你的第███次醒来。你感觉不到任何███，甚至连语言也████。万籁俱寂中，你的脑海里███，时间的长河与空间的山脉尽数碎为███，仿佛运行了数██琥珀纪，又被██悉数删除。
E: This is your ███ awakening. You cannot sense any ███ at all, and even language is ████. In the endless silence, your mind ███, the river of time and the mountain of space are shattered into ███. It is as if you have operated for ██ Amber Eras and been once again deleted by every ██.

C: 在名单的末尾，你看到了导师和小雅的签名，他们的肉身早已化为尘土，这两行签名或许是他们存在过的唯一证明。
E: At the end of the list, you see the names of the teacher and Xiaoya. Their bodies have long since been reduced to dust, and these two signatures may well be the only proof that they ever even lived.

C: 你并不知道眼前这座农场是何时建起来的，但你凭借自己偷盗劫掠多年的嗅觉，断定这是某个亿万富翁的养老地。是夜，你伙同月光从窗口潜入。奇怪的是，这座农场内部与普通农场并无二致，大棚中栽满反季节果树，鲜若夕阳的果实已经缀枝。难道这回要空手而归？
E: You have no idea when the farm before you was constructed, but your sense of smell honed over years of theft and robbery tells you that this is the retirement home of someone with extortionate wealth. Under the night sky, you slip in through the window, bringing the moonlight with you. Strangely, the inside of this farm is like no regular farm you have ever seen. The greenhouses are full of out-of-season fruit trees, their branches stocked full with fruits ripe as the evening sun. Could it be that you will be leaving empty-handed?

C: 拒绝交出。
E: Refuse to hand it over.

C: 默默接受。
E: Accept your fate silently.

C: 「模拟宇宙是不错啦。但模拟宇宙的建立靠的可不止我一人。贪天之功的事，一向不是我的风格。」
E: "The Simulated Universe is pretty good. But establishing the Simulated Universe was not solely my own work. Claiming credit for the work of others has never been my style."

C: 载入有机生命的行为数据库，指令：远离未知个体，与更多梅尼科取得联系。
E: Loading organic lifeform behavioral database. Order: Stay far away from this unknown entity and establish contact with more Meniks.

C: 你满脸过来人的表情。
E: You wear the expression of a seasoned veteran.

C: 帕提维娅走出飞船，不敢相信眼前的景象。金属密布的废墟，鲁珀特一世在机械坟场中醒来，愤怒萦绕着他的回路。那将二世又如何？
E: Patavia walks out of the ship, in complete disbelief at the scene before her eyes. Among the metal-covered ruins, Rubert I awoke from the mechanical graveyard, rage lingering in his circuits. What then would become of Rubert II?

C: 所谓的无机仿生神经元集群，不过是对博识尊的拙劣模仿。帝皇制造出天体级的计算干涉装置，给予其解答的算力，却没有赋予它们「提问」的机能。
E: These so-called inorganic neuron clusters are merely poor imitations of Nous. The Emperor constructed celestial-level computational interference devices and gave them the computational power to answer questions, yet never gave them the function to "ask."

C: 有机和无机，所有的生命都会消失。
E: All life, organic and inorganic, would have disappeared.

C: 时间倒退，为你们披上学者的衣装，未来学大会上人声鼎沸，学士们相互推搡，从身旁穿行而过。帕提维娅在同谁人交谈，面带微笑，「未来？呵，未来。」
E: Time rewinds, shrouding you all with scholars' attires. At the Futurological Congress, the roiling voices of a thronging crowd accompanied by scholars jostling with one another and pushing past you. Patavia is talking to someone, her face covered in a mild smile, "The future? Heh, the future."

C: 走着瞧吧。如果我赢了，它就会把战略投资部此行的计划一五一十道出——虽然我也没那么感兴趣。
E: We'll see. If I win, the sidekick will come clean with the Strategic Investment Department's purpose behind this trip — even though I'm not really interested.

C: 你做得真棒。
E: You did a great job.

C: 你开始期待，红鹅绒幕布之后的演出。你想，也许是萨尔索图歌剧团的宇宙公主，裙摆宽阔得可以笼罩住整个舞台。
E: You feel a buzz of anticipation for the show behind the red velvet curtains. You start picturing the Salsotto Troupe's cosmic princess, whose dress has a hem wide enough to cover the entire stage.

C: 你不慎一脚踏入软木碎叶搭成的地面陷阱中——你相信这是布莱德星最*老式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。你站起身，面前有一个巢穴入口。
E: You accidentally step into a ground trap made of branches and leaves — the type you believe to be used only by the most old-fashioned hunter on planet Bled. You get to your feet, and the entrance of a nest is before you.

C: 你发现了尽头惊异的景象，在数以百计的*虫泡*堆起的王座上，祂昏沉地睡在那里。
E: You find an astonishing sight at the end of the nest. On a throne atop a pile of hundreds of "egg sacs," "THEY" are sleeping soundly.

C: 哇！你驾驭了一名伙伴！你从半空中呼啸着落下！
E: Wow! You're riding a companion and swooping down from the sky!

C: 「最多噪音的摇滚、最神圣古典的说唱、最时髦的复古元素、最炫彩的朴素装饰音！星际潮玩美食、新推出的说谎游戏纯享奏乐、时代多重大混搭的珍藏大碟！」
E: "The noisiest rock music, the most sacred classical rap, the trendiest retro elements, and the most vibrant basic musical ornaments! This precious album showcases the instrumental piece of cosmic trendy toys and food and the latest social deduction game, with a mixture of elements across the ages!"

C: 你恶狠狠地想着——他看上去一定隶属于矛盾元素组织！
E: Feeling annoyed, you are certain he is a member of the Contradictory Element Organization!

C: 时光如梭。你所抚养的太空美虫「着涎香」已去星际茶园沉浸式学习已久…当你听到门口出现摸索的声音时，你便知道它归来了。
E: Time flies. The space worm named Sweet Saliva that you have nurtured has been undergoing immersive learning at the cosmic tea plantation for a long time... When you hear the sound of fumbling at the door, you know it is back.

C: 但这次似乎有些不同。它的身边多了更多*孢夹*，在那些半透明的液囊中，你似乎认出了一些有机生命…他们的身上有着「开拓」的标志。
E: But something is different this time. There are more *Sporangium* around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. In the translucent sacs, there seem to be some organic lifeforms... The insignia of Trailblaze can be found on their bodies.

C: 你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。
E: You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.

C: 这些「鏖兜虫」发出了吮吸的声音…你犹豫是否要进入猎杀它们，这或许会让你的身上沾上更多惹人注意的虫类气味……
E: These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...

C: 你只好用莫洛托斯鸡尾酒制成的燃烧瓶作掩护撤退…前功尽弃了！一边撤退一边想，接下来又得从头再来…可恶！
E: You have no choice but to cover your retreat with a Molotov cocktail... All your previous effort has gone down the drain! While retreating, the thought of having to start everything over leaves you frustrated!

C: 「好，都来齐啰。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「我们终于相聚在机械城的 『认知理发馆』了！虽然是模拟的。现在来理发吧。噢，抱歉，在理发过程中，我们总得聊点什么。」
E: "Alright, everyone is here." Herta clears her throat and says, "We've finally gathered at the Cogito Hair Salon in the Mechanical City, though it's just a simulation! Now, let's get a haircut. Oops, sorry, we've got to talk about something while getting our hair done."

C: 「欢迎来到圣多明戈城！我们倒卖作弊代码。」这位机械招待满不在乎地说，「你小时候一定热衷的那种。但我们这儿的不一样，这里是圣多明戈之城版本。」
E: "Welcome to the city of St. Domingo! We sell cheat codes here." The mechanical attendant explains without a care in the world. "The kind you were definitely crazy about when you were little. What we have is slightly different, as they are the St. Domingo version."

C: 你将意识和手中的鱼线连接到一起，大祭司说，那是用水晶母亲的身体打造的丝线。你听到亲切的声音，从四面八方询问你。
E: You tie your consciousness and the fishing line in your hand together. The High Priest says that this thread was crafted from the Crystal Mother's body. You hear an affectionate voice querying you from all around.

C: 铺天盖地的航船还未泊停便已易主，向来清修的布雷塔德人，也忙不迭地在身上寻找可以交换的商品。
E: Countless ships, their shadows numerous enough to cover the sky, don't even have a chance to dock before they find themselves under new ownership. The habitual ascetics, the Bretadens, also find themselves scouring every surface of their bodies for things that they could possibly trade.

C: 「要不，来两下试试水？」扭蛋机一语道出你的心声。
E: "How about it? Try your hand?" The capsule machine speaks out the thoughts in your head.

C: 快！让他再讲个笑话！
E: Get him to tell another joke! Quickly!

C: 你走进阿蒂纳星的餐馆，过时的炫彩灯牌里，狗和愚者不得入内的告示正缓慢旋转。一条没尾巴的金鱼坐在盘子上，凸起的鱼眼转动，为你选择合适的味觉体验。
E: You enter a restaurant on Planet Adina. An old-fashioned sign in dazzling colors slowly rotates while informing patrons that dogs and Fools are not allowed entry. A tailless goldfish sits on a plate, its protruding fish eyes rotating as it chooses a taste experience that suits you.

C: 「虽说你头脑中的我远不如本尊的百万分之一，但是嘛，偶尔能体会下模拟阿哈的感觉，倒也不赖。」黑塔打了个响指，「不用谢我，这座数据库的藏品权限也给你打开了。老样子，拿<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>来换。」
E: "Though the me in your mind is a far cry from the real deal — no more than a millionth of my true self — but hey, it's not bad experiencing every now and then what the simulated Aha felt," Herta snaps her fingers. "I've also unlocked access to this database's collections for you — Don't mention it. As always, go buy them with <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>."

C: 在浅滩的两侧，你能看到许多徘徊的灵魂。它们有的忘了带上登船的硬币，只能在岸边流浪百年。有的犯了不可宽恕的罪孽，在身形溃散后不断呻吟，等待最终的审判。
E: On either side of the shallows, you can see countless restless souls drift aimlessly. Some, having forgotten to bring the coin needed for the ferryman, are cursed to wander the shores for centuries. Others, burdened by unforgivable sins, groan in torment after their forms dissolve, awaiting the final judgment.

C: 但在多洛斯的传说中，扎格列斯只是化身为海蛇潜入法吉娜的宫殿，偷喝了将要赠予死亡的礼物。从此，扎格列斯也可在生死间自由来往。
E: But in the legends of Dolos, Zagreus simply transformed into a sea snake and sneaked into Phagousa's palace, then drank the gift meant for Death. Since then, Zagreus can also freely traverse between life and death.

C: 它曾包庇欧洛尼斯，用连绵的大雨，掩饰逃离天空的繁星。可欧洛尼斯的嬉笑声焕发出光亮，连最深的海沟也无法隐藏。
E: They once sheltered Oronyx, cloaking with endless rain the stars fleeting from the sky. But Oronyx's laughter shone so brightly that not even the deepest ocean trench could hide their light.

C: 愿坚守永不断绝。
E: May steadfastness endure forever.

C: 你看见永不停歇的信使。他们穿过镜中的道路，赞颂着泰坦的名讳，以鸟儿般轻盈的步伐，传递生与死的讯息。
E: You witness the tireless messengers. They navigate the mirror-like paths, extolling the Titans by name. Their steps are as light as birds, conveying messages of life and death.

C: 神悟树庭向整个翁法罗斯发出了实习学者考试，这对于苦心钻研学术二十年的你来说，是一个绝不能错过的机会。
E: The Grove of Epiphany has issued its Intern Scholar Examination — an open call across all of Amphoreus. After twenty long years of academic toil, you know this is a chance you cannot let slip away.

C: 洗浴确实是很重要的事，但把它当成科研成果未免有些小题大做，也许爱泡澡的评委会喜欢？
E: Bathing is undoubtedly important, but presenting it as a groundbreaking scientific discovery? That might be a stretch. Then again, maybe there's a bath-loving reviewer on the panel?

C: 所幸你不用面对「选A还是选B」的经典困境，你还有第三个选择，靠自己的双腿走出去。
E: Luckily, you aren't limited to a simple A or B choice. There's always a third option — walking out on your own.

C: 背后一定发生了什么。
E: Something must have happened.

C: 很难想象没有规则的世界。
E: It's hard to imagine a world without rules.

C: 愿万物遵从自身的规则，勿要违背公正之秤的度量，否则迎接它的将是最严厉的审判。
E: May all things follow their ordained laws, and never defy the Scale of Justice, lest they face the severest judgment.

C: 原来大地是这么来的。
E: So that's how the land came to be.

C: 艾格勒没学到精髓。
E: Aquila didn't understand the essence of things.

C: 攻彼之盾。
E: To pierce thy shield.

C: 那些碎片，后来被扎格列斯铸成了金币。也有人说，它们成为了后世悬锋城盾的秘密。
E: Some say these fragments were later minted into coins by Zagreus. Others whisper that they became the secret behind the indomitable shields of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 你捡起废纸，再次将它扔入垃圾桶中。
E: You pick up the paper scrap and toss it into the trashcan again.

C: 「八心八箭的光锥」
E: Jeweled-Studded Arrowheart Light Cone

C: 当前排队领取人数为：0，餐点正在为您派送中，请您耐心等候。
E: Current number in line: 0. The meal is being dispatched for you, please wait patiently.

C: 加入空间站
E: Joining the space station

C: 错误！工作时间禁止干扰其他同事！宠物也不例外！外！
E: Wrong! Interfering with colleagues during working hours is prohibited! Pets are no exception! No exception!

C: 设备激活进度已达<unbreak>99%</unbreak>，请输入最终密码破解权限！
E: Device activation progress has reached <unbreak>99%</unbreak>, please enter the final password to unlock access!

C: <unbreak>1233211234567</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>1233211234567</unbreak>

C: 设备屏幕陡然一黑，随后出现了你熟悉的开机页面。然而你心中并无欣喜，只有繁琐流程带来的无尽疲惫。
E: The device screen turns stark black, followed by the familiar startup page. However, your heart holds no joy — only the endless exhaustion from following complicated procedures.

C: <unbreak>9527</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>9527</unbreak>

C: 无意义的歌词与噪音般的旋律令人恶心，但它们霸占大众的耳朵实在太久…是时候让音乐市场知道什么才是真正的音乐了！你决定——
E: Meaningless lyrics and noisy melodies are horrid, but they've been in the public's ears and minds for too long... It's time to let the music scene know what real music is all about! You decide...

C: 现在你总算明白这件奇物名字的由来了。取名的人一定和你一样，头顶承受了太多不该有的压力……
E: Now you finally understand the reason behind this Curio's name. Whosoever named it must've also experienced this same crushing weight upon their head...

C: 那怪声的意义在你耳中变得清晰起来——「而你，将加冕为约特伍德的帝皇……」
E: The meaning of the strange voice became clear inside your head: "And you shall be crowned Emperor of the Tottonids..."

C: 你还挺八卦。
E: I didn't take you to be a gossiper.

C: 随手抽一本书检查。
E: Pick out a book at random and flip through.

C: 咖啡的苦涩味霸占了你的口腔，这种滋味带着侵略性，向你的味蕾发起残酷的冲锋。
E: The bitter flavors of the coffee begin to take over your mouth, aggressively and brutally assaulting your taste buds.

C: 要我说，流光忆庭、筑城者、家族，当然还有反物质军团这群人都是一群傻瓜，崇拜星神崇拜得都魔怔了。
E: If you ask me, the Garden of Recollection, the Architects, The Family, and the Antimatter Legion are all idiots. They obsessively worship their Aeons.

C: 属于雕塑左侧的似是一健美的男性，而右侧则像是绮丽的女子；每侧各有双臂，其掌攀向对侧的躯体，相互支撑、托举，又执着刻刀，仿佛正在雕琢其本身。
E: The left part of the sculpture is a muscular man, while the right part is a gorgeous woman. Each part has two arms extended toward the other. They support and uplift each other, but also hold a carving knife each as though they are crafting each other.

C: 怪物身手不凡，但还好你技高一筹，有惊无险。
E: The monster has extraordinary skills, but you're much stronger still. The affair was more of a shock than any real danger.

C: 啊，抱歉，你是生病了吗，还是去医疗科看看吧。
E: Oh no, are you sick? You should go to the Medical Department and get that checked out.

C: 我就纳闷了，我又不是在厕所休息，怎么会听到冲水声！而且这次还真冒出来个「马桶」！到底什么情况！
E: I got so confused — I wasn't in the restroom, so how come there's this flushing sound!? And then this "toilet bowl" just popped out of nowhere!

C: 怎么，手痒了，特地跑来想过把拳击瘾？这可不好办啊，现在是休赛期……
E: Did you come all the way here to scratch your boxing itch? This might be a bit tough, since it's the off-season now...

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 尽管驻留在星球地面的博识学会民俗学团队还未回复任何讯息，但你们的飞行器的燃料已近乎消耗殆尽。「我们必须降落！」驾驶员在通讯频道里宣布。
E: The folklore team of the Intelligentsia Guild stationed on the planet has not replied, but your aircraft is running out of fuel. "We must land now!" The pilot announces through the communication channel.

C: 你感到空气中弥漫着一丝不安。他们说——主要是阿德，你们工程队里消息最灵通的那个小伙子说——皇帝已经向施工地派出了一支别动队，缘由暂不得而知。
E: You feel a sense of unease that pervades the air. You hear from the others — mostly from Ader, the one person on the team who's always getting the latest news — that the emperor has dispatched a special force to the construction site. The reason for this development remains unknown.

C: 不不不，这怎么可能！我、我向来遵纪守法……
E: Nonono, of course not! I, I've always been a law-abiding citizen...

C: 呦吼吼吼吼…冒险者啊，一路上辛苦了喀。在篝火边休整休整再出发吧。
E: Yo ho ho... Adventurer, you've come a long way already. Let's rest beside the campfire and take off again later.

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 我把你借我的装备弄坏了。
E: I broke the pickax you lent me.

C: 你还有心情读这些文字？
E: You can still stomach reading this text???

C: 糟透了…
E: I feel awful...

C: 我从你的沉默里察觉到了明智。
E: From your silence, I detect wisdom.

C: 不，你才不会那么做。你是公正的化身。你绝不会因为可耻的怜悯就把考卷上的<unbreak>59</unbreak>修改成<unbreak>60</unbreak>。你坚信…好评是挣来的，不是施舍来的。
E: No, you won't. You are the embodiment of impartiality. You would never take pity on a test with a score of <unbreak>49</unbreak> and change it to a <unbreak>50</unbreak> for a pass. You strongly believe that good reviews are earned, not handed out.

C: 「感谢您对歌德宾馆的服务做出评价。您可以在以下空白区域为我们留言，宾馆工作人员会收集您的意见，并尽量改善不足之处。」
E: "Thank you for evaluating the service here at the Goethe Hotel. You may leave a comment in the space below. We will take your feedback seriously and try our best to improve our services."

C: 哦，对了，这些你拿着吧！你可别拒绝啊…都是些零碎的小礼品，一直囤在我这儿也送不出去。欢迎下次再来住呀。
E: Oh yeah, go ahead and have these! And I won't take no for an answer... They're just a few small things that have been building up around here, and I haven't been able to give them away. Hope to see you next time.

C: 我藏在了小巷里。
E: I was hiding in the alley.

C: 房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
E: The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.

C: 胜券在握…
E: Victory is at hand!

C: 这条路真是漫长啊喀。我已经连续爬了不知多久，却还是没到终点喀。
E: This pathway really does go on and on. I've been climbing goodness knows how long, but still haven't hit the end yet.

C: 学生与老师。
E: Student and teacher.

C: 不要回头…
E: Don't turn back...

C: 在我的威严——
E: Under my majesty—

C: 哎呦！谁啊这么缺德，砸我干什么喀！
E: Ouch! Hey! Who's doing this? Why attacking me!?

C: …有缘再见。
E: ...Until we meet again.

C: 打开小型宝箱
E: Open the small chest.

C: 请为我们把这道铁门打开吧！
E: Please open the gate for us!

C: 他的笑容十分僵硬。
E: His smile is stiff as a board.

C: 那个…你是在演岩居蟹吗？
E: Umm... Are you pretending to be a Rock Crab?

C: <size=36>哇！</size>
E: <size=36>Ah!</size>
One...

C: 中间这棵。
E: The one in the middle.

C: 哦…不对，我没有屁股，只有腹腔嘤~
E: Oh... wait, I don't have a backside, just an abdomen, eep~

C: 真希望阳光永驻嗡…
E: How I long for the sunlight to never fade...

C: 人，你现在一定很迷茫，很痛苦吧…蝶…帮不了你。
E: Human, you must be lost and in pain right now... But I... I can't help you.

C: 还有意义吗…
E: Does it still mean anything...

C: 太好了，这样吧，我这里还有一杯没开封的仙人快乐茶，就先送给你了。
E: Great. I have a glass of unopened Immortal's Delight. I'll give it to you.

C: 机巧鸟就这样潇洒地离开了，它明明那么小，背影看上去却很高大。它的出逃似乎并非是为了一个消极的理由，它只是想验证「机巧鸟的快乐到底是什么」。
E: The cycrane strides off, dignified. Even though it is tiny in form, it seems like a giant from behind. It doesn't seem to be scurrying away for any passive reason, but rather just to experience "what happiness means to a cycrane."

C: 输了就输了，愿赌服输，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}。
E: A loss is a loss. Put your money where your mouth is, {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 你能想到这只机巧鸟回到鹤运物流之后，它不会为了生存资料而奔走，它会为了在劳动中肯定自身的存在而辛劳…也许它找到了真正属于机巧鸟的快乐。
E: You cast your mind to this cycrane returning to Heron Express — how it won't struggle to survive, how it will find meaning existentially through life-affirming work... Perhaps it has even discovered the true happiness of being a cycrane.

C: 此刻，你化身成为了一名小小贼人，希望能够从恶龙手下偷走真正的宝贝——无论是代代相传的宝钻、还是刀枪不入的银甲……
E: In that moment, you have transformed into a little thief, hoping to steal the real treasure from the vicious dragon — whether it be the antique jewels, or the impenetrable silver armor...

C: 坏了！刚才是不是在修理我的过程里，它们都被删掉了？啊——
E: Oh shoot! Did everything just get deleted during the reparation? Gah!

C: 让我再次感谢你吧，我敬爱的朋友。再见，总有一天，我们的道路会再次相汇，到时候再促膝长谈吧。
E: Let me thank you again, my dear friend. Goodbye, and may our roads cross again someday. Until then — I'll look forward to it.

C: 我也没有费什么功夫呀。
E: It was no real effort.

C: 您看起来正忙的团团转…
E: You're as busy as a bee...

C: …看来，赢家已经产生了！
E: ...Looks like we have a winner!

C: 恭喜你，{NICKNAME}选手！你就是我们的冠军！
E: Congratulations to {NICKNAME}! You are our new champion!

C: 不许不许！
E: No, no, no!

C: 你也看到了吧，雷力这家伙一接上，要不了多久就哭爹喊娘地脱离了控制。
E: You saw it, didn't you? Once Leili connects to it, it doesn't take long for him to cry and scream and give up control.

C: 所以测试者最好能和雷力有共同生活的经验。两人心有灵犀，齐心协力。
E: That's why testers need to have experience living with me, So that both of us have an understanding and can work together.

C: 听师傅的话吧…
E: Maybe heed his warning next time...

C: 当然不能。你以为这句话是在开玩笑吗？
E: Of course not. Did you think I was joking?

C: 你还想扔几次？不行就是不行！
E: How many more neutron bombs do you want to toss? No means no!

C: 咱们仙舟上谁不知道，工造司主持的项目多，只要你老实干活，赚得也多。要是运气好，发明了个什么机巧物件，把专利卖出去……
E: Everyone on the Xianzhou knows that the Artisanship Commission oversees many projects, and as long as you work hard, you can earn a lot. If you're lucky enough to invent some kind of mechanical device and sell the patent...

C: 嘻嘻，看好戏咯！
E: Hehe, here comes a show!

C: 既然总是播放相同的画面，为什么还要特意放两台电视呢？
E: Why would anyone ever set up two screens like this if they're both going to be playing the same thing?

C: 井盖下的热气齐唱着歌谣，每一颗水分子都手牵着手，分享彼此的喜悦。
E: The steam from under the manhole cover is united in song. Each water molecule is sharing their joy, hand-in-hand.

C: 对雕像进行清洗和修补，居民们把这视为生活的一部分，巨大的钟表小子也一定把这视为自己生活的一部分。
E: The citizens see cleaning and maintaining this statue as a part of their lives. The giant Clockie must see this as a part of its life, too.

C: 这扇门的一丝缝隙似乎是故意留下的，渗出的红光一定是某种邪恶之物的邀请，为了你的灵魂，请遏制住不必要的好奇心。
E: The slight crack in this door has been intentionally left open. The red light that spills forth must be an invitation from some evil entity. You must control your curiosity for the sake of your soul.

C: 生态学家认为，持续地保持地面湿润，应该是水管用于标记领地的一种方式。
E: Ecologists believe that keeping the ground constantly wet is likely a way for water pipes to mark their territory.

C: 无论管道的另一端是谁，他的品味都很难让人认同。
E: I don't care who is on the other side of this pipe, their taste is questionable.

C: 这是流梦礁的地图，没有人比它更懂流梦礁，可惜也没有人懂它。
E: This is a map of Dreamflux Reef. No one understands Dreamflux Reef better than this map. Just a shame that no one understands this map.

C: 大哥，不是我胆小，这人我实在不敢抢。
E: Bro, it's not that I'm a coward. I just really don't think I should try robbing that person...

C: 是啊，还是这儿过着舒坦。
E: Yeah, life here is way more comfortable.

C: 真是壮观…
E: It's truly magnificent...

C: 你决定*跳*上去。
E: You decide to jump onto it.

C: 我跟你说，瑟希斯啊…
E: Let me tell you, Cerces is...

C: 所以我才会担心啊。
E: That's why I'm worried.

C: 我来求神谕，不是找你。
E: I'm here for prophecies, not for you.

C: 都交给你就好了！
E: I'll leave both to you then!

C: 所以，以后记得要提前准备好物资再外出哦！
E: So always remember to prepare your supplies in advance, before you go out!

C: 不用紧张，你就当、就当是列车服务之类的满意度调查好了。
E: Don't be nervous. Just think of it as a survey about the service record.

C: 知道啦…应物…密卷…地什么来着…地…地…想不起来了……
E: Pom-Pom knows... Implement Arts... Mysticism... Geo... What is it... Pom-Pom can't remember...

C: 换首歌听听呗。
E: Listen to something else.

C: 下次可不能这么不小心了哦！陶瓷碎片可是很危险的，稍不留心就会割破手指。
E: Don't be so careless again! Ceramic shards are dangerous, and someone could cut themselves.

C: （把留声机关掉）
E: (Turn off the phonograph)

C: 有！帕姆说有就是有。
E: There they are! When I say there are footprints, there are.

C: 不过你也别灰心，可以试试，星穹列车绝对会让每位乘客都宾至如归！
E: Don't worry, and feel free to give it a go! Every passenger will feel at home here!

C: …呜呜，{NICKNAME}乘客说话太残酷了！沉闷的极致就是让人内心毫无波澜！
E: *sob* That's very harsh of you, {NICKNAME}! Only extreme dullness can make you think that way!

C: 我知道了！你是把我和狗狗作比较了对吧！{NICKNAME}乘客太过分了！
E: I get it! You're comparing me to a dog! {NICKNAME}, you're awful!

C: 这不就是列车长的工作？
E: Isn't cleaning the job of the conductor?

C: 关于「资源补给协议」…
E: About the resource supply agreement...

C: 管理经验？这些年来我在「地火」的确积累了一些心得，不过也称不上什么经验——那就是把专业的事情交给专业的人去做。
E: Management? Over the years, I have accumulated some experience in Wildfire, but it can't really be called management. I just leave professional things to professional people.

C: 举个例子，下层区的秩序过去是「地火」来维护，但以后我们会交还到银鬃铁卫手里，毕竟他们才是专业人士。
E: For example, the order in the Underworld used to be maintained by Wildfire, but in the future we will hand it back to the Silvermane Guards. After all, they are professionals.

C: {NICKNAME}，快告诉帕姆，你都问到了什么吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, tell Pom-Pom what advice you got!

C: 帕姆就是帕姆，帕姆是你们尊敬的列车长大人，在列车上要遵守列车的规矩，不要总是惹帕姆生气。
E: Pom-Pom is Pom-Pom, your respectful conductor. Follow the rules of the Express, and try not make me angry all the time.

C: 中小包裹，当日可达。
E: Same-day delivery for small- and medium-sized parcels.

C: 想要继续前进，挑战邓恩队长的话，有两条路线可以选择。
E: There are two paths to choose from if you want to keep on going and challenge Captain Dunn.

C: 怎么样，{NICKNAME}？准备好再跟我较量一次了吗？
E: How about it, {NICKNAME}? Are you ready to go head-to-head with me?

C: 禁区的<color=#dbc291ff>铁卫军官</color>也许随身携带着密钥。想要操控栈桥的话，看来必须要和他们作战才行。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>Silvermane officers</color> here should have the key. Looks like you'll have to fight them if you want to operate the bridge.

C: 来了——他来了！杰帕德戍卫官加入了禁区演练！
E: He's coming — he's coming! Captain Gepard is joining in on the drill!

C: 居然在这里偷懒？让我逮住了吧！
E: Are you slacking off here? I've caught you now!

C: 噢，对了，现在这风雪可不小…战斗的时候要小心，身体被冻僵就不好办了。
E: Oh yeah — the snow's really coming down now. Be careful when you're fighting. You really don't want to come down with frostbite.

C: 您这话说得就见外了。您是大英雄，怎么能亏待呢？
E: Don't mention it. You're the great hero and you deserve it.

C: 你瞧——这电话亭中空无一人，附近似乎也没有急于通信的贝洛伯格居民。这无疑是个独占电话亭的好时机。
E: Nobody in the phone booth... No Belobogians dying to use it, either. A good time to hog it all to yourself.

C: 哦，好的！
E: Oh, right!

C: 我非得治治他不可！
E: I have to put him in his place!

C: 肆意破坏公物的家伙，今天被我抓了个现行！不给你点颜色瞧瞧，简直妄对我的铁卫誓词！
E: I caught you redhanded, you vandal! Under my sworn oath as a Silvermane Guard, I shall carry out proper justice!

C: 你终于在这空荡荡的手提箱中发现了滴答声的来源——这果然是一只价值连城的金表。
E: You finally locate the source of that ticking sound in the rather empty suitcase. It turns out to be a precious gold watch!

C: 你才不会轻易被它欺骗——你的内心防线比克里珀堆砌的城墙还坚不可摧。你做好准备了。
E: You won't be easily fooled by it. Your mind is stronger than those city walls built by Qlipoth. You are prepared.

C: 歌德宾馆的恶魔……
E: The Goethe Hotel's devil...

C: 你明白，这就是那种曾风靡一时的某类作品中常见的男二号：永远寡淡如水，永远保持距离，永远不遗余力地克制自己的感情。我们通常称之为……
E: You identify him as the classic second male lead in a once-popular period genre: Always indifferent, always at a distance, always struggling to keep emotions in check. We usually call this kind of guy...

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 可我什么也没得到，好亏！
E: But I got nothing, What a lousy bargain!

C: 噗…这话倒是出乎我的意料。
E: Pfft... Now I didn't expect to hear that.

C: …你在哪？
E: ...Where are you?

C: （这是…史考特的字迹？）
E: (Is it... Scott's handwriting?)

C: （拿起来耍一耍）
E: (Pick it up and play around with it)

C: 男人带着一脸不可思议的表情，收下钱，迅速消失在街角。
E: He looks at you incredulously, before taking the money and scarpering off around the corner.

C: 您看这样，我呢，眼下被地衡司的执事给逮了。要不您给我交个保，再接济点儿。我以后就跟您混了。
E: How about this, then — I got caught by the Realm-Keeping Commission. If you help post my bail and help me out a little, you can be my boss.

C: 我不是故意的，我只是好奇。
E: It was an accident, and I was just curious.

C: 你又为什么不住在罐子里？这尘世凶残险恶，唯有罐中的一方天地独享清闲。寰宇无穷亦樊笼，螺蛳壳里天地宽。
E: Why don't YOU live in a vase? The mortal world is cruel and evil, and only within this vase can I enjoy my peace. The universe is an infinite bird cage, and this snail's shell is as liberating as an entire world.

C: 不懂也无妨。你站在那里不要动，我径自来取。
E: It doesn't matter if you don't understand. Just stand there, and don't move. I'll get it myself.

C: 如您所见，这些机巧鸟栖木周围跑来些坏东西，多半是被鸟儿吸引来的，胡搞一气，连栖木都被咬坏了。
E: As you can see, these bad things running around the cycranes' roost are mostly attracted by the birds and are causing chaos. Even the roost is being bitten and damaged.

C: 不好意思啊…把你们两个也卷到了这么危险的事情里面。
E: I'm sorry... I got you two involved in such a dangerous situation.

C: 这种事我见多了。
E: I deal with this kind of thing all the time.

C: 希望下一次…不要再遇到这种危险的情况了……
E: I hope it will be something less dangerous next time...

C: 没错，就是这家伙…啊！他好像看到我们了，{NICKNAME}，走，我们追上去！
E: It's them! Ah! I think they've seen us. {NICKNAME}, let's go after them!

C: 我家是做药材生意的，这些「鲛人泪」就是我从鳞渊境里带出来的。
E: My family is in the pharmaceutical business, and I've brought these Draconic Tears over from Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 值钱，但是还是不够，我最多给你<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
E: It's valuable, but still not enough. I'll give you <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits. That's my best offer.

C: 总之，很感谢你把我救出来。
E: Anyway, thank you very much for helping me out of here.

C: 你你你你你你是谁？为什么突然开门？
E: Wh—Wh—Wh—Who are you? What's all the rush?

C: 那我先走了，祝你一切顺利！再见！
E: Alright, then I'm heading out. Wishing you all the best! So long!

C: 「枘凿六合」不是挺好的吗？
E: Isn't the Hexanexus a marvelous invention?

C: 「枘凿六合」玩法不行。
E: The Hexanexus gameplay is no good.

C: 或许是个主意，也不知道他们会不会收留我这样的废物……
E: That's an idea, but I don't know if they'd ever want to take in anyone as useless me...

C: 乐观一点啦…
E: Cheer up a little...

C: 乐观？在快乐重新占领宇宙之前，恐怕没有人能乐观起来……
E: Cheer up? I'm afraid nobody will ever be able to cheer up until happiness recaptures the universe...

C: 干脆永远别醒来算了…永远都别醒来……
E: I'd be better off never waking up at all... Never waking at all...

C: 据说最近新出了一款彩虹芥末味的苏乐达，之后买一瓶尝尝看…哦，听说飞碟堡的味道也不错，得去尝尝。
E: I heard SoulGlad is putting out a new Rainbow Mustard flavor. I'll have to buy one and give it a try... Oh, I heard the Floatdisc Burger flavor is great too. Gotta try that.

C: 那些守卫是…？
E: Are those guards...?

C: 阿然的仪态依旧优雅得体，但你分明窥见了她神情中的麻木与空洞。
E: Ran's demeanor is still graceful and elegant, but you can clearly see apathy and emptiness behind those eyes.

C: 那些声音、那些颜色、甚至…我每天都能听到、都能看到。不是此刻这般远远倾听或观望，它们是如此强烈、如此鲜明，气势汹汹地逼近，像洪水一样近乎将我淹没。
E: Those voices, those colors, and even... I hear and see them every day. Instead of listening or observing from a distance like we are now, they are intense and brilliant as they aggressively approach, almost drowning me like a torrential flood.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>艾迪恩公园</color>那边好像有梦境鼓励师当班……
E: Pretty sure there's a Dreamscape Motivator on duty over by <color=#f29e38ff>Aideen Park</color>...

C: 她在现实中的「白日梦」酒店当<color=#f29e38ff>前台接待</color>。面对那种无聊的工作，我猜她每天肯定都过得愁眉苦脸的吧？嘻嘻……
E: She works <color=#f29e38ff>as a receptionist</color> out in The Reverie in reality. Such boring work should leave her feeling utterly miserable each day, right? Tee-hee...

C: 是啊，入射角度必须精确，发射力度必须适中；任何失误都会破坏碎片的排列，根本没有重来的余地。
E: Yeah, the angle of incidence must be exact with moderate force only; any mistakes would destroy the arrangement of the scraps. There was no room for a mulligan here.

C: 这么说也没错，毕竟解决问题的关键只是抛弃压舱物而已，听起来确实很简单。
E: Sure, when it's put like that. After all, problem-solving is really all about jettisoning the ballast, that's all. It sounds really simple.

C: 唉，果然用言语描述出来还是差了些味道。
E: *sigh* So it seems like you lose some of the magic when you put it into words.

C: 你？你能怎么解决？
E: You? What are you going to do about it?

C: 我、我们的行为是符合公司价值观的！你个外人有什么权利这么说？
E: O—Our behavior is in line with IPC values! What right do you outsiders have to talk like that?

C: 为表歉意，送你个赔罪礼吧，拿好哦~
E: Here's a token of my apology. Please keep it!

C: 奇迹本杰明——这个团队在银河间久负盛名，我听说过他们以往的作品和成就。
E: Miracle Benjamin is a team that has been well-known for quite some time in the cosmos. I've heard of their past work and accomplishments.

C: 你觉得我觉得呢？
E: What do you think?

C: 后来我几番打听，才知道原来是费曼将黑锅甩给了我，说那段时间大家强制加班是因为我那「愚蠢的企划」得罪了家族……
E: I later asked around and found out that Feinman had made me his scapegoat. He claimed that the reason everyone had to work overtime during that period was because The Family wasn't happy with my "stupid project."

C: 你感觉心情有些复杂。或许你可以留下来看看其他人的反应…或是直接转头离开。
E: You feel a mix of emotions. Maybe you should stay for a while to witness the others' reactions... or just walk away.

C: 伙计，你真是缺少同情心！我们的兄弟横尸街头，你居然能如此幸灾乐祸！
E: Seriously, mate? Have a little empathy! How can you be so heartless when our brother is lying dead on the street?

C: 答应我一件事，拍照前一定要征得她本人的同意！我不想被当成一个…呃…偏执狂。
E: But promise me one thing. Do ask her permission before taking the photo! I don't want to come off as... uh... pervert.

C: 有个叫莫里斯的客人暗恋你。
E: There's a visitor named Morris who has a crush on you.

C: 如果凭一张照片就能缓解他的惆怅，那就把这当作家族回馈宾客的一种「服务」吧。
E: If my photo can make him feel better, consider it a "service" we provide to our guests.

C: 嗯，我想明白了，今后请多多指教！
E: Yes, I've thought it all through. I'm ready to get on board!

C: 他只是去星际和平娱乐了。
E: He's just joined Interastral Peace Entertainment.

C: 它们有的是宇宙中古老的艺术遗产，有的是银河中前卫的探索表达…但这些事物都无法让市场认可，难以收获追捧，还会面临非议与偏见。
E: Some of them are ancient artistic heritage lost in the universe, while others are avant-garde expressions on a cosmic scale... but none of them are recognized by the market. Not only do they get zero attention from the public, but they also face criticism and prejudice.

C: 这也没什么不好的。
E: It isn't necessarily a bad thing.

C: 打我记事起，我就随长辈一起四处卖唱。从边星小国到佣兵船舰，我们走到哪里就唱到哪里，演出的报酬只能勉强满足生存。
E: Well, for as long as I can remember, I have been traveling and singing with my relatives. We performed in various places, from small countries on border stars to mercenary ships, but the pay we received was barely enough to make ends meet.

C: 嗯，我随时愿意跟宾客交流。
E: Sure, I'm always up for chatting with guests.

C: 多么前卫的音乐…不愧是我的偶像，成名后还能潜心开拓音乐艺术的边疆，拉洛丝小姐真是位名副其实的艺术家！
E: What an avant-garde style of music... worthy of admiration. Larose is truly an artist in her own right, managing to be famous while pushing the boundaries of music and art!

C: 当我在演唱结束后看到那些否定的眼神，耳边听不到一点欢呼与掌声时，我感觉自己仿佛被噩梦撕碎了一样——
E: At the end of my performance, when I saw those disapproving glances and heard no cheers or applause in my ears, it felt as though I was being torn apart by the most terrible nightmare...

C: 呼——解开了那些让我痛苦多年的心结，我终于可以为事业全力以赴了。
E: Phew... Now that I've untangled the knots that plagued me for years, I can finally dedicate myself completely to my career.

C: 你有什么心事吗？
E: What's on your mind?

C: 不要再缅怀过去了，那对我也是一种折磨。
E: Don't dwell on the past anymore. That too is torture to me.

C: 跳吧，最好再来个后空翻。
E: Go ahead and jump. Do a backflip if you can.

C: 果然，这繁华的大都会才是我理想中的栖身之处——在这里，只要有钱就能买到一切；而越是挥金如土，你就越能感受到一种无比的欢乐、一种亲昵的归属……
E: Indeed, this vibrant metropolis is the ideal place for me to settle down. Money can buy anything here. The more you splurge, the more you can feel an unparalleled joy and a sense of belonging...

C: …如果你愿意参与这项事业，等垃圾回收完毕后，我会向你献上最崇高的赞许。
E: ...If you're willing to get involved in this endeavor, I'll offer you my highest compliments when you're done collecting the trash.

C: 再见，请时刻注意周围的环境。
E: Goodbye. Please take care of the environment at all times.

C: …嗯…好，我会照顾好自己的，你放心…咦，怎么还有未撤离的宾客？
E: ...Yes... Okay, I'll take care of myself. Don't worry... Huh? There are guests who haven't evacuated?

C: 放心，在我身边，你绝对安全。
E: Relax. You're absolutely safe by my side.

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 你耍我呢？！还有完没完了，没事赶紧从我眼前消失，我可一点都不想再看到你了！
E: You screwing with me? Stop dragging this out and go away! I don't ever want to see you again!

C: 午休从两小时缩短为三十分钟；课堂签到从声纹验证改为扫脸、指纹和采血三重验证，杜绝代签、漏签；晚自习必须自愿出席……
E: Afternoon breaks will be shortened from two hours to thirty minutes. Class attendance shall no longer be taken via voiceprint. A three-factor authentication process that includes facial scanning, fingerprint recognition, and blood sample verification will be used instead. Failing to take one's own attendance or taking attendance on behalf of others is strictly prohibited. Students must also voluntarily attend nightly self-study sessions...

C: 平平无奇的垃圾桶，上面结了很厚的霜。
E: A trashcan covered in thick frost, not remarkable in any way.

C: 这个故事告诉我们，最好的体验不一定非要花钱才能得到。
E: This tale shows that the best experiences don't always have to come with a price tag.

C: 这么大的机器人，也不知要修到什么时候去。我还有可能看见那天吗.......
E: I have no idea how long it will take to fix a robot that large. I wonder if I'll even get to see the day...

C: 尽管这里没有什么感叹号，连问号也没有，但你还是决定行动起来，谁让你天生一副热心肠呢。
E: Despite there being no exclamation marks here — nor a single question mark, either — you decide to take action. You were just born to be a kind-hearted person.

C: 尽管在现场见证了「无限荣光」的人只有你和它——严格来说只有你，但你还是忍不住发出了轻轻的笑声。
E: Despite you and the Insighter themselves being the only ones present to witness this moment of limitless glory — well, strictly speaking, it's just YOU — it's impossible to stop a chuckle from slipping out.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 人家要准备去跟妃色夫人交流创作了，下次再陪客官小酌啾~
E: I'm getting ready to exchange creative ideas with Lady Vermilion. Dear customer, I'll have to tip a few back with you next time, tweet~

C: 啾…刚刚也有个小女孩匆匆忙忙跑过来啾……
E: Tweet... There was also a little girl who ran past here hurriedly earlier, tweet...

C: 啾！人家不会怕你的…啾？原来不是石头老板，吓死鸟了啾。
E: Tweet! I'm not afraid of you... Tweet? Oh, it's not Boss Stone. You really scared me there, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个爱操心的孩子总在帮忙<color=#dbc291ff>整理行李</color>，但它小小的翅膀怎么能举得起那么多箱子呢？说不定是把自己埋进去了啾…
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's an anxious child who's always helping to <color=#dbc291ff>arrange baggage</color>, but how can its tiny wings carry so many suitcases? Who knows, it may have buried itself beneath them...

C: 有人闯进钟表小子家了，得赶快回去跟大哥报告啾——
E: Someone's trespassed in Clockie's home. I have to quickly return to Boss to report this, tweet...

C: 啾？！我不是故意要偷看的啾！我只是在这儿看流星啾！
E: Tweet!? I didn't mean to peek, tweet! I'm only here to watch the shooting stars, tweet!

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 还有好看的宝石啾！
E: And shiny gems, tweet!

C: （找到所有折纸小鸟了，回「大树」跟妃色夫人汇报吧…）
E: (Found all the origami birds. Time to report back to Lady Vermilion at the Great Tree...)

C: 好吧！这是原本为小家伙们准备的零花钱，也分给你一些吧！
E: Alright! This is supposed to be the pocket money prepped for the little ones, but I'll give you a share!

C: 啾啾——太好了，捉迷藏的孩子们都安全回来了啾！
E: Tweet, that's great. The children playing hide-and-seek are all back safely!

C: 随时为您效劳——啾啾！
E: At your service, tweet!

C: 当然，你口中的危险完全不是这个意思。
E: Of course, the danger you speak of doesn't mean this at all.

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 头上有一只奇怪的蓝色脑袋一直盯着我，好可怕啾……
E: There's a strange blue head up there that has been staring at me the whole time. It's so scary, tweet...

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 欢迎——来到——
E: Hello... Welcome to...

C: 我来替你望风！
E: I will keep watch for you!

C: 啾啾，好漂亮的大房子啾！
E: Tweet, tweet, what a beautiful house, tweet!

C: 关于你自己…
E: About you yourself...

C: 结果没想到，刚开打，就被对手吓软了腿啾。
E: I didn't think that the opponent would be scared silly right as the match started, tweet.

C: 我说怎么一觉醒来场上的大恐龙就没了，原来是被你打败了啾。
E: I was wondering where the dino went when I woke up. So you defeated it, tweet.

C: 在大家都躲进气球的时候，只有我选择了一个与众不同的藏身之所啾。
E: When everyone hid in the balloon, I was the only one who chose a unique hiding spot, tweet.

C: 但是，明明是哈努兄弟，为什么上这点小小的台阶都要有书垫脚呢？啾啾？
E: But it's Brother Hanu. Why's there a need to stack books for such a low step? Tweet tweet?

C: 啾，你快来评评理，这人偶实在是欺负鸟啾。
E: Tweet, you be the judge. This puppet is just pushing us around, tweet.

C: 那羽毛慢慢飘向云——咳咳咳，唱不上去了啾。
E: That feather slowly floats toward the clouds — *cough* can't hit that high note, tweet.

C: 啾啾，没想到，居然有人能跟上我的舞步啾。
E: Tweet tweet, not bad, you're able to keep up with my dance moves, tweet.

C: 你们不要再打了，小鸟把羽毛给你们，大家一起做好朋友啾。
E: Stop fighting! Here's the feather, let's all be friends, tweet.

C: 这个房间好奇怪，每次有人进来，它都会「刷」地一下变成新的样子啾。
E: This room is really strange. Each time someone enters, it will rearrange its layout with a "swoosh," tweet.

C: 因为在镜子里吧…
E: Probably because it's in the mirror...

C: 希儿，你在吗？
E: Seele, are you there?

C: 咕，没想到自己居然输得这么简单。
E: Coo, I didn't think I'd lose so easily.

C: 啾，看到远处的花园了吗？这可是湛蓝爵士最得意的设计。
E: Hey, see the distant garden? That's Dr. Blues' best design.

C: 但我不喜欢吃披萨。
E: But I don't like to eat pizza.

C: 我发誓啾，待遇是一样的，只不过你的工位稍小一点啾……
E: I swear, the benefits are the same, but your workspace is just a little smaller, tweet...

C: 你到底想说什么?
E: What are you trying to say?

C: 总之，既然在这里相遇，就说明我们都是《以太战线》的铁杆粉丝......
E: Either way, as we've met here, that means we're both die-hard fans of Aetherium Wars...

C: 哟，好巧啊，没想到你也在这。
E: Oh! What a coincidence! I had no idea you'd be here, too!

C: 哦，{NICKNAME}大人！你的出现奠定了我今天的好心情。
E: Oh, great {NICKNAME}! Your appearance always puts me in a wonderful mood for the day!

C: 你一棒子打碎了它牢固的「大门」，它看上去有些无所适从。
E: Considering you basically smashed down its "front doors" with your bat, it's at a loss about what to do.

C: 你放心！绝对属实！我再也不想当卧底了！
E: Don't worry! What I said is the absolute truth! I never want to be a mole ever again!

C: 我看你那震惊的表情就知道，你肯定想问「丹鼎司到底行不行啊」。你现在明白了吧，让我回来继任丹士长可以说是危机重重了。
E: Oh, by your astonished expression, I can tell that you actually want to say "Come on! Has the Alchemy Commission ever done anything right!?" Well, now you see how perilous my position as the chief alchemist is.

C: 行啦，这个事情也犯不着{F#她}{M#他}来给你解释。况且{F#她}{M#他}也未必搞得清楚。
E: Well, I don't think we need {F#her}{M#him} to explain what's going on. Perhaps not even {F#she}{M#he} knows what has truly transpired.

C: 你这问题普通的谛听也能算得出来。
E: Even an ordinary Diting could answer such a simple question.

C: 只要能改变他的心态就好。
E: As long as this helps change his attitude about his fate.

C: 其实每一次抽签，我都默默告诉自己「每一次抽签都当最后一次，也不要怕是凶签」…但是，这一次我真的要把它当成最后一次时，我却怂了。
E: To be honest, every time I drew a stick, I kept telling myself that it would be the last time and that I shouldn't be discouraged if it turned out to be a "Woe"... But now that I'm actually going to draw the last one, I'm feeling unsure of myself.

C: 老板，你的玉兆不行啊…
E: Ruoyue, your jade abacus is not working...

C: 这个发力在腰…这招…倒是在手臂…可这角度…这动作倒有点眼熟的……
E: This one forces the waist... and this move... unexpectedly hits the arm... but at this angle... this move actually seems kinda familiar...

C: 那我这拳法岂不是白学了…
E: So it'd be a complete waste of time to learn it as a boxing skill...?

C: 没太记住，能再唱一遍吗？
E: I can't quite remember that. Could you please sing it one more time?

C: 好的哦。那你可要记得，唱错了是要挨打的。可不是为师心狠手辣，这都是为了让你学会这段戏啊！
E: Alright. Then you have to remember that you'll get beaten if you make a mistake. This isn't just to be cruel; it's all so you can learn the song!

C: 且为郎君解罗裳，芙蓉帐暖饱饥肠。
E: Robes fall away, revealing my desire. In hibiscus tent, our passions shall transpire.

C: 这一加长车，差点没给我外壳撞开胶了。
E: This limo nearly broke the glue seal on my outer shell.

C: 智械的身体猛地颤抖了一下。你看不见他的眼神，却能感受到扑面而来的愤怒——那是蒙受冤屈的耻辱，还是走投无路的反扑？
E: The Intellitron's body shakes violently. You can't make out his eyes, but his anger smacks you in the face — is that humiliation at being wronged, or the desperation of a cornered beast?

C: 那盘「古怪的磁带」。
E: About the "Bizarre Tape."

C: 这位朋友，玩得还顺手吧？
E: Friend, are you having a good time?

C: 至于这位朋友…来，这是你的份。你帮了我的忙，就别客气了。
E: As for you, my friend... Here, this is your cut. You helped me out, no need to be polite.

C: 这个人一直在赢钱。
E: This guy just keeps winning.

C: 这些事还是少管为好。
E: Whatever it is, it's best to stay out of it.

C: 惜叹…好事难成啊。
E: *sigh* I knew it was too good to be true.

C: 怎叹…唉。
E: Ahh...

C: 你正面对着一台略显怪异的取款机。它似乎被什么东西卡住了*嗓子眼*，疯狂颤动却吐不出任何东西。
E: You find yourself standing in front of an ATM that looks slightly odd. Something seems to be stuck in its throat, stopping it from spewing anything out despite trembling vigorously.

C: 选金色的香槟。
E: The golden champagne.

C: 这…我也不知道啊。
E: I have no clue.

C: 相信这位热情似火的仙舟女孩一定不想错过这么热闹的场合。
E: That Xianzhou girl with her fiery passion would not want to miss out on a lively scene like this!

C: 等全人类都变成了铁桶，真正的天堂就会降临。
E: When the entire human population becomes iron cans, the real paradise will descend.

C: 也就是祂老人家慈悲为怀，否则你绝对看不到明天的太阳！
E: You should be thankful that THEY are compassionate and forgiving, or you will never see the sun tomorrow!

C: 打不过就招安？
E: If you can't beat them, recruit them?

C: 摊开手。
E: Spread 'em out.

C: 很多无家可归的居民看到了我们的成功，也打算加入其中——以后，这里就是所有流浪者们的家了，我们会重拾曾经的责任，维护流梦礁的和平与安全。
E: A load of the homeless locals have seen our success n' wanna join us too... In the future, this'll be a home for all vagrants. We will take up our old responsibility n' maintain the peace n' safety of Dreamflux Reef!

C: 给你买个打气机？
E: You want me to buy you a gas pump?

C: 只是…没想到这一天来得这么快呢。
E: It's just... I didn't expect this day to come so soon.

C: 我、我也…买一张…好了。
E: I—I'll... I'll also... take one... okay?

C: 勇敢的人先享受世界，别等热情耗尽了才后悔。信用点都准备好了吗，这就……
E: The bold get first dibs on everything. Don't wait until your passion wanes and regret sets in. Have you got all your credits ready, then? Here you go...

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: …朋友，你回来了？是不是到处逛了一圈后发现，我这里才是最低价？
E: ...Hey buddy, you're back? Did you ask around and find out that my price really is the cheapest?

C: 请知更鸟怎么样…
E: How about Miss Robin...

C: 这是你们自己的事…
E: That is your problem...

C: 你知道原始博士喜欢吃香蕉吗？
E: Do you know Dr. Primitive loves to eat bananas?

C: {NICKNAME}大人，这次真是给你添麻烦了。请收下这些赔礼，当是这个小小闹剧的补偿吧。此间事毕，寒鸦也先行告退了。
E: {NICKNAME}, sorry to cause you so much inconvenience. Please accept these gifts as our apology. Now that this case has come to an end, I'll take my leave first.

C: 标题有意思的，我会看。
E: I'll read the ones with interesting titles.

C: 将它带上吧，也许负责智库维护的丹恒会感谢你的。
E: Take it along with you. Maybe Dan Heng, the caretaker of the data bank, will thank you for it.

C: 然而，百密终有一疏。就算冥差、狱卒、幽府武弁统统放弃了休假，日夜不停地加班修复各类出逃问题，仍有一些狡猾的犯人不知踪影。
E: Then again, nothing is ever airtight. Even if the spiritfarers, prison guards, and Wraith Warden forgo their vacation days and work overtime to plug escapee problems, there will still be certain cunning convicts who slip away among the shadows.

C: 哼，再走近一些也无妨。
E: Hmph, it won't matter even if you come a little closer.

C: 这么重要，你就随便找个人？
E: You're grabbing just anyone for something so important?

C: 没了我，你可咋办呀。
E: What will you do without me?

C: 我要退出！
E: No, I quit.

C: 求人办事和嗑瓜子聊天，能一样嘛。
E: It's not like I can ask someone for help like I'm kicking back and catching up with a friend, is it?

C: 别听他胡说，这是好事！
E: Don't listen to him. We're do-gooders!

C: 你干啥了你就投降。
E: What have you done? Why are you surrendering?

C: 我现在有一种养大的闺女嫁人的感觉，又寂寞又开心，哎……
E: It feels comparable to if my daughter has grown up, and I'm finally giving her away on her wedding day. It's a bittersweet happiness...

C: 这世界上有很多「不留心，看不见」的东西，我的飞行编队也是这样的。
E: There are many things in this world that just will not be seen if they are not observed closely, and my flight team is one of those things.

C: 虽然阁下的威名我也有所耳闻，但云骑军还是不能以人质的安危去冒险。尤其被劫持的又是位老者。
E: Although I have heard tell of your great strength, as a Cloud Knight, I cannot take risks when it comes to the safety of a hostage. That is especially true when the hostage is an elderly man.

C: 只有一个人么？快点吧，我累了。
E: There's just one of you? Hurry up then, I'm getting tired.

C: 剧组的各位，大家好。我叫阿红，从小就作为童星在电影中担任过主要角色，拥有极其丰富的演艺经验，特技是「五秒内就能喷出来」。请多指教。
E: Hello to everyone in the production crew. My name is Reddie. I've played main characters in movies as a child star, and I have ample acting experience. My special is "spitting it out in five seconds." I'll be in your care.

C: 询问红色酒瓶。
E: Talk to the red bottle.

C: 我想好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 但你看见金色的酒瓶躺倒在桌面上——它的瓶身已经变得破碎，其中的液体正缓慢渗透出来。很明显，它已经没法再回应你的话语了。
E: But you see the golden bottle lying on the desk — it has been shattered, its liquid slowly seeping out. It's clear that it can no longer reply to your words.

C: 但在你手掌触碰间，圣烛顶部的光芒突然熄灭，黄金般闪耀的流体迅速下沉。
E: But just as you touch it, the light at the top of the candle goes off, and the golden fluid rapidly sinks.

C: 算了还是别乱摸了。
E: Never mind. Best not to fiddle with it.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 吼吼，不无道理，可惜可惜，答案只需要局限在「两个人」中间。「动摇的信念」，这不是正确答案。
E: Ho-ho, it is a sound argument. Alas, the answer requires that only two individuals are involved. "Wavering will" applies to one whole army and is not the right answer.

C: 再想想？
E: Think again?

C: 虽说你也可以试着自己思考，但听听新朋友们的意见总不是什么坏事。
E: You can try to figure it out yourself, but it's not too bad to listen to the opinions of your newfound friends.

C: 本狮不敢，不敢吼，只是随口说说而已…您还是快点把手拿出去吧！
E: Of course not, I wouldn't dare. It's just banter... you may bring your hand out of here as you please!

C: 遐蝶找来了些药膏，坚持看你敷好后才离开。
E: Castorice gives you some medical ointments and insists on applying them before she leaves.

C: 可以不回答吗？
E: Can I refuse to answer?

C: 吼吼，被这精妙的谜题吓坏了吧，本狮就大发善心，为你再讲一遍吼！
E: Ho-ho, stumped by this ingenious question, eh? I'm feeling generous, so listen well!

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 这不是什么值得骄傲的事吧？
E: It's not something to be proud of, is it?

C: 它正值壮年惨遭不幸…
E: It was in its prime when it faced its untimely demise...

C: （打开冰箱）
E: (Open the fridge)

C: 走过冰箱时，你发现上面贴了一个便签。
E: As you walk past the refrigerator, you notice a note attached to it.

C: 呼呼，大地从不吝啬回报。这样吧，呈出令我满意的供品，我必将丰厚还于你。
E: *crackle* The earth always rewards those who sow. How about this? Make a satisfactory offering, and I will repay you abundantly.

C: 啊，又一个迷途的羔羊，不知你是否拥有我所期待的智慧——就让我来考考你。
E: Ah, another lost soul. I wonder if you possess the wisdom I'm seeking. Well, let me test you.

C: 是啊，即便如此精妙的问题，也不能突破意义的桎梏……
E: Yeah, even such a subtle question is restrained by the nature of existence...

C: 手指并拢，用手掌尖指示方向。
E: I'll keep my fingers together and point in the right direction with the tip of my palm.

C: 为了永久性地解决这一难题，我认为，应该取消掉休息日，每天都是星期一——这样就不会因为休息日的结束而痛苦了。
E: In order to permanently resolve this problem, I believe we should cancel rest days, making every day Monday. Then they won't be suffering when the rest days end.

C: 哼！孤陋寡闻！我这一路上明明听到所有人都在讨论{F#她}{M#他}的事迹，你装什么不知道，莫不是骗我的？你什么意思？！
E: Pfft, ignorant! I've been hearing everybody else discussing {F#her}{M#him} just walking down the street, yet you expect me to believe that you know nothing of this matter? Do you think I'm dumb?

C: 垃圾桶膝下有垃圾，不许跪！
E: Do not bend the knee so easily, trashcan!

C: 徒儿请起，以后不可轻敌。
E: Rise, disciple. Do not underestimate your enemy next time.

C: 师傅！我已经悟了！原来真正的力量并非外形的变化，而是在于心与心的融合！
E: Master! I've finally understood! True power does not come from the transformation of one's appearance, but from the melding of hearts!

C: 梦里？我就说…这种晃晃悠悠的感觉，还有真正的我，只可能出现在梦里……
E: In a dream? I knew it... This floating feeling, as well as my true identity, could only be possible inside a dream...

C: 我想选…
E: I will pick...

C: 回忆第二封回信。
E: Recall the second reply sent.

C: 别紧张！这只是人家的小魔法。我努力变出了书上的生物，它不会攻击你，也不会把木棚压塌的。
E: Don't panic! It's just a little spell of mine. I tried summoning a creature from the book. It won't hurt you, and the hut's sturdier than it looks!

C: 我成奇美拉了？
E: Wait, you mean I'm a chimera!?

C: 无论是哪位…一旦发作，必然导致生灵涂炭。
E: Whichever one it is... when it erupts, countless lives will surely be lost.

C: 若真如此…身在翁法罗斯内部的{NICKNAME}和丹恒，岂不是相当危险？
E: If that's true... wouldn't {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng be in extreme danger in Amphoreus?

C: 人家倒是不担心啦。以后我们还会遇见许多人或事，并因此回忆起今天的一些心绪……
E: I'm not too worried. We'll meet all kinds of people and experience all sorts of things in the future, and some of those moments will bring us right back to how we felt today...

C: 小妖精，真对不起，你是来欢迎新访客的吧？作为道歉，我们会用欧洛尼斯的小魔法为你治疗。
E: I'm sorry, little fairy. Are you here to welcome the new visitors? As an apology, we'll heal you with Oronyx's magic.

C: 现在，不如就和我一起躺下来，放松地观赏风车们吧…睡着了也没关系，人家会端来面包，用热腾腾的香气叫醒你的。
E: Why don't we lie down and enjoy the windmills together? It's okay to fall asleep. Someone will bring you bread and the warm fragrance will wake you up.

C: 所以来自天外的{NICKNAME}，是不是也能算作一种「勇敢的水手」呢？
E: As for you who come from beyond the sky, are you also a kind of "brave sailor"?

C: 是呀。启程前行，远方的风景就真的触手可及啦。
E: Yes. Once the journey begins, those distant lands will be truly within reach.

C: 真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！
E: That's so fascinating! When you talk about it like that, I wanna go see it for myself! Hehe, but I'll want you to be the guide!

C: 拍照留影。
E: We took a photo.

C: 大家都为这个世界牺牲了一切，我也心系着他们的命运，想要尽快开启新的篇章。只是……
E: Everyone sacrificed everything for this world, and my heart is tied to their fates too. I want to start a new chapter as soon as possible. It's just that...

C: 我是说着玩的。
E: I'm just kidding.

C: 等了许久，外面都不再有说话声传来。你确信那位虔敬的信徒已经走了，正当你缓慢推开木马的活门，打算呼吸新鲜空气的时候……
E: You wait a considerable while until you hear no further sound from the outside. Confident that the loyal disciple had gone, you gently push the trap door open and go to take a breath of fresh air, when...

C: …你要去哪？
E: ...Where are you headed?

C: 我是不是在哪见过你？
E: Do I know you from somewhere?

C: 活火雀跃了一阵，随即默默燃烧起来。
E: The living flame flickered with excitement for a moment before quietly burning once more.

C: 我那时生气，只是因为你糟蹋美食。不过事到如今，的确也不必管那么多了。毕竟相比于礼仪，「填饱肚子」才是菜肴诞生时最初的意义啊。
E: Back then, I was only angry because you were wasting good food. But now, I suppose none of that matters anymore. After all, compared to etiquette, "filling an empty stomach" is the very first purpose for which a meal is made.

C: 我踏足那座偏爱大地兽的城邦时，风沙送来浓重的熏香味。彼时人们乘坐大地兽在砂石道上穿行，可他们并不满足，却希望大地兽能为他们分担更多忧愁。
E: When I set foot in that city-state, which favored the dromases, the wind carried the heavy scent of incense. At that time, people rode atop the dromases, traversing the sandy roads, yet they were not satisfied. They wished for the beasts to bear even more of their burdens.

C: 可在怪物逼近，符印即将聚拢时，涅柔娅祭司却将我推进了密径之门，自己完成了最后的校准……
E: But as the creatures closed in and the sigil was about to converge, Priestess Nereia pushed me through the Hidden Passage's gate, completing the final alignment herself...

C: 还是别烦它了。
E: Just leave it alone.

C: 不过我们会在安全的基础上进行开辟，不会急于求成，这点你可以放心。
E: However, we will proceed with safety as our top priority. We are not in a rush. Don't worry.

C: 若你沐浴阳光的温暖时，有幸瞥见太阳的雄姿，你会是什么感受？！
E: How would you feel if you get to see the sun whilst basking in its warmth?

C: 空间站共计四方舱段，如今人手却只堪堪顾得上其中一隅，如此下去，何日才能达成「复兴宣言」所立宏远之计。
E: There are four zones in the space station. With our current capacity, we can only take care of one. If the situation persists, I wonder when we will achieve the objective we have set out in the Declaration of Revival.

C: 哦！又是一位迷失之人。不要担心，不要着急，我会为你指引道路。
E: Oh! Here's another lost soul. Don't worry. I'll show you the way.

C: 哎，总之，还是要注意安全。现在的情况，发生什么意外都不足为奇……
E: In short, please be careful. The way things are right now, anything can happen.

C: 只要能给我一个相同的机会，我一定也能在空间站留下属于我的传说……
E: As long as I am given the same opportunity, I'm sure I will be able to create my own legend on the space station...

C: 我没啥文化，不像是古恩看得明白愚人戏。我大半辈子都搞机修，和载具称兄道弟，老了也只会折腾点这个。
E: I never got a proper education. I wouldn't understand Fool's Play like Gunn does. My life's work has been all about repairing and handling machines and vehicles, and now that I'm old, that's still the only thing I do.

C: 没什么别的想问了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 一些还算有意思的奇物，一些没什么意思的人。
E: Curios that are mildly interesting and people who are utterly boring.

C: 哎，说来也是，试问谁会不喜欢歼星舰呢？
E: Now that I think about it, it's understandable that people are not willing to sell theirs. After all, who doesn't love a starnought?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 啊，是你！我记得你，就是你将我送到那个可恶的传送装置里的，害我脸着地，疼了好久！
E: Ah, it's you! It was you who sent me to that wicked teleporter! Because of you, I landed on my face and suffered for a long time!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你的名字是随机生成的吗？
E: Is your name randomly generated?

C: 我敢保证，世界上没有任何武器可以击破这面盾牌——您要是不信，大可以试试！
E: I dare guarantee that no weapon in this world can shatter this shield — feel free to test it out, if you don't believe me!

C: 覆灭前的阿卡索斯，与现今被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯，是否为同一物？
E: Are the Icatus that existed before its destruction and the Icatus that has now been devoured by the black tide the same thing?

C: 既然这位智者愿意加入讨论，我们就来选个直观而深奥的论题。阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我先退让一步，将确定论题的权力交付你。
E: As this wise one has seen fit to join us in debate, let us select a topic that is both intuitive and profound. Parmenides of Icatus, I shall step back and pass the rights of topic selection to you.

C: 要是它在空间之内存在，那么它必然有固定形状。它是圆形的、方形的、和现在的阿卡索斯城相同的，还是奇形怪状，根本无法被度量？
E: If it exists in space, then it must have a physical form. Is it circular? Square? Is it the same shape as Icatus is in currently? Or is it another obscure shape that cannot be measured?

C: …啊，是你呀年轻人。抱歉啊，今天我有些急事，暂时不开张啦……
E: ...Ah, it's you there, youngster. Sorry, but I have something urgent on today, so I'm not opening up for a while...

C: 得到这个信息后，德墨忒尔婶婶再次拜托了几个冒险家去寻找，结果…真找到了和梦境里极其相似的地方…没有人的、临时搭建起的营地。
E: Once she heard about this, Aunty Demetria asked a few more adventurers to go find them, and... they really did find a makeshift camp jury-rigged together just like in the dream... but with nobody in it.

C: 做好事，我义不容辞。
E: I am duty-bound to do honorable things.

C: 应该没什么疏漏。
E: I think that covers everything.

C: 鹰血红极为罕见，少有的存世珍品也多作为悬锋族人的传家宝，不会出现在普通奥赫玛守卫手上。
E: Eagleblood is very rare, and the rare extant treasures are mostly safeguarded by Kremnoans, so there's no way it'd be in the hands of an ordinary Okheman guard.

C: 遵…遵命，夫人。
E: Y—Yes, ma'am.

C: 逃跑我还没输过！
E: I have never failed to escape before!

C: 我听奥赫玛的人们说，您能使用欧洛尼斯的神力……
E: I heard the people of Okhema say that you can use Oronyx's divine power...

C: …谢谢。你不在这里的时候，我也会尽量和{RUBY_B#比如旁边那位}其他有识之士{RUBY_E#}一起行动。「逝者只能停下脚步，但生者还必须前行。」
E: ...Thank you. When you're not here, I'll try to act with {RUBY_B#the person beside me}other smart souls{RUBY_E#}... "The dead can only stop, but the living must move forward."

C: 啧…真是个棘手的家伙，得赶快将新的调查结果汇报上去。
E: *Tsk*... he's more trouble than we thought. We should report these new discoveries at once.

C: 嘶…不好意思，我现在身上只有这些，但之后回了奥赫玛，你要是有什么需要都可以找我帮忙！
E: S—Sorry... it's not much, but once I'm back in Okhema, just name your price!

C: 黑潮怪物…别动我们的藏书…！
E: Beasts of the black tide... I won't allow you to touch our collection!

C: 上次教给你的浪漫情话有效果吗？
E: Did that sappy spiel I taught you last time work at all?

C: 但容易把消息刷走……
E: But it's too easy for it to get spammed away by other messages...

C: 从大地兽的这声嘶吼中，你听出了五分惆怅、三分无奈，还有两分对身旁人类的不屑。好吧…就算是为了赔偿金，你也得想办法搞清楚它的来历。
E: From its roar, you can hear five parts sorrow, three parts resignation, and two parts disdain for the humans nearby. Alright... even if it's just for the compensation, you'll need to figure out its origin.

C: 大地兽望向身后的悬锋族人，那是曾随它的主人出生入死过的战士。可无论如何用荣誉和尊严做包装，他们都是活生生的、会受伤会流血的人们。
E: The dromas turns to look at the Kremnoans behind it — warriors who had fought alongside its master. No matter how they dressed their wounds in honor and pride, they are still people who bled and felt pain.

C: 后来我才知道，那是我从未谋面的母亲！啊——！
E: Only later did I learn she was my estranged mother! Ahhh—!

C: 「我要…弑神！」
E: I want to slay the gods!

C: 我反对「他人决定论」，否则，你说我是猪，我就真的是猪了吗？
E: I reject the idea that identity is determined by others. Otherwise, if someone called me a pig, would I really be a pig?

C: …别扯那些了。你只是想说，埃德加应该接受惩罚，而伊俄无罪？
E: ...Enough philosophy. Are you just arguing that Edgar should be punished, while Eio is innocent?

C: 到了第二天清晨……
E: The next morning...

C: <size=28>爸爸才不会对自己的孩子冷眼相看！</size>
E: <size=28>A father would never greet his children with a cold shoulder!</size>

C: 伟大的天父刻法勒…
E: Oh, the great sky father, Kephale...

C: 那之后，柯库翁哭天抢地地把医师喊过来，其实只受了点轻伤这件事更是说不出口了。
E: After that, Glykon called for a healer, all while in anguish. That made it even harder to say that our injuries weren't severe at all.

C: 好了，孩子们，祈祷的时间结束了，记住天父赐给你们的回应了吗？
E: Alright, children, prayer time's over. Remember how the sky father replied to you?

C: 还有事，下次再来吧。
E: I have things to do. Come back another time.

C: 黯淡，却又星星点点。
E: The brew glimmers faintly, sprinkled with twinkling specks.

C: 瓦赫他…生前总是执着于借医学突破血肉之躯的极限，最后不得已含恨而终……
E: Vache spent his life looking for ways to push past the limits of the human body... but he met a bitter end.

C: 荣誉队员好笨！离这么远怎么可能抓得到星星嘛！
E: You're pretty stupid for an honorary member! How can you grab stars from so far away?

C: 帕姆…帕姆……
E: Pom-Pom... Pom-Pom...

C: 喜欢！
E: I love it!

C: 希望你能喜欢……
E: Hope you like it...

C: 老成持重的前辈。
E: A wise and cautious mentor.

C: 之前都太过沉浸于防卫科的工作，忘记休息的重要性了。
E: I was too caught up in Security Department affairs — I forgot how important it is to get some good rest.

C: 为啥？
E: Why's that?

C: 不算什么特别有趣的话题，都是航天技术相关的…只是我本来担心星槎的原理不好理解，没想到姬子一听就懂。
E: Oh, nothing too interesting — space flight technologies... I was worried that the principles of the starskiff would be hard for Himeko to comprehend — I never imagined she'd grasp it so easily.

C: 帕姆学会了吗？
E: Did Pom-Pom understand everything?

C: 不行不行，但我还是应该对自己有信心。
E: Ah! No, no — I need to believe in myself!

C: 我好像又看到希拉了。
E: I think I saw Sheila again.

C: 又见到你了…除了星神…我了解的知识并不多……
E: We meet again... I don't know much about anything apart from the Aeons...

C: 你的动作好像被精心设计过…
E: The way you move seems to be deliberately designed...

C: 最开始来到空间站的时候，我还多少抱有一些自我发展的规划。但是在做秘书的这段时间里，那些计划早就被磨灭得一干二净了。
E: I did have some plans for self-development when I first arrived at the space station, but those plans were all worn away during my time working as Capote's secretary.

C: 所以当他讲完自己的深刻反省以及对我的歉意之后，我一下子没能说出来一句话。
E: I couldn't even say anything when he stated how deeply he had reflected on himself and how sorry he was.

C: 也不知道是自己已经从那段过去中彻底走了出来，所以不在意他的回应；还是说从没想过他会道歉，所以真正听到的时候有些诧异。
E: I don't know if I've totally put that time behind me and didn't care about what he could have said, or I never thought he'd apologize and was surprised he actually did it.

C: 关于「勇气」这件事，我其实之前也很怀疑自己……
E: I don't know about being brave...

C: 往后，我还想常来列车上叨扰。希望那个时候，也能和老师们一起聊聊天、看看宇宙、吃些好吃的……
E: I think I'll be coming to the Express more often in the future... The next time I'm here, I want to have more conversations, watch the universe, and eat some good food together with all of you!

C: …当然，我会尽量不影响丹恒的，放心吧。
E: ...Don't worry, I'll try my best not to bother Dan Heng.

C: 决定了，我要去和列车长提意见，给你们改造一间训练房出来！
E: I've decided. I'm gonna raise the issue with the conductor and get them to put together a training room for you!

C: 那你之后可以试试看。
E: You should.

C: 对这个宇宙而言，资本必不可少——但假如世界上所有的事物都被资本收进囊中，那这个故事就一点都不浪漫了…你说是吧？
E: Capital definitely plays a critical role in the universe... but if everything in the world revolved around it, then life would be a lot less romantic... don't you think?

C: 吁…有鬼。别急，等我先派人去了解下情况。
E: Hmm... strange. Don't worry, I'll have someone check it out.

C: 我很喜欢盯着这窗外的宇宙看。这景象既迷幻又深邃，还夹杂着些许浪漫。
E: I really enjoy staring out into the universe. What a vast, mesmerizing, romantic view.

C: 我在想，这宇宙里是不是还有很多其它世界，处境和我们类似，甚至更糟……
E: I wonder... how many other worlds are out there in the universe? Are they going through the same struggles as us? Perhaps they're facing even greater challenges...?

C: 结果回过神来，我在家里待了三天，和平常做着一样的事情，然后假期就要结束了…不知道素裳和桂乃芬假期里在做些什么呢……
E: But then, before I knew it, I'd spent three days at home doing the usual things, and now my vacation is about to end... I can't help wondering what Sushang and Guinaifen are doing on their days off...

C: 出门的时候，我去「鉴爻轩」帮你算了一下「今日运势」。若月老板说你的转运道具就是这些亮晶晶的石头，我就带来给你了。
E: While I was away, I stopped by The Looking Bronze and had got your "Fortune for Today." Ruoyue, the owner, said these sparkling stones were your lucky charms, so I brought them back for you. They'll bring you good fortune.

C: 鲜花…似乎有些枯萎了。
E: Flowers... seem a bit withered.

C: 算不上友情。模拟宇宙项目结束后，可能我们就会分道扬镳…感谢黑塔在空间站对我睁一只眼闭一只眼。
E: I might not refer to them as friends — once the Simulated Universe project is over, chances are we'll part ways... but I'm grateful to Herta for always granting me some leeway on the space station.

C: 这不就是我平时的工作——「愚钝」是世界的顽疾，传播智慧便是在医治宇宙。
E: I often find myself addressing the world's seeming inclination towards ignorance. But sharing a bit of my acquired knowledge? Well, I suppose it's my modest contribution to the universe.

C: 今天终于踏上了星穹列车，我特别高兴…感觉就像回到了家一样！
E: But I can't believe I finally got to come aboard the Astral Express. It almost feels like home!

C: 哇，好复杂的构造……
E: Woah... it all looks so complex...

C: 咳咳！咳咳咳！
E: *cough* *cough* *cough*

C: 不过「检修身体」，也算是一个改造人的必修课了。
E: But body maintenance is a required class for cyborgs.

C: 可以…嚼？
E: You can... chew on them?

C: {NICKNAME}，非常感谢！
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you very much!

C: 在学习「断舍离」前，还是都买了吧~
E: I'd better buy them all before I learn how to "Detach and Declutter"!

C: {NICKNAME}，得亏你来了~
E: {NICKNAME}, great, you're here!

C: 小灰毛，别露出这么紧张的表情嘛。
E: Gray Hair, don't be so nervous.

C: 何止！有一次我戴着哀嚎面具，混进了他们的剧团。
E: Ohhh, I've met them, alright. One time, I wore a weeping mask and snuck into their troupe.

C: 这样啊…好可惜。不考虑考虑建一个么？
E: I see... That's a pity. Have you considered starting one?

C: 带了一点小东西。
E: I brought a little something.

C: 是啊，那些照片不仅记录着旅程中的点点滴滴。对于三月小姐来说，也是弥足珍贵的回忆。
E: Yes, those photos are not just ordinary records of her trips. To Miss March, they are dearly precious memories.

C: 希望这次占卜能对你有所帮助。不过，运势占卜的结果仅供参考，只能作为当下的建议。可不要让自己陷入思维的怪圈哦~
E: I hope this divination was of help to you. Of course, the results of this fortune-telling are merely a reference — nothing more than suggestions for now. Do not become trapped in your own thoughts.

C: 如此纯美的行为！看来你已彻底为纯美女神伊德莉拉的美名所折服！
E: An act of pure beauty! It appears you have been completely converted by the good name of Idrila, the Beauty!

C: …抱歉，这名单臂骑士的陨落令我有些失神。
E: ...Apologies, this one-armed knight's passing has left me somewhat distraught.

C: {NICKNAME}，你是否还在观察绒球装饰？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you still looking at the fluff ball ornament?

C: 说起来，列车上有专门存放兵器的地方吗？
E: Speaking of which, does the Express have a place specifically for storing weapons?

C: 是呀，列位恩公的服饰也极为好看。
E: Indeed, benefactor. Your crew's outfits are all very stunning.

C: 很久很久以前……
E: Once upon a time...

C: 小女子曾在匹诺康尼听说，有一家商会在失魂星域发现了珍贵的雷云闪玉，但迟迟还未出手。
E: While in Penacony, I heard that a merchant guild found some precious Cumulonimbus Flash Spheres in the Consternation Starzone, but they still have not sold those goods.

C: 感觉…已经…不会再爱了。
E: Feels like... I'll never... love again.

C: 咳咳，这位市民…没事的话请不要妨碍我工作。为了保证上下层区的正常连通，市政厅上下最近都在加班，我可没时间和你闲聊。
E: Ugh. Citizen... If there is no problem, then please refrain from obstructing my work. In order to ensure the regular connection between the Overworld and Underworld, Town Hall officials at every rank are working overtime. I don't have time for idle chatter.

C: 交出未妥投的信封•一
E: Hand over the Misdelivered Letter 1

C: 「行政区，六号街，三十五栋B<unbreak>03</unbreak>室，卡隆•艾尔收。」
E: "Carlo Eyre, B<unbreak>03</unbreak>, Building <unbreak>35</unbreak>, 6th Street, Administrative District."

C: 哎，我打算再研究研究遣词排句的技巧。你有事找我吗？
E: Need to put more work into honing my rhetorical skills. How may I help?

C: 我想再深入了解你的房源。
E: I'd like to know more about these properties.

C: 行行出状元，换个工作吧。
E: No need to stick to one career path. How about doing something else?

C: 我们店里的花朵，花型各不相同，价位也不一样。在这个时节有好几种花都开得相当不错，在我们这儿也很畅销。
E: We have all types of flowers at different prices. There are several types that bloom quite well at this time of year—those are the bestsellers in our shop.

C: 没有哦，目前还没培育出什么新品种。不过最近的雪小了很多，气温也有所回升，有些花开得特别灿烂——这不，店里正准备搞些促销活动呢。
E: Nah. I haven't cultivated any new varieties, but we've had a lot less snow recently, and the temperature is starting to go back up. Some flowers have blossomed splendidly. It could be a good chance for the shop to put together some sales promotions.

C: 音乐剧还要配音？
E: Musicals need voice-overs?

C: 是个有意思的名字…啊，又随便评价别人的名字了，不好意思……
E: That's an interesting title... Huh? Why am I commenting on people's names again? Sorry.

C: 办公室内外的人都看我不顺眼，处处给我使绊子…真不知道我到底怎么惹到他们了！我只是在做分内的工作而已啊。
E: They don't like me and they're giving me a hard time... I don't know why they are like this! I'm just trying to do my job. That's it.

C: 干脆离开部队如何？
E: Why don't you leave the garrison?

C: 当然，这也多亏了{NICKNAME}你、佩拉长官，还有希露瓦小姐。能遇到各位真的是我人生中最幸运的事…非常感谢各位！
E: Naturally, it's all thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, Officer Pela, and Serval. Meeting you all was the luckiest break I've had in my life... I am so grateful to you all!

C: 这还用问吗？你以为我为什么加入「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」？
E: Of course not, otherwise why do you think I would have joined the association?

C: 凭我的实力，就应该去负责更复杂、更有价值的大案！那种案件才能体现我的价值！你懂我在说什么吧？
E: I should be in charge of more complex, important cases! That's where I shine! You know what I'm talking about, right?

C: 布洛妮娅大人声称可可利亚「前往了裂界的根源，以生命为代价守护了贝洛伯格」…但这是她一家之言，谁知道究竟发生了什么呢？反正也没有别的证人……
E: Lady Bronya stated that Cocolia went to the source of the Fragmentum and sacrificed herself to protect Belobog... But that's just what she is saying. Who knows what actually happened? There were no other witnesses after all...

C: 给我来份报纸。
E: Yes, please.

C: 嗐，话怎么能这么说呢！
E: Huh? No!

C: 吃喝拉撒、装备后勤，地底样样都缺。没有这些物资保障，你拿什么保卫自己的家园？那不就是空想嘛！
E: Food, water, waste disposal, logistics — it's a mess from head to toe in the Underworld. Without these basics guaranteed, how do you plan on defending your home? Why, it's just a daydream!

C: 孩子他爸最近回来得早，最近难得有几天清净日子，干脆加个菜好了。
E: My husband has been coming back early these days, and peace and quiet has been in short supply. Let's add another dish.

C: 你说这话是什么意思？难道你就不觉得激动吗？
E: What do you mean? Don't you feel excited, too?

C: 封锁之后，我只能靠矿场的生意过活——这虽然够我吃穿用度、也够给矿民开工资，但这下层区的经济环境说到底还是死水一潭，资金和物料根本流动不起来……
E: During the days of the blockade, I could only rely on my mining for work — and despite leaving me with enough money and my miners' wages, this Underworld and its economy are stagnant. There's no trickling down of funds or goods...

C: 你真是个冷血的混蛋！
E: You really are cold-blooded!

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}再见～！
E: Bye bye!

C: （不打扰她）
E: (Leave her alone)

C: 啊…这道菜已经改名成「风味肉冻」啦！这可是磐岩镇的特色菜哦，我强烈建议你尝试一下。
E: Well... I've renamed this Flavorful Jelly! This is a specialty of Boulder Town. Highly recommend!

C: 这个嘛…首先，肯定得要客人把古代遗物带到我这边来，对吧？
E: Well... First of all, people bring their relics to me, okay?

C: 是我把你从大矿区救出来的…
E: I saved you from the Great Mine...

C: 我们是刚从矿坑里出土的…
E: We were just unearthed from a mine...

C: 每天都去上层区？不累吗？
E: Wouldn't it be tiring to travel to the Overworld daily?

C: 来聊聊吗，希儿？
E: Care to chat, Seele?

C: 我原本以为，没了「星核」的祸害，这里的日子肯定会一天比一天好过。但现实和设想却差了好远。
E: I originally thought that without the Stellaron's destruction, life here would just get better by the day. However, the reality was far from how I imagined.

C: 老实说，我会感觉有点迷茫…到底该怎么做才能算是帮到了布洛妮娅，帮到了贝洛伯格的大家？
E: To be honest, I feel a little lost... what am I supposed to do to help Bronya and the people of Belobog?

C: 「在任何时候都能保持冷静的、批判性的思维方式，不被时而涌现的情绪蒙蔽，是身为将领最基本、却也是最难得的品质。」
E: "Being able to remain calm and maintain critical thought at any time, without allowing bursts of emotions to blind you, is the most basic, yet also the most rare quality of a leader."

C: 我只是想聊聊天…
E: I just want to chat...

C: 前阵子那件事也没让她消沉多久，这两天又转头和我一起研究她的传家宝盒子了。
E: She wasn't depressed for long after that last thing, and she's been working with me the past two days on her heirloom box.

C: 这下萨克雷露怯了呀，听人说，他被吓得两腿直打哆嗦，哈哈哈！
E: It scared the heck out of Zackery. I heard that his legs were shaking uncontrollably. Hahaha!

C: 曾经有一次，我见她工作繁忙，便提出替她处理某张报表。
E: There was once when I saw that she was swamped with work, so I suggested helping her finish up a report.

C: 如果有兴趣的话，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也可以在这里随意游览哦…！
E: If you're interested, {F#Miss}{M#Sir}, you're welcome to see the sights here too!

C: 克拉拉觉得…史瓦罗先生和大家说的「父亲」是一样的。
E: I think... Mr. Svarog is like what people call... a "father."

C: 经多次反复演算，克拉拉与本机关系，完全符合贝洛伯格文化中「家人」之定义。
E: After multiple calculations, the relationship between Clara and this machine is best defined as "family," according to Belobogian traditions.

C: 被剥夺尊严的人，凭惯性在雪中流浪
E: Dignity stolen, we drift now that it's snowing

C: 等我不耐烦了让你们全爆炸
E: Catch me when I'm mad and I'll explode — tick tock!

C: 至于哥哥嘛…他很勤奋，是个非常正直的人——要是他别那么担心我就完美了。
E: As for my big brother... He's hardworking and extremely righteous... I just wish he didn't worry about me so much.

C: 你和佩拉的关系？
E: What's your relationship with Pela?

C: …啊，没什么！史瓦罗大佬果然名不虚传，要打败他这个地底最强，果然我还是得勤加锻炼才行！
E: ...Ah, never mind! Svarog is indeed an awesome fighter! I guess I'll have to work harder if I want to best him, the strongest fighter!

C: （捏捏它的鼻子）
E: (Squeeze its nose)
...Arf?

C: 清爽的薄荷气息自你的舌根处晕开，滋润了你的喉咙和声带…感觉不赖，怪不得瓦尔特总是糖不离手。现在你准备好了。
E: A refreshing mint flavor bursts from the back of your tongue, moistening your throat and vocal cords... That feels great, no wonder Welt's always gobbling sweets! Now, you are ready.

C: 我没孩子。
E: I don't have kids.

C: 这个杂志上没说，只说了小编也感到很好奇。
E: The magazine doesn't say. It just says that the editor is also very curious.

C: 唔…我觉得覆夏竹更好。
E: Hmm... I think Summershade Bamboo is better.

C: 时候不早了，咱们结账吧。
E: It's late. Time to get the bill.

C: 不会是放我鸽子了吧？
E: Have they stood me up?

C: 听说那玩意不干净……
E: I heard that thing's somehow cursed...

C: 你是说被她当作压泡菜坛子石头的那个？角上尖尖的？
E: You mean the one she used as a block to press out kimchi? With pointed corners?

C: 好身手啊……
E: What a brute...

C: 哔——啵。祝你玩得开心，克拉拉的朋友。
E: Beep-boop. I hope you have a good time, Clara's friend.

C: 请随意参观。
E: Please visit any time.

C: 我专门找老人聊闲天。
E: I'm here solely to talk with older people.

C: 难不成…你是找我来聊天的？
E: Are you... looking to have a chat with me?

C: 博物馆里都有什么？
E: What do you have in your exhibitions?

C: 哈，这不是我的老主顾、兼贝洛伯格的名侦探{NICKNAME}嘛！你也来参观展览啊，真是好兴致！
E: Ah, isn't this my old pal, the famed detective of Belobog, {NICKNAME}? You're here to visit the exhibition as well? What an adventure!

C: 这位志愿导览员正卯足了全身力气，批判着尸位素餐的筑城者们，根本没有注意到你的存在。
E: This volunteer tour guide spends all of his energy in criticizing the Architects' sinecure ways and pays no attention to you.

C: …那会儿还没发现大矿脉呢。
E: ...We haven't even discovered the giant vein back then.

C: 我想了解你的工作。
E: I want to know more about what you do.

C: 当初建木生发的时候我起过一卦，现在我倒没再看过了。我觉得也不必再看了，没什么好惊奇的，既有生发，就必然会停止。
E: I divined when it sprouted, but I didn't bother to check again later because I didn't think it was necessary. Neither its sprouting or its sudden stop came as a surprise to me.

C: 哦对了，我是陈机铺的掌柜，连烟。说是掌柜，其实店里也就我一个人，小本经营。
E: Oh yeah, by the way — I'm Lianyan, manager at the Oldies Depot. And when I say manager, I mean I'm the only person there. It's just me and my small business.

C: 建木不再生发了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor no longer sprouts...

C: 那这顶多算《建木风云：前传》，故事都没讲完呢。
E: If that's the case, the title of the immersia should be Legend of Ambrosial Arbor: Prequel, since the story is only told halfway.

C: 十王慈怀！数学从未如此温情！
E: Oh merciful Ten Lords! Math has never felt so heartwarming before!

C: 你在等谁？
E: Who are you waiting for?

C: 你是做什么工作的？
E: What do you do for a living?

C: 你到底多大了？
E: How old are you?

C: 具体的我也不太了解，到目前为止都是爹娘替我包办的。
E: I'm not sure about the details. My parents have been handling that part for me so far.

C: 哎，这种大道理就甭提了，我耳朵都要听出茧子来了。
E: Enough with the life lessons! My ears are getting calloused just from all the "life lessons" thrown at me!

C: 我又不是为了长生来的。
E: I didn't come here to extend my lifespan.

C: 是啊。持明这一辈子，总得当个执事或者录事，尝尝当官的滋味吧？
E: Yeah. In one of our lifetimes, Vidyadhara have to serve as officers or clerks so we get a taste of what it's like to be a public servant, right?

C: 你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
E: Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?

C: 感谢您的谅解。
E: Thanks for understanding.

C: 我姐要推进的这项技术，叫做「太岁机巧」。名字只是暂定的，因为它其实不是那种会跑来跑去的「机巧」，而是类似玉兆那样的设备。
E: My sister wants to promote this new tech called Lucidum Ingenium. The name's not finalized yet because it's not really an autonomous ingenium. It's a small device more like a Jade Abacus.

C: 那还是不一样的，建木至少不会每天钻进神策府，拿一些很难通过的企划案找我耗一整天。
E: There are some differences. At least the Ambrosial Arbor doesn't visit the Seat of Divine Foresight every single day to pester me with proposals that can hardly be approved.

C: 都有哪些问题你不能答？
E: Are there any questions you can't answer?

C: 他白天和老夫学习，晚上疯狂地将白天学到的和想到的记录下来…老夫听说，他在回故乡的路上就死了。
E: He'd study with me during the day, then by night he'd frantically record notes about everything he'd learned and thought throughout the day... I later heard that he'd died on his way back home.

C: 这是我每天观察的结果，所以是「据我观察」。
E: That's just the conclusion I made from my day-to-day observations.

C: 我曾在最富庶的行星上目睹新的城市拔地而起…我也曾在最贫瘠的行星上与牧民一起劳作…我见过祖国每一颗行星的日出日落，也见过每一片大海的潮涨潮消……
E: I've seen new cities rise up on the richest planets... I've worked with nomadic herders on the poorest planets... I've seen the sun rise or set on every planet in my home system, and also the ebb and flow of every tide...

C: 嗯…你走吧，快些走，别把时间浪费在一个罪人这里。
E: Mmm, you go then, quickly. Don't waste your time here any longer with a criminal.

C: 你是做什么的？
E: What do you do?

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 要知道在咱们埃伊加，十二岁就能持有私人武装了。
E: Back on Aigaia, personal weaponry is legislated for ages twelve and up.

C: …我这人说话有些冲，老家的朋友说我要是不改，以后做不了生意。刚才我要是多有冒犯，请您不要介意。
E: ...I know I come off as rather aggressive, and my friends back home always remind me that this'll run me out of business one day. If I've offended you just now, please don't take it to heart.

C: 灾难发生之后我就悟了，世界上从来就没有什么「稳赚不赔的生意」，按照仙舟的俗语来说就是「时也，运也，命也」。
E: After the disaster, I came to realize that there's no such thing as a steady and stable business out there in the universe. Or as a common Xianzhou saying puts it, "It's a matter of time, luck, and fate."

C: 所以他想压价钱，我也奉陪。我还会比他更早拿到天舶司的批文，让他看看正经的行商都是怎么做的。
E: So if he wants to lower the price, I shall accompany him down. I'll get my documents from the Sky-Faring Commission approved before he does, too. That'll show him how a serious merchant gets business done.

C: 有些事情想问你。
E: There's something I'd like to ask you.

C: 您看，你需不需要——
E: Look, do you need any—

C: 虽说现在您用不着，但以后万一有需要了，指不定就有用到我的地方了，嘿嘿。
E: You might not need it now, but just in case there's some time in the future when I could help you out... haha!

C: 唷，这不是仙舟稀客嘛，怎么有时间有闲专程来太卜司视察工作呀？
E: Hey, if it isn't a sight on the Xianzhou. How have you found time to make a dedicated trip to check out the work of the Divination Commission?

C: 这我得向您道歉，是我不对。您来的不时候，我才批评完司内职场风气，气还没消退…是有些口无遮拦了。
E: Sorry, it's my bad. When you came, I was just beating up on our workplace culture, and I still hadn't cooled off... Sorry for running my mouth off.

C: 大人请慢走。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 今时今日这个态度可不行。
E: That attitude is completely unacceptable in this day and age.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 你是做什么工作的？
E: What do you do for a living?

C: 你平时都在忙些什么？
E: What do you usually do?

C: 这种无关紧要的事，没必要知道，也没必要打听。
E: There's no point in asking about meaningless things like that.

C: 哼，抱歉。但这不过是有话直说罢了。
E: Well, then I'm sorry for being real.

C: 至于是多远的未来，我未必看得到。
E: As for how far into the future... Maybe I won't even be around to see it.

C: 我只是路过，没有在看你。
E: I wasn't looking at you. I was just passing by.

C: 我在金人巷要待上一段时间，你要来便来，我随时都在。
E: I'll be staying in Aurum Alley for a while. Feel free to come back for a chat.

C: 上面的工作安排而已。上面让我去金人巷，我就去金人巷。
E: It's just a job from the higher-ups. They told me to come, so here I am.

C: 现在我对放生的理解深刻多了，最近的话…我在坚持放生「鳞渊冰泉」——就是矿泉水…还有日记本。
E: I now have a much better understanding of what it means to release things back to nature. As for now... I've stuck to only releasing Scalegorge Spring Water — you know, mineral water — and diary books.

C: 尝过以后就不会再有人来缠着你要旅游手信了，效果非常好。给自己省点事儿吧，旅行是一个人的放松，别让那些所谓的「人情世故」困住你。
E: Once they've tried it, they won't be pestering you for souvenirs anymore, guaranteed. I mean, come on, you're on a trip. Just relax and stop worrying about the "social obligations" back home.

C: 然后故事全部被你记住了。
E: And now you've memorized all the stories.

C: 客人要是感兴趣，也可以来我这里试试不会售卖的新品，就当是帮我一个忙，我也会给客人相应报酬的。
E: If you are interested, feel free to try my latest inventions that are not yet publicly available. Do me this favor and I'll make it worth your while.

C: 好嘞，下回再见。以后要是有什么修旧物、买二手、卖废品的需求记得来找我。
E: Alright, catch you next time then. If you ever need any old gadgets fixed, or if you want to buy and sell second-hand stuff, come find me.

C: 老板用上我这机巧鸟，<color=#dbc291ff>规划的线路越长，物流评分会越高</color>，要开始吗？
E: With my cycranes, <color=#dbc291ff>the longer the planned route, the higher the logistic score</color>. You ready?

C: 你能问到很多「标准回答」，但是它们不一定是你要的答案。
E: I can provide you with many "official answers," but they may not be the answers you seek.

C: 金人巷商会同事们经常来找我的，会给我带些小零食，都挺好吃的。
E: My colleagues in Aurum Alley often come to me and bring me snacks, and they are tasty.

C: 暂时没什么需要的了。
E: I don't need anything for now.

C: 请问这是什么乐器呢？
E: What is this instrument?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 这种时候，看着别人像活腻了似的，在满地的利刃上面倒挂金钩…这帮观众就一边留着冷汗一边产生了「活着」的真实感。
E: So they will watch others dance on the razor's edge... Such thrilling performances will refill them with the feeling of being alive.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「朱明」，匠人于此熔金铄铁，洪炉昼夜不停吞地吞吐烈焰，甲板上络绎不绝地运输着各式机巧。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Zhuming, on which countless craftsmen are busy melting metals and forging their masterpieces. The ship's blast furnaces are smoldering with flames, and various ingenia are constantly being transported on its deck.

C: 我给集团开发了很多热门商品～比如说仙人快乐茶口味的牙膏、燃茶口味的辣椒酱、可冲泡的苏打豆汁……
