E: Since then, I have developed many bestsellers for the Correctional Group, such as Immortal's Delight-flavored toothpaste, Flaming Tea-flavored hot sauce, instant mung bean soda...

C: 彦卿当然知道，自己年龄尚小，经验尚浅，吃些亏也是在所难免的…但是只要是彦卿未能得胜，不甘心就是不甘心。
E: Of course, I know that being young and inexperienced means taking some losses is inevitable... but I just can't accept it if I don't come out on top.

C: 素裳啊，有空多读点书吧。
E: Sushang, for your own good, you gotta hit the books a bit more!

C: 回答的很好，不过有些刻意。太卜大人明知故问，你此时若是假装不知道，拒绝的意图就太明显了，容易招来额外的工作量。
E: That's a good answer, but it sounds a bit phony. Since the master diviner probably already figured out the truth, pretending to know nothing would be too obvious an attempt to wash your hands clean. She's likely to arrange more work for you.

C: 目前「束形却邪阵」需要有人维护，捉拿岁阳是一回事，镇伏岁阳是另一回事。这份工作，对长生种来说也够煎熬的啊。
E: The Evil Binding Matrix currently needs someone to maintain it. Capturing heliobi is one thing, but subduing them is a whole other matter. This work is torment for a long-life species.

C: 哪里哪里，多亏了{NICKNAME}大人的福，现在心情好多了。
E: Don't be silly, you've really lifted my spirits, {NICKNAME}.

C: 十王司的性质比较特殊，这个你也清楚。它司掌仙舟人的生死，职责实在是太重大了。
E: As you know, the Ten-Lords Commission is a rather unique place. It has a vital duty of administering Xianzhou people's lives and deaths.

C: 无法回答。金人勾魂使四卅七号向你致歉。
E: Answer not found. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> sincerely apologizes for it.

C: 没什么事，下次见。
E: That's all. See you next time.

C: 具体来说，就是从面料和颜色入手，选那些亲肤材质、中性色调的衣服，比如羊绒材质的、黑棕杏三类色泽的衣物。
E: To elaborate, when it comes to picking fabric and color, pick items that are skin-friendly and of neutral tones, such as wool-made ones, in colors like dark, brown, and almond.

C: 建木的事，现在总算平息了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor crisis has finally come to an end...

C: 这不是玉器珠宝商店吗？
E: Isn't this a jade jewelry store?

C: 「咕咚」一声，这铁皮彪形大汉就倒在地上昏迷不醒了。
E: With a "thud," the towering iron-skinned figure fell to the ground, unconscious.

C: 今日惠风和畅，很适合试试应季新芽的「狩原毛峰」，这茶我们店里从来不敢怠慢，要求上午采，下午制；下午采，当夜制…保证客人喝到最新鲜的。
E: There's a gentle breeze today, so it's a good time to try our fresh Hunter Maofeng which is in season. We never neglect this tea in our shop, making sure we pick fresh leaves every morning for the afternoon's brew, and afternoon leaves for the evening... ensuring you only drink the freshest.

C: 不过按照茶馆的规矩，还得先问问客官的口味，您是喜欢喝茶汤浓的，还是喜欢喝一些清淡的呢？
E: But in this teahouse, we like to ask the customer's preference. Do you like your tea thick and strong, or mild?

C: 来，这个送给你，这是我在外面旅行时发现的东西。不过，你可能见过很多类似的东西了吧。
E: I'll give you this: Something I found while traveling outside. Though, you must've seen plenty of these.

C: 坦白说，我觉得和那些短生种的旅行家比起来，我去过的地方绝对谈不上特别多。毕竟长生种离开仙舟并不是很容易。
E: Frankly speaking, compared to travelers with short lifespans, I don't think I've been to that many places. It's hard enough for long-life species to leave Xianzhou as it is.

C: 你别以为我没听说过，他们全都是些祸害银河的坏东西。
E: Don't assume I don't know about them. They're all bad eggs who bring doom to the cosmos.

C: 嗯嗯。如果有什么适合我的外驻工作，记得推荐给我哦。
E: All right then. Don't forget to drop my name if you find any interstellar work suitable for me.

C: 建木生发又静止，真是神奇。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor grew then stopped. It's a miracle.

C: 你见过帕忽热里克的铬树林吗？参天大树似的铬柱，像真正的树林一样遮天蔽日。而且那可是真正的自然造物，真正的鬼斧神工！而不是什么莫名其妙的星神遗产。
E: Have you been to the chromium forest in Pakhurik? Towering chromium pillars that resemble massive trees block out sunlight like the canopy of a real forest. That forest is a fantastic creation of nature, a true miracle of the world! Instead of some mysterious legacy of an Aeon!

C: 我不太愿意在这里说自己是一个厨师。毕竟，是个人、会烧水就能在星槎海做厨师。
E: I don't really like telling people I'm a chef here. I mean, you can get a cooking job at Starskiff Haven as long as you have a pulse and know how to boil water.

C: 所以我想到了一件事——虽然我在仙舟上是个糟糕的丹士，但是在异世界里生活的话，我有着便利的玉兆，还有些做药本事，我还会平平无奇吗？
E: So I thought of something — I was a terrible alchemist on Xianzhou, but if I lived in another world, with my trusty jade abaci and talent in medicine, would I still be mediocre?

C: 想听你聊聊异世界经历。
E: I want to hear your stories of other worlds.

C: 没错，俗话说「太卜司有三不占」嘛！
E: Yep! As the saying goes, "the Divination Commission has three taboos"!

C: 隔着洞天，狮子是怎么过来的？
E: How'd the lion come over with a delve in between?

C: 您的理解能力可真是高啊。
E: Your ability to comprehend things really is incredible.

C: 要问我的话，就选鳞渊春。
E: If you ask me, Whale-Tide Spring's the best.

C: 鳞渊春是吗，稍等，让我查一查茶饮典故。
E: Whale-Tide Spring? Hold on, let me look up some good quotes about tea.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}也和我一样是个化外民吧。虽然话说的倒也没错，不过这样做实在是有伤风雅。
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you're an Outworlder just like me. You're not exactly wrong, but it's really quite rude.

C: 你别看咱小小年纪，咱可是经历过旱灾涝灾的！冬生可厉害了，三天不吃饭也饿不着。
E: I'm young, but I've lived through plenty of droughts and floods! I'm so awesome that I can go for three straight days without food!

C: 后来，也有很多很多其他地方的人跑来找神仙姐姐治病。他们走了很远很远的路，就是为了求神仙姐姐的一副仙药。神仙姐姐也从不让他们失望。
E: Then, lots and lots of people from other places came to see her for their issues. They'd walk for so long just to get medicine from her, and the celestial lady never disappointed them.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，又见到你啦！是有什么事要找咱吗？
E: {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, we meet again! What can I do for you this time?

C: 你别看很多人说自己可以待在家里大门不出、二门不迈，要是没有快递和外卖，你说他能待得下去吗？绝对待不下去的。
E: Don't listen to all those claims about being able to stay indoors here. Without courier deliveries, do you really think anyone could stand staying in? Nobody could.

C: 唔…是有点拗口，也许可以更顺口一点…有了！
E: Hmm... you're not wrong. Maybe there are other names that could roll off the tongue a little easier.

C: 你看这天舶司里，有很多喜欢用「加班来表明自己很努力」的人，到了下班时间偏不离开，宁愿磨磨蹭蹭到很晚才走，还以为自己很辛苦。
E: Just look around the Sky-Faring Commission — many love working overtime to prove their efforts. They refuse to get off on time, preferring to dawdle away till late at night. They even think themselves hardworking.

C: 没别的事了，我先走啦。
E: That's all. I'll take my leave now.

C: 你还见过我之外的「筑城者」吗？这也不奇怪，已经更多的人认识到了「存护」的重要性，并且加入其中。
E: Have you met any of the other Architects? Well, it's nothing new. Many people have realized Preservation's importance and joined.

C: 这位朋友请留步！嘿嘿，我观察你半天了，想看哪一场比赛啊？想看星际和平公司的大机甲吗，还是说仙舟剑阵竞演？
E: Wait up, friend! Heh-heh, I've been observing you for some time. Which match do you want to watch? Are you interested in the IPC's gigantic mech? Or perhaps the Xianzhou's sword contest?

C: 你这是什么话？我要求你立刻向彦卿大人道歉！
E: How dare you? Apologize to Master Yanqing immediately!

C: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}又见面了，这次是来买苏乐达的么？
E: We meet again, {F#miss}{M#mister}! Up for a bottle of SoulGlad today?

C: 我打价格战？真的假的。
E: A price war? Are you sure that would work?

C: 四百多少年？
E: Specifically?

C: 好贵啊…
E: That's expensive...

C: 先来第一个问题，你知道之前飞霄将军大破步离人阴谋的事吗？
E: Let's start off with this: Do you know of the incident whereby General Feixiao foiled the borisin's nefarious plans?

C: 哎，这个嘛，只是在真实内容上稍微增加一点点故事性而已。
E: Eh, I'm just embellishing the truth a little.

C: 大家都知道我是编的故事，但是大家就是想看——你明白了吗？这和小说其实也没有太多差别了，那也不必换行了。
E: Everybody knew the article was a lie, but they couldn't help but want to read it. You see what I mean, don't you? This isn't actually that different from writing novels. In that case, there's no point in a career switch anymore.

C: 「敌人的丑闻」？
E: "Enemy's scandals"?

C: 你的老家是个什么样的地方？
E: What's your hometown like?

C: 如果我是为了温饱而乞讨，那就永远也不是一个…「大丐」？正因为我可以选择「不乞讨」，「乞丐」才谈得上是一种生活方式、一种职业选择、一种毕生志业！
E: If I begged for lodging and food, I'd never become a... grand beggar? It is because I can choose not to beg, that being a beggar is a way of life, a profession of choice, and a lifelong pursuit!

C: 只要不涉及敏感问题，我都会尽力解答。
E: As long as it doesn't involve sensitive questions, I'll answer the best I can.

C: 少喝点儿甜水，全是糖。
E: You should drink less tea, as it's so sugary.

C: 我兄弟在公司的工业世界干活，一天要工作四十二个小时。
E: My bro works <unbreak>42</unbreak>-hour days at the industrial zone.

C: 还是很可怕啊！让不让人活了？
E: That's still too much! Can't they let people live a little?

C: 那不就成了公司的演武仪典吗？
E: Wouldn't that make the Wardance the IPC's?

C: 等「竞锋舰」开放登舰…
E: When the Skysplitter is open for boarding...

C: 我都等不及咧！
E: I can't wait!

C: 背后偷袭，欺诈暗算，群而攻之，用各种随手可得的器械，用你能想象到的所有街头混混打架的招式、野路子，用最系统性的方法进行总结。
E: Backstabbing, underhanded tactics, ganging up on opponents, weaponizing anything you pick up, any sort of street brawl tactics and unorthodox methods you can think of in the most systematic manner.

C: 先聊到这儿吧。
E: Good chatting with you.

C: 我与你棋逢对手，是一生的宿敌，当然满意了。
E: You and I are evenly-matched rivals, lifelong nemeses... Of course I'm happy.

C: 我在魔阴身里感受到一种接近于疯狂的生命力，我想想该如何解释于你，就像是野兽之于人类，他们遵循直觉行事，以生存为第一准则，超越了道德伦理。
E: While inside the mara-struck body, I felt a vitality that is close to madness. How can I explain it to you — just like beasts are to humans, the mara-struck acts according to intuition and prioritizes their own survival over morals and ethics.

C: 滚一边去，别烦我。
E: Get lost and don't bug me again.

C: 要是你在品茶、阅读、弹琴的话，可以试试清雅甘甜的香。我听说列车领航员姬子女士喜欢泡一杯咖啡看看书，这类香就比较适合。
E: If you're enjoying tea, reading, playing an instrument, or other similar activities, you might want something with a lighter, sweeter fragrance. I hear that the Express Navigator Himeko enjoys reading with a cup of coffee. I imagine this kind of incense would be more suitable for her.

C: 我要寻得卜者最想要的解答，来告慰那人的在天之灵。
E: I want to find this answer, this most sought-after of all answers for us diviners, to appease that person's spirit.

C: 可是还没分胜负！
E: But we haven't got a winner yet!

C: 要是卜者们结果不同呢？
E: What if diviners reach different conclusions?

C: 还挺有节奏感…
E: It's quite rhythmic...

C: 总之这不是什么好事。
E: Anyway, it doesn't bode well for anything.

C: …可我都是成年人了啊！仙舟的法律真严格啊。
E: ...But I'm an adult! Xianzhou law sure is strict.

C: 没有事比得过这种感觉…
E: Nothing else beats this feeling...

C: 哎，码头还没彻底恢复运作，咱们就来上班了。
E: *sigh* The docks hasn't even fully resumed operations yet, but here we are, working.

C: 哎，你还小，因为万物终有尽头…这种事情你得长大了才会明白。
E: *sigh* You're still a little kid. All things come to an end... You'll only understand it when you're older.

C: 请小心行事，不要乱走
E: Please be careful and don't wander around.

C: …答对了，不过你本来知道答案。
E: ...Correct, but you already knew the answer.

C: 看来这是个体差异，人与人之间的鸿沟。
E: Looks like it's just individual differences — a gulf between people.

C: 悬锋的字典还在变薄。
E: Kremnos's dictionary keeps getting thinner.

C: 恭敬不如从命了。
E: Your wish is my command.

C: 的确，没有人知道明天会发生什么，也没有人能保证明天会变得更好。
E: Indeed, no one knows what tomorrow will bring, and no one can guarantee that tomorrow will be better.

C: 如果，小小灰想我们了，就捏一捏，娃娃吧！
E: If you ever miss us, just give the doll a little squeeze, Little Gray!

C: 此美称我构思了很久。你既是救世主，亦是这段故事的主角。一石二鸟，岂不合适？
E: I've pondered this title for quite a while. You're both the Deliverer and the protagonist of this story. Killing two birds with one stone. Isn't that fitting?

C: 你好，开山者，我是开拓者。
E: Hi, Mountainbreaker, I'm the Trailblazer.

C: 他希望「凯撒」输吗？
E: Does he want the Imperator to lose?

C: …呵。我从你的眼神里看出，这个问题你很早就想问了，小灰鱼儿。
E: ...Heh. I can see it in your eyes. You've been wanting to ask that for a while now, Little Gray Fry.

C: 值得铭记的东西…小灰鱼是打算把它带去天外之海吗？也好……
E: Something worth remembering... Little Gray Fry, do you plan to take it to the sea beyond the sky? That works too...

C: 灰宝，欢迎你！不过抱歉，我得先为二位伤者看诊，恐怕你得自己照顾自己一会儿了。
E: Welcome, Grayie! But I need to attend to the two patients first, so you'll have to take care of yourself for a while.

C: 飞、飞宝是什么！
E: Wh—What!? Ciphie?

C: 他太爱了。
E: He's way too into it.

C: 既然如此，也不必再勉强。看来这瓶珍酿，只能由我们享用了呢，小灰鱼儿。
E: Well then, no need to force it. Seems this fine vintage will just have to be enjoyed by just us alone, Little Gray Fry.

C: 不过听着他们争吵，好像又回到了那段逐火的时光。不知多少个夜晚，正是这些嘈杂的声响，和篝火一同伴着我们入睡。
E: But listening to their bickering takes me back to those days of Flame-Chase. On countless nights, these noisy sounds lulled us to sleep along with the campfire.

C: 要不这样，不如你把我也关起来吧！
E: How about this, why don't you lock me up as well!

C: 就你还大艺术家，那大艺术家怎么进这来？
E: A famous performer? Then what's a famous performer doing in here?

C: 你说智械能修炼内功吗？
E: Can Intellitrons practice inner cultivation?

C: 但即便石门也无法掩盖另一侧漾动的水声...仿佛某位控驭水体的神明曾被镇压在此。
E: But even a door of stone cannot conceal the sound of water sloshing on the other side... It is as if a god that reigned over water is sealed here.

C: 从犯人的心跳频率到囚室内的空气密度，系统对古海底部的管控细致入微。重刑犯的拘束容不得一点偏差，任何错漏，都将酿成一场无妄之灾。
E: From the heartbeats of the prisoners to the density of air within the cells, the system's control over the bottom of the ancient sea is meticulous down to the finest detail. There cannot be the slightest mishap with regard to the captivity of criminals who have committed serious offenses, for the slightest error could result in an unforeseen calamity.

C: 根据司狱所说，曾有无数犯人尝试逃狱来到石门前想要通过这里离开幽囚狱——然而事实上，「石门」只是徒有其表，这门后没有通路，只有坚硬的海底岩石……
E: According to the Jailer, countless criminals have come to the stone door and attempted to escape the Shackling Prison through it. However, this stone door is merely a facade. The door leads to nowhere but hard rocks at the bottom of the sea...

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 年代不明
E: Period unknown

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 年代不明
E: Period unknown

C: 普通的卷轴，没有记载自过去到未来的一切记录。这意味着阅读其内容毋须支付任何代价——不会瞎，不会发疯，更不会失去生命。
E: It is an ordinary scroll without any record of the past or the future. You do not have to pay any price for reading it — you won't go blind, lose your mind, or be killed.

C: 全剧终。
E: The end.

C: 那*鸟类粗语*倒是发啊！
E: Well *avian swear word*, why don't you post 'em then!

C: 如果你提议在星穹列车的车顶也安装几门巨炮，不知道帕姆会不会同意呢？杨叔应该会投下赞同票吧，对此，你满怀信心！
E: If you suggest installing several mega cannons on the roof of the Express, you wonder if Pom-Pom will agree. Mr. Yang will probably cast a vote of approval — you're confident about this!

C: 找到你，就没有奖励吗？
E: I found you. Where's my reward?

C: 那么大的领导也来参赛？
E: Even the management is here to compete?

C: 报告组长！我有问题！
E: Reporting to the team leader! I have a question!

C: 现在大家都去演武仪典官网！
E: Everyone, please head to the official website of the Wardance!

C: 存护对纯美，期待！
E: The Preservation versus the Beauty, can't wait!

C: 多少有点感慨。
E: It's a bit emotional, after all.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「仙舟与星际和平公司的盟谊缔结于星历<unbreak>2022</unbreak>年。通过被称为『歌民』的行商民族引介，仙舟成为了泛银河贸易网络中的重要一员。」
E: "The alliance between Xianzhou and the IPC was formed in <unbreak>2022</unbreak> SC. The Balladians, a mercantile race, acted as a go-between and helped Xianzhou become an important member of the pan-cosmic business network."

C: 好像在哪里见过这个套路…
E: I think I've seen how this plays out before...

C: 你曾听说过，某些世界的树都是能言能思考的古灵，它们会在危急时刻苏醒过来，展现自然的伟力——这棵树是否也是这样呢？
E: You have heard of the myth about trees in some worlds being ancient spirits that can talk and think. They will awaken when there is a crisis and unleash nature's might. Could this tree be like that?

C: 一只带蹼的小手轻轻压在珍珠质地、半透明的晶壳上，若隐若现。你略带好奇地将手指放在这只小手上，隔着晶壳，彼此相对。
E: A small webbed hand can be faintly seen inside, lightly pressing against its pearlescent and translucent shell. You press your fingers up against the outline of the small hand, your touch only separated by the crystal shell.

C: 「寿考堂」售卖各种颜色相近、但药性不同的药丸。假使你闯入店内将不同药丸倾倒一处，模仿翻洗帝垣琼玉牌的架势将其混合，店主又该如何分辨？你不敢想。
E: Longevity Hall sells a variety of pills that are similar in color but have different pharmaceutical properties. If you were to storm into the shop and mix these pills together as if you're shuffling tiles in a game of celestial jade, how would the owner be able to tell the pills apart afterwards? You dare not imagine the outcome.

C: 那么身为仙舟人民的老朋友，面对这样一个危险的邮包，你准备怎么做呢……
E: So, as an old friend of the people of Xianzhou, what are you supposed to do when faced with such a dangerous package?

C: 身为对世间万物都充满好奇的开拓者，你毫无疑问应当——
E: As a Trailblazer filled with curiosity for all things, naturally you must...

C: 我是阿往，这位是阿来，今天给大家来一段相声。
E: I'm Forth, and this is Back'n, and today we're ready to tickle your funny bone with our crosstalk comedy.

C: 查看评书话本
E: Check storytelling script

C: 对哦，确实。
E: That is not untrue.

C: 看上去白白嫩嫩的…
E: They look pink and plump...

C: 他要和我合作开烧烤摊。
E: He wanted to open a grilled food stall with me.

C: 曾经，绥园里有不少传统艺人登台唱戏，被称作「戏子」。时移世易，如今，绥园里星火之精四处横行，它们登上戏台，被称作「戏精」。
E: In the past, several traditional performers, known as "drama actors," sang and acted onstage in Fyxestroll Garden. As things change over time, the Starfire Essences are now everywhere in Fyxestroll Garden. Whenever they go on stage, they are known as "drama queens."

C: 这一发现化作巨大的喜悦，转瞬就冲上了你的脑壳，仿佛一记重拳。
E: This discovery turns into overwhelming joy, and it rushes to your head like a punch.

C: 你一开始怎么不告诉我？出了事你担得起责任吗！
E: Why didn't you tell me from the start? Can you take the blame if something happens?

C: 匹诺康尼常见的自助推车，主打一个方便快捷、数量繁多。
E: A self-serve goods trolley. It is a common sight in Penacony with its convenience, speed of service, and ubiquitousness.

C: 这抹为惨淡光线所浸透的翠绿，并未能带来任何生机，反倒平添几许寒意。
E: This emerald green soaked in bleak light does not bring about life, but rather adds a shroud of chill instead.

C: 或许从前有一大家人围在这条桌前共进晚餐，但现在他们和桌子都不再完整了。
E: Maybe there was a big family who ate dinner at this table, but now both they and the table are incomplete.

C: 荧幕投出的冷光让房间显得更为孤寂，可你怎么也关不上它。
E: The cold light projected from the screen showers the room with even more loneliness. You can't turn it off no matter what you do.

C: 朋友，你喜欢悲剧还是喜剧？
E: Do you like stories with a sad ending or happy ending, my friend?

C: 果然！我就没认错，像您这样身份显赫的成功人士，简直就是茫茫人海中的明珠，到哪都能一眼看出来！
E: I knew it was you! A distinguished and successful figure like you always stands out from the crowd no matter where you go!

C: 我是逐梦客。
E: I am a Dreamchaser.

C: 万一被预料之外的人给翻找出来，那场面可能会很难堪哦。
E: If someone you least expect uncovers them, it'll be an awkward sight.

C: 相信我，家族可不是那么好骗的。
E: Believe me, The Family doesn't take kindly to lies.

C: 所有生活在匹诺康尼的人都明白，向一位皮皮西女性提出这种要求是极其无礼的行为。若非您先前的表现始终很礼貌，我都要怀疑是不是遇上了偷渡过来的罪犯。
E: All who live on Penacony know that it is extremely rude to extend such a request to a Pepeshi lady. If you weren't on your best behavior just now, I would've suspected you were some fugitive on the lam.

C: 你很确信，没有人能拒绝一只毛绒绒的可爱生物，更何况，它正挥动着又短又圆的前肢，似乎想给你一个小小的熊抱。
E: You're certain no one can ever resist a cute, fluffy critter — not to mention that it's waving its cute little stumpy arms at you as if to ask for a little bear hug.

C: 谛听从喉咙深处发出微弱的呜咽声，不住用头蹭着你的腿，像极了只刚被雨淋过的小狗。
E: The Diting makes a weak whimper from deep within its gullet and keeps rubbing its head against your leg just like a puppy drenched in a downpour.

C: 拍拍它的额头。
E: Pat it on the head.

C: 咳咳…我叫乌玛，是家族的新闻主持人。如果你经常关注路边屏幕，应该多少见过我主持的节目。
E: *Ahem*... My name's Uma, I'm a news anchor from The Family. If you keep an eye out on the roadside billboards, you ought to have come across a few of my shows.

C: 之前有条稿子，居然写起了知更鸟小姐的绯闻来，太离谱了！还好最后没有播出。
E: There was a draft they put out a while ago that actually mentioned the Miss Robin scandal. That's outrageous! Luckily it never made it to air.

C: 我的理想，只会动摇人们的安稳生活…真讽刺啊。
E: My ideals would only shake the stability of people's lives... how ironic.

C: 但我能责怪谁呢？这一切都是我咎由自取…我明白，我其实比谁都明白……
E: But who can I blame but myself for everything... I understand I brought it all upon me, and I know that better than anyone else...

C: 知更鸟，我亲手培养出来的好学生……
E: Robin, my student who I raised with my own hands...

C: 感觉像是虐待…
E: It feels like you're torturing them...

C: 脆筒…我的脆筒…呜呜呜——
E: Cone... My precious cone... Waaaaaah —

C: 嘿，这主意肯定能赚到大钱……
E: Hey, I'm sure I can make big bucks with this idea...

C: 每根线条都是一种超脱，每次落笔都能带我逃离这无趣的人生。
E: Every line drawn is a transcendence, and every time my brush touches the canvas, it takes me away from this uninteresting life.

C: 虽然「钟表匠」的成就举世皆知，但匹诺康尼中有关他真容的记录极少。这让我感到些许疑惑：如此伟大的「工匠」，在匹诺康尼里却见不到他的作品？
E: Though the achievements of the Watchmaker are known by all, there are very few records of his true appearance in Penacony. I just find this kind of confusing... Why are the works of such a great "craftsman" nowhere to be seen in Penacony?

C: 克劳克影视乐园。
E: Clock Studios Theme Park.

C: 无论如何——谢谢您，您的这番话对我意义非凡。
E: Either way... Thank you. This conversation has meant a lot to me.

C: 因为那是个恐高的皮皮西人——哈哈哈哈！
E: Because that Pepeshi has a fear of heights! Hahahaha!

C: 你瞧，我们爱他、人们也爱他——我的小先生啊，他将再也不会感到孤独、感到痛苦啦。
E: You see, we love him, and everyone loves him... My dear master will never feel lonely or miserable again.

C: 你靠得太近了！离远点，别影响我们演出！
E: You're too close! Stay away! Don't interfere with our performance!

C: 还有事，拜拜。
E: I have things to do, bye!

C: 但如果想搞纯艺术，就去艺术系吧！筑梦技术系不需要那么多务虚的人！
E: But if they just wish to focus on art, they should become artists! The dream construction department does not need all these unrealistic Dreamweavers!

C: 起初你不明白这究竟有何意义，但渐渐这段简单的、与周围气氛格格不入的旋律渗透你的皮肤、浸润你的神经、最终在你脑内晕开——
E: At first, the significance eludes you, but gradually, this simple yet out-of-place melody seeps into your mind, saturating your senses, and eventually unfolding in your mind...

C: 入梦须知已记录在您的梦境护照上，您可以随时查阅。
E: Please refer to your Dreamscape Pass for instructions.

C: 可爱。
E: You are cute.

C: 不过，去其他星球的时候还是得多加小心——千万别走到浴室里。
E: Still, we must be careful when visiting other planets and never enter a bathroom.

C: 您不知道吗？「谐乐大典」是家族每个琥珀纪都要举办的盛大庆典，届时，寰宇间的诸多明星将齐聚一堂，为赞颂{RUBY_B#希佩}神主{RUBY_E#}开嗓！
E: You don't know about it? The Charmony Festival is a grand carnival held by The Family in each Amber Era. It brings together numerous stars of the universe to herald {RUBY_B#Xipe}the Great One{RUBY_E#}!

C: 一位强大的绝灭大君带领着军团的先遣队迫临，黑云笼罩了整个星球，贝洛伯格的民众绝望地等待着末日降临……
E: The invasion is led by a powerful Lord Ravager, engulfing the entire planet in dark clouds and despair. The people of Belobog await their impending doom...

C: 你身在何方，伊德莉拉？
E: Where are you, Idrila?

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 叮！您目前已经睡眠1小时<unbreak>26</unbreak>分钟，剩余睡眠时间3小时<unbreak>04</unbreak>分钟。
E: Ding! You have slept for 1 hour and <unbreak>26</unbreak> minutes, with 3 hours and 4 minutes remaining.

C: 「我的极限，即是宇宙的极限！乌通蓬自动车。」
E: "I can reach as far as the universe's limits. Utopon Motion Maverick."

C: 看起来有点怪…
E: It seems kind of weird...

C: 送我去「黄金的时刻」。
E: Bring me to the Golden Hour.

C: 你在美梦里畅游的时候，偶尔应该能拿到一种<color=#dbc291ff>金色的钞票</color>，钞票上面还印着我的头像，对吧？
E: You do occasionally receive a kind of <color=#dbc291ff>golden banknote</color> with my face on it during your journey in the Dreamscape, right?

C: 滴~嗒！真正的好朋友才不会说这种话！
E: Tick... tock! If you were my true friend, you wouldn't say things like that!

C: 自从你来到美梦小镇以后，这里的气氛相比从前完全变了一个样！你贡献的「金表钞」让镇上的每位居民都能量满满，活力满满！
E: Since your arrival in Dreamville, this place has completely changed! The Clock Credits you contributed have brought energy and vitality to every resident!

C: 祝您一切顺利！
E: I hope you have a pleasant time!

C: 啊…我终究没法像真正的「铎音」那样，将告解者的苦恼尽数消化……
E: Ah... I'm ultimately not a true Bronze Melodia, and am unable to fully assuage all the burdens of those who confess...

C: 总之，欢迎你到处转转。只有人多起来，乐园才能更加兴旺嘛。
E: In any case, you're welcome to look around. Theme parks only get more prosperous with crowds.

C: 当然是自由万岁啦！
E: Freedom forever, obviously!

C: 或许在他的幻想中，他已经克服了重重困难，获得了自由、实现了梦想…
E: Perhaps, in his fantasies, he has overcome the obstacles to become a free man and achieved his dream...

C: 他甚至…博识尊在上…甚至妄图将我变为刽子手与帮凶！
E: He even... oh, by Nous... attempted to make me an executioner and his accomplice!

C: 我不顾一切地爬向厨房，抱起受伤的妈妈，飞奔到屋子外面。热浪没能烧灼我的皮肤，废墟也没能阻拦我的脚步……
E: Without hesitation, I crawled my way to the kitchen, carried my injured mother, and ran outside the house. The heat did not burn my skin, and the debris did not impede my way.

C: 皮皮西头顶的绒球开始不停摆动，仿佛飞行器的螺旋桨——要是速度再快一点，说不定他真能飞起来。
E: The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head starts swinging vigorously like the propeller of an aircraft. He might be able to fly if it spins a little bit faster.

C: 你简明扼要地为沃尔特解释了何为星穹列车、何为无名客。
E: You give Walter a brief explanation of the Astral Express and what it means to be a Nameless.

C: 我还有事，回见吧。
E: I have things to do. See you around.

C: 哦，你来啦？最近有没有什么新鲜事，跟我分享分享呗？
E: Oh, you're here? Do you have any new stories to share with me?

C: 我的朋友，看来你还不太了解这个美丽的小镇吧？
E: My friend, I see you still do not fully understand our beautiful little town?

C: 没问题，滴答！
E: No worries, tick-tock!

C: 故乡是个很神奇的地方。你出门的时间越长，逃得越远，反而在情感上才离它更近。
E: A home is a mysterious thing. The longer you leave it and the farther you roam, the closer you feel to it.

C: 那您饿了吗？要不来一份薯条圣代，垫垫肚子？
E: Then, are you hungry? How about a Potato Fries Sundae to fill your belly?

C: 我很喜欢，恐怕在整个梦境里，都找不到如此…有人情味的地方了。
E: I like it a lot! I fear there is nowhere else in the Dreamscape that you can find a place with such a... human touch.

C: …因为主人不爱它？
E: ...Because the master doesn't love him?

C: 有消息了再通知你…还是那个酒保？算了，就你吧，至少你不会给我太多压力。
E: Shall I let you know when I hear something... Or the drinksmith? Forget it, I'll talk to you, I know you won't pressure me too much.

C: 你看起来很开心。
E: You seem to be enjoying yourself.

C: …还是算了吧。
E: ...Perhaps not.

C: 这群人…明明信奉一尊「秩序」，却自以为自己的理想才是唯一的「秩序」。呵呵，可怜虫。
E: This group... They believe in the same Order, and yet they assume that their own ideal is the only Order out there. They're so pitiful.

C: 要来聊聊吗？
E: Want to talk for a bit?

C: 呃…原来宾客们都这么开放的吗？
E: Uh... Are all the guests this open-minded?

C: 你在这做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 既然你如此好奇，就告诉你吧。实不相瞒，正是本人，朋克洛德的超级骇客——「石剑」！
E: Seeing as you're so curious, I'll tell you who. The truth is, it was none other than me — the super hacker of Punklorde — Stoneblade!

C: 智慧生命的多样性，可真是让人大开眼界……
E: The diversity of intelligent life really is utterly eye-opening...

C: 苏乐达瓶放歪了？重新摆！场务有人在偷懒？狠狠骂！
E: Is there a bottle of SoulGlad placed at the wrong angle? Reposition it! Is one of the crew slacking off? Chew them out!

C: 哎，困在梦里的时间长了，反而变得有点向往安定了。
E: Ah, having been stuck in this dream for so long, I'm starting to long to settle down.

C: 我告诉你，他们的爪牙无处不在…可能在那儿！也可能在…那儿！无时无刻不在监视着、监视所有人…阴魂不散！
E: I'm telling you, their minions are everywhere... They could even be right here! Or maybe... over there! They are always watching, they're watching all of us... They linger around every corner!

C: 这是行为艺术吗？
E: Is this a performance art piece?

C: 你都有什么作品？
E: What works have you made?

C: 之前不是还夸他来着吗？
E: Weren't you praising him just before?

C: 她在这里度过了短暂而绚烂的一生，难道就要这样葬身于无底的时间之中，与荒蛮的迷因相伴吗？
E: She has spent a short and splendid life in this place. Is she going to be buried here for eternity in bottomless time, and be accompanied by nothing but savage memes?

C: 不过我不会放弃的，就像钟表小子从来不会放弃一样！
E: But I won't give up, just like how Clockie never gives up!

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 我想看看吃的。
E: I'd like to see the food.

C: 难得碰到外面的年轻人，你们现在喜欢什么样的食物？
E: Such a rare chance to chat with a youngster from outside. What kind of foods do you like to eat now?

C: 我想想…按照「故事情节」来说，这一章我该扮演「善良的折纸小鸟」，而你是「帮我寻回伙伴的好心客人」。
E: Let's see... According to the plot, I should be playing the kind origami bird in this chapter, and you're the kind-hearted guest who helps me find my companions.

C: 猫头鹰老师是美梦小镇的设计者，是钟表小子的老朋友，是折纸小鸟们的老师——当然，这只是动画故事里的设定。
E: Professor Owl is the one who designed Dreamville and Clockie's old friend. He's the teacher of the origami birds. Of course, that's just how it was set up in the cartoon's story.

C: …又怎么了？本鸟现在忙的很，有话快说啾。
E: ...What is it this time? I'm awfully busy, make it quick, tweet.

C: 啾？看来你已经找到所有小鸟了。
E: Tweet? Looks like you've found all the birds.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，<color=#dbc291ff>不久前来了个红头发的骑士</color>，有个小家伙被他迷得神魂颠倒，总是躲在一边远远望着他啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>A red-haired knight recently stopped by</color>. One of the birds is besotted by him, always admiring the knight from afar, tweet.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 嘿呀，硬派鸟即使没有帮助也能出色完成任务——啾啾！
E: Hi-yah, real hardcore birds are able to complete the task perfectly without help, tweet tweet!

C: 原来客官这么看重人家，等我把小家伙们找回来，一定陪您逛遍美梦小镇啾。
E: So you do really care about me. Once I round up those little ones, I'll be sure to accompany you on your tour around Dreamville, tweet.

C: 小鸟温柔地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird gently holds the token you gave it in its mouth, and then — swallows it whole!

C: 苏乐达的未来规划？
E: SoulGlad's future plans?

C: 惊梦剧团倒是见过不少。
E: I've seen plenty of the Dreamjolt Troupe though.

C: 如果遇到任何困难就来找我吧，我会尽己所能提供一切帮助。
E: Seek me out if you run into any difficulties. I will provide help any way I can.

C: 但在米哈伊尔离开的那段时间里，匹诺康尼各大家系之间的内乱让梦境世界遭受了毁灭性的破坏。
E: But during the period when Mikhail left, civil strife broke out among Penacony's Families, causing much destructive damage to the Dreamscape.

C: 祝你在梦中平安，{NICKNAME}。
E: May you be safe in your dreams, {NICKNAME}.

C: …但他的心绪表盘没有在你面前显现。
E: ...But his Emo Dial does not appear before you.

C: 我这边还有关于那个游戏的「纪念品」，如果你感兴趣，我们之后还可以聊聊。
E: I still have a souvenir for that game here. I can talk about it if you'd like.

C: 所以当我来到流梦礁，看到自己信仰被人贬低、侮辱、憎恶时，我十分愤怒，但当了解了这里发生的一切，我居然瞬间释怀了！
E: So, when I came to the Dreamflux Reef and saw that my own faith was derided, insulted, and hated, I was enraged. But when I understood all that had happened here, I was suddenly enlightened!

C: 你分辨不清他的表情，却直觉般感受到那平静之下的冷淡与挑剔。
E: Even though you can't place his expression, you instinctively feel a sense of apathy and criticism beneath his calm demeanor.

C: 我们相遇于她人生的末尾，那时她早已因丧失理智而深陷谵妄与幻觉。
E: I met her near the end of her life. By then, she had long since lost her sanity and sank into a mix of delirium and hallucinations.

C: 就是怀抱着这种可笑的想法，他从故乡出发，万分艰难地从一个星球流浪到另一个星球。
E: Armed with such a ridiculous notion, he departed his homeland and wandered from planet to planet, encountering many difficulties along the way.

C: 怎么没有偷窃检定？
E: What happened to the theft detection?

C: 「厨师向你展示今晚的牛排——
E: "The chef shows you the steak cut used for this evening —"

C: 美食分享中，似乎混进了些奇怪的情节……
E: It seems like some strange events got mixed into that gourmet food-sharing session.

C: 是的，我是一个好人。
E: Yes, I am a nice person.

C: 嗨嗨，别再盯着我了。招标的事得按流程走，公司的流程你懂的，一切公事公办。
E: Hey, could you stop staring at me? You know the bidding needs to follow the IPC's protocol. Business is business, after all.

C: 公司派我来这儿出差…这就是器重我的证明！
E: The IPC sending me on this business trip is a clear recognition of my value!

C: 叶子店长个头小小的，但是最讨厌别人说他矮了啾……
E: Although Shopkeeper Leaf has a small stature, he really hates it when other people call him short, tweet...

C: 让我想想…对了，有个特别爱做生意的孩子，估计又被<color=#dbc291ff>路边的摊贩</color>吸引了啾~
E: Let me think... Oh yeah, there's one child who loves doing business and probably got fascinated by <color=#dbc291ff>a roadside vendor</color>, tweet~

C: 我没什么想说了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 未来还长着呢，我看您模样还挺年轻的，年纪轻轻的就事业有成，颜值又高，总感觉船长您以后会成为了不得的大人物……
E: Ah, you've got a long future ahead of you, and you look pretty young too. With impressive accomplishments at a young age and good looks to boot, I can't help but believe that you'll become someone legendary in the future, captain...

C: 我想明白了，到我这个年纪，没天赋没钱的就别捣鼓音乐了，还是趁早转行吧。
E: I've figured it out. At my age, being penniless and with no talent to boot, a path in music probably isn't meant to be. I'm better off jumping ship early.

C: 比如说，基于我们皮皮西船员的生理构造问题，我们在某些大型器械的使用或搬运上就比较吃力。但装个高空作业装置就没问题了。
E: Take our biological build, for example. It can be tricky for us Pepeshi crew members to transport or operate larger equipment, but we can easily install an aerial work platform to get around the problem.

C: 这个都知道，你挺上道嘛！
E: You even know that slogan! It seems like you really know your stuff!

C: 这些老教授的年纪比我还小呢，怎么教育理念能这么落后？
E: These old professors are all younger than me. How could their teaching philosophy be so outdated?

C: 组委会那群家伙真没眼光。我的「梦想」和其他人的一样好…应该说，更好！
E: Those people on the committee really have poor judgment. My "dream" is just as good as any — if not better!

C: 你留意到这个古怪的人正在对着空气自言自语，便驻足欣赏了一会。
E: You see a strange guy muttering to himself, and you decide to watch him for a while.

C: 你？！咳、咳哼…来咨询实习机会的吧？这个时间已经晚了，好资源早就没了，之前和你们说过，对实习要上点心…
E: You...!? Ack, ahem... You're here to inquire about internship opportunities, aren't you? A little too late, though. The best offers have been snapped up. Didn't I already tell you guys to put in more effort for your internships...

C: 若是要跻身商界前列，与上流人士的联系必不可少。在交流中，那些人的知识与思维方式会自然为你所有。
E: You're going to have to interact with the highborn and the elite if you want to make it to the top in the business scene, and when you do, you'll naturally pick up the way they think.

C: 「活得一帆风顺的家伙」、「跋扈阔少」、「冷血无情的逐利者」……
E: The guy with the smooth-sailing life, the rich and bossy guy, the self-serving profiteer...

C: 比如老是来烦我的那家伙，要不是因为惹到他，恐怕他绝对不会和我有任何交集。
E: It's like that guy who is always bothering me. If I hadn't angered him, I fear he never would have bothered interacting with me at all.

C: 所以你的诉求是？
E: So, what is your request?

C: 我…真是没用啊！
E: I'm... so useless!

C: 啊？别把我和那种人相提并论！虽然…阻拦你们登台这件事，我也有责任，但他是为了自己的利益，而我是为了艺术！
E: Eh? Don't lump me in with those folks! Though... I am somewhat responsible for preventing your show too. But he did it for his own interests — I did it for art!

C: 但我觉得…甜品比筑梦更能诠释这种快乐，因为甜品的样子、触感、香气、口味，乃至它的所有存在，都会被食客全部享用……
E: But I think... compared to dreamweaving, desserts can much better express this type of happiness — the look, feel, taste, and even the existence of a dessert can be fully enjoyed by whoever eats it...

C: 我没什么想问的。
E: There's nothing else I want to ask.

C: 总、总之…如果想吃的甜品的话，欢迎随时来找我！
E: A—Anyway... if you want some desserts, you're always welcome here!

C: 我的…绒球？
E: My... fluff ball?

C: 无论有没有折纸大学的毕业证都没关系，只要继续做甜品，我就能让大家感到快乐——到时候你一定要来光顾我的店铺，好吗？
E: Whether I graduate from Paperfold University or not doesn't really matter. As long as I keep making desserts, I can bring joy to everyone. You must come to my shop next time when that happens, okay?

C: 有什么事需要我吗，{F#女士}{M#先生}？
E: May I help you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}?

C: 她离去时留下过一句耐人寻味的话语：如果群星也没有我所求的答案，那战略投资部…会是无家可归者最后的归宿。
E: She shared some intriguing words with me before she left. She said that if I cannot find the answer I seek among the stars, the Strategic Investment Department... will be the last refuge for the lost.

C: 「好好反思一下，你们和能进展柜的汽水，到底有什么不同？」，「生产日期。」
E: "Think about it. What's the difference between you and the sodas that get to go in the display case?" "Our expiry date."

C: 从这个视角看，一切都被缩小了，就连匹诺康尼十二时分内的一切建筑都像是棋子，令你心神激荡。
E: Everything looks so small from this angle. Even the buildings on Penacony's Twelve Hours look like chess pieces — this view gets your senses all abuzz for some reason.

C: 桌上散落着几本折纸书，这可能是匹诺康尼某个未竟的秘密工程，又或是一位忙碌的筑梦师随手丢下的草稿。
E: A few origami books are scattered across the desk. This could be one of Penacony's unfinished secret projects, or a draft casually left behind by a busy Dreamweaver.

C: 或许随着时间的流逝，这尊雕像会成船上的一个话题，进而演化成乃至一个传说。你不敢想象你在传说中会有怎样荒腔走板的事迹。
E: Perhaps, as time passes, this statue will become a topic of banter on the ship, eventually evolving into a fable. You dare not even imagine how absurd your story will end up in these tales.

C: 为什么会有你的记录？
E: Why is there a record of you here?

C: 欢迎到店垂询产品详情。
E: Welcome to our store. You can ask about anything.

C: 是啊，真晦气…
E: Yeah, what rotten luck...

C: 记得开滤镜啊。
E: Remember to turn on the filter.

C: 哇，都喷出来了诶。
E: Whoa. It's squirting.

C: 哼，有什么了不起？
E: Hmph, what's the big deal?

C: 这都在做梦了，怎么还有人吃零卡圣代啊？
E: We're in a dream now! Why would someone eat a zero-calorie sundae?

C: 噗嗤……
E: Pfft...

C: 终于见到本人了！好耶！不枉咱们在这里蹲了足足一个礼拜……
E: Finally, in person! Yeah! Staying here for a week is paying off...

C: 你、你再说一……
E: Y—You dare say it again...

C: 我来找家族借钱的。
E: I'm applying for a loan from The Family.

C: 朋友！没听说过我吗？
E: Friend! Have you not heard of me?

C: 我需要先考虑一下。
E: I need to consider this offer first.

C: 就快到了吧…
E: He'll be here soon...

C: 找人来修修吧。
E: Better find someone to fix it.

C: 这次的盛会巨星肯定是她！
E: I bet she'll be the superstar of this contest!

C: 姐你别说了，我要哭了。
E: Sis, let's drop it. I'm about to cry.

C: 那可不行，长远的事谁能说得准呢？这个价格有些虚高了。
E: That won't do. Who knows what'll happen in the future? This price is a little inflated.

C: 你有没有这种感觉，就是周围的一切都很不真实……
E: Do you have this feeling that everything around us doesn't feel quite real...

C: 呃，是有这么回事，但改期了……
E: Um, they were supposed to be, but there's been a change in dates...

C: 听起来不像真的，但在匹诺康尼，这倒合理…我倒是想换取未来的成功——唔，如果真的能达成，一切代价我都可以接受。
E: It doesn't sound true, but it ironically does on Penacony... I'd like to trade for some future success... Ooh, if I could really get it, I'd be willing to accept any price.

C: 你也一起来啊，哈哈…
E: Come on, haha...

C: 老古董，这是激光感应的。
E: You fossil. These are laser sensors.

C: 吹牛不打草稿…
E: You need to work on your bragging...

C: 在忆域死亡能报保险吗？
E: Can I buy life insurance for Memory Zone deaths?

C: 你最近有开单吗？
E: Have you made any purchases lately?

C: 我才是第一个！
E: No, I was here first!

C: 面子不能丢！
E: I can't lose face!

C: 你能不能现实点？
E: Can you be realistic?

C: 非常抱歉，夫人。
E: I'm truly sorry, madam.

C: 谐乐学院的人偶。还好教学楼不怎么熄灯，否则得有不少学生会被它们吓醒。
E: Charmony Academy's puppets. Good thing the lights in the teaching facility aren't ever fully turned off, or that'd be plenty of students scared awake by them.

C: 「笃笃笃——」你敲了敲屏幕，这里会有哈努兄弟钻出来吗？你感到好奇。但回应你的只有电视广告上烦人的罐头笑声。
E: "Tap tap tap," you knock on the screen. Will Brother Hanu come out from in there? You're curious. The only response you get is the annoying canned laughter from the TV ad.

C: 「今天该如何穿搭呢？」你显然没有这样的烦恼。
E: "What should I wear today?" Clearly, you don't have that kind of dilemma.

C: 很遗憾，这面镜子没有实装捏脸功能。
E: Unfortunately, this mirror doesn't come with a face-sculpting feature.

C: 你就是如此地热爱着文字，并且坚持认为每所学校都必须拥有自己的文学社。书籍是我们的精神食粮，在梦里当作真正的食物也没什么问题。
E: You love literature very much, and maintain your firm belief that every school should have their own literature club. Books are food for our soul, and they can even be used as actual food in the dream.

C: 娱乐向的。
E: Entertainment oriented.

C: 判官藿藿。随我去趟幽囚狱，身负「不赦十恶」的凶犯正等候受审。
E: Judge Huohuo. Please accompany me to the Shackling Prison. The criminal accused of the Ten Unpardonable Sins is about to be sentenced.

C: 通话到此结束。你不确定藿藿究竟是从梦中惊醒，还是被尾巴大爷给强硬拉了起来——毕竟这种梦话，要是不小心说出口可就糟糕了。
E: The call ends here. You're not sure if Huohuo was rudely awoken from a dream, or she was dragged away by Mr. Tail to parts unknown — it'd be disastrous if such somniloquy was accidentally spoken.

C: …不错，你提了一个值得思考的好问题。
E: ...Not bad. You brought up a question worthy of thinking about.

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: （打开音乐播放器）
E: (Turn on the music player)

C: 的确，黄金裔的光辉拽起了灵感的丝线，我对他们的神性之美顶礼膜拜，但我不得不承认这其中掺有不少现实的考量……
E: While the allure of the Chrysos Heirs inspires me and I admire their divine beauty, I have to admit that practicality also played a role in my choice of clients...

C: （选择不打扰，转身离开）
E: (Leave quietly. Do not disturb her.)

C: 就因为伏尔甘是个外来的山之民…他们甚至问我是不是受到了胁迫才嫁给他，哈哈。
E: All because Vulcan is an outlander, a Mountain Dweller... They even asked me if I was forced into marrying him, heh.

C: 别因为评分限制了你对美好的想象力！
E: But don't let a rating limit your imagination of what could be wonderful!

C: 我究竟是什么性格的开拓者？
E: What kind of Trailblazer am I really?

C: 哈哈，那真是太好了。作为受到刻法勒庇佑的圣城，奥赫玛并没有受到黑潮的影响，无论气候、环境还是生活节奏都非常宜人。
E: Aha! That's great to hear! This holy city, blessed by Kephale, remains unharmed by the black tide. Over time, you'll find that Okhema is quite cozy — that goes for the weather, the surroundings, and the lifestyle.

C: 正好你来了，异乡人。帮我想想。
E: Now that you're here, outlander. Help me with this.

C: 说说塞纳托斯的故事。
E: Tell me more about Thanatos.

C: （继续听）
E: (Keep listening.)

C: 欢迎来到云石天宫，客人。阿格莱雅大人交代过我们，要将您与您的同伴当作贵宾来接待。
E: Welcome to Marmoreal Palace, good guest. Lady Aglaea has instructed us to receive you and your fine companions as esteemed guests.

C: 我是来聊天的。
E: I'm here to chat.

C: 不用我说，你应该明白我来找你做什么了吧？要说神谕也确实算。汝将竖耳聆听，虔诚的「白银裔」啊——
E: Surely you understand what I'm doing here, no? I guess you may call this a moment of prophecy bestowal anyway. Pray perk your ears and listen, devout "Argyros Heir"...

C: 阿格莱雅女士的爱好？
E: What are your hobbies, Lady Aglaea?

C: 不过嘛，老头子看你有眼缘，倒是可以给你传授传授经验。来说说，你信仰的哪一位泰坦啊？
E: That being said, I can tell that you have fine taste. I can share some of my experience with you. Tell me, which Titan do you have faith in?

C: 我想知道未来的命运。
E: I want to know about my future destiny.

C: 你这什么态度…有这么做生意的吗？
E: What kind of attitude is that? What kind of business are you running?

C: 人们都说当{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}给你关上一扇门的时候，祂还会为你打开一扇窗……
E: They say when {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} closes one door, they always open a window...

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 没事，逛逛。
E: Nothing. Just browsing.

C: 没事，逛逛。
E: Nothing. Just browsing.

C: 我是一位「侍者」，在保证浴场内整洁的同时，也为有需要的客人提供服务。
E: I am an "attendant." I ensure the cleanliness of the baths while providing services for customers in need.

C: 抱歉，我也言重了。不必担心，这里是奥赫玛，于刻法勒的庇护下，即使我全盘托出，我们的生活也不会发生任何改变。
E: My apologies. That sounded threatening. There is no need to worry. This is Okhema, after all. Under the protection of Kephale, even if I tell you everything, our lives will remain unchanged.

C: 讲讲躺椅的选材吧。
E: Tell me about the materials.

C: 唉，也不知道这个黑潮什么时候才是个头。希望不会到最后让我连个睡觉的地方都难找。
E: Ah, I wonder when we'll be done with this black tide nonsense... If it keeps raging like this, I fear I will be left without even a place to sleep.

C: 「我要打十个！」
E: "I'll fight ten!"

C: 叮，叮，叮，大工匠正忙着锻造。
E: *ding* *ding* *ding* The Grand Craftsman is busy forging.

C: 想和你聊聊天。
E: I want to have a chat with you.

C: 下次再这样乱来，我就不捞你了。
E: If you get like this again, I won't be here to pick you up.

C: 我全想起来了！
E: I remember everything now!

C: 这天外之音来自雅努萨波利斯的动荡，人们享受着公正的庇护、门径的指引、天帷的启示…而当天秤失衡、门径闭锁、天帷隐没之时，那脆弱的希望便会化作绝望……
E: This celestial echo comes from the panic that spread across Janusopolis. People enjoyed the protection of justice, the guidance of the passage, the revelations of the veil... Yet the day the scale was tipped, the passage was sealed, and the veil went missing, those frail hopes were ground into cries of despair...

C: 作为探险家，我还是想要去寻找未知！即便得不到实际结果，我也想要证明，我的猜想是正确的！
E: As an explorer, I'm driven to seek the unknown! Even if it yields no practical results, I'm determined to prove that my conjectures are correct!
...Sure.

C: 我，执勤。再见。
E: I'm, on duty. Goodbye.

C: 讲讲你的故事！
E: Tell me a story about you!

C: 眼见两人又要为「真理」的定义争吵起来，你赶忙快步离开了现场。
E: Seeing that both of the men before you are hurtling towards another argument about the definition of "truth," you rush away from the scene as quickly as possible.

C: 这两者并不能简单等同。数学知识在没有人的世界中仍然能成立，可「阿卡索斯」呢？若是没有最初的那批建城者，这个城邦便会变得从未存在过。
E: You cannot equate these two concepts so simply. The truths of mathematics would still stand to reason in a world where humans never existed, but what of Icatus? If it weren't for its original builders, the city would never have existed in the first place.

C: 砂土多吃不健康，红土营养刚刚好——舔…这个味道应该是对的，呸呸呸。
E: Too much sandy soil isn't good for them. Redsoil has just the right nutrients... *licks* Hmm, this taste seems right... ptooey.

C: 讲讲黑衣人的那个。
E: Tell me about the man in black.

C: 讲讲高空折返跑。
E: Tell me about the high-altitude shuttle runs.

C: 讲讲无影寻宝。
E: Tell me about shadowless treasure hunting.

C: 那要取决于报酬给多少了。
E: Well, that depends on how much the reward is.

C: 好啦，吵闹的家伙已经不在了，现在我们可以好好聊聊了吧，来自「异乡」的朋友~
E: Alright, the noisy ones are gone now. We can have a good chat, can't we, my outlander friend~

C: 难以想象…那个名为「黑塔」的瑟希斯眷属竟有如此伟力，能筑起如此宏大精巧的高塔，用以陈列奇珍…这番壮举怕是早已能够堪比塞勒苏斯了。
E: It's hard to imagine that... This Herta, kin to Cerces, possess such power, is capable of building such a large and intricate tower. And to use that as a display of her rare treasures too... I fear this feat is more than comparable to Thalesus' efforts.

C: 什么雕像？
E: What statue?

C: 不过这个时期倒是例外…很多富人期待着救世后的价值震荡，他们会刻意找一些「可能会升值」的作品来收藏。
E: However, this period is an exception... Many wealthy individuals are anticipating the value fluctuations after salvation, and they will deliberately seek out artworks that "might appreciate in value" to collect.

C: 关于园丁…
E: About Gardeners...

C: 我最近都会在附近边散步边讲学，你要是感兴趣，随时可以来旁听。
E: I've recently been strolling about and lecturing nearby. If you are interested, you can have a listen.

C: 简单介绍下，我叫尤利娅，是树庭的学者，现在是浴场的常客。我喜欢在这里跟普罗大众宣讲我一生信奉的瑟希斯之道。
E: An introduction is in order: I am Julia, a Grove scholar, and now a bath regular. I always enjoy the chance to regale everyone here about Cerces, the path to which I have devoted my life.

C: 希望离开翁法罗斯之后，我也能记得在这里的时光。
E: I hope that I can still hold onto these memories even after I leave Amphoreus.

C: 我才不给你！
E: I'm not handing this over!

C: 然后是通讯助手模式，目前我储存了空间站的通讯录，可以帮你接收空间站的讯息，记录重要留言，在对方同意的情况下与空间站远程连线。
E: Then there's the "Communication Assistant" mode. I've got the space station's directory loaded up, ready to handle incoming messages, save important ones, and facilitate remote connections upon approval.

C: 说实话，要不是之前医疗科的科员给他做心理检查，我都怀疑他是不是有点自闭，真没想到他还会主动给你发消息。
E: To be honest, if the Medical Department hadn't given him a psychological evaluation, I might have thought he was a bit of an introvert. It's surprising he took the initiative to message you.

C: 虽然其中大多都是平庸之作，但还是有几篇内容令我非常感兴趣。比如《利用黑洞制作永动机的可能性》《关于水猴子物种存在的若干证据》……
E: While most are mediocre, a few articles caught my eye, like The Possibility of Creating a Perpetual Motion Machine Using Black Holes and Evidence Supporting the Existence of Water Monkey Species...

C: 你这问题，叫小女子好生为难。这叫什么话？塔米拉小姐帮了我这么多，她让小女子不再成为她的影子，还为我找到了走到台前的路。
E: That's a weird question to ask. Miss Tamila has done so much for me — she helped me step out of her shadow and showed me the way to the spotlight.

C: 年轻人，你要是有兴趣，我可以和你讲讲古今朝圣的区别。
E: Youngster, if you are interested, I can tell you the differences between the pilgrimages of today and ancient times.

C: 嗯…原来如此，我明白了…无怪你的父亲如此忧虑深重。对于凡俗之人而言，雅努斯的神谕确实过于晦涩……
E: Hmm... I see. I understand... No wonder your father is so weighed down with concern. The prophecies of Janus can indeed be a little cryptic to the common man...

C: 唉，这么说吧…您应当知道，进行祭祀时，只有当牺牲的鲜血泼洒在祭坛之上，神明才会向我们投下赞许的目光。
E: Ah, allow me to put it this way... You should understand that when one is carrying out a ritual, it is only when the sacrificial blood hits the altar that the gods will grace us with their approval.

C: 可…如果是这样的话，那不恰巧说明了那位大人并没有骗人吗？
E: But... If that's true, does that not prove that they were not actually scamming anyone?

C: 是啊，自我刚懂事起，就被派过来服侍圣女大人了。往后，我待在神殿工作了几十年。
E: Indeed. I was sent here to aid the Holy Maiden since I was old enough to walk. I've spent decades within these walls.

C: 每次早早起来，筛出最好的面粉，过滤最纯净的蜂蜜，那股香甜味我自己闻到都忍不住口水直流。
E: Every morning, I wake early to sift the finest flour and strain the purest honey. The sweet aroma is so tempting, even I can't help but start to drool.

C: 听说你服侍过圣女？
E: Did you serve the Holy Maiden once?

C: 能为我介绍下这里吗？
E: Can you show me around?

C: 你描述了缇宝给你的印象，除了身高的部分……
E: You describe your impression of Tribbie, carefully leaving out any mention of her height...

C: 的确，相伴旅行能让人发现朋友身上不为人知的一面。即使是相识已久的缇安老师，在这次树庭之行里，同样露出些隐蔽的性情。
E: Indeed, traveling together often reveals sides of a friend that were previously unseen. Even Trianne, whom I've known for so long, showed hidden sides of her personality on this trip to the Grove.

C: 阿格莱雅大人曾嘱咐我待人更加亲切温柔些。可人们对我不是退避三舍就是恭敬有加，似乎这份隔阂并不那么容易消弭吧。
E: Lady Aglaea once advised me to be gentler and more amiable in my demeanor. But people either avoid me altogether or treat me with great reverence — this distance is not so easily bridged.

C: …呵，真是感人至深的道别辞。
E: ...Haha, such a heartfelt farewell.

C: 愚钝的阿那克萨戈拉斯，树庭七贤人之一，从事渎神的「炼金术」研究，行事狂狷不羁、独爱口放厥词。
E: Anaxagoras the fool, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove, who engages in heretical alchemical research and acts with reckless arrogance, loving to spew nonsense with abandon.

C: 那是辆星间旅行的列车！
E: That was an Express traveling between the stars!

C: …哦，你确实可能没听说过我，但是你没听说过我不可能。
E: ...Oh, maybe you haven't heard about me, but it's impossible that you haven't heard of me.

C: 你说的那个运动会…
E: About the sports event you mentioned...

C: 这就是黎明云崖将我奉为上宾的原因。
E: That is why I am held as an esteemed guest at Dawncloud.

C: 当然，那么你对谁的遗言更感兴趣呢？
E: Of course. Whose parting words would you like to hear the most?

C: 你来，拿着这个。
E: You there, take this.

C: 你会来见我，说明你已经有了进展——至少我希望如此。
E: You've come to see me, which means you've made progress... at least I hope so.

C: 很幸运，我没有受伤。圣城卫士们把那些怪物拦在云石市集之外了。
E: Yes, I'm fortunate to be unharmed. The Holy City Guards managed to keep those creatures at bay, away from the Marmoreal Market.

C: 是啊，做了一生的「服务业」，难得有机会，就让我也体验下当客人的乐趣吧。
E: Yes, after a lifetime in "service", it's rare to have the chance. So let me enjoy the experience of being a guest for once.

C: 我曾经无数次想象奧赫玛的陷落、翁法罗斯的末日。可事到如今，一切近在眼前，我却反倒有些索然无味了……
E: I've imagined Okhema's fall and Amphoreus' doom countless times. Yet now that it's here... I find myself oddly... underwhelmed.

C: 差点忘了，我这就跑。
E: Oh, I almost forgot. I'll start fleeing now.

C: 只是一切难免让我猜测——翁法罗斯本来就是个循环的世界。在漫长的轮回中，人或许可以演化成泰坦，泰坦或许也可以演化成人，所有人都能经历所有人的故事。
E: But I can't help but speculate — what if Amphoreus is fundamentally a world of cycles? In these endless turns, perhaps mortals eventually become Titans, Titans become mortals, and everyone experiences everyone else's journey.

C: 悬锋人的礼仪，便是将一切软弱的哀怨与仇债，在战场上讨回。
E: The Kremnoan way is to settle all weakness, grief, and grudges on the battlefield.

C: 好？哈！我能有什么不好？不过是被我侍奉一生的泰坦抛弃了而已！
E: Alright? Ha! What could possibly be wrong? I've only been abandoned by the Titan I've devoted my entire life to!

C: 他们真的很有信念感。
E: They had such convictions.

C: 快去避难吧！
E: Hurry and seek shelter!

C: …对，细想一下，还是这里比较安全，不仅有着吉奥里亚的庇佑，大家伙们也会保护我的。
E: ...Right. Come to think of it in detail, this place is pretty safe. It's not only protected by Georios, but the big ones will also be watching over us.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望完美。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的某根柱子上</color>，把自己伪装成一盏灯，说是要「追求极致」。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who strives for perfection. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now leaning <color=#dbc291ff>against a certain pillar along the corridor</color>, disguised as a lamp, claiming they are "pursuing perfection."

C: 抱歉…没有记忆残晶，金线千丝万缕，不知该向何处寻觅。请您之后再来吧，贵客。
E: Sorry... Without any Memory Crystal Shard, the golden thread can't trace their whereabouts. Please come back later, honored guest.

C: 嗯…有位织者羡慕黄金裔的伟力。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一处疏泄黄金血的孔道</color>前，沐浴最纯粹的金血呢。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who admired the might of the Chrysos Heir. The golden threads brought news, it now stands before <color=#dbc291ff>a channel of flowing golden blood</color>, bathing in the purest essence.

C: 嗯…有位织者苦练技艺，终于小有所成。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天象画壁前的悬台高处</color>，去检验一番它的成果吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has diligently honed their skills and has finally made progress. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>a high place of the suspended platform in front of the celestial mural</color>, ready to test its achievements.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「逐火的脚下本无是无物。但若求助于高天，无物中亦可窥见前路。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The Flame-Chase treads on nothingness. But those who seek aid from the sky may glimpse a path in the void."</color>

C: 总之，别给自己太大压力，按心里的想法前进就好。
E: Just don't pressure yourself. Whatever you choose, as long as it's what your heart tells you... that's enough.

C: 迷！迷迷！抬起头，不要向干旱的天气弯腰。
E: Memi! Mem! Lift your head. Don't bow to the dry weather.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: …呀，是{NICKNAME}！怎么不说一声呢，没让你久等吧？
E: ...Ah. It's you, {NICKNAME}! Why didn't you warn me? Did I keep you waiting?

C: （上去看看）
E: (Move closer to take a look)

C: 想做些有意义的事。
E: I want to do something meaningful.

C: 暂时不想做什么……
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

C: 干脆利落，又不落声势……
E: Clean and swift, yet without forsaking grandeur...

C: 维吉妮娅闭上眼，定神半晌，再度睁眼时气场已截然不同。
E: Verginia closes her eyes and remains focused for a while. When she opens her eyes again, her demeanor has completely changed.

C: 毕竟，在海洋之后，还有诡计、死亡、天空、纷争…那么多厉害的泰坦要讨伐，我这么孱弱的黄金裔，说、说不定就死在哪场恶仗里了呢。
E: After all, after Ocean, there are still Trickery, Death, Sky, Strife... With so many mighty Titans to overcome, a weak Chrysos Heir like me... m—might just end up throwing my life away in battle.

C: {NICKNAME}贵客，这宴会的体验不错吧？凯撒大人的宴会就是世界最顶级的宴会，法吉娜都得低头认输！
E: Honored guest, was this feast to your liking? The Great Imperator's feasts are the greatest feasts in all feasts, that even Phagousa would have to admit defeat!

C: 想必强如泰坦，都可能只是那星海沙场上的尘埃吧。
E: Something as strong as the Titans might only be the dust scattered across the stars.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，你果然不会错过这般良辰。宴会中途如果需要帮忙，尽管告诉我！
E: Ah, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I knew you wouldn't miss such a splendid occasion. If you need any help during the banquet, don't hesitate to let me know!

C: 我们虔诚的海洋祭司一族，受恩于海瑟音大人的剑刃…所以才来到半神们的战场…侍奉深海中歌唱的她……
E: Our devout lineage of sea priests... blessed by Lady Hysilens's blade... came to this demigod battlefield... to serve her who sings in the abyss...

C: <size=28>呜啊啊啊啊！！——嘤嘤嘤嘤嘤嘤！！</size>
E: <size=28>Uwaaaaah! Eeeep!</size>

C: 我的朋友，一起向赴死者致敬吧嘤。
E: My friend, let us pay our respects to the deceased, eep.

C: 我是一条鱼~
E: I'm a fish~

C: 我喜欢沉底！
E: I love diving!

C: 本来我想买下整个餐馆，可被那个看起来凶巴巴的餐馆主管直接回绝了。
E: At first, I wanted to buy the entire restaurant, but that fierce-looking restaurant supervisor shut me down instantly.

C: 迷迷！你好好端菜，多揣摩揣摩顾客的喜好，等时机成熟，我就会安排你去当主厨迷！
E: Mem! Carry those dishes with care. Learn what the customers like. Once the time comes, I'll make you head chef, mem!

C: 他们在辩什么啊？
E: What are they debating?

C: 行啊，你想去哪个？
E: Sure, which one do you want to go to?

C: 我真怀疑你是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒，说话不过脑子。我要是信你，我就是那个…那个飞天坛递。
E: I'm now starting to suspect if you're a follower of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Empty vessels make the most noise. If I believed you... then I might as well be a Flying Amphora.

C: …我会的。在那之后，我会永居冥界，让冥河回到这里，化作天上的细雨，将灵魂播撒向这片冥土……
E: ...I will. After this, I will remain permanently in the nether realm. The River of Souls shall return here and rain down from the sky, scattering souls across the earth...

C: 出千了吧你？！
E: Did you just cheat!?

C: 1…2…3…已经劝回了这么多孩子。
E: 1... 2... 3... Already so many children persuaded to come home.

C: 猫头鹰老师，猫头鹰老师啾——
E: Professor Owl, Professor Owl, tweet...

C: 咕咕——只要你在算术课上别再睡觉就好。
E: Hoot hoot... As long as you stop dozing off in math class.

C: 考完才给吃，猫头鹰老师真狡猾啾！
E: We only get to eat after the exam? Professor Owl's so cunning, tweet!

C: 不用了不用了，卡波特大人强调过，他的私人事务不能随意经他人手。
E: No. Master Capote told me specifically that his personal affairs should not be handled by random strangers.

C: 你烦不烦？想要了解她的情况，你在哪儿都可以问到，何必来烦我？
E: Come on, seriously? If you are so interested in her, you can get her information everywhere. Why are you bothering me?

C: 嗷呜～我又困又饿，没有同伴能发现我在哪里，我以为自己彻底没救了。
E: Awoooo~ I was tired and hungry, with no companions who could find me. I thought I was completely done for.

C: 它听见了我的呼救，但它并不能帮助我离开洞穴——我已经陷入大地深处，那是再也不能回头的深处。
E: My cry for help was heard, but the voice couldn't help me escape the cave. I was trapped deep beneath the land, in depths from which there was no return.

C: 荒笛大人接受了与生俱来的使命，便是为吉奥里亚引领大地众生，它可以为此舍弃一切…即便那是战友，即便那是自己。
E: Lord Terravox embraced their destined duty: to guide all living beings for Georios. They would sacrifice everything for this cause... be it their comrades, or even themself.

C: 不过为什么透明的石头也有建模呢？
E: But why does a transparent stone even have a 3D model?

C: 这就是我家大大瑟希斯的雕像，无论从哪个角度看都好漂亮、好完美…
E: This is the statue of my beloved Cerces, it's so beautiful and perfect from every angle...

C: 你的气泡太吵了，很难不发现。
E: Your speech bubble is so noisy, it's hard not to notice.

C: 「扎格列斯身无分文」，那它的密钥……
E: "Zagreus is without a penny to their name," so its encryption key...

C: 「兔子洞」似乎是个比喻，大概指的是某个类似洞穴的造物。至于它的位置，说不定真如预言所说…近在眼前呢。
E: The "rabbit hole" seems to be a metaphor, probably referring to some cave-like creation. As for its location, perhaps it's just as the prophecy said... right before our eyes.

C: 啊，是你，{F#女士}{M#先生}！快看看我的刺绣！
E: Ah, it's you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}! Come look at my embroidery!

C: …为了…为了什么？
E: ...F—For... for what?

C: 我只是个虔诚求知的无知老头。不过你说得对，我确实愿为新世界献出一份力量。
E: I'm just a simple old fellow thirsty for knowledge, but you make a good point. I do want to do my part for this new world taking shape.

C: 您说得确实在理，可我们听不懂……
E: You make a good point, but we have no idea what you're saying...

C: 呜嗡？（我最近学会了后空翻，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你要看吗？可以多带几个人来哦。）
E: Grumph. (I just learned how to do a backflip, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}! Wanna see? You can bring a whole crowd to watch!)

C: (x３っ「Zzzzz……」)∋
E: (x３っ "Zzzzz..." )∋

C: 这位客人，我们和它们谁更可爱？想听听你公正的判断迷。
E: Hey there, customer! Who's cuter, us or them? I'd love to hear your honest opinion, mem.

C: 迷…意料之外的答案……
E: Mem... an unexpected answer...

C: 那实在太坏了！
E: That's awful!

C: 海瑟音姐姐出马，恐怕布料还没反应过来，就已经被裁断了吧？
E: With big sis Hysilens on the job, I bet those fabrics won't even know what hit them before they're cut!

C: 你来做股东！
E: You'll be a shareholder!

C: 唔…从别人家里掏东西，我很擅长，但要把东西往别人家里塞，这还是头一遭。
E: Hmm... I'm good at taking stuff from other people's homes, but putting things into them? That's a first.

C: 说实话，赛法利娅是否会接受邀请，我真有点拿不准。
E: To be honest, I'm not quite sure whether Cifera will accept the invitation.

C: 或许正因为你在场周旋，她才会选择加入。我必须向你道谢。
E: Perhaps it was your presence and mediation that made her choose to join. I must thank you for that.

C: 嗬！
E: Sup?

C: 我的脚趾在抠三室两厅了。
E: This is so awkward I wanna sink through the floor.

C: 随后那些脆弱的纸本也在大火中燃烧起来……
E: Then those fragile volumes also went up in flames...

C: 新世界的人们也得从一段更好的故事里了解过往「历史」，不是吗？
E: The people of the new world deserve to learn about the "history" through a better story, don't they?

C: 这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
E: You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.

C: 制品？是说食材吗？我也很意外，你会报名新一轮的黄金厨神争霸赛……
E: Crafts? You mean ingredients? I'm also surprised that you signed up for the new Master Chrysos Chef Championship...

C: 若虫到底是什么？
E: What exactly are the nymphs?

C: 没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 别看小三月总是嘻嘻哈哈的，她的内心其实很不安。
E: Despite her cheerful demeanor, March is very anxious inside.

C: 至于它的制造过程，和停留的原因，都已不得而知了。
E: As for how it was built and how it was damaged, I do not have an answer.

C: 陨落的星神，逝去的「开拓」——祂的离开是一个谜，但在所有已知的星神里，阿基维利是最接近人类的一位。
E: The fallen Aeon, deceased Trailblaze — THEIR passing is still a mystery, but of all the known Aeons, Akivili was the closest to mankind.

C: 关于丹恒…
E: About Dan Heng...

C: 七年、八年…不，都不对。抱歉了，我不像丹恒，从来没有在列车上记录行车日志的习惯。
E: Seven years, eight years... No, that's not right. I'm sorry. I'm not Dan Heng — I've never kept a diary aboard the Express.

C: …我不告诉你。
E: ...I am not telling you.

C: 三个小鼹鼠你都不知道吗？
E: Don't you even know the three little moles?

C: 安东尼娜没看错，你确实是一名合格的助教。
E: Antonia was right. You are indeed qualified as an assistant instructor.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 滴答，天哪，我之前的思维是多么天真，目光是多么短浅！
E: Tick-tock, oh dear. I was so naive back then, so short-sighted!

C: …不知道老大把下个档期的排班列好了没有……
E: ...I wonder if Boss has listed the next schedule up yet...

C: 「你在追查我的事，对不？那咱们来比一场吧。」
E: "You're trying to catch me, aren't you? Then how about a little contest?"

C: 我一点也不奇怪，人家好歹是能和螺丝咕姆的差分机球打个平手的黑客，骇入这个纸糊的空间站还不是轻而易举？
E: I'm not surprised at all. They're hackers on a level with Screwllum. This space station's security must be like a kindergarten to them.

C: 「哈哈，你还记得啊。我也没想到会以这种方式再见到你，咱们还挺有缘的。」
E: "Haha, you remember me? I never thought we'd be meeting like this again, either. Call it fate."

C: 我好像没干什么坏事吧？
E: I didn't do anything bad, did I?

C: 她是位漠视生命的冷酷女王。
E: She's a heartless queen with a disregard for life.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了铆钉镇上那座工坊的景色。
E: A work of photography that captures the view of the workshop in Rivet Town.

C: …查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉伊斯坎德拉山的远景。据说是雅利洛-Ⅵ表面最高的山峰，但这名字到底是谁起的？
E: ...Mt. Zarathustrazapala Iskandra from afar. It was said to be the tallest mountain on the surface of Jarilo-VI, but who gave it such a ridiculous name?

C: 一系列来自下层区的招贴画，看起来已十分陈旧。
E: A series of posters from the Underworld. They look old.

C: …七百年前，来自天外的怪物点燃了星球。生死存亡之际，自天外降临的「星核」响应了阿丽萨•兰德的祈愿，唤来了足以退敌的寒潮。
E: ...Seven hundred years ago, monsters from beyond the sky ignited our beautiful planet. In a time of life and death, a Stellaron that descended from outer space heeded Alisa Rand's prayers and summoned the Eternal Freeze to repel our invaders.

C: 解说词到此结束了。
E: The narration ends.

C: …可以说，若没有「开拓者三人组」的协助，星核便不可能得到抑制。他们乘坐神秘的列车自星穹降临贝洛伯格——这一次，天外来客没有带来战火，而是未来。
E: ...It can be said that, without the help of the Trailblaze Trio, the Stellaron wouldn't be contained so successfully. They arrived at Belobog on a mysterious train from the stars. This time, visitors from outer space didn't bring forth the smog of war, but the light of hope.

C: 交给我们吧…不过，要是能近距离拍拍幽灵星槎就好了，那样——
E: Leave it to us... But it will be good if I can take a close-up picture of the phantom starskiff. That way —

C: 我明白了。再见，小空。
E: I see. Goodbye, Little Kong.

C: 驭空大人……
E: Madam Yukong...

C: 你先别急啊，我还没说要怎么拍呢！
E: Relax, I haven't said how to take those pics yet!

C: 诶？你刚才是在拍我吗？
E: Huh? Were you just taking a photo of me?

C: 太好了，终于有人发现我的才华了，不枉我天天坐在这里卖唱！你是艺术记者吗？
E: Awesome! Finally, somebody noticed my talent. I knew it wouldn't be a waste, busking here on the street every day! Are you a reporter of the arts?

C: 哼哼，用这份照片好好宣扬虎克大人的威名吧！
E: Hmph, let this photo show to all the fierceness of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 等了很久，机兵们终于满足地离开了……
E: After a long time, the automatons finally leave in contentment...

C: 我觉得…这好像是我的自拍诶！
E: This looks like... a selfie of me!

C: 不怎么好看。
E: It doesn't look that great.

C: 我以为长乐天就这么点儿地方。
E: I didn't know there was anything else to see in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 仙舟上有化外民来观光，我们也得去其他世界看看，多听多看多交流嘛。
E: The Xianzhou gets plenty of visitors, so it's only natural that we should venture out and see what other worlds are like.

C: 哎哟，这位客官是化外民游客吧。我想问您一句，喜欢金人巷这地方吗？
E: Oh, a visitor from afar? May I ask you a question — do you like Aurum Alley?

C: 查宝？我不知道那是什么。
E: Findie? I've never heard of that before.

C: 喂，你态度也太嚣张了吧。积欠租金的事，好好商量不行吗？
E: Ugh, you're being completely unreasonable. Why can't we talk this over?

C: 随着罗浮仙舟暂时停泊休养，和公司的贸易往来越发频繁，商会遭遇到真正的威胁——公司高调宣布竞标金人巷的开发。他们的承诺看得见、摸得着，并且极富侵略性。
E: When the Luofu was moored for maintenance and trade with the IPC increased, a new threat emerged for the Merchant Guild — the IPC's announcement of a bid for the development of Aurum Alley. Their promises were visible, tangible, and extremely aggressive.

C: 这样吧，先和身边的朋友们商量下如何？
E: Why don't you talk it over with everyone first?

C: 毕竟我不帮忙，你就要道歉了。
E: Of course. You'd be in big trouble if I don't.

C: 我可没法保证…
E: I can't make any guarantees...

C: 你可不能做经营码头的工具人呀。
E: Then why would they put you in charge of things at the dock...?

C: 你应该堂堂正正地反对。
E: Be a man! Do the right thing!

C: （我们可以用什么证明？）
E: (Do we have any proof?)

C: 但是商会拒绝与金人巷的各大商铺进行合作，曾经繁华一时的码头如今门可罗雀。
E: The Merchant Guild refused to cooperate with the major shops in Aurum Alley, and the once prosperous dock is now desolate.

C: 这个过程，实在是有些艰辛。
E: It was a tough journey.

C: 会长，你别躲在里面不出声。
E: President, get your butt out here!

C: …唉，气死我了。
E: Ugh... what did I do to deserve this?

C: 金人头，这也太酷了吧！
E: A talking aurumaton head? So cool!

C: 曾经的金人巷选择了「我的坚持」，它才会创造如今无法企及的商业奇迹。
E: The old Aurum Alley achieved a commercial miracle that has not yet been replicated. It did so by following my way of doing things.

C: 我在准备竞标的文件，暂时抽不开身，只好拜托你了。
E: Sorry, I would have helped her myself, but I've been drowning in paperwork in preparation for the bidding.

C: 老朽这副身体有失远迎，希望你们理解。
E: You'll forgive me for not shaking hands.

C: 理解理解。
E: No worries.

C: 接下来，请中标候选人，向天舶司评标审查会解释金人巷之后的经营理念。
E: Representatives of all parties, please be ready to brief the review committee on your business plans.

C: 那当然啊，我们可是主人公。
E: Of course, we're the protagonists.

C: 我听白露说你们老远就听到我的声音了，真的吗？
E: Bailu told me you two heard me yelling before you showed up. Is that true?

C: 少说废话了，让我来吧。
E: Enough of that. Let me do it.

C: 让我试试，不行再换人。
E: Let me try. If that doesn't work, put someone else in.

C: 不好意思，再说一遍？
E: I'm sorry. Could you repeat that?

C: 超大碗月华饭。
E: A mega bowl of moonlight rice.

C: …{NICKNAME}，青雀说的有道理，这本《琼玉牌秘技丛集》好像用处不大。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, Qingque has a point. The Celestial Jade Techniques 101 isn't actually that useful.

C: 商会从来没有拒绝和金人巷商铺合作。
E: The Merchant Guild has never refused to work with any shops in Aurum Alley.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 这只是个例，这还不足以说服我。
E: The sample size is too small. I'm not convinced.

C: 门口这几位云骑是怎么回事？
E: What's up with these Cloud Knights at the door?

C: 我能清晰感觉到气流拂过翅膀轻微的震颤…起风了，我要出发了。
E: I can feel ever so clearly the slightest hint of a slipstream... Time to fly. I'm off.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，我这里还有件事想要麻烦你。最近鹤运物流的垣风老哥建议我们做「客制运单」，能够进一步提升客户对我们的信赖。
E: By the way, {NICKNAME}, I need you to do me another favor. Recently, Yuanfeng from Heron Express suggested that we start "custom orders" to build trust with our customers.

C: 不管公司想做什么，金人巷都应该做出积极改变。
E: Regardless of the IPC's wishes, positive changes need to be made to Aurum Alley.

C: …这里好像是人家的后厨仓库吧？一般人导航不应该去店面吗，定位在这儿是要怎么进去啊。
E: ...Isn't this the back kitchen's pantry? Navigation tools shouldn't be sending people here. How can I get in there?

C: 本来我送完货就要返航的，但是金人巷我们才来没多久，物流地图的数据空缺了一大片…我想确认下自己在哪儿都定位不了。
E: I was meant to return to the base after delivery, but seeing as we only just got here and so much of the map data was empty... I just couldn't confirm my own location.

C: 是这样的，我这摊子接了点外卖订单，但负责配送的机巧鸟却隔三差五地偷懒。
E: Here's the deal: I've received some take-away orders, but the cycrane that is supposed to deliver them just keeps slacking off instead.

C: 这样是哪样？
E: What did you say?

C: 只是{NICKNAME}大人没注意罢了。
E: It's {NICKNAME} who didn't pay enough attention.

C: 大人只是太过专注，没有注意到守灵罢了。
E: You were merely too deep in thought to notice Shouling's presence.

C: 你气沉丹田，打出了两记下勾拳，拳风锐利如刀。
E: You muster your strength and throw two hooks into the punchbag. The force cuts through the air like a knife.

C: 又是这熟悉的搏击俱乐部，又是这熟悉的沙袋…不如在这里用那神秘的古代「斗技」来热热身吧。
E: The same old Fight Club once again, with its familiar punchbag... Why don't we warm up using those mysterious and ancient techniques of "martialism"?

C: 怎么听着像编的故事？
E: Why does that sound completely made up?

C: 现在看来绩效考核问题已经不大了，剩下的就是为了满足数量。我们干脆将计就计，跟着上回的「外宇宙之炎」，研究它在金属冶炼方面的应用吧！
E: Anyway, now it seems the performance review matter is no longer a big issue. All that's left is to hit the quota. We'll beat them at their own game and use the previous "Blaze Out of Space" to study its application in metal smelting!

C: 好的，我发誓…
E: Alright, I swear...

C: 什么样才算异常？
E: What is "abnormal"?

C: （这个广告画似乎有滚轴控制转动，等一等可以看到其他的画面内容。）
E: (This advert seems to be controlled by a rolling mechanism. Wait and you'll see different ads.)

C: 你看，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}都这么说了！
E: See? Even {F#big sister}{M#big brother} say it's okay!

C: （异常情况应该不在这个地方。）
E: (The anomaly is not here.)

C: 他说自己是什么…民间科学家？
E: He said he's a... civilian scientist?

C: 哎！留步！这次的灵感让我「头皮发麻」…啊！这种熟悉的陌生感让人好难受。我要缓会儿，你先走吧！
E: Ah! Stop! The intuition this time makes my scalp tingle... Ah! This feeling of déjà vu is so weird. I need to rest for a bit. You go on!

C: 感恩庆典活动会持续七天，每天都会提供不同美食，你可以随时过来参加。
E: The celebration event will last for seven days, with different delicacies offered each day. Feel free to drop by anytime to participate.

C: 我有。
E: I can.

C: 滴答，是的！既然您能修好我们，一定有特殊的本领，请帮帮我们吧！

E: Truth be told, I learned of a secret passage that leads into the Reverie on one of my investigations... But I was alone then, and didn't dare to venture forth by myself. Now that you're around, I can put my mind at ease.

C: …咳，抱歉，我的想象力又发作了。
E: ...Ahem, sorry, my imagination got the better of me.

C: 但是作为「真相的仆人」，我——一位敬业的调查记者——是绝对不会轻言放弃的。
E: As a servant of truth, I — a committed investigative reporter — will never abandon my creed so easily.

C: 我好像…没那么伤心了。你看，我的翅膀都开始跳舞了。
E: I'm not feeling... so sorrowful anymore. Look, even my wings are starting to flutter.

C: 汪！…这边，到这边来，有点事情想和你商量哇！
E: Woof! ...This way, come this way. I've got something to talk to you about!

C: …别想转移话题啦！
E: ...Hey, don't try to change the subject!

C: 真的不管我们是谁嘛？太执拗可是会吃苦头的。

C: 可以试着离开，你不需要按照他们的指示去生活。
E: Well, you always have the choice to leave. You don't have to spend your life obeying their orders.

C: {F#她}{M#他}是{NICKNAME}，是列车组的新加入的成员。
E: This is {NICKNAME}, a new member of the Express Crew.

C: 你肯定有过和什么「回响」、「模因」之类的存在聊过天吧。我现在大概是这样的存在。
E: I bet you've probably talked with something like a resonance or a memetic entity before. That's pretty much what I am.

C: 在我们那个时代，我经常和其他搭车客坐在一起玩「强手棋」，他们在这小小棋盘上试试运气，以便下车时能够带着好运启程。
E: In our time, I used to play Cosmodyssey with other passengers. They tried their luck on this small board, so they could bring their good luck with them when they disembarked.

C: 有什么苦衷值得他背叛家族！背叛神主！
E: What kind of reason would get him to betray The Family!? Betray the Great One!?

E: I've got a feeling that there's probably something incredible in here. Let's head out and look it all over.

C: 啊，钢铁鳄鱼，你还好吗！？
E: Ah! Steely Gator, are you alright?

C: 太好了！
E: Great!

C: 醒醒！你就是苏乐达！
E: Wake up! You are SoulGlad!

C: 《钟表小子》永远属于克劳克影业，属于「钟表匠」先生！你们家族休想夺走它！
E: Clockie will always belong to Clock Studios and Mr. Watchmaker! You Family people can never have it!

C: 抱歉，钟表小子没有什么困境，也不需要这种虚伪的善意！
E: I'm sorry, but Clockie isn't in any trouble, nor does he need such hypocritical goodwill!

C: 我叫皮斯，是钟表小子系列动画的「制片人」，欢迎您来到克劳克影视乐园！
E: My name is Pisce, the producer for the Clockie franchise. Welcome to the Clock Studios Theme Park!

C: 哈哈，这是匹诺康尼的卡通明星——钟表小子！
E: Haha, this is the cartoon star of Penacony — Clockie!

C: 开始剪辑。
E: Begin editing.

C: 好吧，但时间不等人。还是希望您能尽快完成剪辑，好让我们早些度过难关。
E: Well, time and tide wait for no man. It'd be best if you could complete the editing as soon as possible so that we can get through this rough patch sooner.

C: 等等，你看起来有点眼熟啊…哦！我之前在克劳克影视乐园见过你！
E: Wait, you look kinda familiar... Oh! I met you at the Clock Studios Theme Park before!

C: 如果我能明白「钟表匠」这么做的理由，或许就能说服梅芙恩家主撤销封禁胶卷的决定，毕竟她要的只是一个解释。
E: If I can figure out why he did that, I can probably convince Lady Maeven to lift the ban on the movie. After all, all she wants is an explanation.

C: 这个…不就卡在你们家族手里吗！居然想用这个来要挟我们，无耻……
E: That... is all because of The Family's interference! To think you can use this method to threaten us... How shameless...

C: 花火坏笑着思考情节的不同可能——相信用不了多久，就能从其他观众口中听到她的奇妙分析。

C: 呵呵，如果「钟表匠」能看到那样的未来，他一定会很高兴的。
E: Heheh, I'm sure the Watchmaker will be pleased to see such a future.

C: <size=28>来组成桥梁！</size>
E: <size=28>to form a bridge!</size>

E: It was a long time ago, when I first met with the origami bird...

E: "The resounding noise has attracted a few members of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. They wish to help Clockie escape this predicament..."

E: Even Sweet Dreams Troupe from the Iris Family has contacted us for collaboration. The crimes committed by Dreamjolt Troupe are on the rise lately, so they want to salvage their reputation by associating themselves with the Clockie franchise.

C: 「但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。」
E: "But his behavior angered Boss Stone, who would not allow anyone to transgress on his turf. The vile Boss Stone used a trick to capture Mr. Soda, and tossed him into a prison cell."

E: Great, we're done with the extra story's script then!

C: 没错，就是这样的。
E: Yes. That's it.

C: 嚯，真是个残忍无情的大坏蛋！
E: Ooh, what a brutal and ruthless bad guy!

C: 但你也看到了，在这个过程中，家族不断伸展的枝蔓也会阻挡渴望奔跑的人们，被它绊倒的不只是钟表匠与克劳克影业…这是好事还是坏事呢？
E: But, as you can see, the ever-extending tendrils of The Family would stop those who deserve to run during this process. It wasn't just the Watchmaker and Clock Studios who got entangled and fell... Was this good news or bad news?

C: 哎呀，急急急急急！急死了！别吵我！

E: What kind of game is this?

E: "The cosmos is full of danger and adventure. One day, a teeny hero left their home world to conquer the stars..."

E: (Tell a dad joke)

C: 太感人了！故事继续发展，那场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，竞争对手就开始大量倾销低价商品挤占市场。
E: A tug at the heartstrings! The story continues to develop. The heavy rain leads you both to sense a business opportunity, so you start venturing into the umbrella industry. But just as the business begins to pick up, competitors start flooding the market with low-priced goods, squeezing your market share.

C: 「这不公平！你现在就得帮我。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "It's not fair! You have to help me." — You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

E: Look up there... If we can push that thing down, do you think that would do the trick?

E: Phew... thank you guys, tweet. I feel I'm about seventy percent cooked, tweet!

E: What about you? Where do you stand?

E: The thing you've long desired to make was just a cycrane?

E: Subsequently, as I transitioned into the role of an artisan, my schedule afforded me ample time. However, each time I geared up to commence work on it, a nagging question would stealthily surface in my mind — "Do I truly desire to craft a mere toy?"

C: 虽然生活模式重复，但生活每天带来的烦恼与压力却千变万化。想象一下，你循规蹈矩地写了一百年公务文档，承受来自上级的压力和同事间的摩擦……
E: Although they repeat their ways of life, the worries and pressures of life come in endless forms. Imagine for a second that you have spent a hundred years working to write official documents, enduring pressure from superiors and friction with colleagues...

C: 我愿意和它们捉迷藏。
E: I'll play hide-and-seek with them.

C: 在现实宇宙中，我只是个普普通通的垃圾桶。为了维持你眼前的这个形态，我强行从「夹层世界」里汲取了很多能力…这一战过后，我的能量基本消耗殆尽了。
E: In the real universe, I am no more than an ordinary trashcan. In order to maintain the form you see before you, I forcibly absorbed a large amount of power from the "Betweenwhere"... After this last battle, my energy is pretty much at its end.

C: 再多休整一下吧。
E: Let's spend a bit more time recuperating.

C: 说得没错！来吧！
E: You said it! Let's go!

C: 那次主要是青雀的功劳。
E: That was all thanks to Qingque.

E: How many Qingques do you have???

E: (Is Luka back yet? Let's head back to the lounge and take a look.)

C: 老师？可不敢当，我叫卢卡，是专程来参加演武仪典的，希望能成功挑战罗浮仙舟的守擂剑士，扬名立万，好让所有人都知道贝洛伯格的名字！
E: Master? You flatter me. My name is Luka. I'm here to compete in the Wardance. I hope to make a name for myself by successfully challenging the ringmaster of the Xianzhou Luofu so that everyone will know the name "Belobog"!

C: 来，小哥，你也喊两嗓子～咱们给自己鼓鼓劲！

E: However, Mr. Luka, you will still have to participate in all the knockout stages and work your way up to the final stage.

C: 他大概是真心劝你退赛。
E: He was genuinely trying to convince you to drop out of the competition.

C: 「熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——让世界上的邪恶无处遁形！」
E: "The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion... Defeater of evil throughout the world!"

C: 我甚至找不出一张完整的参赛选手名单，更没找到伊戈尔的名字。
E: I couldn't even find a complete list of contestants, and I didn't see Igor's name anywhere.

C: 七十五轮…你看，幸亏我们没并入公司体系，现在才不用受这个罪。
E: Seventy-five rounds... See? It's fortunate we didn't join the IPC system, now we don't have to endure this misery.

C: 抱歉，将军，你刚才说的那个世界叫什么名字？

C: 把她赶下去！她这是在侮辱演武仪典！
E: Kick her off the stage! She's an insult to the Wardance!

C: 呼…好个厉害的铁家伙！居然能操控周围的机器来揍我们！不过到底是破铜烂铁，不如咱们的爪牙锐利，哈哈。
E: Phew... That sure was a strong suit of steel! It could even control the surrounding machines to attack us! But these trash heaps of metal were no match for our sharp talons in the end, haha.

C: 我拒绝执行指令。
E: I declined to execute that specific command.

C: 还不错！逐渐找到感觉了！
E: Not bad! I'm starting to get into my groove!

C: 还挺累的。
E: It's pretty tiring.

E: But many netizens have commented that Luka seemed like two different people, from his performance in the first and second halves... There are some who even suggest that Luka should be subjected to a doping test.

C: 我是「二号机」。

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 可能是视角原因，你应该没有注意到这位记者。不过，可能是出于好奇，可能是出于疲倦，你仍然选择了这位*空气记者*进行提问。
E: It could have been a problem with your line of sight, and you might not have noticed this journalist. But, perhaps out of curiosity, perhaps due to fatigue, you still point to this "invisible journalist" to ask their question.

C: 感谢各个品牌方的支持。不过对于卢卡来说，当下最高优先级的目标仍是获得比赛胜利，除此之外的事情暂时没有考虑。
E: We are thankful for the support from all the brands. However, for Luka, his highest priority now is winning the match. For the time being, we will not be considering other matters.

C: 可以理解。
