C: 行呀，要是有什么消息，请随时和我们「观忍社」联系！
E: Nice, if you have any news, please contact us, the Ninja Appreciation Society!

C: 乐队经理要做些什么？
E: What does a band manager do?

C: 这种幼稚的言论还是留到你的论文里吧。作为学院负责人，你应该清楚这场音乐派对的价值，不是什么艺术殿堂，而是匹诺康尼在市场上竞争的筹码。
E: Please save this childish rhetoric for your thesis. You should be clear on the valuable import of this music party — it isn't some hallowed artistic hall, but a bargaining chip in the Penaconian market.

C: 乱破…莫、莫非是《银河忍法帖》的主角？！
E: Rappa... C—Could it be that she is the protagonist of the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions?

C: 正式修行前，劳烦诸位先介绍各自的身份与忍•特技，在下也好制定特训章程。
E: Before training proper, I would have everyone introduce themselves and their special ninja arts, which allows me to more easily tailor a special training schedule.

C: 留…留…音乐最解我心愁！
E: Ma... Making... music always relieves my burdens!

C: 班上的同学都会喊我…算了，没什么！嗯。就这些。
E: My classmates will call me... Never mind. It's nothing! Mm, that's all.

C: 那么，这就是我等流派的大名了吗？
E: Then, this will be our school's official name?

C: 无妨，命名流派并非小事，阁下应当深思而后行。
E: Let us not be hasty. The naming of a school is a monumental task. My lord ought to be more prudent.

C: 唔。这就是苦茶大师说过的「开悟」吗？在下必将尽心谱曲，不负主公的万般努力。
E: Hmm. Is this the "enlightenment" of which Master Kucha spoke? I must devote myself to composing, ensuring that I do not squander Sound Master's utmost efforts.

C: （乱破确实在很认真地构思乐曲，还是别打扰她了。）
E: (Rappa really is churning her creative juices. I'd better not bother her.)

C: 告诉我吧——所以，乱破小姐是哪里人？
E: So tell me, where's Ms. Rappa from?

C: 我也喜欢！看来我和乱破小姐有很多共同语言啊！
E: I like rap too! Looks like we share a common language!

C: 具体讨厌什么地方呢？
E: What exactly do they dislike?

C: 好久不见，我的朋友。你和站长找我过来，难道是我们的非人生物权益保护事业取得了重大进展，终于要在整个空间站推广开了吗？
E: Been a while, my friend. Seeing that you and the lead researcher invited me here, does that mean that our non-human rights protection initiative has seen progress? Are we finally going to promote this across the whole space station?

C: 总算来了。
E: You're finally here.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 倒也不用说得这么绝吧，谐乐学院的这群人真是死脑筋。
E: There's no need to be so black-and-white about it, is there? These Charmony Academy folks are so stubborn...

C: 这跟音乐有什么关系？
E: What does that have to do with music?

C: 负责的老师弄混后，我将错就错，来到了你们面前……
E: When the teacher got us mixed up, I went with the flow and appeared before you...

C: 嗯？那经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}想知道的是什么？
E: Hm? What was it you wanted to know then, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager?

C: 银河忍法，死缠烂打。
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu — Persistent Pestering.

C: （乐队成员都沉浸在音乐的世界里，还是不要再打扰了。）
E: (The band members are immersed in the world of music. Best not to interrupt.)
...Yeah!

C: 寻找失踪的演员啊…虽然不知道你们要找谁，但我发现校园里多出了一个奇怪的片场，或是说微缩梦境。
E: A missing cast member... I don't know who you're looking for, but I've noticed a strange set that popped up in the academy — or rather, a miniature dreamscape.

C: （那个学院代表应该很快就会过来，得想办法为乱破多拖延些时间。）
E: (That academy's rep will probably show up soon. We have to find a way to buy time for Rappa.)

C: 记得啊。难道不是因为咱们现在是梦境里的大人物了嘛？
E: I do. Is it not because we're now famous in the dreamscapes?

C: …呼…呼。
E: ...Huff ...Huff.

C: 不得不讲，老师的想法还是比学生要来得正确。但我遇到这种事也不会强求，只是觉得，他们要是能多听听学院的意见就好了。
E: I must say, a teacher's views are often more accurate than students'. But I wouldn't insist on this. I only feel that they should be more open to listening to the opinions of the school.

C: （时间所剩无几，乱破还没有回来，或许…得想想别的办法了。）
E: (There's not much time left, and Rappa's still not back. Maybe... we have to think of some other idea.)

C: 还未等你采取行动，几位身形壮硕的观众已然站在了你身边，无形的压力仿佛是堵高墙，将你与近在咫尺的舞台隔绝开来。
E: Before you can even make a move, several burly members of the audience are standing beside you, their imposing auras looming over you, and completely zoning you out of the stage that is inches away.

C: 哎，没劲。闲逛得差不多，该回去继续排练了。
E: Bah, no fun. We've spent enough time outside, and it's time to return to practice.

C: 聊聊这单生意。
E: Let's talk about this deal.

C: 这都什么人哪——他要再感慨，那人真得下去拥抱伊德莉拉了！
E: Who the heck was that? If he were any more emotional, he'd probably go down personally and embrace Idrila!

C: 怎么突然这么勤快？你不是三月七！你是谁？你把三月七怎么了？
E: Why so hardworking suddenly? You aren't March 7th! Who are you? And what have you done with March 7th?

C: …谢谢你们。
E: ...Thank you all.

C: 对面果然开始胡搅蛮缠了！
E: As expected, the commenter's started to spew more drivel!

C: 关于某个组织建立的动画。
E: The one about the establishment of a certain organization.

C: 到时候指定没他好果子吃！
E: He will suffer for his indiscretions when that time comes!

C: 别买，是智商税。
E: Don't buy it. It's a scam.

C: 哼哼，正合我意。三月小姐，请做好被黑洞撕裂的准备吧。
E: Heh-heh, you read my mind. Miss March, prepare to be torn to shreds by the black hole.

C: 只要用云吟术操纵水流冲击扭蛋，就能通过水流声在扭蛋中的反射时间和强度，勾勒出扭蛋中玩具的大致形状……
E: As long as we use cloudhymn magic to control the water flow that impacts the capsule, we can outline the approximate shape of the toy inside it by assessing the chronometric time and intensity of the sounds of water flow in the capsule...

C: 兵分两路，全部完成。
E: Split the teams up and complete both.

C: 支持「铁砧」，人类荣光永存！
E: Anvil. Eternal glory to humanity!

C: 你到底会多少种外语？
E: How many languages do you speak exactly?

C: 既然它爱吃垃圾，就让它也来帮忙值日吧！垃圾管饱！
E: Since it likes eating trash, then let's assign it a duty. It can eat all the trash it wants!

C: 拍得不错嘛，{NICKNAME}！
E: Not bad, {NICKNAME}!

C: 揪一揪。
E: Yank at it.

C: 人类在漫长的进化中得到了智慧，也失去了很多。譬如「尾巴」，譬如「皮毛」，譬如「敏捷的身手」。
E: Humanity obtained intelligence through the long process of evolution, but they also lost much. Such as their tails, fur, and dexterous reflexes.

C: 现在，请你们揭下伪装，让大家看看你们的真容吧！
E: Now, please shed your disguises and show everyone your true visages!

C: 不过是跑了群爱舞文弄墨的岁阳，要是老子出手，手拿把掐，一个都跑不了！
E: It's just a bunch of escaped heliobi that like flaunting their literary flair. I'd have them all rounded up with no effort if I stepped in!

C: 藿藿打断了岁阳们的「雅集」，追着它们跑远了。
E: Huohuo interrupts the heliobi's literary gathering, chasing them into the distance.

C: 呜…还是没有我，这回不会白跑一趟吧！
E: Oh... they still didn't call my name. Please don't tell me this is a wasted trip!

C: 旅途还在继续…
E: The voyage continues...

C: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
E: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

C: 我们在昨日被吹到凡人的坟茔，来日又飘到神明的宫殿。我们看见正义、失心、荣耀、背叛、疯狂…但我们无权裁决。
E: We were blown to a mortal's grave yesterday, and drift to a godly palace today. We see justice, hysteria, glory, betrayal, madness... but we have no right to judge.

C: 差点忘了，灰宝没有在树庭学习过，缺少这方面的知识……
E: I almost forgot, you never studied at the Grove, Grayie, hence you lack knowledge in this area...

C: 嗷呜？
E: Awooo?

C: 正值逐火之旅重启，昏光庭院的工作也很繁忙，要是被阿格莱雅女士知道我在外面还揽了这些杂事，指不定又得生气啦。
E: Since the restart of the Flame-Chase Journey, it's also been busy at the Twilight Courtyard. If Lady Aglaea knew about my mucking around outside, she'd be pretty upset.

C: 等等等等——喂喂，明明是我先来的啊！
E: Wait wait wait! Hey hey, I was here first!

C: 喜欢小风堇，喜欢夸夸！好吃的~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
E: I love Cinny, I love praise! Yummy food, toasty bath, happy me! Awoo-awoo!

C: 对！就是这个。这位浴场的常客，和那个议员对待我们的态度极其相近。元老院或许确实看黄金裔不顺眼，但他没有理由针对我们。
E: Yes! That's it. This bath regular and that Elder treated us in overly similar ways. The Council may not see eye to eye with the Chrysos Heirs, but that's no reason to have a grudge against us.

C: 如果你们想留在这里，我很欢迎。要是有其他的想法呢，我也不会阻拦。
E: You're more than welcome to stay here. If you have other ideas, I won't stop you either.

C: 哼哼哼——揭晓答案！小风堇肯定想不到，*我们*就是「花花」的管理员哦。
E: Huhuhu! Revealing the answer now! Cinny, you definitely did not expect it, but we are Florie's administrator!

C: 你也挺卷的。
E: You work pretty hard too.

C: 我早就看出你们绝非寻常人类。能将这只队伍带到如此高度，你真令我欢喜。
E: I've long noticed you're all no ordinary humans. To have brought this squad to such heights, you sure pique my fancy.

C: ——大家鼓掌！
E: ...Applause, everyone!

C: 我乃是伟大的智者卡利多托斯，留下的一缕神智，作为「目录」的大图书管理员。
E: I am a strand of consciousness left behind by the Great Sage Calidorthos to manage this grand library, known as the Index.

C: 嗨嗨嗨，拿出你真正的实力来，别轻视大哥啊。
E: Hey hey, bring out your big guns. Don't look down on me.

C: 提摩斯老师，坏了！链接没了！好像被偷走了！肥皂也被偷走了！
E: Mr. Timos, bad news! The link is gone, stolen! And the Shower Soaps too!

C: 咳咳…别别别！我刚刚…才从昏光庭院跑出来，咳咳……
E: *cough* Don't... don't! I just... escaped from the Twilight Courtyard... *cough*

C: …哼！现在我的实力只有吾王「万敌」的十分之一，所以我叫「十敌」。
E: Hmph! For His Majesty Mydei, every day is his day. But I am but a pale shadow of his strength, and I must seize the day — hence the name Yourdei.

C: 这孩子数学是不是不太好…
E: That pun's possessive pronouns and logic both need some serious work...

C: 它原本是只普通小海豹，但现在它已经屈服于欲望「豹变」成了黑化海豹！
E: Once an innocent baby seal, it has now succumbed to darkness and evolved into a Dark Seal!

C: 我是数学老师，我要过程。
E: "Evolved"? I see no gradual adaption to natural selection pressures here.

C: 泡泡这么强…缇宁能做到的，你当然也能做到。
E: With your strength, Bubbles... If Trinnon can do it, so can you!

C: 一只成年大地兽冲进了低温浴池，如果它也算一种「小海豹」，无疑是位重量级选手。
E: An adult dromas dashes into the cold bath. If it counts as a "baby seal," it's certainly a heavyweight contestant.

C: 为了让他接受治疗，我被迫带上绷带海豹参加比赛，没想到一路赢到了现在。
E: To ensure he accepted his treatment, I had to enter with Bandaged Seal. I never expected we'd make it this far.

C: 驱邪…缚魅…灵符…保命……
E: Demons... depart... Give me... strength...

C: 放心，这并非是解谜，而是竞赛。
E: Don't worry. This isn't a puzzle — it's a competition.

C: 求求你讲点我听得懂的吧。
E: Please say something I can understand.

C: 小飞儿怎么突然这么好心？
E: Little Ciphy found kindness in her heart?

C: 啊！
E: Ah!

C: 但也有不少观众在质疑，怎么一直没有看到奖杯，是不是真的破碎了。
E: However, many in the audience are asking why they haven't seen the trophy yet, wondering if it's really shattered.

C: 我好像猜到了…但是为什么？
E: I think I know why... but what's the reason?

C: 临近休赛期结束，「替换奖杯」的计划彻底宣告失败。
E: As we neared the end of the off-season, the "trophy swap" plan ended in utter failure.

C: 事情的起因、经过，我已经听吾师说过了。
E: I've already heard the whole story from my teachers.

C: 话说回来，刚才有艘星际和平公司的货船送来了一份包裹，里面是这个写着「致银河球棒侠」箱子——应该是给你的。
E: Say, a freight skiff from the IPC just dropped off a package. Inside was a box labeled "To the Galactic Baseballer" — I assume it's meant for you.

C: 你好啊，无名客{NICKNAME}，还有列车组的成员们。我是丹克西，从遥远的帕拉黛星向你们发来问候。
E: Greetings, Nameless {NICKNAME} and other crew members of the Astral Express. This is Danksi, calling from the distant world of Paradoxe.

C: 果然，一颗星球上的故事终究有限。唯有奔向宇宙，才能知晓寰宇的精彩。
E: As expected, there are limits to the stories in a single planet. We can only discover the brilliance of the cosmos when we travel the universe.

C: 哈哈，我们不是老熟人了嘛。就让我来帮你回忆一下吧——鄙人曾在匹诺康尼赞助过一个游戏项目，利用梦境中特有的技术，做出了全沉浸式的体验。
E: Hahaha, aren't we old friends already? Let me help jog your memory — back in the day, I funded a game project in Penacony, using unique dream-tech to create a fully immersive experience.

C: 请看那边的游戏机，对，就是显示「维修中」的那台——
E: Take a look at that console over there, the one that says "Under Maintenance" —

C: 后续更新优化有保障吗？
E: Is there a guarantee for future updates and improvements?

C: 对了，电视台那边有个冠军专访，劳驾您跟大家说两句——请随我来，电视台的采访间就在会场旁边。
E: Oh right. There's an exclusive championship interview over at the TV station. Please say a thing or two to the audience — come with me. The interview room for the station is right next to the arena.

C: 麻烦看下镜头！
E: Look at the camera, please!

C: 您记得就好，看来省去了不少解释的功夫。
E: Perfect. That saves me a lengthy explanation.

C: 等等，波提欧兄弟，破除诅咒没有这么简单……
E: Wait, Boothill, breaking a curse isn't that simple...

C: 少他宝贝的废话，小可爱，就说你敢不敢吧？
E: Cut the shirtball, you son of a bench! Yes or no?

C: 这…当真是银枪•修罗殿下？！在下推测，这定是某种类似邪猿变身的忍术。
E: Wait... THIS is Silvergun Shura!? Surely this is some ninjutsu like the ape transformation.

C: 呦，好久不见。听小姑娘说，你现在已经是圣杯的主人了？
E: Hey, it's been a while. The girl said that you're now the owner of the Holy Grail?

C: 我想揍你一拳。
E: I wanna punch you in the face.

C: 为钟表小子花钱也罢，为鸢尾花的表演花钱也罢，哪怕把钱投进公司的店铺，只要在匹诺康尼消费，就总有一份钱会流进我的口袋。
E: Whether they're paying for Clockie, the Iris shows, or just shopping in the stores — every penny spent in Penacony ends with a little slice in my pocket.

C: 不好了不好了！「我在末日送快递」宣布还要推出联机补充包！
E: Oh no, oh no! "Post-Apocalyptic Delivery Service" just announced they're releasing a multiplayer DLC pack!

C: 好啦，该去和家系派来的传声筒们扯皮了。
E: Well then, time to bicker with those mouthpieces The Family sent over.

C: 你还是重新学学吧。
E: You really need to relearn that.

C: 我可以喝了吗？
E: Can I drink now?

C: 我在做颈椎健康体操。
E: I was doing neck stretches.

C: 呵呵，吃穿用度、诸般物事，自然也是少不了的。
E: Haha, don't worry. We've got all the creature comforts covered too.

C: 亏得炎老解决后顾之忧，诸将士摩拳擦掌，士气愈发高涨了。
E: Thanks to master Huaiyan securing the rear, morale's through the roof. Our troops are fired up and ready to go.

C: 有黑幕？
E: Rigged!

C: 你怀着成为一名调饮大师的志向背井离乡来到这里，却一整天游手好闲、无所事事地站在柜台后…难道你满意吗？
E: You left home dreaming of becoming a great drinksmith, yet here you are, spending your days idle behind the counter... Is this really what you wanted?

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 多谢款待，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thanks for the drink, {NICKNAME}.

C: 可以下结论了：人偶不需要做梦，甚至没必要睡眠。
E: Conclusion: Puppets don't need dreams, nor even sleep.

C: 战争？！又要打仗了？
E: War!? We're going to war again!?

C: 但不管找到什么，能卖个好价钱就行了，你说是吧？
E: But no matter what we find, what's important is that we can sell it for top money — right?

C: 你好像不太辛苦。
E: You don't seem to be working that hard.

C: 怕什么？我可是搏击俱乐部排行榜的三百强选手！
E: So what? I'm top <unbreak>300</unbreak> on the Fight Club leaderboard!

C: 是啊，让这玩意害惨了！巴列维说他出五十冬城盾回收，要不卖了吧？
E: Yeah, curse this darn thing! Balaway offered me <unbreak>50</unbreak> shield to recycle it. Should we sell it to him?

C: 嗯，祝你玩得愉快啰。
E: Have a good time.

C: 虽说一千个无名客心里会有一千个阿基维利的形象，但也许您听说过…人类一直传诵的经典传说和故事的主角们拢共就那么几十种。
E: And even though Akivili takes on thousands of different forms within thousands of different Nameless, you may have heard that... Actually, there're only a dozen or so archetypal protagonists recycled through these classic legends and tales.

C: 您瞅瞅，只要给主角的英雄之旅中安排好各种奇遇，再让主角在这个过程中获得各种神奇的能力和宝物…最后华丽地战胜强敌！一个精彩的故事就这么成了！
E: Take a gander. All you have to do is set up a diverse range of encounters for a protagonist along a Hero's Journey, and let the protagonist gain various mystical abilities and treasures... Before magnificently defeating a powerful foe! That's how you make a wonderful story!

C: 「进入炉鼎」
E: "Our hero enters the elixir cauldron."

C: 你获得了「生灭灵芝」，可喜可贺。
E: You got a Life-Death Polypore. Well done.

C: 「此时{NICKNAME}想到，持明族乃是龙祖后裔，持明龙尊自然也身怀星神伟力…若能借到龙尊之力，必能使自己神功大成。」
E: "It was then that {NICKNAME} realized the Vidyadhara were descendants of dragons, whose high elders naturally possessed Aeonic powers... And if those powers could be borrowed, transcendence shall be achieved!"

C: 嗐，这些都是文学上的「夸张」手法！在下就学于曜青著名的高等学府「行风璧海」，乃是科班出身的文人，下笔必有章法，绝不会给您乱写的。
E: Hey, ever hear of hyperbole? I studied at the Royal Academy on the Yaoqing and I'm a professional playwright by trade. My writing has structure, and I would never be sloppy.

C: 到底还有多少试炼？
E: Just exactly how many trials are there now!?

C: 嘤嘤嘤！
E: *sob in tears*

C: 你哭什么？啊，是了！定是{NICKNAME}初为{F#人母}{M#人父}，虽非亲生亲养，却也感受到了天地禀赋于人的那份亲情感动！
E: What are you crying about? Ah, yes! {NICKNAME} has become a {F#mother}{M#father} for the very first time and despite not being one by the biological definition, our hero still feels that heavenly gift of affection!

C: 行吧，咱们接着说，铸成神兵所需的其余两大要素，自然就是咱们身处的这工造司了。工欲善其事，必先利其器。若没有此处的铸造设备和无根纯水，神器难成！
E: Alright, let's continue. The two other conditions needed to create the divine weapon are right here in our Artisanship Commission. As they say, you need the right tools for the job. Without the smelting equipment and Bona Aqua here, creating a divine weapon would be impossible!

C: 哈哈，我这茶庄别没有，就是茶水多。很高兴与商会建立正式的合作。
E: Haha, can't argue with that. Everyone loves my tea after all. Anyway, I'm glad to formally establish a cooperation with the merchant guild.

C: 再次睁开双眼，你发现自己来到了一个陌生的地方。
E: When you once again open your eyes, you realize you've arrived in an unfamiliar place.

C: 铆钉镇的商业广场，对吧？事不宜迟，赶快出发~
E: It's at the Rivet Town Plaza, right? Let's hit the road, there's no time like the present!

C: 这到底是个什么游戏？
E: What kind of game is this, exactly?

C: …你又在模仿我说话吗？
E: ...Back to copying me, huh?

C: 谢谢你，乔瓦尼先生。
E: Thank you, Mr. Giovanni.

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}和小三月！没想到第一个来到我们两人面前的居然是你们！
E: Oh, it's {NICKNAME} and March! I didn't expect you two to be the first ones to show up!

C: 另外，这是给你们的礼物：<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>。只要把芯片里的数据注入到以太灵中，就可以让它习得特殊固有能力了。
E: I have something else for you also: An <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Expansion Chip</color>. Integrating its data into an Aether Spirit will grant them new, innate abilities.

C: 欸嘿，其实我们也不知道……
E: Eh-he, to be honest, we don't actually know...

C: 哈～真是好激烈的对决啊。那些机关谜题也挺好玩，感觉这游戏确实还挺有意思的。
E: Ha~ Now that battle was really intense! Those puzzles were such a blast, too — I think I'm hooked!

C: 我开玩笑的，确实很有意思。
E: Just kidding. I'm actually enjoying myself.

C: 好活泼的女孩子！你看着…不像仙舟本地人呀？
E: Someone's full of energy! You... don't look like a Xianzh—

C: 报～上～名～来～！
E: and by their name reveal thyself to all⁓!

C: 又自顾自地走了…不知道他的话里有几分真，几分假。
E: And there he goes again... I just wonder how much of what he says is true.

C: ——我们一定要把那只以太灵夺回来！
E: ...We'll be taking back what's ours!

C: 又在四处捅娄子…我早该勒令你们这「后援团」解散才对。
E: Making a mess wherever you go... I should have disbanded this "support squad" months ago.

C: 精彩…真是精彩！真是酣畅淋漓的对决——我乔瓦尼•乔尔吉奥甘拜下风！
E: Impressive... Truly impressive! What a riveting duel! I, Giovanni di Giorgio, humbly concede!

C: 那边那个像水母一样的小机器人…应该就是黑塔女士说的<color=#dbc291ff>服务机器人</color>了吧？
E: See that robot over there, the one that looks like a jellyfish? That's probably <color=#dbc291ff>one of the service robots</color> Madam Herta was talking about, right?

C: 嘿嘿，冠军就是冠军，果然还是斗不过你呀！
E: Hehe, once a Champion, always a Champion, I still can't best you!

C: 我想领取福利。
E: I want to claim benefits.

C: 但在观看比赛后，我的想法彻底改变了——我理解了人们为之心醉的原因。
E: ...but after seeing it for myself, I can totally see why people are so taken in by it.

C: 而且，我听说这游戏并非只有小孩子才能参与…等我忙完了也要好好体验一把，哈哈哈。
E: I heard this game isn't just for kids... I might have a crack at it myself once I get the time, haha!

C: 小意思，都是老掉牙的设备了，对我来说也就是分分钟的事。
E: These obsolete contraptions are so last century. It's child's play for someone like me...

C: 好好好～都听你的。
E: Yeah, yeahhhh, if you say so⁓

C: 接下来的比赛，将由开拓者——
E: Aaaand in the next contest, please welcome... The Trailblazerrrrs⁓!

C: 隐去受害人姓名，只留下咱们几个镇伏鬼怪的英姿，拍些激烈战斗的留影，再配个带点刺激性的标题……
E: We won't reveal the names of any victims. We'll just post some pics and videos of the squad engaging in fierce battles with the supernatural! And then come up with some dramatic titles...

C: 多谢损友支持哈！
E: Hee-hee, thanks bestie.

C: 你误会了，我确实是为当年之战而来，只是…你还不配。
E: You misunderstand — I came for a rematch. It's just that... you are not a worthy opponent.

C: 咱俩可是忘年交。
E: She and I are best buddies.

C: 明白，我就是仙舟奇兵队长。
E: This has to be the strangest group of people on the Xianzhou...

C: 小桂子，这回是公务，不比咱们平时在街头那些小打小闹。你可别再那么兴奋了——
E: Little Gui, this is official business — it's nothing like the street fights we're always dealing with. You can stop being so excited...

C: ……说了许多借口，其实我只是很想念它。
E: ...M—Maybe that's all just a bunch of excuses... The truth is... I miss him.

C: 我就是想多出来玩一玩！我有什么错？
E: I just wanna play a little longer! What's so bad about that?

C: 你是干这个的，我可不行。只要我一闭上眼，就梦见自己和白露小姐不断周旋周旋周旋…比亲自上阵还累人。
E: Well aren't you lucky. As soon as I closed my eyes, I dreamt of endless running and circling and chasing after Lady Bailu... it was even more exhausting than doing it in real life.

C: 这摆烂发言让我想起某人…
E: You sound like someone I know...

C: 连判官大人也知道她！她还真是闲名远播啊。
E: Even a judge knows her! Her reputation sure does precede her...

C: 与人争斗，能预测对手的进退行动，这样的能力最重要不过——所以，聚成「燎原」的岁阳中，犀焰司掌着鉴往知来，预测休咎的职能。
E: In warfare, nothing is more important than being able to predict your opponent's movements. Among the fragments of Ignamar, Keralum was in charge of knowing the past and predicting the future.

C: 走火入魔？本座很清醒，不如说从未如此清醒过。
E: "Clouding my mind"? I've never been of clearer mind than I am right now.

C: 他这是怎么了？
E: What's with this guy?

C: 她不告而别，显然受人蒙骗。
E: She left without a word — someone clearly deceived her.

C: 她现在…在哪里！
E: ...Where is she!?

C: 寒鸦仔细检查了藿藿的体征。
E: Hanya carefully examined Huohuo's vital signs.

C: 寒鸦大人！绥园急报！被镇伏的岁阳…又有异动！
E: Madam Hanya! Urgent news from Fyxestroll Garden! The subdued heliobi are stirring again!

C: 简单，咱们把捉鬼……呃我是说「镇伏岁阳」的过程实录发出去就好了！我们现在可是给十王司当差，谁手上还能有比我们更劲爆的料啊？
E: That's the easy part — we just post some videos of us ghost hunting... Uh, I mean, subduing heliobi! We're working for the Ten-Lord's Commission after all — we're gonna have the best content out there!

C: 好吓人！
E: Very freaky!

C: 我们该走了，再见了，判官小姑娘，还有你{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
E: We should get out of here. Goodbye, Miss Judge, and to you, {M#dude}{F#lady}.

C: 若昔，我好想你…
E: Ruoxi, I miss you so much...

C: 符玄大人，那青雀小姐眼下还在这儿吗？
E: Diviner Fu Xuan, is this Miss Qingque still here at the moment?

C: 那当然，你都出现了…再加上我竟然梦见自己辞职创业、大发横财，这也太不正常了吧！我想我多半是不小心招上了那些会让人胡思乱想的幽魂吧……
E: Of course, you're all here after all... That and the fact that I dreamed about quitting my job and becoming a hugely successful entrepreneur, this is all too crazy! I imagine I must have attracted one of those spirits that makes people think wild things...

C: 先走一步，青雀小姐。
E: I'll be off now, Miss Qingque.

C: 我因此失业了。多亏了青雀大人宽宏大量，不计前嫌，给了我一份闲职让我勉强谋生。感恩青总！
E: I lost my job because of this. Thankfully, President Qingque was magnanimous enough to forgive me for my past wrongs, and gave me an easy job so I could scrape a living. My gratitude to President Qing!

C: 你刚才看到了许多不同的琼玉牌玩法，它们每一个都很有潜力。但我心中坚信，没有哪个比眼前这个模式更有传播力。
E: You just saw lots of different game modes for Jade Tiles, they all have a lot of potential. But I am convinced that none of them have the wide appeal of this mode before you.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么样你喜欢这种感觉吗？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Do you love how it feels?

C: …前面就是凶宅了吧。
E: ...That must be the haunted house up ahead.

C: …住手。
E: ...Stop.

C: 紧闭的门，需要钥匙才能打开。
E: A door that is sealed shut, it requires a key to open.

C: 古旧的铃铛。似乎是用于招来小动物的道具，先拿走吧，也许能用得上。
E: An old bell. It looks like an item used to call a small animal. Let's take it, it may come in handy later.

C: 从「7」开始…
E: Start from "7"...

C: …不过，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
E: ...Although, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.

C: …我以为你讨厌我才避而不见。
E: ...I thought you avoided me because you hated me.

C: 明明都魔阴身了，却因为姐姐的事强撑着一口气在…难怪岁阳会附身在她身上。
E: She's already mara-struck, but she still managed to hang in there all because of her big sister... No wonder the heliobus possessed her.

C: 大人请看……
E: Judge, here...

C: 三月小姐别担心。总、总之，我们先回绥园吧，藏月瓠里的…东西还需要镇伏呢。
E: Miss March, don't worry. I—In any case, we will return to Fyxestroll Garden. The thing... in the Lunaumbra Gourd needs to be restrained.

C: 还剩下一些岁阳碎片，我们慢慢处理吧。
E: There are still some fragments left. Let's take our time with this.

C: 只要操控机巧鸟靠近这些岁阳碎片，藏月瓠就会自动将它们吸锁收服。
E: We just need to move the cycrane closer to these heliobus fragments, and the Lunaumbra Gourd will capture them.

C: 你为什么找上三月？
E: Why did you look for March?
Huh!?

C: …好嘞，老规矩，你来发帖吧。
E: ...Will do. We'll do the usual — you do the posting.

C: 早知道账号就叫「球棒侠」了…
E: On hindsight, this account should have been called Baseballer Hero...

C: …没什么印象了。
E: ...No impression whatsoever.

C: …它才出生没多久，可能还没习惯这里的生活。
E: ...It only just spawned not long ago, so it may not be used to life here yet.

C: （向它讲述刚才的事）
E: (Recount what just happened)

C: …那些可怜的巡海游侠，至死也没发现，此人正是「毁灭」纳努克的化身。
E: ...Even till their deaths, those poor Galaxy Rangers had no idea this person was actually the incarnation of Nanook, the Destruction.

C: 这案情的确离奇：下任大守护者从雪原中回来，说前任大守护者可可利亚已经背叛了贝洛伯格，并被自己就地正法。
E: The circumstances behind this case are indeed bizarre: The incoming Supreme Guardian came back from the Snow Plains, claiming that the previous Supreme Guardian, Cocolia, had betrayed Belobog — and thus summarily got executed on the spot.

C: 很好！我忠实的家仆哟，我正面临选择。请用你那足以昭示未来的舞步，来为我揭晓——究竟什么样的饮品，才配得上这一路的颠沛流离。
E: Well said, my loyal servant! Now, I find myself at a crossroads. Show me the answer through your dance steps that portend the future: Which beverage befits this extraordinary journey?

C: （就是这杯饮料了，快递给它吧。）
E: (That's the drink. Now I should deliver it.)

C: （舒翁重新描述了一遍，现在应该能找到那杯正确的饮料了。）
E: (Siobhan just described it again. Now I should be able to find the correct drink.)

C: 大…是大。
E: Big... it's big.

C: 汪！酒吧里有只发狂的怪物哇！
E: Woof! There's a frenzied monster in the lounge!

C: 将杯子从冰块池中取出来。
E: Remove the glass from the ice cube pool.
...Huh!? Oh... I see...

C: 想到要和你打交道就恼火。啧，我就勉为其难地教教你，作为服务员的自我修养！
E: The very thought of talking to you annoys me. Tsk, fine! I'll show you how to be a competent attendant!

C: 先转会搅拌棒。
E: Move the mixer first.

C: 春宵苦短啊！
E: Don't make decisions you'll regret!

C: 还说什么…现在的舒翁肯定会答应她，感觉像是认识了很长时间呢。
E: She even said... Siobhan would definitely accept her offer this time... It's as if they've known each other for ages.

C: 你是傻的吗？
E: Are you simple or something?

C: 那个蠢货很快就会过来，最后给您个忠告——和它交流，要引它说出真正的想法！
E: That fool will be here soon. Here's a piece of advice: When you're talking to them, try to make them reveal their true thoughts!

C: …装饰物？
E: ...Decorations?

C: …分层？
E: ...Layering?

C: …你始终在试探我。
E: ...You've been testing me from the beginning.

C: 你是想要吓我离开。
E: You were trying to scare me into leaving.

C: 世间的苦痛将我的脊背压垮，而我却连那可口的甘霖都无缘品尝！
E: The world's bitterness weighs heavy on my shoulders, yet I do not even have a chance to taste that delectable beverage!

C: 因为我热爱调饮。
E: Because I'm passionate about mixing drinks.

C: 当哈努兄弟转头时，<color=#f29e38ff>长按空格</color>来停止跳动。
E: When Brother Hanu turns, <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} and hold space</color> to stop moving.

C: 现在，哈努兄弟转头的持续时间将发生变化。
E: Right now, the duration of Brother Hanu's turn will be changed.

C: 喂，你该不会是个味盲吧？醋和糖浆都分不出来的那种，对着陌生人喊妈妈的那种？
E: Hey, are you unable to taste flavors, or something? You know, the kind of person who can't tell vinegar from sugar? Like the kind of person who would call a complete stranger "Mom"?

C: 玩啥？
E: Play what?

C: 你将银狼小鸟摆放在街机上
E: You place the Silbird Wolf on the arcade machine

C: …你脑子中病毒了吗？还念念不忘，你又不是我的星际网络账号……
E: ...Has your brain been infected with a virus? Me, think of you all the time? Don't kid yourself. It's not like you're my Interastral Network account.

C: 俗话说得好，胜败乃PVP常事，偶尔赢我一局，你也不至于激动得都快掉帧了吧？
E: You know what they say about PVP games: You win a few, and you lose a few. No need to get all worked up just because you beat me in an occasional round, is there? You're about to start dropping frames.

C: 为表歉意，刚刚的基础款黄金小鸟就送给您了。
E: As amends, you can have this basic Golden Bird you saw earlier.

C: 你那是什么表情…放心，这个投影我也做了信息加密，不会被发现的。
E: Why are you looking at me like that? Don't worry, I encrypted the hologram. No one's gonna notice.

C: 而且到时候一下车，我就往路边支个摊子一坐，帕姆就再也不用担心经费问题了！
E: And the next time we disembark, I'll just set up a roadside stall doing this, and Pom-Pom will never have to worry about our expenses again!

C: 我觉得比起黑天鹅小姐…
E: Instead of Miss Black Swan, Back'n & Forth...

C: 一起玩…什么？
E: Games?

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，待会可以稍微等等我吗？
E: Oh, right. {NICKNAME}, can you wait a while for me later?

C: 你们两个怎么还有心思开玩笑！卢卡选手！出大事了！
E: Are you two really joking right now? Luka, we've got a serious situation!

C: 可他们也不知道我和托帕小姐见面的事啊？这…总不会是托帕小姐……
E: But they didn't know about my meeting with Miss Topaz, did they? It couldn't possibly be... Miss Topaz... behind this...

C: 糟糕，他听见了，快跑！
E: Oh no, he heard us, run!

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎来到星天演武仪典邀请赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators and friends, welcome to the Luminary Wardance invitational match!

C: 活动邀请？
E: An event invitation?

C: 可是，我两只手臂都还在，该怎么使用这机械义肢呢？
E: But I still have both arms. How am I supposed to use this mechanical prosthetic?

C: 你打开游戏机，一串患有社恐的文字以惊人的速度从眼前逃离。但假如你拥有足够强大的动态视力，就能轻易看清它的内容。
E: You switch on the arcade machine, and strings of words afflicted with social phobia run away from your vision at a startling speed. However, had you owned a more powerful dynamic vision, you would have read its content with ease.

C: 这是我做的游戏机，{NICKNAME}，希望你能从中享受到游戏的乐趣。
E: This is the arcade machine I made, {NICKNAME}. I hope you can experience the joy of video games with it.

C: 而且它的名字也颇具巧思——「扳手」与「手拌」形成了谐音与回文的精妙结构，而我的手恰似一对「扳手」，令人忍俊不禁。
E: There's even a clever wordplay in its name: "Wrench" and "drenched" almost rhyme, and I have wrenches for hands! You can't help but laugh, can you?

C: 要暂别熟悉的生活，前往未知的世界展开冒险。
E: You'll step out of your comfort zone to set forth on adventures into uncharted territories.

C: 要制作最符合后现代表象本体论的不锈钢汉堡，需要兼顾基础矩阵的离散变量，并应用主动土压力对丙烯涂料进行能指剥离。
E: To create a stainless steel burger that best fits the apparent ontology of postmodernity, one must take into consideration the discrete variables in the fundamental matrices and apply active earth pressure in the separation and extraction of signifiers from acrylic paint.

C: 好耶！我们以后一定能成为最好的开拓伙伴！
E: Yay! I'm sure we'll be the bestest Trailblazing buddies!

C: 没错，我当时就不得不亲手碾碎了一个…怎么可能啦，又不是犯罪团伙！
E: Yep! When I joined, I had to crush a... Just kidding! Why would you even think that? Haha! We're not a crime syndicate!

C: 二十多个枕头也是生活必需品吗？
E: Do you really need over <unbreak>20</unbreak> pillows, though?

C: 列车长大清早就来我的房间，一定是来给我送早餐的吧！
E: The Express conductor came to my room so early in the morning — must be to bring me breakfast!

C: 确定没有危险？
E: Are you sure it'll be safe?

C: 继续前进吧。
E: Let's continue onward.

C: 你沿着那条捷径前进。道路一直向前延伸，将你引去了尽头的某个房间……
E: You follow the shortcut as it extends toward a room at the far end of the hypogeum...

C: 唉，看到这些玩意，我突然有种感慨——盛筵难再啊。
E: *sigh* I suddenly feel quite emotional when I look at these artifacts. After all, they are proof that good times never last.
*Gurgle*

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡。呜呜。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的脸好奇怪，哈哈。让我也试试——）
E: Grumph! Grumph grumph. Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa} looks so silly, haha. I'll try it too—)

C: 摸摸它的下巴。
E: Pet its chin.

C: 陪着它。
E: Stay with it.

C: 呜，呜嗡嗡…（好哦…感，感觉压力山大。）
E: Grumphhhh... (O-Okay... I'm feeling really overwhelmed here.)

C: 它看着你，你看着它，名为沉默的列车在两个干瞪眼的家伙间疾驰而过——作为开拓者，你决定率先打破沉默。
E: It stares at you. You stare at it. An Express named Silence races through between two wide-eyed individuals locked in a staring contest. As a Trailblazer, you choose to speak first.

C: 劝说失败，这孩子绝了——没别的办法，考完再说。
E: Convincing it didn't work. This kid's on another level... Guess you'll have to wait until after the exam.

C: 难道不该是这块熔岩真的很烫吗？如果感到害怕的话，现在回家还来得及。
E: Shouldn't we be more worried about how hot this lava actually is? If you're scared, it's not too late to head back home.

C: 懂了，培养系统，启动！
E: Got it. Build system, activate!

C: 如果你也想学两手鉴定之术，不妨每天来我这儿帮帮忙，我也会将店内收益分给你做报酬的。
E: If you're keen on mastering the art of appraisal, why not lend a hand at my shop every day? In return, I'll cut you in on the profits.

C: 而它的模样，无疑让你想起了某位故人……
E: And its appearance unmistakably reminds you of someone from your past...

C: 但愿不会太棘手。
E: Hope it won't be too tricky.

C: 好难啊！
E: This is so hard!

C: 「体谅一下啦，即兴创作可是很难的。作为补偿，我会把你的部分讲得更绘声绘色哦！」
E: "Cut me some slack. Making up a story on the spot is really hard! But I promise, I'll make it up to you. I'll make your scenes as vivid and dramatic as possible!"

C: 不明觉厉，姑且试试…
E: I have no idea what's going on, but it sounds cool... I'll give it a shot.

C: 试运营的菜单也准备好了。放心，都是我的拿手菜，保证没问题！
E: The trial menu is ready too! Don't worry. These are all my best dishes. There won't be any issues!

E: We remember the village chief's request was to revitalize the restaurant. Making a profit was more of a side effect.

C: 迷！肚皮鼓鼓的，心里暖呼呼的，好高兴迷！
E: Mem! My tummy's full and my heart's all warm. I'm so happy, mem!

C: 哈、哈哈，当然不会，我已经是个成熟的厨师了，这种评审当然不在话下。没问题的！
E: Ha, haha... Of course not! I'm a professional chef now. A little food review's nothing! Totally under control!

C: （同意缇安的观点）
E: (Agree with Trianne)

C: 那句话怎么说的…现在是知识付费的时代，想知道新信息，就得掏钱。
E: Hey, how does the saying go...? "Knowledge ain't free these days." You want the good stuff, you gotta pay up.

C: 少了个能吃苦的？
E: Missing a Bitter Overlord or something?

C: 怕你等会就没心情了。可别输得太难看了啊，万敌主厨。

C: ——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，我们永远在你的身后迷！
E: Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon, we'll always have your back, mem!

C: 迷！冲冲！成为四星级餐馆后，村长有惊喜要送给各位迷！

C: 就当给你的绩效奖吧。
E: Consider it a bonus for your good work.

C: 我对玩乐并无兴趣，能称得上幸事的，唯有——

C: 谢谢，我们会继续努力的！
E: Thank you! We'll keep doing our best!

E: Can you maybe stop copying how others talk...

C: 如尼卡多利那般，\n终有一日，他也难逃疯狂。
E: Like Nikador,\nHe cannot escape madness's clutches.

C:
今时争辩，
正恰如往日。

今时退却，
却将无未来。
E:
The discussions today
Are the same as those in times past.
Retreating now
Will forever deny us the future.

C: 时光也因此沉默，\n唯有叹息。
E: And time thus becomes silent,\nPainted with sighs only.

C: 多洛斯城的花天锦地，\n令人心和言语变得纷杂缭乱。
E: The mesmerizing moneyed charm of Dolos city\nTurns minds and tongues into a whirlwind of confusion.

C: 「去采撷财宝吧，贪婪的葡萄。」\n「等你在宝箱中重拾『诡计』的记忆，」\n「我再将救你一命的报酬讨要。」
E: "Go, collect treasure, you greedy little grape.\nOnce you regain the memories of 'Trickery' from chests,\nThen I will claim the reward for saving your life."

C: 你看见一颗流星，\n如同最具创造力的笔尖，\n在回环的夜中刻下顿号。
E: A shooting star flashes by,\nlike the most brilliant pen,\ncarving staccatos into the endless loop of night.

C: 让我找找，\n翁法罗斯这本漫长的书卷……\n缺的是哪几章？
E: Let me uncover,\nthe missing chapters...\nin this long chronicle of Amphoreus.

C: 翁法罗斯从此有神话流传——\n一匹巨龙将裂土掣曳拼合，\n使大地再度完固。
E: And from that day forth, Amphoreus had a new legend...\nOf how a giant dragon collected the broken lands,\nAnd once again made the earth whole.

C: 我曾想过为它们找寻家园，\n也曾试过在心中与它们沟通。
E: I once thought about finding them a home,\nAnd tried to communicate with them in my heart.

C: 「那是吉姆•罗杰面包味汽水。」 ——丹恒 「里面的三月七主题蓝粉色又是怎么回事？」 ——{NICKNAME} 「那是色素。」 ——丹恒 「你们两个，不要破坏回忆的气氛啊！」 ——三月七
E: "That's Jim Roger Bread Soda." — Dan Heng "And what's with that March 7th-themed blue and pink color in there?" — {NICKNAME} "That's just food coloring." — Dan Heng "Hey, you two! Don't ruin the nostalgic mood!" — March 7th

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n救城建业的将领，\n亦或高高在上的权贵？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who would win?</color>\nThe general who saved the city,\nOr the high and mighty with their privileged authority?

C: 启程之日，旌旗蔽空。\n人们仰望声势浩大的战盟，\n眼中映出一座黄金色的城。
E: On the day the journey began, the sky was an expanse of fluttering banners.\nThe people gazed upon the overwhelming military alliance,\nA golden city reflected in their eyes.

C: 其时王女亲自收殓遗物，\n却在地上见到一盘残局。
E: When the princess personally cleaned up the possessions of the dead,\nShe caught sight of an incomplete game on the ground.

C:
自高处投下的石子，
砸中了少女的王冠。
人群惊叫后退——
惧怕君王的怒火殃及。
E:
The rock tossed from up high
Hit the girl's crown.
The crowd shrieked and retreated...
Fearful of {M#a}{F#the} ruler's flames of fury.

C: ——被凯撒褫夺封号者，\n一位怨毒的贵族，\n如是说。
E: ...A vengeful aristocrat,\nOne whose title was stripped by the Imperator,\nthus spoke.

C:
士卒猎杀飞鸟，
奔马踏死群狼。
战车碾碎巨木，
皇后斩首寿瘟。
E:
The pawns slay the birds,
The knights trample the wolves.
The rooks smash the trees,
And the queen severs the head of pestilence.

C: 欢歌持续了许久——
E: The music of revelry continued for a long time —

C: 「竟敢告状，此仇…后会有期！」\n少女踢踏着逃离。
E: "Exposing me like this... I'll get my revenge!"\nThe girl ran away in a fit.

C: 「您的子民个个能歌善舞，」\n「怎唯独我没有一副好歌喉？」
E: "All of your people sing and dance with skill,"\n"So why do I alone lack a good singing voice?"

C: 因她已见过洞外的天空，\n愿意相信承诺中的未来，\n拥抱一份缥缈的希望。
E: For she had glimpsed the sky beyond the cave,\nAnd chose to believe in the promised future,\nEmbracing a hope as fragile as mist.

C: 白垩是一种矿物，\n天然的粉笔。
E: Final...\nAn eventuality for students, a test for knowledge gained.

C: <color=#9e5738>卡厄斯兰那</color>。
E: <color=#9e5738>Khaslana</color>.

C: 不，即便不知「爱」为何物，\n那幸福的过往也绝非谎言。
E: No. Even though he knew not the meaning of "love,"\nThat happy past was not a lie someone wove.

C: 真相不再重要，\n男人只是迈步向前。\n他不愿相信，但愿意承认。
E: The truth no longer important,\nThe man simply took another step forward.\nHe wasn't willing to believe it, but was willing to acknowledge it.

C: 漫无止境的轮回里，\n有一些时刻，\n男人感觉万物消散，如同梦境。
E: In the endless cycles,\nThere were some moments,\nWhen the man felt everything dissolve like a dream.

C: 「你终究会来——」\n他并不惊慌，任凭火种在体内蔓延，\n「但下次记得，准时一点。」
E: "You finally came —"\nHe does not seem shocked, and lets the Coreflame take over his shell.\n"Be more punctual next time, if you will."

C: 队伍的首端…\n通往阿格莱雅的居所。
E: At the head of the line...\nwas the path to Aglaea's abode.

C: 「是她将要丢弃的废作。」
E: "She's about to get rid of her failed pieces."

C: 「此为聆听吾之神谕的代价。」 神明已为她的命运写下注脚， 她已知晓，她早已知晓。
E: "That is the price you must pay for listening to my prophecy." The gods have already determined her destiny and her passing. She knew. She has long known.

C: 「呵…说吧，一无所有的小女孩，你能和我赌什么？」
E: "Heh... Tell me, little girl with nothing to your name, what could you possibly bet against me?"

C: 然而无人知晓的是，目送那位名为风堇的黄金裔少女登上通向天空的彩虹桥后，奋战一生的「阳雷龙骑」伫立在黎明云崖之上溘然长逝。
E: Yet unknown to all, after watching the young Chrysos Heir named Hyacine ascend the rainbow bridge to the sky, the Daythunder Dromas Knight, who had fought all her life, passed away while standing atop Dawncloud.

C: 「缇缇是万花筒，她的身体里好像藏着一千个缇缇。每一个缇缇，都是*我们*的好伙伴！」
E: "Trity is a kaleidoscope, it's like there are a thousand Tritys inside her. And every single Trity is our wonderful companion!"

C: 落款是…「星穹餐车」。
E: Signed... "Astral Food Express."

C: 「奶香冷切嘟噜鸟排，请用。」
E: "Chilled cream Dulu Bird Cutlets, please enjoy."

C: 丹恒的餐品随后端出。「这一盘是凉拌鳞渊海蜇，其名『化龙妙法』。」
E: Then came Dan Heng's dish. "This is Cold Marinated Scalegorge Jellyfish, titled 'Transmutation Arcanum.'"

C: 第<unbreak>39665</unbreak>次循环，无机体Doril<unbreak>816</unbreak>订立集群协议，社会的概念形成。但受限于资源，无机体互相吞并算力，重新回归统一思维。\n第<unbreak>50121</unbreak>次循环，无机体Chaoz<unbreak>666</unbreak>在遭到算力吞并时，选择杀死对方，「毁灭」的行为首次在翁法罗斯形成。本次循环末尾，δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>受纳努克的瞥视成为绝灭大君。
E: By the <unbreak>39,665</unbreak>th cycle, inorganic Doril<unbreak>816</unbreak> established a cluster protocol, marking the birth of the concept of society. Yet, due to resource scarcity, inorganics cannibalized each other's computational power, reverting to a unified consciousness.\nIn the <unbreak>50,121</unbreak>st cycle, inorganic Chaoz<unbreak>666</unbreak> chose to kill the aggressor when subjected to a computational power takeover. The act of "Destruction" was conducted in Amphoreus for the first time. At the end of that cycle, δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> received a gaze from Nanook and became a Lord Ravager.

C:
筑城纪元6█3年，毕业于贝洛伯格士官学校工学院，获地髓能源工程博士学位。
筑城纪元6█4年，开始任职于银鬃铁卫技术部。
筑城纪元6█8年，领导某项目取得重大技术突破；同年离开技术部，开始经营机械屋「永动」，同时以摇滚歌手身份开展相关活动至今。
星核危机解决前夕，多次协助外来者通缉犯成功逃避银鬃铁卫追捕，并在冲突中成功击败铁卫军官和戍卫官。
E:
6█3 AF — Graduated with a PhD in Geomarrow Energy Engineering from the Engineering Department in the Belobog Cadet School.
6█4 AF — Started work at the Silvermane Guards Technology Division.
6█8 AF — Reached significant breakthrough as lead researcher on a specific project. Left the Technology Division at the same year, and started running the Neverwinter Workshop and performing as a rock'n'roll singer till now.
Before the Stellaron Crisis' resolution, she repeatedly helped the wanted outsiders escape from the Silvermane Guards, and successfully defeated Silvermane Guard officers and the captain.

C: 在「货币战争」中，逐步招募你的团队，组成<color=#f29e38ff>8-<unbreak>10</unbreak>人队伍</color>进行战斗，击败对手！
E: In Currency Wars, gradually recruit your team, form <color=#f29e38ff>a team of 8-<unbreak>10</unbreak> members</color>, and defeat your opponents!

C:
如何培养主输出角色：
1. 优先为其升星，1/2/3费角色可追3星，4/5费角色升2星。
2. 优先为其穿戴满3件适合的进阶装备。
3. 为主输出角色激活其至少2个所属羁绊。
E:
How to develop your main DPS character:
1. Prioritize increasing their Star Rating: 1/2/3-cost characters can aim for 3 stars, 4/5-cost characters should be raised to 2 stars.
2. Prioritize equipping them with 3 suitable pieces of advanced equipment.
3. Activate at least 2 of the main DPS character's affiliated Bonds.

C: 每轮结束后，当前战力<color=#f29e38ff>低于目标战力</color>的玩家将被淘汰。整局对战中，每名玩家<color=#f29e38ff>仅有一次免受淘汰的机会</color>。
E: After each round, players with combat power <color=#f29e38ff>below the target level</color> will be eliminated. During the entire match, each player <color=#f29e38ff>has only one chance to avoid elimination</color>.

C: 滑溜地格：造物在跳跃后会继续向前滑动一段距离
E: Slippery Tile: Creations will continue sliding for a distance after each jump.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。打败敌人可以获得<color=#f29e38ff>角色经验材料</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>光锥经验材料</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>信用点</color>等。

C: 拾取<color=#f29e38ff>热能核心</color>后，携带核心靠近<color=#f29e38ff>灯炉基座</color>，便能启动<color=#f29e38ff>照雪灯炉</color>，并在灯炉的周围生成一片热能力场。

C: 由于存在部分<color=#f29e38ff>模糊的记忆</color>，在探索回忆时对话中会出现<color=#f29e38ff>■■■</color>的内容。

C: 击破带有<color=#f29e38ff>苏乐达标志</color>的道具，则可以给<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表时间」技能槽</color>充能。

C: 当「贼灵」处于特殊区间内，需要<color=#f29e38ff>松开</color>按键停止祷言，令他不备后再<color=#f29e38ff>长按</color>按键，将「贼灵」缉拿归案。

C: 快速解锁后，可直接挑战记录中的最高3星通关关卡，3星通关后，<color=#f29e38ff>视同3星通关全部前置关卡，并获得前置关卡的全部奖励</color>。

Once you have passed that stage with 3-stars, <color=#f29e38ff>all the previous stages will be immediately cleared with a 3-star rating, and all rewards from those stages will be delivered</color>.

C: 关卡结算的积分数据受两个因素影响：幻象剩余血量百分比，成功击败幻象后的剩余行动值。如果未击败幻象，只计算其剩余血量百分比。

C: 这次咱可没拖后腿！
E: You couldn't have done it without me!

C: 拥有与追求理想都并非罕见之事，但在理想破灭之后仍能重新开始——这份意志，会带他走向更远。
E: Having an ideal and pursuing it is not rare, but being able to start anew after that ideal is shattered — this kind of willpower will carry him far.

C: 留下来吧。
E: Stay.

C: 这才像样。
E: That's more like it.

C: 黑塔女士是空间站的传说，关于她的故事，连我也能说出不少。
E: Madam Herta is a legend on the space station. Even I can tell you plenty of stories about her.

C: 剑，仍未摧折…！
E: The sword remains unbroken...!

C: 任务还没结束，不能松懈啊。
E: The mission's not done, so neither am I.

C: Caladbolg II！
E: Caladbolg II!

C: 以前，母亲他们开讨论会时，也会让我在场，希露瓦总是不厌其烦地解答我的各种问题…这些日子，似乎已经过去很久了。
E: I remember I'd be there when mother and the rest of them would convene, and Serval would always patiently answer any questions I had... *sigh* I'm starting to feel like that was a long, long time ago.

C: 整理战斗情报的工作就交给你了，佩拉。
E: I'll be needing a combat report, Pela.

C: 拿出魄力来。
E: Show your courage.

C: 病人有各种各样，我也得用不同的面孔去对待他们，有些人要温柔一些，有些人不狠起心来说两句，他根本不把病当回事…对症下药也是医生的职责。
E: I see all kinds of patients. Some require a gentle touch, others need a stern talking to before they take things seriously... Haha, a doctor should always use the right cure for the right person.

C: 虎克闭着眼睛都能搞定~
E: Ha! Hook could do this blindfolded⁓

C: 数学太好的烦恼，就是人人都爱把你当成人形计算器。所以呀，自从坐上这个位置，我就很少跟别人说起我在这方面的专精了。
E: The trouble with being too good at math is that everyone treats you like a human calculator. So yeah, that's why I rarely talk about my expertise in that area.

C: 昔日仇敌或死或擒，故交好友风流云散。这么想来，我确确实实已是个「老人」了…
E: My past enemies are either dead or captured, and my past friends are scattered to the winds. Now that I think about it, I am indeed an old man...

C: 雷霆，在此！
E: Hear this thunder!

C: 是个出航的好日子，不是么？
E: It's a good day to set sail, isn't it?

C: 稀客啊，是要占问吉凶么？不用惊讶，你的来意早已在卦象中应验。
E: Honored guest, would you like to know your fortune? No need to act surprised — your reason for coming has already been foretold by the hexagram.

C: 再多来些，便可购一柄新剑！
E: A few more like this and I can buy a new sword!

C: 「等留名史册之后，还能做些什么？」我去问将军这个问题，结果他说自己压根就没想过成为将军，所以回答不了，让我自己想，哎……
E: "What can one do after one has made history?" I once asked the general this question, but he said he can't answer it because he never wanted to be a general, and that I should try to answer it myself. Um...

C: 呃，前面那位，非得去惹它吗？
E: Maybe this one's not a customer...

C: 无需紧张。
E: Do not fret.

C: 承十王敕…
E: By the order of the Ten-Lords...

C: 有差事没办完…又还阳了。
E: There's unfinished business... Back to the world of the living.

C: 我在放空自己的时候，青雀也在休息。我在忙的时候，她也在休息…她到底是怎么做到的？太卜司的工作肯定比十王司轻松吧……
E: It seems like Qingque is always on a break. When I'm relaxing, she's relaxing, and when I get swamped with work, guess what...? She's still relaxing! I guess the Divination Commission has a pretty light workload...

C: 藿藿：嗯？这样…这样就好了吧？\n尾巴：好了吧。
E: Huohuo: Hmm? So... did I do it?\nTail: Next.

C: 第一次见素裳那会儿，她还在素衣大人怀里美美嘬手指呢，包庇她逃学、挨素衣大人骂的场面仿佛也就在昨日…怎么想都是我老了，哎。
E: When I first met Sushang, she was still in Suyi's arms, sucking her thumb. It feels like it was just yesterday when I was helping her skip classes and being scolded by Suyi... I'm getting old.

C: 椒丘，别光动脑子，也爱护点自己。
E: Jiaoqiu, don't just focus on exercising your intellect. Take some care of yourself too.

C: 来得正好！
E: Right on time!

C: 瞧着点。
E: Watch yourself.

C: 人生嘛，总是充满谜题。
E: Life is just full of puzzles.

C: 琴音周而复始。
E: Eternal melody.

C: 投机取巧不是什么大事，但光明正大地把手伸到别人的口袋里——这事可做得不够漂亮。
E: Taking a shortcut or two isn't a big deal, but blatantly dipping your hands into someone else's pockets — that lacks finesse.

C: 呼——闲着也是闲着，不如跟我玩点什么吧？
E: All this free time, why not make the most of it with a game?

C: 哟！真正会玩的人入场了。跟着你咯。
E: Look who's graced us with their presence! Guess I'll be in your shadow now.

C: 暮雨，终将落下。
E: Dusk's rain... it too shall fall.

C: 哥哥，我们再像小时候一样，一起演奏吧。
E: Let's perform together again like we used to, brother.

C: 谐乐，即将齐奏。
E: The harmony will soon play in unison.

C: 从踏上战场那一天起，我就明白燃烧的羽翼终会有熄灭的时候。我只希望，在回到大地之前，能够看一眼天空中…那最为明亮的光。
E: From the day I set foot on the battlefield, I knew that my blazing wings would eventually be extinguished. All I can hope is, before I return to the earth, I'll be able to see... the brightest light in the sky.

C: 每一次重逢也是新的相遇。你好，我是「星期日」，一介普通的搭车客。
E: Every reunion is also a new encounter. Hello, I am "Sunday," a humble passenger.

C: 不算什么。
E: It's of no consequence.

C: 时代变了，亲爱的。
E: Times have changed, darling.

C: 此人忍法高超、谈吐不凡，可称得上是文武两道的忍者•大师。在下尚不能追及彼等心境，仍当修行！
E: This person's ninjutsu is superb, and his eloquence is extraordinary, making him a ninja master of both literary and martial arts. I cannot yet attain his state of mind, so I must continue to practice!

C: 伪饰。
E: Just a facade.

C: 这个大家伙，该找谁帮忙好……
E: Who can help us with this big guy...

C: 淬火而生的枪与剑，也会在岁月的腐蚀下磨损。战场上我唯一仰赖的，便是这副不死之躯。
E: Spears and swords forged in flames also wear down with the corrosion of time. On the battlefield, the only thing I can rely on is this undying body.

C: 遗憾啊！
E: What a shame!

C: 你听说过多洛斯城吗？千年前，喵喵教和汪汪教在那里大战，最后喵喵教打败了汪汪教，作为喵喵教的圣女，我继承了教派大旗…听着很假？那是，骗你玩儿嘛，但我小时候可喜欢讲这个故事啦。
E: Ever heard of Dolos? A thousand years ago, the Meow-Meow faith and the Woof-Woof faith clashed there in an epic battle. The Meow-Meow faith triumphed, and as their Holy Maiden, I inherited their sacred powers — What's that? You think it's fake? Well, it is. But wasn't it fun? I used to love telling this story when I was a kid!

C: 别用时间拖垮敌人…无趣。
E: Don't try to stall your enemies... Tedious.

C: 使用正确的攻击方式回应【巴特鲁斯】的谜题，【巴特鲁斯】会立即改变谜题，并对其造成基于其生命上限百分比的物理属性伤害。当【巴特鲁斯】受到致命伤害时，会离开战斗并令我方全体能量恢复。
E: Use the correct attack method to respond to "Bartholos"'s brainteaser, and "Bartholos" will immediately change the brainteaser, taking Physical DMG based on a percentage of its Max HP. When "Bartholos" takes fatal damage, it leaves the battle, and regenerates Energy for all targets.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成物理属性伤害，目标生命值越高造成的伤害越高。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target. The higher the target's HP, the higher the DMG dealt.

C: 我方可选择1名角色，随后对选定的我方角色造成冰属性伤害并使其陷入【幻身】状态，【幻身】状态下的我方角色及其召唤物<u>离场</u>。同时召唤【致幻人鱼】，代替该离场角色继续战斗，【致幻人鱼】视为我方角色。
E: The target can select 1 character. Then, deals Ice DMG to the selected character and causes them to enter the "Phantom Illusion" state. In "Phantom Illusion" state, the target character and their summon are <u>Departed</u>. At the same time, summons "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" to replace the Departed character in battle. "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" is considered as a non-friendly target.

E: Im Anfang war die Tat

E: Guillotine of the Weak

C: 「齐响诗班」神主日
E: "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus

C: 流萤没法恢复「做梦」的机能，只能藉由银狼的手术来获取一次入梦机会。就算你早已忘记，流萤也会尽力去赴重逢的约定。
E: Firefly couldn't recover her ability to "dream," and could only get one chance to enter a dream through Silver Wolf's hacking. Even if you'd already forgotten, Firefly would do her best to keep the promise of reunion.

C: 大丽花称自己的天性并非背叛，而是「贪心」。黑天鹅怀疑大丽花的坦诚，大丽花则表露，她想要说动黑天鹅一同探究梦主的秘密。
E: The Dahlia claimed her true nature was not betrayal, but rather "greed." Black Swan doubted The Dahlia's sincerity, while The Dahlia revealed she wanted to persuade Black Swan to investigate the Dreammaster's secret together.

C: 花火与知更鸟会搞出些大动静，破除十二时刻。流萤则会为你们破除原始梦境，然后坠入太一之梦，迎来第二次死亡。若梦境与现实完全融合，流萤的死亡就会成为事实，反之则有一线生机。砂金揭开底牌，称公司舰队并非为正面对抗星期日而来，而是为给梦中的「存护」之心打下根基。
E: Sparkle and Robin would create some chaos to break through the Twelve Hours. Firefly then needed to breach the Primordial Dreamscape, only to then fall into Ena's Dream, facing her second death. If the dreamscape and reality fully merged, that death would become real. If not, there was still hope. Aventurine revealed his trump card: the IPC fleet hadn't come for a direct confrontation with Sunday, but to seed the Preservation's heart into the dream.

C: 生来拥有翅膀的鸟儿，飞上天际时不需要理由。知更鸟祈求「同谐」庇护信奉祂的人们，为此献唱。以美梦的名义，谐乐大典开幕。
E: Birds born with wings needed no reason to soar into the sky. Robin prayed for Harmony's protection on THEIR believers and began her song. In the name of the sweet dream, the Charmony Festival began.

C: 在蚀心影魔「困难」难度中，达成3个挑战目标
E: Complete 3 challenge goals in the Corrupting Shadowfiend challenge in Hard mode

C: 累计获得#4点荣誉值
E: Obtain #4 Honor in total

C: 【<u>会心</u>】层数越多，造成的追加攻击伤害越高，我方目标发动追加攻击时，获得【<u>会心</u>】。
E: The more "<u>Critical Boost</u>" stacks, the higher the Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt. When ally targets launch Follow-Up ATKs, gains "<u>Critical Boost</u>."

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个3星方程。战斗中自动激活所有小于等于3星的方程
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Equation(s) of 3-star rarity. Automatically activates all Equations of 3-star rarity or below during combat.

E: Occurrence

E: Lament, Lost Soul

E: Outgrow the Old, Espouse the New

E: Break Boost

E: DEF decreases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. Gains Weaknesses of all Dance Partners' Types.

C: 被添加的额外冰弱点，冰属性抗性降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Additionally implanted Ice Weakness. Decreases Ice RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

E: DMG Boost

E: DMG Mitigation

E: Additional Imaginary Weakness

E: Breach

C: 奇怪的视觉偏差…出现问题的，会是流萤还是梦境本身呢？\n无论如何，原始忆域危险重重，先进入「十二时刻」再说吧。
E: A strange visual glitch... Is the problem with Firefly, or the Dreamscape itself?\nEither way, the Primordial Memory Zone is treacherous. Let's focus on getting into the "Twelve Hours" first.

C: 流萤一直在和某位同伴进行通讯，从她们的交流来看，她们的身份和目的都绝不简单。\n继续追索吧，联想到此前感知到的杂音，她们一定与梦境的异常有关。
E: Firefly has been communicating with a partner. From their conversation, their identities and objectives are clearly not what they seem.\nI need to stay on their trail. Considering the static I sensed before, they must be connected to the anomalies in the dreamscape.

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。完成赛事组安排的数场定级赛，确定你的初始等级吧！
E: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Complete several placement matches arranged by the tournament organizers to determine your initial rank!

C: 确认右侧道路的性质
E: Check the properties of the path on the right

C: 探寻梦主掩埋的罪行
E: Expose the Dreammaster's buried crimes

C: 哪用得着我们提醒，{NICKNAME}和大丽花同行的时间，比任何人都要多。
E: No need for reminders from us. {NICKNAME} has spent more time with The Dahlia than anyone else.

C: 如果一点印象都没留下，我倒是会有些受伤呢。
E: I'd feel a bit hurt if I didn't leave any impression on you at all.

C: 我和{F#她}{M#他}有约定。重逢就在眼前。我没有理由不尽力而为。
E: I made a promise with {M#him.}{F#her.} Our reunion is right before us. I have no reason not to give it my all.

C: 公司？
E: IPC?

C: {NICKNAME}！你没事吧？
E: {NICKNAME}! Are you alright?

C: 是吗？<color=#dbc291ff>你看见了啊，那些身处美梦，却被「死亡」带走的家人。</color>
E: Oh? <color=#dbc291ff>So you saw them... those family members who were in the sweet dream, yet "Death" took them away.</color>

C: 就像现在，如果不是为了从你口中问出真相……
E: Just like now, if it weren't for getting the truth out of you...

C: 就是这里吗，一个入口？
E: Is this it? An entrance?

C: 你有过类似的记忆吗？始终不愿忘却，无数次回想的一段时光。
E: Do you have memories like that? A moment in time you never want to forget, one that you find yourself reliving over and over again.

C: 正是为了避免这一可能，我们眼前，才会存在「备用手段」。
E: That's exactly why we have a "contingency" plan right in front of us.

C: 我宁可不是这样。
E: I wish I wasn't like this.

C: 接下来的事，你多少能回忆起一些吧？
E: You should be able to recall at least some of what comes next?

C: …那么，很可惜，你还尚未知晓，自己多么「清醒」。
E: ...Well, I'm afraid you have yet to realize just how "awake" you truly are.

C: 「我的名字是康士坦丝…很高兴认识你。我们本该在匹诺康尼相遇，共度一段…*刻骨铭心*的时光。」
E: "My name is Constance... A pleasure to meet you. We were supposed to meet in Penacony and spend an... unforgettable time together."

C: 已经在渐渐恢复了。不可否认，流梦礁同样在传扬「同谐」，并且没有受到家族叛徒的影响。
E: I'm gradually getting better. There's no denying that Dreamflux Reef also spreads the Harmony, and it hasn't been affected by The Family's traitor.

C: 对了，打听消息的时候，记得留心分辨，偶尔也会有些谣言。
E: Oh, and when you're gathering intel, remember to sort fact from fiction. Rumors do pop up from time to time.

C: 抱歉，还差一些，我的同伴马上会把你带来这边。
E: Sorry, just a moment. My companion will bring you this way shortly.

C: …罪行？
E: ...Crime?

C: 有新发现吗？
E: Found something new?

C: 那时，我非但留下了黄泉女士的秘密，还就此离开，放了你一条生路。
E: Back then, I not only kept Lady Acheron's secret, but also left you with your life intact.

C: 这话真够绝情啊…想试试看吗？把一朵花丢掉容易，但手上的花香，可不会那么容易散去——我很缠人的。
E: Harsh words... Want to test that theory? It's easy to throw away a flower, but the fragrance lingering on your hands won't fade so easily. I can be quite persistent, you know.

C: …哎呀，本以为在梦境边缘，能瞒过你的眼睛的。看来主场就是主场，哪儿都躲不掉。
E: ...Oh my, I thought I could fool your eyes at the edge of the Dreamscape. But I guess there's no hiding from you on your home turf.

C: 也对，行于「开拓」的无名客，怎会留下教人「逃避命运」的遗产？
E: Indeed, how could a Nameless who walks the path of the Trailblaze leave behind a legacy built on "evading destiny"?

C: 不，我觉得很浪漫。
E: No, I think it's quite romantic.

C: 因为人们害怕从「梦」中醒来？
E: Because people are afraid to wake up from the dream?

C: 不准备说点什么了？这巧合有些荒诞了。
E: Nothing else to say? This is far too much of a coincidence.

C: …梦主实行一切阴谋的地方。
E: ...Where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes?

C: 「梦主」将行的恶毒之举，我同样一无所知，但他一直在等待你的到来。<color=#dbc291ff>那位他亲手杀死的格拉默铁骑，他希望以我的存在，还她一个「公道」，并由你，她的友人来见证。</color>
E: I'm equally unaware of the Dreammaster's malicious plans, but he's been waiting for your arrival. <color=#dbc291ff>That Glamoth Knight he killed with his own hands... through me, he hopes to restore "justice" for her. And you, her friend, are meant to witness it.</color>

C: 以她的「向生而死」，予此世「向死而生」——但您为何如此确信，此事绝无错失？
E: Her life shall "beget death," and that death shall "beget life" unto this world. But why are you so certain that nothing will go wrong?

C: 看来，也只是殊途同归，人的意志，作用当真微乎其微。
E: In the end, all paths lead to the same destination. Human will, it seems, truly has very little impact.

C: 但还好，我们先一步去找到了黄泉女士，她伸出援手，让我们能和自己的{RUBY_B#黑天鹅}那位冤家{RUBY_E#}展开行动，试着将人们逐一唤醒。
E: Fortunately, we sought out Acheron first, and she lent us a helping hand. That allowed us to take action and try waking people one by one.

C: 又一个……
E: Not another one...

C: 这也正是「太一之梦」的可怕之处。在「秩序」支配的乐园里，每个人都能获得各自美满的梦境，幸福快乐地生活下去。
E: This is what makes Ena's Dream so powerful. In this paradise governed by the Order, everyone indulges in their delightful dreams and lives happily ever after.

C: 准确来说，还差一步之遥。公司的星舰恰恰在此时集结，「存护」的力量渗入美梦，让他无法彻底登神，但这只是暂时的。
E: Specifically, he's just one step away from becoming an Aeon. The IPC's starships converged here at an opportune moment, and the power of the Preservation seeped into the sweet dream to prevent him from completely ascending. However, that is only temporary.

C: 该怎么做？
E: How do we do that?

C: 说白了，想要苟且偷生的人总会死去，敢面对死亡的人才能活下来——我喜欢。
E: In other words, those who only want to survive by playing it safe will die, while those who dare to face death head-on will live. I like that.

C: 听了以后，你别急。
E: Now. I'll tell you, but don't panic.

C: 至少今天，你能亲自决定它的去向——越是最后的舞台，登上它时，越要从容自若。
E: But you can decide its destination at least for today. The bigger the stage, the more you need to be composed when stepping onto it.

C: 我们一直都对星核猎手很感兴趣，等了结这一切后，要不要谈谈？
E: We've always been interested in the Stellaron Hunters. How about we have a chat after all this is over?

C: 于律法之中，人类构建社会……
E: Within the foundation of law, humanity establishes civilization...

C: 电车难题听说过没？选一个吧——大家一起玩完，还是让匹诺康尼付出点「小小的牺牲」？
E: Ever heard of the trolley problem? Make your choice. Do you want everyone to go down together, or to have Penacony make a "small sacrifice"?

C: 最后一次……
E: Last ever performance...

C: 梦主或许没有说错，<color=#dbc291ff>所有我们抛在身后的过去，早已决定了我们的未来</color>。
E: Perhaps the Dreammaster was right. <color=#dbc291ff>All the past we've left behind has already determined our future</color>.

C: 但也没有任何人，可以剥夺他们继续寻找的机会。
E: But no one can take away their chance to keep looking for the answer.

C: 「记忆」须臾即灭，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
E: The Remembrance is fleeting and impermanent. By this decree, it shall be ended!

C: 完
E: The End

C: 星期日
E: Sunday

C: 她知道「第三次死亡」会是多么悲惨，只敢远远地看着你，并在即将消散之时，独自躲了起来。
E: She knew how tragic her "third death" would be, so she only dared to watch you from afar and hid on her lonesome when she was about to fade away.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 她背叛过太多人，每一刻都面临着寻仇者的杀机，她曾乐于在死亡中起舞……
E: She's betrayed too many people, facing death threats from avengers at every moment. She used to delight in dancing with death...

C: 可是…流萤呢？似乎哪里都没见到过她……
E: But... where's Firefly? I haven't seen her anywhere...

C: 不要小看我的情报网。
E: Don't underestimate my intel network.

C: 你虽经历过失败，却仍未放弃勇气与希望。老者露出一个豁牙的微笑，你背上饱满的行囊，重新向黑潮丛生的大地发起挑战。
E: Though you faced failure before, you haven't lost your courage and hope. The old man flashes a gap-toothed smile as you shoulder your well-packed bag, ready to challenge the land where black tides surge once more.

C: 「今日的绩效又不达标，你能不能学学其他同事，追赶一下它们的工作进度？」你对小奇美拉质问道。
E: "Your performance is below standard again today. Can't you learn from your coworkers and try to keep up with their task progress?" You interrogate the little chimera.

C: 你似乎领悟了某种道理，而小奇美拉早就趁你沉思的功夫摸鱼去了。
E: While you seem to have grasped some profound truth, the little chimera has long since slacked off during your philosophical moment.

C: 身为一名废墟行者，你奔走在远离文明的断壁残垣之间，尤其偏爱那些深埋地下的古墓。有人说你是觊觎死者的财宝，你不在乎。
E: As a Ruin Strider, you roam among crumbling walls far from civilization, with a particular fondness for ancient tombs buried deep underground. Some say you're just after the dead's treasures, but you couldn't care less.

C: 「律令·其三」的回声
E: Echo of "Divine Law (III)"

C: 我方角色<color=#f29e38ff>消灭敌方目标时</color>可回复【生命计数】，忆灵消灭敌方目标时会为忆师回复【生命计数】。使用我方【生命计数】较少的角色消灭敌方目标，可避免其因【生命计数】归零而陷入无法战斗状态。
E: When ally characters <color=#f29e38ff>defeat enemy targets</color>, they will regain "HP Count." When a memosprite defeats an enemy target, the memomaster will regain "HP Count." Use ally characters with lower "HP Count" to defeat enemy targets to avoid being knocked down due to their "HP Count" reaching 0.

C: 小灰！感到迷茫的时候，可以点这里查看<color=#f29e38ff>攻略</color>哦。
E: Little Gray! When you're feeling lost, you can click here to check the <color=#f29e38ff>guide</color>.

C: Lv.
E: Lv.
